name: World Models
title: Recurrent World Models Facilitate Policy Evolution

summary.en: World Models studies how an agent can learn control through a compact predictive representation of its environment. A variational autoencoder maps image observations to latent codes, while an action-conditioned mixture-density recurrent network models their temporal evolution and supplies a persistent hidden state. A small controller consumes the visual code and recurrent state to choose actions, and can be optimized through imagined rollouts generated entirely by the learned model. Experiments in CarRacing and VizDoom evaluate both direct control using learned representations and transfer of a controller trained inside the simulated latent environment.
summary.zh: World Models 探索智能体如何借助紧凑的环境预测表示学习控制。方法先用变分自编码器把图像观测压缩为潜变量，再以动作条件混合密度循环网络预测潜状态随时间的变化，并通过循环隐状态保存历史信息。轻量控制器读取当前视觉编码与记忆状态后输出动作，还可完全在模型生成的想象轨迹中优化。论文在 CarRacing 与 VizDoom 中验证了基于学习表示的直接控制，以及在潜空间模拟环境中训练后迁移到真实游戏环境的控制能力。

applications: game control

name: SimPLe
title: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning for Atari

summary.en: SimPLe is a model-based reinforcement-learning system designed to learn Atari games from 100,000 real environment interactions. It trains an action-conditioned stochastic video model to predict future frames and rewards from recent observations, then exposes that model as a simulated environment for policy optimization with PPO. Training alternates between collecting real trajectories, updating the predictive model, and improving the policy through short model-generated rollouts that restart from recorded states. Evaluation across the Atari 100K protocol compares model architectures and training choices, showing how learned visual dynamics can support sample-efficient game control.
summary.zh: SimPLe 面向仅允许十万次真实环境交互的 Atari 控制任务。系统根据近期图像与动作训练随机视频预测模型，同时预测后续画面和奖励，再把该模型封装成供 PPO 优化策略使用的模拟环境。训练过程在收集真实轨迹、更新世界模型以及利用短程生成轨迹改进策略之间交替，并从已记录状态重新启动模拟以形成多轮学习。论文按照 Atari 100K 协议评估多种模型结构与训练设置，展示动作条件视觉动态模型如何为样本高效的游戏控制提供交互式预测环境。

applications: game simulation; control

name: EfficientZero
title: Mastering Atari Games with Limited Data

summary.en: EfficientZero develops a sample-efficient visual model-based reinforcement-learning agent around MuZero's latent planning framework. Its recurrent dynamics model predicts future latent states and value prefixes from encoded observations and candidate actions. A self-supervised temporal-consistency objective aligns imagined latent transitions with representations of subsequent observations, while an off-policy correction procedure improves value targets from replayed trajectories. Monte Carlo tree search uses the learned representation, dynamics, reward, value, and policy components to select actions. Experiments under Atari 100K and DMControl 100K evaluate overall control performance and the contribution of each training component.
summary.zh: EfficientZero 在 MuZero 的潜空间规划框架上构建样本高效的视觉模型强化学习智能体。循环动态模型从编码后的观测与候选动作出发，预测未来潜状态和价值前缀；自监督时间一致性目标把想象状态转移与后续真实观测的表示对齐，离策略修正过程则改进回放轨迹中的价值学习目标。蒙特卡洛树搜索综合表示、动态、奖励、价值和策略模块选择动作。论文在 Atari 100K 与 DMControl 100K 上评估控制表现，并通过消融实验验证各组成部分在有限交互条件下的作用。

applications: game control; planning

name: TD-MPC
title: Temporal Difference Learning for Model Predictive Control

summary.en: TD-MPC combines a task-oriented latent dynamics model with model-predictive control for continuous-action problems. An encoder maps state or image observations into latent states; learned transition, reward, value, and policy functions are trained jointly with temporal-difference targets and latent-consistency supervision. At decision time, the agent optimizes short action sequences through the learned dynamics, uses the terminal value estimate to account for outcomes beyond the planning horizon, executes the first action, and replans. Experiments span diverse DeepMind Control Suite and Meta-World tasks, including image observations, sparse rewards, goal conditioning, and multi-task settings.
summary.zh: TD-MPC 将任务导向的潜动态模型与模型预测控制结合，用于连续动作决策。编码器把状态或图像观测映射为潜状态，转移、奖励、价值与策略函数通过时间差分目标和潜状态一致性监督联合训练。执行时，智能体在学习到的动态模型中优化短动作序列，并用终端价值估计表示规划时域之外的回报；每次只执行首个动作，随后根据新观测重新规划。论文在 DeepMind Control Suite 和 Meta-World 的多类任务上验证该接口，覆盖图像输入、稀疏奖励、目标条件以及多任务控制设置。

applications: continuous control; planning

name: JOWA
title: Scaling Offline Model-Based Reinforcement Learning via Jointly-Optimized World-Action Model Pretraining

summary.en: JOWA is an offline model-based reinforcement-learning agent that jointly pretrains world modeling and action selection across multiple Atari games. A shared transformer processes sequences of visual tokens, actions, and rewards, while separate heads learn environment dynamics and distributional action values. Joint optimization lets predictive supervision shape the representation used for temporal-difference learning. During inference, a parallelizable planning procedure evaluates candidate actions with model predictions and value estimates. The system is pretrained on six billion offline tokens, and experiments examine scaling across model sizes, performance on pretrained games, and sample-efficient adaptation to previously unseen games.
summary.zh: JOWA 是一个面向多款 Atari 游戏的离线模型强化学习智能体，通过联合预训练学习世界动态与动作选择。共享 Transformer 处理视觉标记、动作和奖励序列，不同输出头分别建模环境变化与分布式动作价值，使预测监督能够直接塑造时间差分学习所用的表示。推理时，可并行的规划过程结合模型预测和价值估计比较候选动作。系统使用六十亿离线标记进行预训练，实验考察不同模型规模的变化、预训练游戏上的控制表现，以及对未见游戏进行少量数据适配后的决策能力。

applications: game control; planning

name: DINO-WM
title: DINO-WM: World Models on Pre-trained Visual Features Enable Zero-Shot Planning

summary.en: DINO-WM learns task-agnostic visual dynamics directly in the feature space of a pretrained DINOv2 encoder. A causal transformer receives histories of patch-level visual features, proprioception when available, and actions, then predicts the next set of spatial feature tokens without reconstructing pixels. At test time, the model rolls candidate action sequences forward and selects actions whose predicted features approach a goal observation, enabling planning without task-specific policy training. Experiments across six simulated and real control settings evaluate future-state prediction, visual planning, generalization to unseen object or layout configurations, and the contribution of pretrained representations.
summary.zh: DINO-WM 直接在预训练 DINOv2 编码器的特征空间中学习与任务无关的视觉动态。因果 Transformer 接收由图像块特征、可用时的本体状态及动作组成的历史序列，预测下一时刻的空间特征标记，而不需要重建像素。测试时，模型向前展开多组候选动作，并选择其预测特征最接近目标观测的序列，从而无需针对具体任务训练策略即可规划。论文在六组模拟与真实控制环境中评估未来状态预测、视觉规划、对新物体或新布局的泛化，以及预训练视觉表示带来的作用。

applications: zero-shot planning; manipulation

name: UVA
title: Unified Video Action Model

summary.en: UVA unifies robot action prediction and future-video generation in one masked multimodal sequence model. Video and action tokens are fused into a shared temporal latent representation, while separate diffusion decoders produce visual observations or action trajectories. Random masking during training exposes the same network to multiple input-output configurations, allowing it to operate as a policy, forward dynamics model, inverse dynamics model, video predictor, or combined planner. Because action decoding is separated from video decoding, policy inference can produce actions without first generating frames. Experiments cover simulated manipulation, real-world multi-task manipulation, video prediction, disturbance robustness, and inference speed.
summary.zh: UVA 在同一个掩码多模态序列模型中统一机器人动作预测与未来视频生成。视频和动作标记先融合成共享的时间潜表示，再由彼此独立的扩散解码器生成视觉观测或动作轨迹。随机掩码训练让同一网络适配多种输入输出组合，因此可作为策略、前向动态模型、逆向动态模型、视频预测器或联合规划器使用。由于动作解码与视频解码分离，策略推理无需先生成画面即可输出动作。论文在模拟操控、真实多任务操控、视频预测、视觉扰动鲁棒性及推理速度方面进行验证。

applications: robot policy; forward/inverse dynamics

name: Aether
title: Aether: Geometric-Aware Unified World Modeling

summary.en: Aether is a geometry-aware world model that combines dynamic 4D reconstruction, action-conditioned video prediction, and goal-conditioned visual planning. Built by post-training a video diffusion model, it jointly denoises color-video, depth-video, and camera-trajectory latents under task-specific conditioning. An automated annotation pipeline derives camera poses and depth for synthetic videos, providing aligned geometric supervision. For planning, the model predicts a camera path from an initial observation and goal image; for forecasting, it generates future RGB and depth sequences conditioned on observations and actions. Experiments evaluate reconstruction, future generation, trajectory planning, and transfer from synthetic training data to unseen real scenes.
summary.zh: Aether 是一个几何感知世界模型，把动态四维重建、动作条件视频预测与目标条件视觉规划统一起来。它在视频扩散模型上进行后训练，并按任务条件联合去噪彩色视频、深度视频和相机轨迹潜变量。自动标注流程为合成视频估计相机位姿与深度，形成对齐的几何监督。用于规划时，模型根据初始观测和目标图像生成相机路径；用于预测时，则依据观测与动作生成未来的彩色和深度序列。论文评估四维重建、未来生成、轨迹规划，以及从合成训练数据向未见真实场景的迁移。

applications: 4D reconstruction; future prediction; visual planning

name: Dreamer
title: Dream to Control: Learning Behaviors by Latent Imagination

summary.en: Dreamer learns long-horizon control policies from images by optimizing behavior inside a recurrent latent world model. The model encodes observations into stochastic states, carries temporal information through deterministic recurrent states, and predicts images, rewards, and episode continuation. Starting from states inferred from replayed experience, an actor generates imagined action trajectories through the frozen dynamics model. A learned value function supplies multi-step return estimates, and analytic gradients propagate through predicted states and rewards to update the actor. Experiments across visual continuous-control tasks examine data efficiency, planning horizon, representation objectives, and transfer of imagined behavior to environment interaction.
summary.zh: Dreamer 通过在循环潜空间世界模型内部优化行为，从图像中学习长时程控制策略。模型把观测编码为随机状态，以确定性循环状态保存时间信息，并预测图像、奖励和回合继续概率。智能体从经验回放中推断出的状态出发，由演员网络在固定动态模型中生成想象动作轨迹；价值函数提供多步回报估计，解析梯度再沿预测状态和奖励反向更新演员。论文在多项视觉连续控制任务中评估数据效率、想象时域、表示学习目标，以及想象行为迁移到环境交互后的控制效果。

applications: continuous control

name: DreamerV3
title: Mastering diverse control tasks through world models

summary.en: DreamerV3 presents a general world-model reinforcement-learning algorithm designed to use one configuration across diverse domains. A recurrent latent model predicts observations, rewards, and continuation from experience, and supplies imagined trajectories for actor-critic learning. The training system combines normalization, return transformations, balanced objectives, and replay choices so that the same learning interface accommodates different observation types, action spaces, reward scales, and data budgets. Evaluation spans more than 150 tasks across eight domains, including visual and low-dimensional control, Atari, procedural environments, and Minecraft, where the agent learns multi-stage behavior from pixels and sparse rewards without demonstrations or curricula.
summary.zh: DreamerV3 提出一个可用同一套配置适配多种领域的世界模型强化学习算法。循环潜模型从交互经验中预测观测、奖励和回合继续信息，并为演员—评论家学习提供想象轨迹。训练体系结合归一化、回报变换、目标平衡与经验回放设计，使统一接口能够处理不同观测形式、动作空间、奖励尺度和数据预算。论文在八个领域的一百五十余项任务上评估，包括视觉与低维控制、Atari、程序生成环境和 Minecraft；其中智能体仅凭像素和稀疏奖励学习多阶段行为，不使用示范或课程。

applications: general control

name: Genie
title: Genie: Generative Interactive Environments

summary.en: Genie introduces generative interactive environments learned from video without recorded actions. A spatiotemporal video tokenizer compresses frames into discrete tokens, a latent action model infers a compact set of transition controls between observations, and an autoregressive dynamics model predicts the next visual state conditioned on prior tokens and a chosen latent action. This interface turns an image or short visual prompt into an environment that can be controlled frame by frame. The system is trained at scale on internet platformer videos, with additional robotics studies, and is evaluated through generation quality, controllability, scaling behavior, and human judgments of interactive consistency.
summary.zh: Genie 从没有动作标注的视频中学习生成式交互环境。时空视频分词器把画面压缩为离散标记，潜动作模型从相邻观测间推断少量可控转移，随后自回归动态模型依据历史标记和选定潜动作预测下一视觉状态。借助这一接口，单张图像或短视觉提示可变为能够逐帧操作的环境。系统主要在大规模互联网平台游戏视频上训练，并包含机器人数据研究；论文从生成质量、可控性、规模扩展规律以及人类对交互一致性的判断等方面进行评估。

applications: playable world generation

name: GameNGen
title: Diffusion Models Are Real-Time Game Engines

summary.en: GameNGen demonstrates a playable DOOM simulation whose visual transitions are produced entirely by a diffusion model. Training first records trajectories from a reinforcement-learning agent, then fits a next-frame generator conditioned on recent frames and player actions. Conditioning augmentations prepare the model for inputs produced by its own autoregressive rollout, decoder fine-tuning improves game details and text, and a reduced-step sampler supports real-time interaction. During play, each action updates the generated scene without calling the original game engine. Evaluation measures frame fidelity, runtime, stability over multi-minute trajectories, and human ability to distinguish short generated clips from recorded gameplay.
summary.zh: GameNGen 展示了一个完全由扩散模型生成视觉状态转移的可玩 DOOM 模拟器。训练阶段先由强化学习智能体采集游戏轨迹，再学习依据近期画面和玩家动作预测下一帧。条件增强让模型适应自回归过程中自身生成的输入，解码器微调提升游戏细节与文字呈现，少步采样器则支持实时交互。实际游玩时，每个动作都会直接更新生成场景，无需调用原游戏引擎。论文评估画面保真度、运行速度、多分钟轨迹的稳定生成，以及人类区分短生成片段与真实游戏录像的能力。

applications: real-time game simulation

name: iVideoGPT
title: iVideoGPT: Interactive VideoGPTs are Scalable World Models

summary.en: iVideoGPT is a scalable autoregressive world model that represents visual observations, actions, and rewards in a shared token sequence. A conditional video tokenizer compresses future frames relative to context frames, reducing temporal redundancy while preserving stepwise interaction. The transformer is first pretrained on action-free human and robot videos, then adapted with action and reward tokens for downstream dynamics prediction. Its next-token interface can generate future observations, estimate rewards, and support action-sequence planning or model-based reinforcement learning. Experiments cover robotic manipulation video prediction, action planning, and continuous-control learning, alongside studies of tokenization, dataset scale, model scale, and computational efficiency.
summary.zh: iVideoGPT 是一个可扩展的自回归世界模型，把视觉观测、动作和奖励组织在统一标记序列中。条件视频分词器相对于上下文画面压缩未来帧，减少时间冗余的同时保留逐步交互能力。Transformer 先在无动作的人类与机器人视频上预训练，再加入动作和奖励标记适配下游动态预测。统一的下一标记接口既能生成未来观测和估计奖励，也能用于动作序列规划或模型强化学习。论文涵盖机器人操控视频预测、动作规划和连续控制，并分析分词方式、数据规模、模型规模与计算效率。

applications: video prediction; planning; MBRL

name: UniSim
title: Learning Interactive Real-World Simulators

summary.en: UniSim learns an interactive real-world simulator by combining heterogeneous image, navigation, manipulation, and activity datasets. A conditional video diffusion model predicts visual outcomes from recent observations together with either high-level language instructions or low-level motion and robot controls. Dataset identifiers and coordinated conditioning let different sources contribute complementary objects, actions, viewpoints, and dynamics to one simulator. The generated environment is then used to produce training experience for high-level vision-language policies and low-level reinforcement-learning policies. Experiments examine instruction following, object manipulation, stochastic scene changes, navigation, policy learning within generated rollouts, and zero-shot deployment of learned behavior in real robotic settings.
summary.zh: UniSim 通过整合图像、导航、机器人操控和日常活动等异构数据学习交互式真实世界模拟器。条件视频扩散模型根据近期观测以及高层语言指令或低层运动、机器人控制，预测操作后的视觉结果。数据集标识和协同条件设计使不同来源分别提供物体、动作、视角与动态知识，并汇入同一模拟器。生成环境随后为高层视觉语言策略和低层强化学习策略提供训练经验。论文评估指令执行、物体操控、随机场景变化、导航、生成轨迹中的策略学习，以及所得行为在真实机器人设置中的零样本部署。

applications: policy training; simulation

name: Cosmos 3
title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI

summary.en: Cosmos 3 is a family of omnimodal world models for physical AI that unifies understanding, generation, simulation, and action. Modality-specific encoders map language, images, video, audio, and actions into structured token arrangements processed by a shared Mixture-of-Transformers backbone. Autoregressive paths support multimodal reasoning and action prediction, while diffusion paths generate visual and audio content; shared temporal context connects these capabilities. The models can be post-trained for robot policies, forward dynamics, driving, camera control, and synthetic-data production. The report evaluates general reasoning and generation as well as robotics and driving tasks, and describes the released training, serving, and benchmark infrastructure.
summary.zh: Cosmos 3 是面向物理人工智能的全模态世界模型家族，统一理解、生成、模拟与动作。语言、图像、视频、音频和动作先由各自编码器变为结构化标记，再交给共享的混合 Transformer 主干处理。自回归路径负责多模态推理与动作预测，扩散路径负责视觉和音频生成，共享时间上下文将这些能力连接起来。模型可继续训练为机器人策略、前向动态模型、驾驶与相机控制系统或合成数据生成器。技术报告评估通用推理和生成、机器人与驾驶任务，并说明公开的训练、服务和基准基础设施。

applications: Physical AI reasoning; simulation; control

name: Pandora
title: Pandora: Towards General World Model with Natural Language Actions and Video States

summary.en: Pandora is a general-domain world model that represents world states as video and actions as natural-language instructions. An autoregressive language backbone interprets action sequences and produces conditioning representations, while a video diffusion component generates the corresponding future visual states. Its staged recipe first aligns reusable pretrained language and video models, then instruction-tunes them on curated video transitions paired with descriptions of dynamics. Users can issue new actions during generation, allowing the simulated trajectory to change as it unfolds. Experiments span indoor, outdoor, human, robotic, natural, and synthetic scenes, evaluating video quality, action adherence, temporal continuation, and cross-domain interactive control.
summary.zh: Pandora 将世界状态表示为视频，并用自然语言指令表示动作，面向跨领域的世界模拟。自回归语言主干解释动作序列并产生条件表示，视频扩散模块据此生成相应的未来视觉状态。分阶段训练先对齐可复用的预训练语言模型与视频模型，再利用带有动态描述的视频转移数据进行指令微调。生成过程中，用户可以随时输入新动作，使模拟轨迹随交互继续变化。论文覆盖室内外、人类、机器人、自然与合成场景，并从视频质量、动作遵循、时间延续和跨领域控制等方面进行评估。

applications: general world simulation

name: PAN
title: PAN: A World Model for General, Interactable, and Long-Horizon World Simulation

summary.en: PAN implements Generative Latent Prediction for general, interactive, long-horizon world simulation. A multimodal tokenizer maps visual observations and natural-language actions into a shared sequence, and an autoregressive latent backbone predicts the structured evolution of world states over time. A video diffusion decoder renders those predicted states into high-fidelity visual segments, while a sliding-window reconstruction process carries the simulation across extended horizons. Users can insert actions between segments to redirect the generated future. Evaluation covers action-conditioned simulation, long-horizon forecasting, visual quality, action fidelity, and use of simulated outcomes by an external multimodal agent for counterfactual reasoning and planning.
summary.zh: PAN 以生成式潜预测框架实现通用、可交互的长时程世界模拟。多模态分词器把视觉观测与自然语言动作映射到统一序列，自回归潜空间主干持续预测世界状态的结构化演化；视频扩散解码器再把这些预测状态渲染为高质量视觉片段，滑动窗口重建过程则把模拟延伸到更长时间。用户可以在不同片段之间插入动作，实时改变后续生成。论文评估动作条件模拟、长时程预测、视觉质量与动作一致性，并检验外部多模态智能体利用模拟结果进行反事实推理和规划的能力。

applications: open-domain world simulation

name: StableWorld
title: StableWorld: Towards Stable and Consistent Long Interactive Video Generation

summary.en: StableWorld is a memory-selection method for maintaining visual consistency during long interactive video generation. The paper traces scene collapse to small frame-to-frame prediction deviations that accumulate when generated frames are repeatedly reused as context. StableWorld scores historical frames for degradation, removes unreliable ones from the conditioning buffer, and preserves cleaner, geometrically consistent observations as anchors for later generation. The mechanism can be attached to existing action- or camera-controlled world models without changing their core generator. Experiments integrate it with Matrix-Game 2.0, Open-Oasis, and Hunyuan-GameCraft, measuring long-horizon visual quality, motion consistency, and behavior under different memory-selection choices.
summary.zh: StableWorld 是一种用于长时交互视频生成的记忆选择机制。论文把场景逐渐失真追溯到相邻帧之间的细小预测偏差：当生成画面不断被重新用作上下文时，这些偏差会持续累积。该方法评估历史帧的退化程度，从条件缓存中移除不可靠画面，并保留更清晰、几何上更一致的观测作为后续生成锚点。它可以接入已有的动作或相机控制世界模型，而不修改核心生成器。实验将其应用于 Matrix-Game 2.0、Open-Oasis 和 Hunyuan-GameCraft，评估长时视觉质量、运动一致性与不同记忆选择策略。

applications: long interactive worlds

name: ActWorld
title: ActWorld: From Explorable to Interactive World Model via Action-Aware Memory

summary.en: ActWorld extends explorable video world models with object interactions that can occur during a continuous rollout. It generates video chunks from prior observations, keyboard or mouse controls, camera movement, and localized semantic captions. A hierarchical action-aware memory identifies frames that establish object identity or record important events, routes them around the ordinary recency buffer, and retrieves them when later actions depend on those states. Plücker-ray conditioning separates viewpoint motion from symbolic interaction controls, while distillation supports real-time generation. Experiments evaluate navigation, object manipulation, event persistence, long-horizon memory, action alignment, and interactive throughput in generated game-like environments.
summary.zh: ActWorld 让原本以场景探索为主的视频世界模型能够在连续生成过程中执行物体交互。模型根据历史观测、键盘或鼠标控制、相机运动与局部语义描述生成后续视频片段。分层动作感知记忆会识别建立物体身份或记录关键事件的画面，使其绕过普通的近期缓存，并在后续动作依赖这些状态时重新取回。Plücker 射线条件把视角运动与符号交互控制分离，蒸馏过程则支持实时生成。论文评估导航、物体操作、事件持续性、长时记忆、动作对齐以及生成游戏环境中的交互速度。

applications: interactive exploration

name: WorldPlay
title: WorldPlay: Towards Long-Term Geometric Consistency for Real-Time Interactive World Modeling

summary.en: WorldPlay is a streaming world model designed for real-time interaction and long-term geometric consistency. A dual action representation combines discrete keyboard or mouse inputs with continuous camera trajectories. Its reconstituted context memory retrieves earlier observations that match the current field of view and action history, allowing revisited locations to be conditioned on relevant prior appearance instead of only recent frames. Context-forcing distillation trains a few-step generator on both teacher and self-generated histories, supporting fast autoregressive rollout. Experiments use real, game, and generated scenes to evaluate visual fidelity, control precision, return-path consistency, memory retrieval, and 720p interactive generation at real-time frame rates.
summary.zh: WorldPlay 是一个兼顾实时交互与长期几何一致性的流式世界模型。双重动作表示把离散键盘或鼠标输入与连续相机轨迹结合起来。重构上下文记忆会依据当前视野和动作历史取回相关的早期观测，使用户重访地点时能够参考先前外观，而不是只依赖最近生成的画面。上下文强制蒸馏同时利用教师历史和模型自身生成的历史训练少步生成器，以支持快速自回归展开。论文在真实、游戏和生成场景中评估视觉保真度、控制精度、返回路径一致性、记忆检索，以及实时帧率下的 720p 交互生成。

applications: real-time interactive worlds

name: Copilot4D
title: Copilot4D: Learning Unsupervised World Models for Autonomous Driving via Discrete Diffusion

summary.en: Copilot4D learns an unsupervised world model for autonomous driving directly from sequential LiDAR observations. A vector-quantized point-cloud tokenizer converts each 3D scan into a spatial grid of discrete tokens and reconstructs geometric observations from them. A masked discrete-diffusion transformer then predicts future token grids in parallel, conditioned on previous scans and ego-motion information, before decoding them into future point clouds. This separates compact geometric representation learning from multimodal future prediction and supports multiple plausible outcomes. Experiments on nuScenes, KITTI Odometry, and Argoverse 2 evaluate tokenizer reconstruction and point-cloud forecasting over several horizons using geometric distance and occupancy-oriented measures.
summary.zh: Copilot4D 直接从连续激光雷达观测中学习面向自动驾驶的无监督世界模型。向量量化点云分词器把每个三维扫描转换为空间网格上的离散标记，并能从这些标记重建几何观测；随后，掩码离散扩散 Transformer 根据历史扫描与自车运动信息并行预测未来标记网格，再解码为后续点云。该设计把紧凑几何表示学习与多样化未来预测分开，并可生成多种可能结果。论文在 nuScenes、KITTI Odometry 和 Argoverse 2 上评估重建质量及多个时间跨度的点云预测。

applications: LiDAR forecasting

name: BEVWorld
title: BEVWorld: A Multimodal World Simulator for Autonomous Driving via Scene-Level BEV Latents

summary.en: BEVWorld builds a multimodal autonomous-driving world model around a unified bird's-eye-view latent state. Camera images and LiDAR point clouds are fused into compact BEV tokens, and a rendering decoder reconstructs surround-view imagery and point clouds from the shared representation. A spatial-temporal diffusion transformer predicts multiple future BEV states in one pass, conditioned on high-level driving actions, after which the same decoder produces future sensor observations. The representation can also initialize downstream perception and motion-prediction models. Experiments on nuScenes and CARLA evaluate multimodal reconstruction, action-conditioned scene forecasting, cross-sensor consistency, object detection, and vehicle trajectory prediction.
summary.zh: BEVWorld 围绕统一的鸟瞰潜状态构建多模态自动驾驶世界模型。多视角相机图像与激光雷达点云先融合为紧凑的 BEV 标记，渲染解码器再从共享表示重建环视图像和点云。时空扩散 Transformer 根据高层驾驶动作一次预测多帧未来 BEV 状态，之后由同一解码器生成相应的未来传感器观测。学习到的表示还可用于初始化下游感知与运动预测模型。论文在 nuScenes 和 CARLA 上评估多模态重建、动作条件场景预测、跨传感器一致性、三维检测与车辆轨迹预测。

applications: driving representation; forecasting

name: OmniNWM
title: OmniNWM: Omniscient Driving Navigation World Models

summary.en: OmniNWM formulates driving world modeling as a closed loop over state, action, and reward. Its panoramic diffusion transformer jointly predicts six-view RGB, semantic, and metric-depth videos, then geometrically lifts these aligned outputs into 3D semantic occupancy. Ego trajectories are conditioned through normalized panoramic Plücker ray maps, which express motion in a canonical camera-rig-independent coordinate system; structured panoramic forcing supports extended autoregressive rollouts. The generated occupancy volume yields dense collision, drivable-area, and traffic-efficiency rewards. An integrated OmniNWM-VLA agent fuses RGB, depth, and semantic context and returns 12 Hz trajectories with heading, closing the simulation loop. Experiments on nuScenes, plus zero-shot nuPlan and in-house camera rigs, evaluate generation, control, occupancy, long-horizon stability, and planner ranking.
summary.zh: OmniNWM 把驾驶世界模型写成状态—动作—奖励闭环。全景扩散 Transformer 联合生成六视角 RGB、语义和度量深度视频，再将像素对齐的多模态结果几何提升为三维语义占据。自车轨迹通过归一化全景 Plücker 射线图编码到与相机布置无关的规范坐标，结构化全景强制用于维持长时自回归生成。生成占据直接计算碰撞、可行驶区域和交通效率奖励；OmniNWM-VLA 融合 RGB、深度与语义上下文，以 12 Hz 输出含航向角的轨迹，从而闭合仿真。实验在 nuScenes 上评估生成、控制、深度、占据和规划，并测试向 nuPlan 及不同相机配置的零样本迁移。

applications: navigation policy evaluation

name: MuJoCo
title: MuJoCo: A Physics Engine for Model-Based Control

summary.en: MuJoCo is a physics engine designed for model-based control of articulated systems with contact. Models specify bodies, joints, geometry, actuators, sensors, and constraints, which the compiler converts into a compact representation in generalized coordinates. The simulation pipeline advances a deterministic state through forward dynamics, collision detection, convex contact optimization, constraint solving, and numerical integration. Its API exposes state, forces, derivatives, inverse dynamics, and configurable stages, allowing controllers and optimizers to query or modify the physical transition process directly. The paper and technical documentation demonstrate contact-rich robotic simulation, trajectory optimization, state estimation, system identification, and interactive control workflows.
summary.zh: MuJoCo 是面向含接触铰接系统模型控制的物理引擎。用户通过模型描述物体、关节、几何体、执行器、传感器与约束，编译器再把它们转换为广义坐标下的紧凑表示。仿真管线依次执行前向动力学、碰撞检测、凸接触优化、约束求解和数值积分，从而推进确定性的物理状态。接口公开状态、力、导数、逆动力学及可配置计算阶段，使控制器与优化器能够直接查询或干预状态转移。论文与官方技术文档展示了接触丰富的机器人仿真、轨迹优化、状态估计、系统辨识和交互控制用法。

applications: model-based control

name: Isaac Gym
title: Isaac Gym: High Performance GPU-Based Physics Simulation for Robot Learning

summary.en: Isaac Gym is a GPU-based physics-simulation platform that keeps environment state, contact dynamics, observations, actions, rewards, and policy learning on the same device. Thousands of independent robotic environments are advanced in parallel through PhysX, while a tensor API exposes rigid-body, joint, sensor, and control data directly to PyTorch without CPU copies. This architecture lets reinforcement-learning algorithms collect experience and update policies through a fully GPU-resident loop. The paper benchmarks simulation and training throughput across locomotion and manipulation tasks, including humanoids, dexterous hands, quadrupeds, and robot arms, and demonstrates learned policies in contact-rich simulation and selected sim-to-real settings.
summary.zh: Isaac Gym 是一个基于 GPU 的物理仿真平台，把环境状态、接触动力学、观测、动作、奖励与策略学习保留在同一设备上。PhysX 可并行推进数千个独立机器人环境，张量接口则把刚体、关节、传感器和控制数据直接提供给 PyTorch，无需在 CPU 与 GPU 之间复制。由此，强化学习算法能够在完全驻留 GPU 的闭环中采集经验并更新策略。论文比较多类运动和操控任务的仿真与训练吞吐，覆盖人形、灵巧手、四足和机械臂，并展示接触丰富环境中的策略学习及部分仿真到真实迁移。

applications: robot policy learning

name: Dojo
title: Dojo: A Differentiable Physics Engine for Robotics

summary.en: Dojo is a differentiable physics engine for robotic systems with hard contact and friction. It formulates time-stepped dynamics as a nonlinear complementarity problem with second-order cone constraints and solves it using a custom primal-dual interior-point method. The same solver factorization supports implicit differentiation of future states with respect to initial states, actions, and physical parameters. A tunable central-path setting lets applications obtain smooth gradients for optimization while retaining precise contact rollouts for evaluation. The paper benchmarks simulation stability and physical behavior across robot models, then uses the gradients for contact-rich trajectory optimization, policy optimization, and identification of masses, friction, and other system properties.
summary.zh: Dojo 是一个面向硬接触与摩擦机器人系统的可微物理引擎。它把时间步进动力学写成带二阶锥约束的非线性互补问题，并用定制的原始—对偶内点法求解；同一求解器分解还能通过隐函数微分计算未来状态相对于初始状态、动作和物理参数的梯度。可调中心路径参数使应用既能获得适合优化的平滑梯度，也能执行精确接触模拟。论文比较多类机器人模型的稳定性与物理行为，并将梯度用于接触丰富的轨迹优化、策略优化以及质量、摩擦等系统参数辨识。

applications: planning; system identification

name: Causal World Models
title: Causal World Models by Unsupervised Deconfounding of Physical Dynamics

summary.en: Causal World Models learn physical dynamics that can answer counterfactual interventions from observational video. The method represents scenes with object-oriented latent states and uses a graph neural transition model, while an auxiliary estimator infers unobserved static factors such as mass, friction, or gravity from prior motion. These inferred confounders condition imagined rollouts after a user changes an observed state, providing predictions for outcomes not present in the training trajectories. A counterfactual risk objective further trains the transition model under intervention-oriented reweighting. Experiments on CoPhy and PHYRE evaluate counterfactual physical prediction, use of the learned dream environment for reinforcement learning, and sample efficiency under changed dynamics.
summary.zh: Causal World Models 从观测视频中学习能够回答反事实干预的物理动态。方法以面向物体的潜状态表示场景，并用图神经网络建模状态转移；辅助估计器则从历史运动中推断质量、摩擦或重力等不可直接观测的静态因素。当用户改变某个观测状态后，这些潜混杂因素会作为条件生成训练轨迹中未出现过的想象未来。反事实风险目标进一步按干预相关权重训练动态模型。论文在 CoPhy 和 PHYRE 上评估反事实物理预测、学习到的想象环境在强化学习中的使用，以及环境动态改变后的样本效率。

applications: counterfactual physical reasoning

name: Variational Causal Dynamics
title: Variational Causal Dynamics: Discovering Modular World Models from Interventions

summary.en: Variational Causal Dynamics learns a modular latent world model from high-dimensional observations collected across environments with interventions. A variational encoder maps observations to factorized latent variables, and a learned causal graph selects the previous-state and action parents for each next-state variable. Each conditional transition is treated as an independent mechanism; when an environment changes, only mechanisms associated with detected intervention targets receive environment-specific parameters, while the remaining dynamics are shared. The model jointly discovers representation, graph structure, and transitions. Experiments on synthetic dynamical systems and CausalWorld examine causal-structure recovery, sparse mechanism changes, future-state prediction, and data-efficient adaptation to previously unseen intervention settings.
summary.zh: Variational Causal Dynamics 从多个含干预环境的高维观测中学习模块化潜空间世界模型。变分编码器把观测映射为因子化潜变量，学习到的因果图为每个下一状态变量选择历史状态与动作父节点。每个条件转移被视为独立机制；环境发生变化时，只有与识别出的干预目标相关的机制使用环境专属参数，其余动态继续共享。模型联合发现表示、图结构和状态转移。论文在合成动态系统与 CausalWorld 中评估因果结构恢复、稀疏机制变化、未来状态预测，以及面对未见干预设置时的数据高效适配。

applications: mechanism adaptation

name: FOCUS
title: Offline Reinforcement Learning with Causal Structured World Models

summary.en: FOCUS integrates causal-structure discovery into offline model-based reinforcement learning. From a fixed transition dataset, conditional-independence tests estimate dependencies among state variables, actions, next states, and rewards. The resulting causal mask restricts the inputs used by each component of a neural dynamics model, so imagined transitions and policy evaluation follow learned structural relationships rather than an unconstrained predictor. The model is trained inside an offline RL pipeline that optimizes policies using recorded experience and model-generated outcomes. Experiments on a controlled car-driving domain and MuJoCo tasks evaluate graph recovery, transition prediction, policy return, robustness to dataset variation, and generalization when spurious correlations change across environments.
summary.zh: FOCUS 把因果结构发现融入离线模型强化学习。系统从固定转移数据中利用条件独立检验估计状态变量、动作、下一状态和奖励之间的依赖关系，所得因果掩码限制神经动态模型各输出分量可读取的输入，使想象转移与策略评估遵循学习到的结构关系，而不是无约束预测器。该模型被置于离线强化学习流程中，仅借助记录经验和模型生成结果优化策略。论文在可控汽车驾驶域与 MuJoCo 任务上评估图结构恢复、转移预测、策略回报、对数据变化的稳定性，以及环境中伪相关发生改变时的泛化。

applications: offline control

name: C-JEPA
title: Causal-JEPA: Learning World Models through Object-Level Latent Masking

summary.en: C-JEPA is an object-centric joint-embedding world model that learns interaction-aware dynamics without reconstructing pixels. A frozen visual encoder groups frames into object slots, and a predictor receives temporal slot identities, visible history, optional action variables, and selectively masked objects. Training jointly recovers masked historical slots and predicts future object representations. Treating an omitted object as a counterfactual-like query encourages the predictor to model which other objects and events its presence can influence. Experiments evaluate physical and counterfactual visual reasoning as well as model-predictive control, where compact object tokens support action-sequence planning over learned latent transitions in interactive environments.
summary.zh: C-JEPA 是一个面向物体的联合嵌入世界模型，在不重建像素的情况下学习交互感知动态。冻结视觉编码器把视频帧组织成物体槽，预测器接收带时间与身份信息的槽序列、可见历史、可选动作变量以及被选择性遮蔽的物体。训练同时恢复历史遮蔽槽并预测未来物体表示。把缺失物体视为类似反事实的查询，可促使模型学习该物体会影响哪些其他对象和事件。论文评估物理与反事实视觉推理，并在模型预测控制中利用紧凑物体标记对学习到的潜状态转移进行动作序列规划。

applications: counterfactual planning

name: DayDreamer
title: DayDreamer: World Models for Physical Robot Learning

summary.en: DayDreamer applies latent-imagination reinforcement learning directly to physical robots without first training in a simulator. A recurrent world model learns from replayed sequences of images, proprioception, actions, rewards, and episode continuation, while an actor-critic policy improves from trajectories generated inside that model. Separate learner and actor processes let neural-network updates continue while the robot moves and keep action computation responsive. The same algorithmic configuration is evaluated on quadruped locomotion, visual pick-and-place with two robot arms, and wheeled navigation, spanning continuous and discrete actions, dense and sparse rewards, and multiple sensor combinations. Experiments measure real-world learning time and task performance from scratch.
summary.zh: DayDreamer 将潜空间想象强化学习直接用于实体机器人，不需要先在模拟器中训练。循环世界模型从图像、本体感知、动作、奖励和回合继续信息的回放序列中学习，演员—评论家策略则在模型内部生成的轨迹上改进行为。独立的学习与执行进程让神经网络更新能够在机器人运动时持续进行，并保持低延迟动作计算。同一套算法配置用于四足行走、两种机械臂视觉抓取放置和轮式导航，覆盖连续与离散动作、稠密与稀疏奖励及多种传感组合；实验记录从零开始的真实训练时间与任务表现。

applications: robot learning

name: RoboDreamer
title: RoboDreamer: Learning Compositional World Models for Robot Imagination

summary.en: RoboDreamer learns a compositional video world model for language-directed robot manipulation. A parser decomposes an instruction into reusable object, action, and spatial-relation components, which condition separate factors of the video generator. The factors are recombined at inference so that the model can synthesize visual plans for object-action-relation combinations not paired during training. Images or sketches can additionally specify objects and desired spatial arrangements. A robot controller follows the generated video by matching predicted intermediate states to observed scenes. Experiments test zero-shot combinations of manipulation instructions, multimodal goal specification, spatial-relation accuracy, generated-video quality, and execution of the resulting plans on robotic manipulation tasks.
summary.zh: RoboDreamer 为语言指令驱动的机器人操控学习组合式视频世界模型。解析器把指令分解为可复用的物体、动作和空间关系成分，并让这些成分分别控制视频生成器的不同因子；推理时重新组合各因子，可为训练中未成对出现的物体—动作—关系组合生成视觉计划。图像或草图还可以补充指定物体及目标空间布局。机器人控制器通过把预测的中间状态与当前场景匹配来跟随生成视频。论文评估操控指令的零样本组合、多模态目标描述、空间关系准确性、生成视频质量，以及真实机器人执行所得计划的效果。

applications: robot manipulation

name: Unified World Models
title: Unified World Models: Coupling Video and Action Diffusion for Pretraining on Large Robotic Datasets

summary.en: Unified World Models combine video prediction and robot action generation in one multimodal diffusion transformer. Visual observations and action trajectories receive independent diffusion timesteps, so either modality can be observed, noised, or generated while the shared network models their relationship. By selecting those timesteps, the same model operates as a robot policy, forward dynamics model, inverse dynamics model, video generator, or joint video-action predictor. This also permits pretraining with action-free videos alongside labeled robot demonstrations. Experiments in simulation and on real manipulators evaluate policy learning, forward and inverse prediction, out-of-distribution scene changes, mixed-data pretraining, and the contribution of jointly modeling actions and future observations.
summary.zh: Unified World Models 在一个多模态扩散 Transformer 中统一视频预测与机器人动作生成。视觉观测和动作轨迹使用彼此独立的扩散时间步，因此任一模态都可以作为已知条件、加噪输入或生成目标，而共享网络负责学习二者关系。通过选择不同时间步，同一模型可充当机器人策略、前向动态模型、逆向动态模型、视频生成器或联合视频—动作预测器，也能同时利用无动作视频与带标注机器人示范预训练。论文在模拟和真实机械臂上评估策略学习、正逆向预测、场景分布变化、混合数据预训练以及联合建模未来观测与动作的作用。

applications: manipulation; policy learning

name: WorldVLA
title: WorldVLA: Towards Autoregressive Action World Model

summary.en: WorldVLA integrates a vision-language-action policy and a visual world model in one autoregressive transformer. Images and robot actions are discretized into a shared sequence format, allowing the model to predict future visual tokens from actions and to generate actions from language-conditioned observations. Joint training lets future-image prediction supply dynamics supervision for the policy, while action prediction provides behavioral context for visual forecasting. A specialized attention mask controls how earlier action tokens influence later actions during chunk generation. Experiments on CALVIN and additional manipulation settings compare action execution and future-image generation, examine mutual transfer between the two objectives, and evaluate multi-step instruction following and robot control.
summary.zh: WorldVLA 在一个自回归 Transformer 中整合视觉语言动作策略与视觉世界模型。图像和机器人动作被离散化为统一序列，使模型既能根据动作预测未来视觉标记，也能从语言条件观测生成动作。联合训练让未来图像预测为策略提供动态监督，同时让动作预测为视觉变化提供行为上下文；专门的注意力掩码控制动作块生成时早期动作对后续动作的影响。论文在 CALVIN 及其他操控设置中比较动作执行和未来图像生成，分析两种目标之间的相互迁移，并评估多步指令遵循与机器人控制。

applications: robot manipulation

name: GWM
title: GWM: Towards Scalable Gaussian World Models for Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: GWM represents robotic manipulation dynamics as future 3D Gaussian scenes rather than only image frames. A geometry-aware variational encoder lifts multi-view or RGB observations into compact Gaussian-splatting states, and an action-conditioned diffusion transformer predicts how those primitives propagate under a robot trajectory. Predicted states can be rendered from multiple viewpoints, providing spatially consistent visual rollouts. The learned model is used both to pretrain visual representations for imitation learning and as a neural simulator that supplies imagined experience for model-based reinforcement learning. Experiments in simulated and real manipulation environments evaluate future-scene reconstruction, novel-view rendering, policy learning, online model updates, and transfer across visual conditions.
summary.zh: GWM 不只预测图像帧，而是把机器人操控动态表示为未来的三维高斯场景。几何感知变分编码器把多视角或彩色观测提升为紧凑的高斯泼溅状态，动作条件扩散 Transformer 再预测这些图元在机器人轨迹作用下如何传播。预测状态可从不同视角渲染，形成空间一致的视觉展开。学习到的模型既用于为模仿学习预训练视觉表示，也可作为神经模拟器向模型强化学习提供想象经验。论文在模拟与真实操控环境中评估未来场景重建、新视角渲染、策略学习、在线模型更新以及跨视觉条件迁移。

applications: robot manipulation; simulation

name: I-JEPA
title: Self-Supervised Learning from Images with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture

summary.en: I-JEPA learns image representations by predicting abstract features of unseen regions rather than reconstructing their pixels. A context Vision Transformer processes only visible patches, while a narrower predictor uses positional tokens to estimate representations of several masked target blocks. Target features come from a second encoder whose weights track the context encoder through an exponential moving average, providing stable self-supervision without labels or handcrafted view augmentations. Large target blocks encourage semantic, spatially informed predictions from surrounding context. Experiments on ImageNet and downstream vision tasks evaluate linear and fine-tuned classification, low-shot learning, object counting, depth prediction, training efficiency, and the information captured by predicted representations.
summary.zh: I-JEPA 通过预测不可见区域的抽象特征学习图像表示，而不是重建这些区域的像素。上下文视觉 Transformer 只处理可见图像块，较小的预测器利用位置标记估计多个被遮蔽目标块的表示；目标特征来自一个以指数移动平均方式跟随上下文编码器的第二编码器，从而无需标签或人工设计的视图增强即可获得稳定监督。较大的目标区域促使模型依据周围上下文学习语义与空间信息。论文在 ImageNet 和下游视觉任务中评估线性与微调分类、少样本学习、物体计数、深度预测、训练效率及预测表示包含的信息。

applications: visual representation learning

name: V-JEPA
title: Revisiting Feature Prediction for Learning Visual Representations from Video

summary.en: V-JEPA extends joint-embedding prediction from images to video, learning visual dynamics through masked feature prediction. A video transformer encodes the visible spatiotemporal patches of a clip, and a predictor estimates target-encoder representations for masked regions at specified space-time locations. Short-range and long-range masks expose the model to local motion and extended temporal context, while multi-mask training reuses target computations efficiently. The target encoder is updated by an exponential moving average and no pixel decoder is used. Experiments evaluate frozen representations on action recognition, motion-sensitive classification, spatiotemporal action detection, image classification, and label-efficient adaptation, with analyses of masking strategy, architecture, and learned motion information.
summary.zh: V-JEPA 把联合嵌入预测从图像扩展到视频，通过被遮蔽特征预测学习视觉动态。视频 Transformer 编码片段中可见的时空图像块，预测器则在指定时空位置估计目标编码器对遮蔽区域产生的表示。短程与长程掩码分别提供局部运动和更长时间上下文，多掩码训练还能复用目标计算；目标编码器以指数移动平均更新，整个过程不使用像素解码器。论文利用冻结表示评估动作识别、运动敏感分类、时空动作检测、图像分类和少标签适配，并分析掩码策略、模型结构与表示中包含的运动信息。

applications: video representation learning

name: V-JEPA 2
title: V-JEPA 2: Self-Supervised Video Models Enable Understanding, Prediction and Planning

summary.en: V-JEPA 2 learns general video representations and adapts them into an action-conditioned world model for robotic planning. Self-supervised pretraining predicts masked video features from over one million hours of video and additional images, after which probes and language alignment support motion understanding, anticipation, and video question answering. For control, V-JEPA 2-AC post-trains a latent predictor on robot trajectories to forecast future representations from current observations, end-effector state, and candidate actions. Model-predictive path-integral control scores imagined action sequences by their distance to a goal-image representation. Experiments cover video understanding and prediction benchmarks plus zero-shot pick, reach, and manipulation tasks on Franka robot arms.
summary.zh: V-JEPA 2 学习通用视频表示，并将其适配为用于机器人规划的动作条件世界模型。自监督预训练从一百多万小时视频及额外图像中预测被遮蔽的视频特征，之后通过探针与语言对齐支持运动理解、动作预判和视频问答。用于控制时，V-JEPA 2-AC 在机器人轨迹上继续训练潜预测器，根据当前观测、末端执行器状态和候选动作预测未来表示；模型预测路径积分控制再按想象动作序列与目标图像表示之间的距离进行评分。论文评估多项视频理解和预测基准，并在 Franka 机械臂上执行零样本抓取、到达与操控任务。

applications: robot planning; manipulation

name: OccWorld
title: OccWorld: Learning a 3D Occupancy World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: OccWorld learns autonomous-driving dynamics in a semantic 3D occupancy space. An occupancy tokenizer compresses voxelized scenes into discrete high-level tokens and reconstructs their semantic geometry. A spatial-temporal transformer models relationships within each scene and across time, then autoregressively predicts both future occupancy tokens and ego-motion states. Decoded rollouts provide interpretable forecasts of free space, static structure, traffic participants, and the vehicle's own trajectory without requiring separate object tracks. Experiments on nuScenes-based occupancy benchmarks evaluate token reconstruction, short- and multi-step scene forecasting, semantic occupancy quality, ego-motion prediction, and generalization across input modalities, together with ablations of temporal and spatial model components.
summary.zh: OccWorld 在语义三维占据空间中学习自动驾驶动态。占据分词器把体素化场景压缩为离散高层标记，并能重建其语义几何；时空 Transformer 同时建模单帧内部与跨时间关系，随后自回归预测未来占据标记和自车运动状态。解码后的展开能够直接表示可通行空间、静态结构、交通参与者与车辆自身轨迹，无需独立物体跟踪。论文在基于 nuScenes 的占据基准上评估标记重建、单步与多步场景预测、语义占据质量、自车运动预测和跨输入模态泛化，并通过消融分析空间与时间模块。

applications: occupancy forecasting; driving planning

name: 3D-VLA
title: 3D-VLA: A 3D Vision-Language-Action Generative World Model

summary.en: 3D-VLA is a generative vision-language-action world model for embodied reasoning and robot manipulation in three-dimensional scenes. Its data pipeline lifts RGB-D observations into point clouds, derives object boxes and language annotations, and pairs instructions with 3D actions and multimodal goals. A 3D language-model backbone processes scene, text, and interaction tokens, while aligned image-to-image and point-to-point diffusion models generate goal images, depth, or point clouds. The same interface produces robot actions and answers spatial or counterfactual questions. Experiments evaluate 3D localization, embodied question answering, task captioning, what-if reasoning, multimodal goal generation, language-conditioned action prediction, and manipulation planning across large embodied datasets.
summary.zh: 3D-VLA 是一个面向三维场景具身推理与机器人操控的生成式视觉语言动作世界模型。数据流程把 RGB-D 观测提升为点云，提取物体框与语言标注，并将指令同三维动作和多模态目标配对。三维语言模型主干处理场景、文本和交互标记，对齐的图像到图像及点云到点云扩散模型则生成目标图像、深度或点云；同一接口还能输出机器人动作并回答空间或反事实问题。论文在大规模具身数据上评估三维定位、具身问答、任务描述、假设推理、多模态目标生成、语言条件动作预测与操控规划。

applications: robot reasoning; manipulation

name: VLA-JEPA
title: VLA-JEPA: Enhancing Vision-Language-Action Model with Latent World Model

summary.en: VLA-JEPA pretrains a vision-language-action policy by learning action-relevant state transitions from both unlabeled human video and labeled robot trajectories. A joint-embedding predictor receives past visual representations and a latent action, then predicts a future latent state under masking designed to prevent target information from leaking into the action code. Language-aware visual priors help align latent actions with task semantics. Robot demonstrations additionally train a flow-matching head that generates continuous end-effector trajectories, and downstream fine-tuning combines transition prediction with action supervision. Experiments on LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, SimplerEnv, and a Franka robot evaluate task execution, distribution-shift generalization, data scaling, and the effect of human-video pretraining.
summary.zh: VLA-JEPA 通过从无标注人类视频和带动作机器人轨迹中学习与控制相关的状态转移，预训练视觉语言动作策略。联合嵌入预测器接收历史视觉表示与潜动作，并在防止目标信息泄漏到动作编码的掩码设计下预测未来潜状态；带语言信息的视觉先验进一步让潜动作与任务语义对齐。机器人示范还用于训练生成连续末端执行器轨迹的流匹配动作头，下游微调则联合状态转移预测与动作监督。论文在 LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、SimplerEnv 和 Franka 机器人上评估任务执行、分布变化泛化、数据扩展及人类视频预训练的作用。

applications: robot manipulation

name: GAIA-1
title: GAIA-1: A Generative World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: GAIA-1 is a generative world model that predicts realistic driving futures from video, text, and vehicle actions. Separate encoders convert camera frames, natural-language scene descriptions, and control signals into token sequences. An autoregressive transformer learns their joint temporal distribution and predicts future visual tokens, which a diffusion decoder maps back to high-resolution video. The same model can continue a recorded scene, follow a textual event description, respond to steering or speed actions, or combine these conditions to construct a scenario. Trained on large-scale real driving data, the report studies model and data scaling and evaluates scene dynamics, geometric consistency, action controllability, textual conditioning, and generated long-tail situations.
summary.zh: GAIA-1 是一个根据视频、文本和车辆动作预测真实驾驶未来的生成式世界模型。不同编码器把相机画面、自然语言场景描述与控制信号转换为标记序列，自回归 Transformer 学习它们的联合时间分布并预测未来视觉标记，扩散解码器再还原为高分辨率视频。同一模型既能延续已记录场景，也能遵循文字事件描述、响应转向或速度动作，或组合多种条件构造驾驶情景。技术报告基于大规模真实驾驶数据研究模型与数据扩展，并评估场景动态、几何一致性、动作可控性、文本条件以及长尾情景生成。

applications: driving simulation; scenario generation

name: DriveDreamer
title: DriveDreamer: Towards Real-world-driven World Models for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: DriveDreamer learns a controllable autonomous-driving world model from real-world videos. Its first stage, Auto-DM, adapts latent video diffusion with spatially aligned HD-map projections, 3D object boxes, text, an initial image, and driving controls, allowing future scenes to follow explicit traffic structure. A second stage uses the learned visual representation to predict future vehicle actions and connects those actions back to video generation. The model can synthesize alternative driving trajectories and structured traffic scenarios while retaining the observed scene context. Experiments on nuScenes assess visual generation, object and map consistency, response to control signals, future-action prediction, and use of generated data for driving perception and decision tasks.
summary.zh: DriveDreamer 从真实道路视频中学习可控的自动驾驶世界模型。第一阶段 Auto-DM 在潜视频扩散模型中加入空间对齐的高精地图投影、三维物体框、文本、初始图像与驾驶控制，使未来场景遵循明确的交通结构；第二阶段利用学习到的视觉表示预测后续车辆动作，并把动作重新连接到视频生成。模型能够在保留当前场景上下文的同时合成不同驾驶轨迹和结构化交通情景。论文在 nuScenes 上评估视觉生成、物体与地图一致性、对控制信号的响应、未来动作预测，以及生成数据在驾驶感知和决策任务中的使用。

applications: driving simulation; data generation

name: PiJEPA
title: Policy-Guided World Model Planning for Language-Conditioned Visual Navigation

summary.en: PiJEPA plans language-conditioned visual navigation by combining a reactive vision-language-action policy with a predictive latent world model. A frozen visual encoder maps the current and goal images into a shared representation. A fine-tuned Octo policy converts the instruction and current state into a distribution over action chunks, which warm-starts model-predictive path-integral optimization. For each candidate, a JEPA predictor autoregressively rolls the latent state forward under the actions, and the planner scores its final state against the goal representation before resampling. Experiments on CAST navigation trajectories evaluate position and heading accuracy, trajectory coherence, different visual encoders, policy-only and uninformed-planning baselines, world-model scoring, and iterative refinement.
summary.zh: PiJEPA 把反应式视觉语言动作策略与预测性潜空间世界模型结合，用于语言条件视觉导航。冻结视觉编码器把当前图像和目标图像映射到统一表示，微调后的 Octo 策略根据指令与当前状态产生动作块分布，为模型预测路径积分优化提供初始采样。对每个候选序列，JEPA 预测器在动作条件下自回归展开潜状态，规划器比较最终状态与目标表示后重新采样。论文在 CAST 导航轨迹上评估位置与朝向精度、轨迹连贯性、不同视觉编码器，并比较纯策略、无先验规划、世界模型评分和多轮优化。

applications: language-conditioned navigation; planning

name: RAE-NWM
title: RAE-NWM: Navigation World Model in Dense Visual Representation Space

summary.en: RAE-NWM builds a navigation world model in the dense feature space of a pretrained DINOv2 encoder. A representation autoencoder compresses spatial feature maps while preserving semantic structure, and a conditional diffusion transformer predicts future latent maps from recent visual context, navigation actions, and a requested horizon. A decoupled prediction head reconstructs dense targets, enabling sequential rollouts that retain layout and object-level cues over multiple steps. The representation reduces the number of dynamics tokens compared with pixel-oriented latent models. Experiments across visual-navigation datasets evaluate future-state generation, action conditioning, long-rollout structural consistency, perceptual and semantic metrics, downstream navigation utility, computational cost, and model-component ablations.
summary.zh: RAE-NWM 在预训练 DINOv2 编码器的稠密特征空间中构建导航世界模型。表示自编码器在保留语义结构的同时压缩空间特征图，条件扩散 Transformer 根据近期视觉上下文、导航动作与指定预测时距生成未来潜特征图，解耦预测头再恢复稠密目标，从而形成能在多步展开中保持布局和物体线索的状态序列。相较以像素为中心的潜模型，该表示减少了动态标记数量。论文在多种视觉导航数据上评估未来状态生成、动作条件、长时结构一致性、感知与语义指标、下游导航用途、计算成本及模块消融。

applications: navigation planning

name: Genie 2
title: Genie 2: A Large-Scale Foundation World Model

summary.en: Genie 2 is a foundation world model that turns a single prompt image into an action-controllable, playable 3D environment. An autoencoder maps video frames into latents, and a causally masked transformer diffusion model predicts each next latent frame from prior frames and incoming keyboard or mouse actions. Frame-by-frame generation allows a human or AI agent to branch into different trajectories from the same starting state. The model also restores content after it leaves and later re-enters view, generates new areas during continued exploration, and responds to prompted actions. Google DeepMind's demonstrations cover diverse natural, fictional, and game-like worlds and embodied-agent evaluation workflows.
summary.zh: Genie 2 是一个把单张提示图像转化为可操作三维环境的基础世界模型。自编码器先把视频帧映射到潜空间，带因果掩码的 Transformer 扩散模型再依据历史潜帧与实时键盘或鼠标动作逐帧预测下一状态。人类或人工智能智能体因此可以从同一初始状态进入不同轨迹。模型还能在内容离开视野后保留相关信息，在重新观察时恢复，并在持续探索中生成新区域和响应动作提示。Google DeepMind 的官方展示覆盖自然、虚构与游戏式世界，以及利用生成环境评估具身智能体的流程。

applications: interactive 3D worlds; agent training

name: Genie 3
title: Genie 3: A New Frontier for World Models

summary.en: Genie 3 is a general-purpose world model that generates navigable environments from a text prompt and updates them in real time as a user acts. It produces 720p visual feedback at 24 frames per second, maintains environmental state across multi-minute exploration, and recalls visual content when locations are revisited after leaving view. Promptable world events can alter weather, introduce objects, or change scene conditions during an active session, adding semantic control beyond movement. Google DeepMind demonstrates natural landscapes, historical and fictional settings, animated worlds, and unusual physical scenarios, together with examples of using generated environments to train and evaluate embodied agents.
summary.zh: Genie 3 是一个从文本提示生成可导航环境，并随用户动作实时更新的通用世界模型。它以每秒二十四帧生成 720p 视觉反馈，在数分钟探索中维持环境状态，并能在地点离开视野后于重访时恢复相关视觉内容。可提示世界事件还能在交互过程中改变天气、加入物体或调整场景条件，为移动控制之外提供语义控制。Google DeepMind 展示了自然景观、历史与虚构场景、动画世界和特殊物理情境，同时演示如何利用这些生成环境训练与评估具身智能体。

applications: general interactive worlds; agent training

name: WHAM
title: World and Human Action Models towards Gameplay Ideation

summary.en: WHAM is a World and Human Action Model developed to support gameplay ideation. A VQ-style tokenizer compresses game frames, controller inputs are represented as action tokens, and a causal decoder-only transformer learns the joint sequence of visuals and human actions from Bleeding Edge gameplay. The model can continue a supplied gameplay segment, generate both future images and plausible controls, accept alternative user actions, and preserve visual edits through later frames. Its development is guided by interviews and studies with game creators, emphasizing consistency, diversity, and persistence. Evaluations examine long gameplay generation, action distributions, model scaling, edit retention, generated alternatives, and use within iterative creative workflows.
summary.zh: WHAM 是一个面向游戏创意构思的世界与人类动作模型。类 VQ 分词器压缩游戏画面，手柄输入被表示为动作标记，因果解码式 Transformer 从 Bleeding Edge 游戏数据中学习视觉与人类动作的联合序列。模型可以延续给定游戏片段，同时生成后续画面和合理控制，接受用户替代动作，并让视觉编辑在之后帧中持续存在。其设计由对游戏创作者的访谈与研究驱动，重点关注一致性、多样性和持久性。论文评估长时游戏生成、动作分布、模型规模、编辑保留、不同生成方案以及在迭代创作流程中的使用。

applications: gameplay generation; game design

name: Oasis
title: Oasis: A Universe in a Transformer

summary.en: Oasis is a real-time, action-conditioned video world model that produces a Minecraft-like open-world experience without invoking a conventional game engine. A transformer spatial autoencoder compresses frames, and a diffusion-transformer backbone autoregressively generates the next latent frame from recent visual context and keyboard actions. Diffusion Forcing trains tokens with independent noise levels, while dynamic noising during rollout balances correction of accumulated errors with preservation of visual detail. Decart's inference system runs the generator at interactive frame rates. The official release demonstrates movement, jumping, block interaction, inventory use, lighting, animals, and varied environments, and provides a live demo, open model code, and downloadable weights.
summary.zh: Oasis 是一个实时动作条件视频世界模型，无需调用传统游戏引擎即可生成类似 Minecraft 的开放世界体验。Transformer 空间自编码器压缩画面，扩散 Transformer 主干根据近期视觉上下文和键盘动作自回归生成下一潜帧。Diffusion Forcing 以独立噪声水平训练不同标记，展开时的动态加噪则兼顾修正累积误差与保留视觉细节。Decart 的推理系统使模型达到可交互帧率。官方发布展示移动、跳跃、方块操作、背包、光照、动物与多样环境，并提供在线演示、开放模型代码和可下载权重。

applications: real-time playable worlds

name: Matrix-Game 2.0
title: Matrix-Game 2.0: An Open-Source, Real-Time, and Streaming Interactive World Model

summary.en: Matrix-Game 2.0 is an open-source interactive world model for real-time, streaming video generation. Its data pipeline records high-quality scenes and synchronized keyboard, mouse, and camera controls from Unreal Engine and GTA V environments. A bidirectional diffusion teacher is converted into a causal few-step student and refined through self-forcing on model-generated histories. Action-conditioned modulation aligns each frame with user input, and a rolling key-value cache stores recent latent and action context for continuous generation. Optimized decoding reaches interactive frame rates. Experiments evaluate visual quality, control accuracy, temporal consistency, long-sequence behavior, cache settings, and comparisons across game environments and interactive-world benchmarks.
summary.zh: Matrix-Game 2.0 是一个开源的实时流式交互世界模型。数据流程从 Unreal Engine 与 GTA V 环境记录高质量场景及同步的键盘、鼠标和相机控制。双向扩散教师模型先被转换为因果少步学生模型，再通过使用模型自身生成历史的自强制训练继续优化。动作条件调制让每一帧与用户输入对齐，滚动键值缓存保存近期潜表示和动作上下文，以支持连续生成；优化解码达到可交互帧率。论文评估视觉质量、控制精度、时间一致性、长序列行为、缓存设置，以及不同游戏环境和交互世界基准上的比较。

applications: real-time interactive worlds

name: Hunyuan-GameCraft
title: Hunyuan-GameCraft: High-dynamic Interactive Game Video Generation with Hybrid History Condition

summary.en: Hunyuan-GameCraft is an action-controllable video world model for generating interactive gameplay from a reference image and text prompt. Built on HunyuanVideo, it maps common keyboard and mouse inputs into a shared continuous camera representation and injects the resulting action features into a video diffusion transformer. A hybrid history-conditioning scheme combines previously generated content with masked future latents so the model can extend scenes autoregressively while retaining visual context. Phased-consistency distillation reduces the number of sampling steps for more responsive interaction. The model is trained on more than one million recordings from over one hundred games and evaluated for visual quality, temporal consistency, action control, history preservation, and long-video generation.
summary.zh: Hunyuan-GameCraft 是一个根据参考图像、文本提示和用户动作生成交互式游戏画面的世界模型。它以 HunyuanVideo 为基础，把常见键盘与鼠标输入统一映射到连续的相机表示，再由轻量动作编码器将控制信息注入视频扩散 Transformer。混合历史条件机制把已生成片段与遮蔽后的未来潜变量共同用于下一段预测，使场景能够自回归延伸并持续保留视觉上下文。模型还采用分阶段一致性蒸馏减少采样步骤，以提高交互响应速度。训练数据包含一百多款游戏的一百多万段记录，实验从视觉质量、时间一致性、动作控制、历史保持和长视频生成等方面进行验证。

applications: interactive game generation

name: Odyssey-2
title: Introducing Odyssey-2: A General-Purpose World Model

summary.en: Odyssey-2 is a general-purpose world model that turns video generation into a live, text-controlled stream. Its multi-stage training pipeline converts a video model that can observe past and future context into a causal, autoregressive generator that predicts each frame from prior frames and the user's latest input. Natural-language prompts can redirect an active stream as it unfolds, producing multi-minute interactive video instead of a fixed clip. Architecture, data, and inference optimizations allow the system to begin streaming immediately and generate one frame every fifty milliseconds, or twenty frames per second. Odyssey demonstrates the model across varied scenes, physical processes, characters, and open-ended media interactions through its official interactive release.
summary.zh: Odyssey-2 是一个把视频生成转化为实时、文本可控连续流的通用世界模型。其多阶段训练流程将能够同时利用过去与未来信息的视频模型，转换为因果自回归生成器，使每一帧只依据此前画面和用户最新输入进行预测。用户可以在视频播放过程中通过自然语言改变正在展开的内容，形成持续数分钟的交互式视频，而不是预先固定的短片。模型在架构、数据流程和推理系统上进行协同优化，可立即开始串流，并以每五十毫秒一帧的速度达到每秒二十帧。官方发布通过多类场景、物理过程、角色和开放式媒体交互展示了这种实时生成能力。

applications: general interactive worlds

name: LingBot-World
title: Advancing Open-Source World Models

summary.en: LingBot-World is an open-source video world model designed for persistent, controllable, and real-time simulation. It builds on a large video diffusion backbone and converts generation into a causal process conditioned on images, text, camera trajectories, and interactive actions. The training pipeline combines broad video pretraining with curated interactive and synthetic environment data, then extends temporal context through staged long-video training. A chunk-wise causal inference path with key-value caching supports continuous generation, while a distilled fast model targets sub-second response and interactive frame rates. Experiments assess visual fidelity, action following, camera control, temporal consistency, long-horizon generation, and generalization across realistic, game-like, scientific, and stylized environments.
summary.zh: LingBot-World 是一个面向持久、可控和实时模拟的开源视频世界模型。它以大规模视频扩散主干为基础，把生成过程改造成由图像、文本、相机轨迹和交互动作共同控制的因果预测。训练流程先利用广泛视频数据建立生成能力，再结合经过整理的交互数据与合成环境数据，并通过分阶段长视频训练扩展时间上下文。分块因果推理与键值缓存支持连续生成，蒸馏后的快速版本则面向亚秒级响应和可交互帧率。实验核查视觉质量、动作跟随、相机控制、时间一致性、长时生成能力，以及模型在真实、游戏、科学和风格化环境中的泛化表现。

applications: interactive worlds; embodied simulation

name: GWM-1
title: GWM-1: A General World Model

summary.en: GWM-1 is Runway's general world model family for real-time, interactive simulation. Built on the Gen-4.5 video foundation, it generates frames autoregressively and accepts controls including camera pose, robot commands, and audio. GWM Worlds turns a static scene into an explorable environment whose geometry, lighting, and prompted physical behavior remain coherent as an agent moves. The Avatars variant produces audio-driven characters that respond during extended conversations. GWM Robotics predicts manipulation outcomes from observations and candidate robot actions, enabling counterfactual rollouts that can support planning and policy evaluation. The official release demonstrates navigation through generated spaces, interactive characters, and robot manipulation across varied objects and tasks.
summary.zh: GWM-1 是 Runway 面向实时交互模拟推出的通用世界模型系列。它建立在 Gen-4.5 视频基础模型之上，以自回归方式逐帧生成，并接收相机位姿、机器人指令和音频等控制信号。GWM Worlds 可把静态场景转化为可探索环境，在智能体移动时维持几何、光照以及由提示指定的物理行为。Avatars 版本依据音频生成能够在长时间对话中持续响应的角色。GWM Robotics 则根据观测和候选机器人动作预测操作结果，生成可用于规划与策略评估的反事实轨迹。官方发布展示了生成空间导航、交互角色以及多种物体和任务上的机器人操作。

applications: interactive worlds; robotics; avatars

name: Marble
title: Generating Bigger and Better Worlds

summary.en: Marble is World Labs' system for generating persistent, navigable 3D worlds from text, one or more images, video, panoramas, or coarse 3D structures. The generated environment is represented as coherent 3D geometry that supports free-viewpoint browser exploration beyond the content visible in the source view. Users can edit panoramas, expand unexplored regions, create variations, and compose multiple generated spaces into larger environments while retaining spatial and stylistic continuity. Marble also exports Gaussian splats, textured meshes, panoramas, and collider geometry for use in web, virtual-reality, game-engine, and digital-content workflows. The official release and documentation demonstrate realistic and stylized environments, scene composition, world extension, cinematic recording, and downstream asset use.
summary.zh: Marble 是 World Labs 推出的持久三维世界生成系统，可接收文本、单张或多张图像、视频、全景图以及粗略三维结构。生成结果具有连贯的三维几何表示，能够在浏览器中自由切换视角，并探索输入画面原本不可见的区域。用户可以编辑全景、扩展未生成区域、创建变体，还能把多个世界组合成更大的环境，同时保持空间与风格连续性。Marble 支持导出高斯泼溅、纹理网格、全景图和碰撞几何，供网页、虚拟现实、游戏引擎与数字内容流程使用。官方发布和文档展示了真实及风格化环境、场景组合、世界扩展、运镜录制和下游资产应用。

applications: 3D world creation; simulation

name: HY-World 2.0
title: HY-World 2.0: A Multi-Modal World Model for Reconstructing, Generating, and Simulating 3D Worlds

summary.en: HY-World 2.0 is an open-source multimodal framework that unifies 3D world generation and reconstruction. For text or a single image, HY-Pano 2.0 creates a panoramic initialization, WorldNav plans collision-free observation paths, WorldStereo 2.0 generates memory-consistent keyframes along those paths, and WorldMirror 2.0 with 3D Gaussian Splatting composes the final world. For multi-view images or video, WorldMirror directly predicts depth, surface normals, cameras, point clouds, and 3D representations. The WorldLens renderer supports first- and third-person exploration, lighting, collisions, and engine integration. Experiments separately evaluate panorama synthesis, camera control, multi-view consistency, world composition, reconstruction accuracy, rendering quality, and inference efficiency.
summary.zh: HY-World 2.0 是一个开源多模态框架，把三维世界生成与重建统一到同一系统中。对于文本或单张图像，HY-Pano 2.0 先生成全景初始化，WorldNav 规划避障观察路径，WorldStereo 2.0 沿路径生成具有记忆一致性的关键帧，最后由 WorldMirror 2.0 和三维高斯泼溅合成完整世界。对于多视图图像或视频，WorldMirror 可直接预测深度、表面法线、相机、点云和三维表示。WorldLens 渲染平台支持第一与第三人称探索、光照、碰撞以及引擎接入。实验分别验证全景生成、相机控制、多视图一致性、世界合成、重建精度、渲染质量与推理效率。

applications: persistent 3D worlds; digital twins

name: 1X World Model
title: 1X World Model: Evaluating Bits, Not Atoms

summary.en: The 1X World Model is a generative evaluator for full-body humanoid robot policies. It encodes initial image observations and candidate low-level action trajectories, predicts a four-second sequence of future latent states, decodes the corresponding video, and estimates a task-level value for the predicted final state. The model is pretrained on broad video data and post-trained on teleoperated and autonomous episodes from 1X's EVE and NEO robots, with binary task outcomes converted into state-value supervision. By comparing predicted futures from the same starting observation, it supports checkpoint selection, architecture comparisons, long-tail data curation, and policy iteration. Experiments examine data scaling, multi-task transfer, action control, and agreement with physical robot evaluations.
summary.zh: 1X World Model 是一个用于全身人形机器人策略评估的生成式世界模型。它编码初始图像观测与候选低层动作轨迹，预测未来四秒的潜在状态序列，再解码相应视频，并为最终预测状态估计任务级价值。模型先在广泛视频数据上预训练，再使用 1X 的 EVE 与 NEO 机器人遥操作和自主策略轨迹进行后训练，并把任务成败标签转化为状态价值监督。从同一初始观测出发比较不同动作对应的未来，使系统能够支持检查点选择、架构比较、长尾数据整理和策略迭代。实验考察数据规模、多任务迁移、动作控制，以及模型评估与实体机器人测试结果之间的一致性。

applications: humanoid policy evaluation

name: Genie Envisioner
title: Genie Envisioner: A Unified World Foundation Platform for Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: Genie Envisioner is a unified world foundation platform for robot manipulation. GE-Base learns instruction-conditioned, multi-view future video from roughly three thousand hours and more than one million real robot episodes, using generated history to model long manipulation sequences. GE-Act attaches a flow-matching action decoder to visual world-model features so language goals and observations produce executable robot action chunks. GE-Sim conditions video generation on action trajectories, creating a closed-loop neural environment for policy interaction and refinement. The accompanying evaluation toolkit measures visual, semantic, motion, and policy consistency. Experiments cover dual-arm household and industrial tasks, cross-embodiment adaptation, simulated benchmarks, real-world execution, policy evaluation, and action-conditioned rollout generation.
summary.zh: Genie Envisioner 是一个统一的机器人操作世界基础平台。GE-Base 从约三千小时、超过一百万段真实机器人任务数据中学习指令条件下的多视图未来视频，并利用生成历史表示长程操作过程。GE-Act 在世界模型视觉特征上连接流匹配动作解码器，使语言目标和观测能够产生可执行的机器人动作块。GE-Sim 则依据动作轨迹生成视频，构成供策略交互与持续优化使用的闭环神经环境。配套评测工具从视觉、语义、运动和策略一致性等维度进行测量。实验覆盖双臂家庭与工业任务、跨本体适配、模拟基准、真实执行、策略评估以及动作条件轨迹生成。

applications: robot policy learning; simulation; evaluation

name: Qwen-RobotWorld
title: Qwen-RobotWorld Technical Report: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation

summary.en: Qwen-RobotWorld is a language-conditioned video world model that represents robot manipulation, autonomous driving, indoor navigation, and human-to-robot transfer through one action interface. A frozen Qwen2.5-VL encoder supplies semantic action features, a video VAE represents observations, and a sixty-layer double-stream MMDiT fuses both streams through joint attention to predict future visual states. Training uses the Embodied World Knowledge corpus of 8.6 million video-text pairs and more than 200 million frames spanning over twenty embodiments, followed by a general-plus-expert curriculum. The same backbone can be adapted for synthetic policy-training data, simulated policy evaluation, and language-guided action planning. Evaluations cover embodied video generation, physical plausibility, multi-view consistency, cross-domain transfer, and standard world-model benchmarks.
summary.zh: Qwen-RobotWorld 是一个语言条件视频世界模型，以统一动作接口覆盖机器人操作、自动驾驶、室内导航和人到机器人迁移。冻结的 Qwen2.5-VL 编码器提供语义动作特征，视频 VAE 表示观测状态，六十层双流 MMDiT 通过逐层联合注意力融合两类信息并预测未来视觉状态。训练使用包含八百六十万对视频文本、超过两亿帧和二十多种机器人本体的 Embodied World Knowledge 语料，再采用通用加专家的渐进课程。相同主干可适配为策略训练合成数据引擎、虚拟策略评估环境和语言引导动作规划器。实验覆盖具身视频生成、物理合理性、多视图一致性、跨领域迁移及多项世界模型基准。

applications: robot simulation; policy learning

name: GAIA-2
title: GAIA-2: A Controllable Multi-View Generative World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: GAIA-2 is a controllable, multi-view video world model for assisted and autonomous driving. A video tokenizer compresses surround-camera sequences into continuous latent states, and a latent diffusion model predicts future states from past observations and structured controls. Those controls include ego speed and steering, other agents represented by 3D boxes and trajectories, road topology and semantics, geography, weather, lighting, and time of day. The model can forecast recorded scenes, generate scenarios from scratch, inpaint agents, and vary contextual conditions while keeping synchronized camera views coherent. Training spans multiple countries, vehicles, sensors, and frame rates. Evaluations cover visual fidelity, temporal and cross-camera consistency, control adherence, geographic generalization, data augmentation, and safety-critical scenario synthesis.
summary.zh: GAIA-2 是一个面向辅助驾驶与自动驾驶的可控多视图视频世界模型。视频分词器把环视相机序列压缩为连续潜在状态，潜在扩散模型再根据过去观测和结构化条件预测未来。控制信息包括自车速度与转向、由三维框和轨迹表示的其他交通参与者、道路拓扑与语义、地理区域、天气和时间。模型既能延续真实记录，也能从头生成场景、修改交通参与者，并在保持多相机同步一致的同时改变环境条件。训练数据覆盖多个国家、车辆平台、传感器和帧率。实验验证视觉质量、时间与跨相机一致性、控制遵循、地域泛化、数据增强和安全关键场景生成。

applications: driving simulation; safety testing

name: OmniDreams
title: NVIDIA OmniDreams: Real-Time Generative World Model for Closed-Loop Autonomous Vehicle Simulation

summary.en: NVIDIA OmniDreams is a real-time generative world model for closed-loop autonomous-vehicle simulation. Starting from Cosmos-Predict 2.5, it learns single- and multi-camera driving generation with view embeddings, cross-view attention, and a structured world-scenario map that encodes road and traffic state. Diffusion Forcing converts the bidirectional video model into a causal generator, while autoregressive key-value caching carries rollout history. Few-step distillation and runtime optimization enable interactive multi-view sensor generation. Integrated through AlpaSim, a driving policy supplies steering and trajectory actions and receives the next generated observations. Evaluations examine image realism, driving-content preservation, cross-view consistency, action response, long-horizon stability, controllable scenario variation, throughput, and policy-in-the-loop behavior.
summary.zh: NVIDIA OmniDreams 是一个用于自动驾驶闭环模拟的实时生成式世界模型。它从 Cosmos-Predict 2.5 出发，通过视角嵌入、跨视角注意力和描述道路及交通状态的结构化世界场景图，学习单相机与多相机驾驶画面生成。Diffusion Forcing 把双向视频模型转换为因果生成器，自回归键值缓存负责延续轨迹历史，少步蒸馏和运行时优化则实现可交互的多视图传感器输出。通过 AlpaSim 接入后，驾驶策略提交转向或轨迹动作并接收下一步生成观测。实验验证图像真实性、驾驶内容保持、跨视角一致性、动作响应、长程稳定性、场景控制、吞吐率以及策略闭环行为。

applications: closed-loop driving simulation; policy evaluation

name: Waabi World
title: How Waabi World Works

summary.en: Waabi World is a closed-loop simulator for developing and evaluating the Waabi Driver. It reconstructs digital twins from camera and LiDAR data, recovering scene geometry, appearance, material properties, backgrounds, and movable actors. A hybrid of learned rendering and simplified physics produces camera and LiDAR observations in near real time, including altered actors and sensor configurations. During simulation, the Driver consumes generated observations and selects a maneuver; the simulator updates the ego vehicle and other traffic participants before rendering the next state. Waabi also uses automated scenario generation to vary maps, behaviors, and safety-critical interactions and to identify targeted training situations. The same loop supports full-stack testing, sensor design studies, policy evaluation, and simulated driving practice.
summary.zh: Waabi World 是一个用于开发和评估 Waabi Driver 的闭环自动驾驶模拟器。它从相机与激光雷达数据重建数字孪生，恢复场景几何、外观、材质、背景以及可移动交通参与者。学习式渲染与简化物理模型共同生成近实时相机和激光雷达观测，并支持修改参与者行为或测试新的传感器配置。在闭环中，Driver 根据生成观测选择驾驶动作，模拟器更新自车和其他参与者状态，再渲染下一步观测。系统还自动改变道路、交通行为和安全关键交互，以构造有针对性的训练场景。相同流程可用于完整软件栈测试、传感器设计比较、策略评估和模拟驾驶训练。

applications: closed-loop driving training; safety testing

name: Qwen-AgentWorld
title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents

summary.en: Qwen-AgentWorld trains language world models to simulate environment transitions for general-purpose agents. Given an interaction history, current observation, and agent action, the model reasons through the transition and predicts the next observable state. The 35B-A3B and 397B-A17B variants are trained on more than ten million trajectories collected from real interactions across seven domains, including web, software, and tool-mediated tasks. AgentWorldBench evaluates transition prediction using trajectories produced by five frontier agents over nine established task sources, with both in-distribution and held-out environments. The learned simulator is also used as a decoupled environment for agentic reinforcement learning and within a unified foundation-model setting, connecting language-state prediction to action selection and policy improvement.
summary.zh: Qwen-AgentWorld 训练语言世界模型，为通用智能体模拟环境状态转移。模型接收交互历史、当前观察和智能体动作，通过长链式推理预测下一步可观察状态。35B-A3B 与 397B-A17B 两个版本使用来自七个领域、超过一千万条真实交互轨迹训练，覆盖网页、软件和工具调用等任务。AgentWorldBench 汇集五个前沿智能体在九类任务来源上的轨迹，检验分布内和留出环境中的转移预测。模型还被用作与策略解耦的模拟环境，为智能体强化学习生成反馈，并在统一基础模型设置下同时承担状态模拟与智能体能力，把语言形式的状态预测连接到动作选择和策略改进。

applications: agent-environment simulation; agent training

name: PlaNet
title: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels

summary.en: PlaNet is a model-based agent that learns continuous control directly from image observations. Its recurrent state-space model combines a deterministic recurrent path with stochastic latent states, infers the current state from images, and predicts future latent transitions and rewards under actions. Multi-step latent overshooting trains the dynamics across longer horizons without requiring pixel-level rollout losses. At each environment step, cross-entropy-method planning evaluates many candidate action sequences entirely in latent space, executes the first action, and replans after receiving a new observation. The agent collects experience online and updates its model. Experiments on six DeepMind Control Suite tasks study visual control, stochastic and deterministic dynamics, planning iterations, overshooting, sample efficiency, and qualitative latent predictions.
summary.zh: PlaNet 是一个从图像观测学习连续控制的模型式智能体。其循环状态空间模型把确定性循环路径与随机潜在状态结合起来，从画面推断当前状态，并根据动作预测未来潜在转移和奖励。多步潜在超前训练使动态模型能够学习更长时间跨度，而不需要把整个预测过程都解码到像素空间。每个环境步骤中，交叉熵规划器在潜在空间评估大量候选动作序列，只执行首个动作，并在获得新观测后重新规划。智能体在线收集经验并持续更新模型。实验在六个 DeepMind Control Suite 任务上考察视觉控制、随机与确定性动态、规划轮数、多步训练、样本效率和潜在预测。

applications: visual control; planning

name: DreamerV2
title: Mastering Atari with Discrete World Models

summary.en: DreamerV2 is a reinforcement-learning agent that learns behavior from imagined trajectories inside a discrete latent world model. A recurrent state-space model encodes image observations into categorical latent variables and predicts action-conditioned transitions, rewards, and episode continuation. The model is trained from replayed experience, while an actor and value function learn from compact rollouts generated by the model rather than from reconstructed pixels. The actor can use likelihood-ratio gradients for discrete Atari actions or dynamics gradients for continuous control. Evaluations cover all fifty-five Atari games under sticky actions and pixel-based humanoid tasks in the DeepMind Control Suite. Analyses examine discrete representations, KL balancing, layer normalization, exploration data, score aggregation, and training efficiency.
summary.zh: DreamerV2 是一个在离散潜在世界模型内部通过想象轨迹学习行为的强化学习智能体。循环状态空间模型把图像观测编码为类别潜变量，并预测动作条件下的状态转移、奖励和回合延续信号。世界模型从经验回放中训练，策略与价值函数则直接利用模型生成的潜在轨迹学习，无需把每一步都重建成像素画面。对于 Atari 离散动作，策略使用似然比梯度；对于连续控制，则可通过学习到的动态反向传播。实验覆盖带粘滞动作的五十五款 Atari 游戏，以及 DeepMind Control Suite 中仅凭像素完成的人形机器人任务，并分析离散表示、KL 平衡、归一化、探索数据、分数汇总和训练效率。

applications: game control

name: MuZero
title: Mastering Atari, Go, Chess and Shogi by Planning with a Learned Model

summary.en: MuZero is a planning agent that learns the model needed for search without receiving game rules or an environment simulator. A representation network converts the observation history into a latent state. A recurrent dynamics network applies candidate actions to produce successor latent states and predicted rewards, while a prediction network outputs policies and values. Monte Carlo tree search expands these learned transitions and selects actions from the improved search policy. Training unrolls the model along stored trajectories and matches observed rewards, search policies, and value targets; MuZero Reanalyze refreshes targets for past experience. The same algorithm is evaluated on Go, chess, shogi, and all fifty-seven Atari games, including search-scaling and planning ablations.
summary.zh: MuZero 是一个无需游戏规则或真实环境模拟器即可学习搜索模型的规划智能体。表示网络把观测历史编码为潜在状态；循环动态网络对候选动作进行展开，产生后继潜在状态和预测奖励；预测网络再输出策略与价值。蒙特卡洛树搜索沿这些学习到的转移扩展，并根据改进后的搜索策略选择动作。训练时，模型沿经验轨迹展开，分别拟合真实奖励、搜索策略和价值目标，MuZero Reanalyze 还会用最新网络重新生成旧经验的训练目标。同一套算法在围棋、国际象棋、将棋和全部五十七款 Atari 游戏上评测，并分析搜索规模、规划深度和策略改进过程。

applications: game playing; planning

name: IRIS
title: Transformers are Sample-Efficient World Models

summary.en: IRIS is a sample-efficient reinforcement-learning agent trained inside an autoregressive visual world model. A discrete autoencoder converts each Atari frame into a compact grid of image tokens. A Transformer receives recent frame tokens and actions and autoregressively predicts the tokens of the next observation, while separate heads predict reward and episode termination. Starting from observations stored in replay, the model generates multi-step imagined trajectories on which a policy and value function are trained with an actor-critic objective. Real environment interaction supplies new data for continued model learning. Experiments on the twenty-six Atari 100k games evaluate task returns, aggregate scores, reconstruction and rollout quality, token capacity, context length, data scaling, and the fidelity of learned game mechanics.
