summary.zh: IRIS 是一个在自回归视觉世界模型内部训练的样本高效强化学习智能体。离散自编码器先把每个 Atari 画面转换为紧凑的图像标记网格，Transformer 再接收近期画面标记与动作，自回归预测下一观测的全部标记，同时由独立预测头给出奖励和回合终止信号。模型从经验回放中的真实观测出发生成多步想象轨迹，策略与价值函数在这些轨迹上通过演员评论家目标学习，真实环境交互则持续提供新的模型训练数据。实验覆盖 Atari 100k 的二十六款游戏，并评估任务回报、汇总分数、重建与展开质量、标记容量、上下文长度、数据扩展和游戏机制预测。

applications: game simulation; control

name: DIAMOND
title: Diffusion for World Modeling: Visual Details Matter in Atari

summary.en: DIAMOND is a reinforcement-learning agent whose environment model generates observations directly with conditional diffusion. At each imagined step, the diffusion model denoises the next frame from recent clean observations and actions; companion networks predict reward and termination. A policy and value function learn from these autoregressive imagined trajectories, while real Atari interaction updates the replay data used to train the model. The paper studies diffusion parameterization, sampling, conditioning through frame stacking or cross-attention, and the relationship between visual prediction and agent learning. Evaluations cover the twenty-six Atari 100k games, image and video quality measures, rollout behavior, and standalone interactive models trained from recorded Counter-Strike: Global Offensive and motorway-driving sequences.
summary.zh: DIAMOND 是一个以条件扩散模型直接生成环境观测的强化学习智能体。在每个想象步骤中，扩散模型依据近期真实画面和动作对下一帧去噪，配套网络同时预测奖励与终止信号。策略和价值函数在这些自回归想象轨迹上学习，真实 Atari 交互则更新用于训练世界模型的经验回放。论文系统研究扩散参数化、采样方法、帧堆叠与跨注意力条件方式，以及视觉预测和策略学习之间的关系。实验覆盖 Atari 100k 的二十六款游戏、图像与视频质量指标、展开行为，并利用录制数据训练可独立交互的《反恐精英：全球攻势》和高速公路驾驶世界模型。

applications: game simulation; control

name: Dreamer 4
title: Training Agents Inside of Scalable World Models

summary.en: Dreamer 4 is a scalable agent that learns Minecraft control entirely from offline video and action data. A causal video tokenizer and efficient spatial-temporal Transformer model future visual tokens under mouse and keyboard actions. Shortcut forcing trains the model on its own generated histories while retaining parallel sequence training, supporting real-time interactive inference on one GPU. Reward, value, policy, and behavioral-prior heads are adapted from the pretrained world model, and the policy practices tasks through reinforcement learning on imagined trajectories. The main evaluation asks the agent to obtain diamonds from raw pixels through long action sequences. Additional studies test interactive game mechanics, action-label efficiency, architecture choices, visual representations for behavior learning, and counterfactual predictions on robot-manipulation video.
summary.zh: Dreamer 4 是一个完全利用离线视频与动作数据学习 Minecraft 控制的可扩展智能体。因果视频分词器和高效时空 Transformer 根据鼠标与键盘动作预测未来视觉标记。Shortcut Forcing 让模型在自身生成的历史上训练，同时保留并行序列训练效率，使其能够在单张 GPU 上进行实时交互推理。奖励、价值、策略和行为先验预测头从预训练世界模型中适配，策略则通过想象轨迹中的强化学习练习任务。主要评测要求智能体仅从原始像素出发，经由长动作序列获取钻石；其他实验考察交互式游戏机制、动作标注效率、架构选择、行为学习视觉表示，以及机器人操作视频上的反事实预测。

applications: interactive world simulation; control

name: DreamZero
title: World Action Models are Zero-Shot Policies

summary.en: DreamZero is a 14-billion-parameter World Action Model that jointly generates future video and robot actions from current observations and language instructions. It initializes from a web-scale image-to-video diffusion model, adds action tokens to the diffusion transformer, and learns inverse dynamics that align motor commands with predicted visual transitions. Training uses heterogeneous trajectories rather than requiring each behavior to be repeated as a dedicated demonstration set. DreamZero-Flash separates video and action noise schedules so clean action chunks can be produced from partially denoised visual features in one step, alongside inference optimizations for responsive control. Real-robot evaluations use AgiBot G1 and Franka systems and study new tasks, new environments, human-video transfer, and cross-embodiment adaptation.
summary.zh: DreamZero 是一个拥有一百四十亿参数的世界动作模型，根据当前观测和语言指令联合生成未来视频与机器人动作。它从大规模图像到视频扩散模型初始化，在扩散 Transformer 中加入动作标记，并以逆动力学方式让电机命令与预测视觉转移对齐。训练可直接使用包含多种行为的异质轨迹，不要求为每项技能重复采集专门演示。DreamZero-Flash 将视频与动作噪声调度分离，使模型能够从尚未完全去噪的视觉特征中一步产生干净动作块，并配合推理系统优化实现快速控制。真实机器人实验覆盖 AgiBot G1 和 Franka，考察新任务、新环境、人类视频迁移以及跨本体适配。

applications: zero-shot robot control

name: MILE
title: Model-Based Imitation Learning for Urban Driving

summary.en: MILE jointly learns an urban-driving world model and policy from offline expert demonstrations. Camera features are lifted through estimated depth into 3D and pooled into a bird's-eye-view representation, then compressed with route and speed inputs into a recurrent stochastic latent state. The action-conditioned prior predicts future states without new observations, while decoders reconstruct camera images and semantic bird's-eye-view maps and a policy head predicts vehicle control. At deployment, MILE can act from current observations or execute action sequences planned entirely through latent imagination. Training combines behavior cloning, image and semantic reconstruction, and variational dynamics losses. CARLA experiments evaluate driving score, route completion, infractions, long-horizon future diversity, geometric representations, model components, and imagined maneuvers.
summary.zh: MILE 从离线专家演示中联合学习城市驾驶世界模型与策略。相机特征通过预测深度提升到三维空间并汇聚为鸟瞰表示，再与路线图和速度一起压缩成循环随机潜在状态。动作条件先验在没有新观测时预测未来状态，图像与语义鸟瞰解码器负责重建环境，策略头则输出车辆控制。部署时，MILE 既可依据当前观测驾驶，也可执行完全在潜在想象中规划出的动作序列。训练目标结合行为克隆、图像和语义重建以及变分动态学习。CARLA 实验评估驾驶分数、路线完成、违规情况、长程未来多样性、几何表示、模型组件和想象驾驶操作。

applications: autonomous driving

name: TrafficBots
title: TrafficBots: Towards World Models for Autonomous Driving Simulation and Motion Prediction

summary.en: TrafficBots is a data-driven multi-agent traffic simulator and motion predictor built from a shared policy. Maps, traffic lights, and the position, heading, size, velocity, and validity of agents are encoded in global vector form with attention and angular features. A recurrent unit aggregates history, while each participant receives a destination and a time-invariant latent personality that controls route choice and driving style. Action heads predict per-agent controls, and a dynamics module updates the joint scene state in closed loop, allowing traffic participants to react to a player vehicle whose future is not fixed. Training uses prior and posterior personality inference plus destination supervision. Waymo Open Motion Dataset experiments measure rollout realism, traffic-rule compliance, multimodal prediction, configurability, scalability, and motion forecasting.
summary.zh: TrafficBots 是一个由共享策略构成的数据驱动多智能体交通模拟器和运动预测器。地图、交通灯以及参与者的位置、朝向、尺寸、速度和有效状态通过全局向量、注意力与角度特征编码。循环单元汇总历史，每个参与者还具有目的地和时间不变的潜在人格，用于控制路线选择与驾驶风格。动作头预测各参与者控制量，动态模块在闭环中更新联合场景状态，使车辆、行人和骑行者能够响应未来尚未确定的主车动作。训练结合先验与后验人格推断及目的地监督。Waymo Open Motion Dataset 实验评估轨迹真实性、交通规则遵循、多模态预测、可配置性、规模扩展和运动预测。

applications: traffic simulation; planning

name: Drive-WM
title: Driving into the Future: Multiview Visual Forecasting and Planning with World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Drive-WM is a multiview visual world model that connects driving video prediction with end-to-end planning. A latent diffusion model generates future camera streams under a unified condition interface for context images, projected 3D boxes and maps, bird's-eye-view segmentation, scene text, and ego-motion actions. Temporal generation first predicts key future views, and factorized cross-view generation produces the remaining cameras to maintain surround-view coherence. For planning, candidate ego trajectories condition different imagined futures; image-based object and map rewards, or a vision-language reward, score each branch and guide the next maneuver. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate video quality, temporal and spatial consistency, condition control, alternative futures, planning displacement and collision measures, out-of-distribution perturbations, and factorization choices.
summary.zh: Drive-WM 是一个把多视图驾驶视频预测与端到端规划连接起来的视觉世界模型。潜在扩散模型通过统一接口接收上下文图像、投影后的三维框与地图、鸟瞰分割、场景文本和自车运动动作，并生成未来相机画面。时间生成模块先预测关键未来视图，分解式跨视角生成再补全其余相机，以维持环视一致性。规划阶段用不同候选自车轨迹生成多条想象未来，再由基于图像的目标物与地图奖励，或视觉语言奖励，对各分支评分并选择下一步操作。nuScenes 实验评估视频质量、时间与空间一致性、条件控制、替代未来、规划位移、碰撞指标、分布外扰动和分解设计。

applications: trajectory planning; simulation

name: Vista
title: Vista: A Generalizable Driving World Model with High Fidelity and Versatile Controllability

summary.en: Vista is a high-resolution driving world model designed to generalize across datasets and action interfaces. Starting from Stable Video Diffusion, it predicts continuous future camera video from recent frames and driving context at 576 by 1024 resolution and ten frames per second. A unified controllability design supports high-level commands, goal points, full trajectories, and low-level steering-angle and speed inputs, allowing the same generator to connect with different planning systems. The predicted future can also be scored as a reward for candidate actions. Training uses 1,740 hours of driving video from multiple sources. Evaluations examine visual and motion quality, fifteen-second extensions, cross-dataset transfer, action adherence, reward-based action ranking, resolution and frame rate, architecture components, and human judgments.
summary.zh: Vista 是一个面向跨数据集与多种动作接口泛化的高分辨率驾驶世界模型。它以 Stable Video Diffusion 为基础，根据近期画面和驾驶上下文，以每秒十帧、五百七十六乘一千零二十四分辨率预测连续未来视频。统一控制设计同时支持高层驾驶指令、目标点、完整轨迹以及低层转向角和速度，使同一生成器能够连接不同规划系统；生成的未来还可以转化为候选动作奖励。训练使用来自多个来源的一千七百四十小时驾驶视频。实验评估视觉与运动质量、十五秒扩展、跨数据集迁移、动作遵循、奖励式动作排序、分辨率与帧率、架构组件和人工判断。

applications: driving simulation; action evaluation

name: Pathdreamer
title: Pathdreamer: A World Model for Indoor Navigation

summary.en: Pathdreamer is a hierarchical visual world model for imagining indoor navigation trajectories. Given previously observed panoramas, camera poses, and a proposed path through a connectivity graph, a structure generator recurrently predicts semantic and depth panoramas at unvisited viewpoints. A second generator renders corresponding 360-degree RGB observations, with stochastic latent variables representing multiple plausible scene completions. The model can roll forward over several navigation steps without querying the real building. For downstream vision-and-language navigation, an agent samples candidate paths, uses Pathdreamer to generate their future observations, and reranks actions with the imagined context. Experiments on Matterport3D and Room-to-Room evaluate semantic overlap, image quality, recurrent prediction, seen and unseen environments, stochastic diversity, geometric consistency, and navigation success.
summary.zh: Pathdreamer 是一个用于想象室内导航轨迹的分层视觉世界模型。给定已观察全景、相机位姿和连接图中的候选路径，结构生成器会循环预测尚未访问视点的语义与深度全景，第二个生成器再渲染对应的三百六十度彩色观测，随机潜变量则表示多种可能的场景补全。模型能够在不查询真实建筑的情况下连续展开多个导航步骤。用于视觉语言导航时，智能体先采样候选路径，再由 Pathdreamer 生成各路径未来观测，并借助想象上下文重新排序动作。Matterport3D 与 Room-to-Room 实验评估语义重合、图像质量、循环预测、已见与未见环境、随机多样性、几何一致性和导航成功率。

applications: look-ahead navigation

name: NWM
title: Navigation World Models

summary.en: Navigation World Models learns an action-conditioned visual simulator for planning across multiple embodiments and environments. Egocentric frames are compressed by a pretrained VAE, and a temporally autoregressive Conditional Diffusion Transformer predicts the next latent observation from recent visual context and continuous navigation actions. Candidate action sequences are rolled out in the model and ranked by perceptual proximity to a goal, either generating trajectories from scratch with cross-entropy search or reranking proposals from an external policy. Training combines SCAND, TartanDrive, RECON, HuRoN, and unlabeled Ego4D video. Experiments measure future-view prediction, pose consistency, trajectory planning, policy reranking, scaling behavior, and transfer to held-out Go Stanford scenes.
summary.zh: Navigation World Models 学习一个面向多种载体和环境的动作条件视觉模拟器。模型先用预训练 VAE 压缩第一视角画面，再由时间自回归的条件扩散 Transformer 根据近期视觉上下文和连续导航动作预测下一潜在观测。规划时，候选动作序列在模型中逐步展开，并按照预测终点与目标图像的感知接近程度排序；系统既可通过交叉熵搜索从头生成轨迹，也可重排外部策略给出的候选。训练数据包括 SCAND、TartanDrive、RECON、HuRoN 与无标签 Ego4D 视频。实验检验未来视图预测、位姿一致性、轨迹规划、策略重排、模型扩展规律以及向未见 Go Stanford 场景的迁移。

applications: trajectory ranking; navigation

name: NavWAM
title: NavWAM: A Navigation World Action Model for Goal-Conditioned Visual Navigation

summary.en: NavWAM turns a pretrained video world model into a closed-loop goal-conditioned navigation policy. Built on Cosmos Predict2, it encodes current robot state, goal image, and egocentric observation together with targets for an action chunk, future state, future views, and goal-progress value on a shared latent-frame canvas. Three training modes teach the model to jointly generate executable motion and visual foresight, condition future prediction on actions, and estimate progress. At inference, policy mode directly predicts action chunks in a receding-horizon loop without a separate trajectory optimizer. Simulation pretraining and real-robot adaptation are evaluated through offline trajectory error, future-view consistency, policy comparisons, ablations, and closed-loop image-goal navigation on a Diablo robot.
summary.zh: NavWAM 将预训练视频世界模型转化为闭环的目标条件导航策略。它以 Cosmos Predict2 为骨干，在共享潜在帧画布上同时放置当前机器人状态、目标图像、第一视角观测，以及动作片段、未来状态、未来视图和目标进度值等预测对象。策略模式、世界模型模式和值模式三种训练条件，使模型联合学习可执行运动与视觉前瞻、动作条件未来预测和进度估计。推理时，策略模式直接在滚动时域循环中输出动作片段，无需独立的轨迹优化器。论文通过仿真预训练与真机适配，并以离线轨迹误差、未来视图一致性、策略对比、消融实验和 Diablo 机器人闭环图像目标导航进行验证。

applications: goal-conditioned navigation

name: WebDreamer
title: Is Your LLM Secretly a World Model of the Internet? Model-Based Planning for Web Agents

summary.en: WebDreamer is a model-based planning framework for agents operating on websites. For each step, an agent proposes candidate clicks, text inputs, or navigation actions; a language-model world model predicts concise descriptions of their resulting page states, and a language-model value function scores the imagined trajectories before one action is executed. The framework can use general models or Dreamer-7B, a specialized next-state predictor trained on 3.1 million synthesized web interactions collected through random walks and visual state-change labeling. Experiments on VisualWebArena, Online-Mind2Web, and Mind2Web-Live evaluate task success, simulation depth, action refinement, scoring choices, data scaling, general and in-domain world models, and planning efficiency on sandboxed and live websites.
summary.zh: WebDreamer 是面向网页智能体的基于模型规划框架。每一步中，智能体先提出点击、文本输入或页面导航等候选动作，语言模型世界模型预测动作引起的页面状态变化，语言模型价值函数再为想象轨迹评分，之后才在真实网站执行所选动作。框架既可调用通用模型，也可使用专门的 Dreamer-7B；后者通过网页随机游走和视觉状态变化标注得到三百一十万条合成交互，并学习下一状态预测。论文在 VisualWebArena、Online-Mind2Web 与 Mind2Web-Live 上评估任务成功率、模拟深度、动作精炼、评分方式、数据扩展、通用及域内世界模型，以及沙箱和真实网站中的规划效率。

applications: web agent planning

name: CWM
title: CWM: An Open-Weights LLM for Research on Code Generation with World Models

summary.en: Code World Model is a 32-billion-parameter open-weights language model trained to represent the dynamics of programs and software environments. Mid-training includes Python execution traces whose observations contain stack frames and local variables, actions identify executed lines, and subsequent observations record changed program state. It also uses millions of ForagerAgent trajectories in executable repository containers, where shell commands and code edits produce environment feedback. Supervised and reinforcement-learning stages cover coding, mathematics, and multi-turn software engineering. The released model can predict step-by-step execution traces and participate in agentic coding workflows. Evaluation spans trace and output prediction, program termination and complexity, SWE-bench Verified, LiveCodeBench, CruxEval, mathematical reasoning, long context, and model ablations.
summary.zh: Code World Model 是一个三百二十亿参数的开放权重语言模型，用于学习程序和软件环境的动态。中期训练包含 Python 执行轨迹：观测记录调用栈与局部变量，动作对应被执行的代码行，后续观测则反映改变后的程序状态；模型还学习数百万条来自可执行仓库容器的 ForagerAgent 轨迹，其中命令行操作和代码编辑会产生环境反馈。监督与强化学习阶段覆盖编程、数学和多轮软件工程任务。发布模型可逐步预测执行轨迹，并参与智能体式编程流程。评估包括轨迹与输出预测、程序终止和复杂度判断、SWE-bench Verified、LiveCodeBench、CruxEval、数学推理、长上下文及模型消融。

applications: coding agent; software reasoning

name: TransDreamer
title: TransDreamer: Reinforcement Learning with Transformer World Models

summary.en: TransDreamer is a model-based reinforcement-learning agent built around a stochastic Transformer State-Space Model. Instead of recurrent state updates, the world model attends directly to prior latent states and actions, infers observation-conditioned stochastic states in parallel during training, and predicts images, rewards, and discounts. During imagination, prior states are generated autoregressively in latent space and a transformer actor-critic learns control from predicted trajectories while world-model parameters remain fixed. The design targets tasks that require access to extended interaction history. Experiments include partially observed 2D and first-person 3D Hidden Order Discovery environments, where the agent must remember prior attempts, plus DeepMind Control and Atari tasks. Analysis covers returns, future-frame error, reward prediction, imagined trajectories, context length, replay sampling, and architecture choices.
summary.zh: TransDreamer 是以随机 Transformer 状态空间模型为核心的基于模型强化学习智能体。世界模型不再通过循环单元更新状态，而是直接关注过去的潜在状态与动作，在训练时并行推断观测条件随机状态，并预测图像、奖励和折扣。想象阶段中，先验状态在潜在空间内自回归生成，Transformer 演员—评论家根据预测轨迹学习控制，同时世界模型参数保持固定。该设计面向需要调用较长交互历史的任务。实验包括部分可观测的二维与第一视角三维 Hidden Order Discovery 环境，以及 DeepMind Control 和 Atari 任务；分析覆盖任务回报、未来帧误差、奖励预测、想象轨迹、上下文长度、回放采样和架构选择。

applications: memory-based visual control

name: TWM
title: Transformer-based World Models Are Happy With 100k Interactions

summary.en: Transformer-based World Models is a sample-efficient reinforcement-learning system that learns an Atari simulator from 100,000 environment interactions. A variational observation model maps stacked game frames to discrete stochastic latents. Transformer-XL then attends directly to a history of latent states, actions, and experienced or predicted rewards, producing distributions for the next latent state, reward, and continuation. Iterated predictions create new trajectories, and separate actor and critic networks learn from this imagined experience; the deployed policy uses encoded frames without running the transformer. Training alternates real interaction, world-model updates, and latent policy improvement. Across 26 Atari games, the paper evaluates human-normalized scores, data budgets, uncertainty, model losses, replay balancing, policy inputs, reward feedback, and architectural components.
summary.zh: Transformer-based World Models 从十万次环境交互中学习可用于 Atari 控制的模拟器。变分观测模型把堆叠游戏画面编码为离散随机潜变量，Transformer-XL 则直接关注一段历史中的潜在状态、动作以及真实或预测奖励，并输出下一潜在状态、奖励和继续概率的分布。模型反复预测生成新轨迹，独立的演员与评论家网络从这些想象经验中学习；实际部署时，策略只使用编码画面，无需运行 Transformer。训练循环交替收集真实交互、更新世界模型和改进潜在策略。论文在二十六个 Atari 游戏上检验人类归一化分数、数据预算、不确定性、模型损失、回放平衡、策略输入、奖励反馈和架构组件。

applications: game simulation; control

name: STORM
title: STORM: Efficient Stochastic Transformer based World Models for Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: STORM is a stochastic Transformer world model for sample-efficient visual reinforcement learning. A categorical variational autoencoder compresses each Atari frame into one stochastic latent variable. The current latent and action are fused into a single token, and a compact GPT-like Transformer predicts the next latent distribution together with reward and continuation signals. Short real context initializes model rollouts, after which an actor-critic learns from generated latent experience using DreamerV3-style objectives. Training cycles among environment collection, self-supervised world-model updates, and policy improvement in imagination. Evaluation on all 26 Atari 100K games reports game and aggregate human-normalized scores, training time and hardware cost, while ablations examine latent sampling, agent state, Transformer depth, demonstration trajectories, exploration settings, and model components.
summary.zh: STORM 是面向高样本效率视觉强化学习的随机 Transformer 世界模型。分类变分自编码器把每个 Atari 画面压缩为一个随机潜变量，当前潜变量与动作被融合成单个 token，再由紧凑的 GPT 式 Transformer 预测下一潜在分布、奖励和继续信号。短真实上下文用于启动模型展开，随后演员—评论家按照 DreamerV3 式目标从生成的潜在经验中学习。训练过程在环境采集、自监督世界模型更新和想象中的策略改进之间循环。论文在 Atari 100K 的二十六个游戏上报告单项及汇总的人类归一化分数、训练时间和硬件开销，并通过消融检验潜变量采样、智能体状态、Transformer 深度、示范轨迹、探索设置和模型组件。

applications: game simulation; control

name: MineWorld
title: MineWorld: a Real-Time and Open-Source Interactive World Model on Minecraft

summary.en: MineWorld is an open-source interactive world model for Minecraft. A visual tokenizer compresses game frames into discrete codes, while an action tokenizer represents nine keyboard and mouse controls, including movement, camera direction, jumping, inventory actions, and interaction. These tokens are interleaved and modeled by a LLaMA-style autoregressive Transformer, which can predict actions from observations or generate subsequent visual states from chosen controls. Diagonal Decoding parallelizes tokens from neighboring frames to support interactive generation at four to seven frames per second. Models from 300 million to 1.2 billion parameters are trained on VPT gameplay trajectories. Experiments evaluate perceptual quality, reconstruction and action-following accuracy, model scale, context length, decoding speed, controllability, and multi-step real-time interaction.
summary.zh: MineWorld 是面向 Minecraft 的开源交互式世界模型。视觉分词器把游戏画面压缩为离散编码，动作分词器表示九类键盘与鼠标控制，包括移动、视角、跳跃、物品栏和交互操作。视觉与动作 token 交错输入 LLaMA 式自回归 Transformer，使模型既能由观测预测动作，也能根据选定控制生成后续游戏状态。Diagonal Decoding 并行处理相邻帧中的 token，使交互生成达到每秒四至七帧。三亿到十二亿参数的模型使用 VPT 游戏轨迹训练。实验评估感知质量、重建与动作跟随精度、模型规模、上下文长度、解码速度、可控性和多步实时交互。

applications: interactive game simulation

name: Cosmos
title: Cosmos World Foundation Model Platform for Physical AI

summary.en: Cosmos is an open world-foundation-model platform for building customized Physical AI simulators. Its pipeline filters, annotates, deduplicates, and shards large video collections, then represents them with causal continuous or discrete image-video tokenizers. Transformer families are pretrained either by diffusion in continuous latent space or autoregressive generation over discrete tokens, progressing from text-to-world to video-conditioned future prediction. Smaller domain datasets post-train these foundations with camera poses, natural-language instructions, robot actions, vehicle trajectories, maps, or multiview context. Demonstrations cover navigable camera-controlled worlds, humanoid and manipulation prediction, and autonomous-driving generation. The report evaluates tokenizer reconstruction, generation quality, scaling, prompt adherence, 3D consistency, robotics action conditioning, driving scenarios, data curation, post-training choices, and guardrail behavior.
summary.zh: Cosmos 是用于构建定制 Physical AI 模拟器的开放世界基础模型平台。其流水线筛选、标注和去重大规模视频，再通过因果连续或离散分词器形成表示。Transformer 模型族分别在连续潜空间做扩散生成，或对离散 token 做自回归生成，并从文本生成世界训练到依据既有视频预测未来。领域数据可用相机位姿、语言指令、机器人动作、车辆轨迹或多视图上下文完成后训练。展示任务包括相机控制的可导航世界、机器人操作预测和自动驾驶生成。报告评估分词器重建、生成质量、规模扩展、提示遵循、三维一致性、动作条件、驾驶场景、后训练设计和安全护栏。

applications: Physical AI simulation; robotics; driving

name: WorldGPT
title: WorldGPT: Empowering LLM as Multimodal World Model

summary.en: WorldGPT is a generalist multimodal world model that predicts state transitions across arbitrary combinations of text, image, video, and audio. LanguageBind-based encoders place input modalities in a unified representation, a large language model predicts the transition in feature space under a detailed action description, and modality-specific decoders reconstruct requested outputs. Progressive training moves from single-modality transitions to multiple cross-modal inputs and outputs using millions of WorldNet-Wild video examples. A cognitive architecture retrieves external knowledge, offloads prior predictions into working memory, and uses a ContextReflector to select relevant context for specialized and sequential tasks. WorldNet-Crafted evaluations cover modality combinations, knowledge-enhanced and long-sequence prediction; downstream experiments use generated multimodal instructions to train task agents through dream tuning.
summary.zh: WorldGPT 是一个通用多模态世界模型，可在文本、图像、视频和音频的任意输入输出组合之间预测状态转移。基于 LanguageBind 的编码器把多种输入映射到统一表示，大语言模型依据细粒度动作描述在特征空间中预测转移，专用解码器再重建所需模态。渐进式训练利用数百万条 WorldNet-Wild 视频样本，从单模态转移逐步扩展到多输入跨模态输出。认知架构会检索外部知识，把历史预测卸载到工作记忆，并由 ContextReflector 选择与当前任务相关的上下文。WorldNet-Crafted 评估覆盖模态组合、知识增强和长序列预测；下游实验还用模型生成的多模态指令，通过 dream tuning 训练任务智能体。

applications: multimodal state prediction; agent data synthesis

name: Latent Visual States
title: Latent Visual States for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning

summary.en: EVA introduces latent visual states for fine-grained multimodal reasoning without issuing explicit crop or refocus commands to external tools. During a reasoning trace, the model emits continuous Latent_slot tokens whose targets are derived from visual patch features associated with relevant image regions. These internal visual thoughts condition subsequent textual reasoning and the answer. Training proceeds in three stages: learning to generate slots, learning to use them, and reinforcement learning for exploration. EVA-230K supplies text-image-interleaved supervision across natural scenes, documents, charts, and OCR tasks. D-GSPO separates the policy treatment of continuous latents and discrete text around their transition window. Experiments evaluate perception and reasoning accuracy, slot behavior, ablations, latency, training cost, and resolution scaling across MME-RealWorld, HR-Bench, V*, and BLINK-derived tasks.
summary.zh: EVA 为细粒度多模态推理引入潜在视觉状态，无需向外部工具输出显式裁剪或重新聚焦指令。推理过程中，模型自适应地产生连续 Latent_slot token，其监督目标来自与相关图像区域对应的视觉 patch 特征；这些内部视觉思维在同一端到端模型中继续条件化后续文本推理与答案。训练分为学习生成、学习使用和强化学习探索三个阶段，EVA-230K 提供覆盖自然场景、文档、图表与 OCR 的图文交错监督。D-GSPO 对连续潜变量与离散文本在转移窗口中的策略优化进行解耦。实验在 MME-RealWorld、HR-Bench、V* 和源自 BLINK 的任务上评估感知与推理准确率、槽位行为、消融、延迟、训练开销和分辨率扩展。

applications: multimodal reasoning

name: DLWM
title: DLWM: Diverse Latent World Models for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning

summary.en: DLWM models perceptual uncertainty through multiple continuous latent interpretations of an image-question pair. A frozen multimodal backbone supplies the representation, a latent world generator creates four default hypotheses with an orthogonality objective that encourages semantic diversity, and a shared module advances their reasoning states. A resource-aware controller treats computation allocation as a budget-constrained decision process: it can expand one path, stop it, merge two related paths, or answer using learned aggregation of active worlds. Training first establishes fixed-length latent reasoning through supervision and then optimizes the controller with REINFORCE using task accuracy and computation cost. Experiments on GQA, ScienceQA, MMVP, and VQAv2 measure answer accuracy, active worlds, rollout steps, memory, throughput, budgets, action choices, diversity constraints, and training strategies.
summary.zh: DLWM 通过维护同一图像与问题的多个连续潜在解释来表示感知不确定性。冻结的多模态骨干提供表示，潜在世界生成器默认构造四个假设，并用正交目标保持语义多样性，共享推理模块则推进各条潜在轨迹。资源感知控制器把计算分配写成预算约束决策过程，可扩展某条路径、停止路径、合并两个假设，或聚合活跃世界回答。训练先以监督方式建立固定长度潜在推理，再通过结合任务准确率与计算成本的奖励，用 REINFORCE 优化控制器。论文在 GQA、ScienceQA、MMVP 和 VQAv2 上评估答案准确率、活跃世界数、展开步数、显存、吞吐、预算、动作选择、多样性约束和训练策略。

applications: multimodal reasoning under ambiguity

name: Visual Foresight
title: Visual Foresight: Model-Based Deep Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Based Robotic Control

summary.en: Visual Foresight is a self-supervised model-based control framework for robotic manipulation from camera images. A robot autonomously collects pushing and grasping trajectories, and an action-conditioned recurrent video model predicts future frames by transforming pixels from earlier observations. The same transformations propagate probability distributions over user-designated object pixels, including through occlusion with skip connections. Cross-entropy trajectory optimization samples candidate end-effector actions, scores their predicted futures, executes the first action, and replans. Tasks can be specified by desired pixel locations, registered goal images, or classifiers learned from example goal states. Experiments use tens of thousands of robot trajectories to evaluate unseen rigid and deformable objects, clutter, obstacles, multiple objects, cloth manipulation, grasping, recovery, goal definitions, prediction architectures, planning costs, and real-robot execution.
summary.zh: Visual Foresight 是从相机图像学习机器人操作的自监督模型控制框架。机器人收集推动与抓取轨迹，动作条件循环视频模型通过变换观测中的像素来预测未来画面；这些变换传播用户指定物体像素的概率，并借助跳跃连接处理遮挡。交叉熵轨迹优化器采样候选末端执行器动作，对预测未来评分，只执行首个动作并重新规划。任务可由目标像素位置、配准后的目标图像，或从示例目标状态学习的分类器指定。论文利用数万条机器人轨迹，评估未见刚性与可变形物体、杂乱、障碍、多物体、布料操作、抓取、扰动恢复、目标定义、预测架构、规划代价和真机执行。

applications: robot manipulation; visual planning

name: Masked World Models
title: Masked World Models for Visual Control

summary.en: Masked World Models separates visual representation learning from latent dynamics learning for robot control. An early convolutional stem converts each image into local features, most features are masked, and a vision-transformer autoencoder reconstructs pixels while an auxiliary head predicts reward so the representation preserves task-relevant detail. An RSSM learns action-conditioned transitions between frozen representations. Actor and critic networks then learn from imagined latent trajectories, while new online interaction supplies additional training samples. The three updates repeat throughout learning. Experiments span fifty Meta-World manipulation tasks, RLBench tasks, and DeepMind Control environments. Evaluation reports success and return, learning curves, latent prediction visualizations, representation probes, mask ratios, reward supervision, convolutional versus patch masking, dynamics choices, parameter sharing, data augmentation, and sample efficiency.
summary.zh: Masked World Models 将机器人控制中的视觉表示学习与潜在动力学学习分开。卷积层把图像变成局部特征，其中大部分被遮蔽，视觉 Transformer 自编码器重建像素，辅助头预测奖励，使表示保留任务相关细节。每次更新动力学时固定自编码器，再由 RSSM 学习这些表示之间的动作条件转移；演员与评论家随后从想象的潜在轨迹中学习，新一轮在线交互继续补充训练样本，三类更新在整个学习过程中循环。实验覆盖五十个 Meta-World 操作任务、RLBench 和 DeepMind Control 环境，评估成功率与回报、学习曲线、潜在预测可视化、表示探针、遮蔽比例、奖励监督、卷积与 patch 遮蔽、动力学选择、参数共享、数据增强和样本效率。

applications: visual robotic control

name: Think2Drive
title: Think2Drive: Efficient Reinforcement Learning by Thinking with Latent World Model for Autonomous Driving (in CARLA-v2)

summary.en: Think2Drive is a model-based reinforcement-learning planner for CARLA Leaderboard v2 driving scenarios. Privileged scene information, including surrounding agents, obstacles, maps, traffic lights, route state, and semantic bird's-eye-view masks, is encoded by a DreamerV3-style recurrent state-space model. The model predicts latent transitions, rewards, continuation, and reconstructed scene state. An actor-critic planner trains through parallel fifteen-step imagined rollouts and outputs throttle, steering, and braking. The training system adds automated generation of scenario-dense routes, termination-priority replay, a steering smoothness cost, a warm-up curriculum, planner reinitialization, and an increasing planner-to-world-model update ratio. Experiments evaluate all 39 CARLA v2 scenarios, official v1 and v2 routes, CornerCaseRepo, route completion, infractions, scenario density, balanced driving score, world-model predictions, individual scenario success, and component ablations.
summary.zh: Think2Drive 是面向 CARLA Leaderboard v2 驾驶场景的基于模型强化学习规划器。周围交通参与者、障碍物、地图、信号灯、路线状态和语义鸟瞰掩码等特权场景信息，由 DreamerV3 式循环状态空间模型编码；模型预测潜在转移、奖励、继续状态及重建后的场景。演员—评论家规划器通过并行的十五步想象展开训练，并输出油门、转向和制动。训练系统还加入场景密集路线自动生成、终止优先回放、转向平滑代价、预热课程、规划器重置和递增的规划器更新比例。实验覆盖 CARLA v2 的三十九类场景、官方 v1/v2 路线和 CornerCaseRepo，评估路线完成、违规、场景密度、平衡驾驶分数、世界模型预测、单场景成功率及组件消融。

applications: autonomous driving; planner training

name: Echo-Memory
title: Echo-Memory: A Controlled Study of Memory in Action World Models

summary.en: Echo-Memory provides a controlled comparison of memory mechanisms for action-conditioned video world models. It fixes the video-diffusion backbone, optimizer, sampler, training data, camera-action representation, and evaluation pipeline, then varies only how historical observations are stored and read. The comparison covers raw visual context, compressed context, spatial summaries with alternative read-out paths, and state-space recurrence. Evaluation separates ordinary camera-trajectory replay from in-domain loop closure and open-domain leave-and-return tests with distinctive edited objects. Pixel metrics and semantic VLM checks measure whether scene layout and object identity survive a revisit. The resulting design matrix links memory capacity, compression, access, and recurrence to interactive rollout behavior under a common implementation.
summary.zh: Echo-Memory 对动作条件视频世界模型中的记忆机制进行受控比较。它固定视频扩散骨干、优化器、采样器、训练数据、相机动作表示和评估流程，只改变历史观察的存储与读取方式。比较范围包括原始视觉上下文、压缩上下文、采用不同读出路径的空间摘要，以及状态空间递归。评估将常规相机轨迹重放、域内闭环返回和开放域重访分开进行，并使用具有明确身份的编辑物体。像素指标与语义 VLM 检查共同判断重访后场景布局和物体身份是否保持。该设计矩阵在统一实现下分析记忆容量、压缩、访问路径与递归结构如何影响交互式视频展开。

applications: Interactive video worlds; memory-controlled camera rollouts

name: World-model Pipeline Attacks
title: Targeting World Models to Compromise Robot Learning Pipelines

summary.en: This work studies how visual world models can become an attack surface inside robot-learning pipelines. It introduces Visual Prompt Hijacking for text-conditioned generators and Visual Transition Hijacking for action-conditioned dynamics. Both attacks modify otherwise usable teleoperation inputs so that the world model produces adversarial synthetic trajectories. These trajectories are then consumed by downstream behavior-cloning or reinforcement-learning stages, connecting altered imagined state transitions to robot policy behavior. The formulation separates attack success under a trigger from stealth on ordinary observations. Experiments examine modern text- and action-conditioned world models, task specificity, prompt detail, distribution shift, and an end-to-end backdoor transferred through world-model-generated data into a learned control policy.
summary.zh: 该工作研究视觉世界模型接入机器人学习流程后形成的攻击面，并提出面向文本条件生成器的视觉提示劫持，以及面向动作条件动力学的视觉转移劫持。两种方法都对遥操作输入进行隐蔽修改，使世界模型生成带有目标行为的合成轨迹；这些轨迹随后进入行为克隆或强化学习阶段，从而把被改变的想象状态转移传递到机器人策略。目标函数分别衡量触发条件下的攻击效果与普通观察下的隐蔽性。实验覆盖文本条件和动作条件世界模型，并分析任务特异性、提示细节、分布变化及由合成数据向控制策略传递的端到端后门。

applications: Robot-learning security; synthetic-data integrity; policy training

name: BadWorld
title: BadWorld: Adversarial Attacks on World Models

summary.en: BadWorld formulates adversarial attacks specifically for autoregressive visual world models. Starting from a clean context image, it learns a small image perturbation that changes the model’s subsequent action-conditioned rollout without requiring a ground-truth future video. A self-supervised velocity objective uses the denoising model’s own early dynamics as the training signal. To make the perturbation effective when future controls are not known in advance, a bi-level procedure searches for difficult camera or discrete-action trajectories and updates the attack against them. Experiments span representative world models with continuous camera control and discrete user actions, measuring temporal rollout disruption, cross-trajectory behavior, transfer, perturbation constraints, and comparisons with attacks designed for conventional generation pipelines.
summary.zh: BadWorld 为自回归视觉世界模型专门定义对抗攻击。方法从干净的上下文图像出发，学习幅度受限的图像扰动，在不需要真实未来视频的条件下改变后续动作条件展开。自监督速度目标直接利用去噪模型早期动力学作为训练信号；当未来控制序列事先未知时，双层优化会搜索最难攻击的相机轨迹或离散动作轨迹，再针对这些控制更新扰动。实验覆盖连续相机控制与离散用户动作的代表性世界模型，评估时间展开变化、跨轨迹行为、模型间迁移、扰动约束，并与面向常规图像或视频生成流程的攻击方法进行统一比较。

applications: Interactive-world robustness; adversarial testing; visual privacy

name: CounterScene
title: CounterScene: Counterfactual Causal Reasoning in Generative World Models for Safety-Critical Closed-Loop Evaluation

summary.en: CounterScene generates safety-critical driving scenarios as targeted counterfactual interventions inside a diffusion world model. It builds a Conflict-Aware Interaction Graph from relative position, velocity, time-to-collision, and shared conflict regions, then selects the agent whose behavior is causally important for maintaining safety. Spatial guidance moves that agent toward the conflict region, while temporal guidance compresses its arrival time; the learned multi-agent dynamics generate the reactions of the remaining traffic participants. Progressive scheduling and regularization preserve scene structure during intervention. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate trajectory realism, collision rate, time horizons, causal versus proximity-based agent selection, and guidance components, followed by zero-shot transfer to nuPlan regions.
summary.zh: CounterScene 将安全关键驾驶场景生成表述为扩散世界模型中的定向反事实干预。它依据相对位置、速度、碰撞时间和共享冲突区域构建冲突感知交互图，并选择对维持安全最关键的交通参与者。空间引导把该参与者推向冲突区域，时间引导压缩其到达时刻，其余车辆的反应则由学习到的多智能体动力学生成；渐进式调度与正则化用于在干预过程中保持场景结构。论文在 nuScenes 上评估轨迹真实性、碰撞率、不同预测时域、因果选择与距离启发式选择，以及各引导组件，并进一步在多个 nuPlan 区域进行零样本迁移验证。

applications: Safety-critical driving simulation; counterfactual scenario generation

name: StressDream
title: StressDream: Steering Video World Models for Robust Policy Evaluation and Improvement

summary.en: StressDream steers video world-model imagination toward plausible, high-impact outcomes for robust policy analysis. At inference time, it optimizes the diffusion model’s initial noise using a VLM-derived semantic objective describing an event such as a collision or object spill. Gaussian typical-set and isotropy constraints keep the optimized noise within a likely region of the base model, preserving its learned outcome distribution. The method is applied to Vista for autonomous driving and Ctrl-World for robot manipulation. Steered rollouts reveal action-dependent failure possibilities, support trajectory-level risk assessment, and provide weights for policy fine-tuning that favor actions remaining successful across plausible alternatives. Experiments report target alignment, video quality, failure detection, policy ranking, and task success.
summary.zh: StressDream 在推理阶段把视频世界模型的想象引导到合理但影响较大的结果，用于稳健策略分析。它优化扩散模型的初始噪声，并以 VLM 语义目标描述碰撞、物体洒落等事件；高斯典型集与各向同性约束把噪声限制在基础模型的高概率区域，使结果仍对应其学到的分布。方法分别应用于自动驾驶的 Vista 和机器人操作的 Ctrl-World。引导后的展开能够揭示动作相关的失败可能，支持轨迹级风险评估，并为策略微调提供权重，使在多种合理未来中仍能成功的动作得到更高优先级。实验评估目标对齐、视频质量、失败检测、策略排序、任务成功与优化组件。

applications: Robust policy evaluation; robot manipulation; autonomous driving

name: MemoryVLA++
title: MemoryVLA++: Temporal Modeling via Memory and Imagination in Vision-Language-Action Models

summary.en: MemoryVLA++ equips a vision-language-action policy with complementary memory and imagination modules for temporally extended robot manipulation. A perceptual-cognitive memory bank stores and retrieves task-relevant observations, providing persistent context beyond the current camera view. In parallel, a learned world-model component predicts future latent visual states under the evolving interaction. Memory-guided integration combines retrieved history, imagined futures, language instructions, and present perception before producing robot actions. The system is evaluated across LIBERO, SimplerEnv, Mikasa-Robo, CALVIN, and Libero-Plus, together with real-robot tasks on three platforms. Experiments and ablations examine long-horizon execution, visual changes, memory retrieval, future prediction, and the contribution of each temporal component to action generation.
summary.zh: MemoryVLA++ 为视觉—语言—动作策略加入互补的记忆与想象模块，用于处理具有时间延展性的机器人操作。感知—认知记忆库持续保存并检索与任务相关的历史观察，使策略能够利用当前相机视野之外的上下文；并行的世界模型则根据交互进程预测未来潜在视觉状态。记忆引导的融合模块把检索到的历史、想象的未来、语言指令与当前感知共同整合，再输出机器人动作。系统在 LIBERO、SimplerEnv、Mikasa-Robo、CALVIN 和 Libero-Plus 上评估，并覆盖三类真实机器人平台及多种操作任务。实验与消融分析长程执行、视觉变化、记忆检索、未来预测，以及各时间建模组件对动作生成的作用。

applications: Long-horizon robot manipulation; vision-language-action control

name: Mem-World
title: Mem-World: Memory-Augmented Action-Conditioned World Models for Persistent Robot Manipulation

summary.en: Mem-World is an action-conditioned visual world model for persistent robot manipulation across changing viewpoints and extended interaction histories. It constructs an initial multi-view point-based scene map and maintains a wrist-view-centered 4D surfel memory as the robot acts. New observations update this memory, while geometry-aware retrieval selects historical content relevant to the current camera pose and predicted future. The generator conditions on robot actions, camera motion, retrieved history, and current visual evidence to produce temporally consistent multi-view rollouts. The resulting imagined trajectories are used both to evaluate candidate robot policies and to create synthetic experience for policy training. Experiments study long-horizon manipulation, viewpoint changes, memory persistence, rollout quality, policy assessment, and downstream control performance.
summary.zh: Mem-World 是面向持续机器人操作的动作条件视觉世界模型，重点处理视角变化与长程交互历史。它先由多视角观察构建点式场景地图，再在执行过程中维护以腕部相机视角为中心的四维 surfel 记忆；新观察持续更新记忆，几何感知检索则依据当前相机位姿和待预测未来选择相关历史。生成器联合使用机器人动作、相机运动、检索历史与当前视觉证据，产生跨视角且时间一致的未来展开。生成轨迹既用于评估候选机器人策略，也用于构造策略训练所需的合成经验。实验考察长程操作、视角切换、记忆持续性、展开质量、策略评估及下游控制表现。

applications: Persistent robot manipulation; policy evaluation; synthetic policy training

name: DIM-WAM
title: DIM-WAM: World-Action Modeling with Diverse Historical Event Memory

summary.en: DIM-WAM jointly models future visual observations and robot actions while preserving diverse task history. Its Diverse Historical Event Memory uses several bounded memory banks to retain complementary events rather than a single compressed record. Task-progress supervision organizes stored experience, redundancy-aware merging consolidates similar events, and a diversity objective encourages different banks to cover distinct parts of the interaction. Retrieved memories condition both the visual-world prediction stream and the action-generation stream, linking anticipated scene evolution to control. Evaluation includes RMBench and four real-world Franka manipulation tasks. The experiments compare memory and world-action baselines and analyze prediction, action execution, memory capacity, event diversity, retrieval behavior, and the contributions of progress supervision, merging, and multi-bank storage.
summary.zh: DIM-WAM 在保留多样任务历史的同时，联合建模未来视觉观察与机器人动作。其多样历史事件记忆由多个容量受限的记忆库组成，用互补事件替代单一压缩记录；任务进度监督组织已存经验，冗余度合并机制整合相似事件，多样性目标则促使不同记忆库覆盖交互中的不同阶段。检索历史同时条件化视觉世界预测和动作生成分支，把预期场景变化与控制连接起来。论文在 RMBench 和四项真实 Franka 操作任务上评估，并比较记忆及世界—动作建模基线，分析预测、动作执行、记忆容量、事件多样性、检索行为，以及进度监督、事件合并和多记忆库存储的作用。

applications: Long-horizon robot manipulation; joint visual and action prediction

name: Mind-Studio
title: Mind-Studio: Executable World Models with Lookahead Evaluation for Partially Observable Games

summary.en: Mind-Studio builds an executable symbolic world model for planning in partially observable games. It converts interaction observations into symbolic traces, selects informative transitions with an entropy-based criterion, and combines them with a reusable skill file. A language model then synthesizes code that represents entities, relations, and action-dependent transition rules as a runnable program. During control, the program predicts the next symbolic state and supports K-step lookahead for each candidate action; an LLM planner uses these simulated branches and can roll back to subgoals when execution diverges. Evaluation spans Montezuma’s Revenge, Assault, Alien, and Skiing in OC-Atari, measuring next-state prediction and game performance against direct LLM simulation and prior programmatic world-model approaches.
summary.zh: Mind-Studio 为部分可观察游戏中的规划构建可执行符号世界模型。系统先把交互观察转换为符号轨迹，利用基于熵的准则选择信息量较高的状态转移，再与可复用的技能文件结合；语言模型据此生成可运行代码，用实体、关系和动作依赖的转移规则表示环境。控制阶段，程序预测下一符号状态，并为每个候选动作执行 K 步前瞻；LLM 规划器读取这些模拟分支，在实际执行偏离时还可回退到先前子目标。论文在 OC-Atari 的 Montezuma’s Revenge、Assault、Alien 和 Skiing 上评估，以状态预测和游戏表现比较直接使用 LLM 模拟以及既有程序化世界模型方法，并分析轨迹选择、技能信息和前瞻机制的作用。

applications: Partially observable game planning; executable state simulation

name: DreamX-World 1.0
title: DreamX-World 1.0: A General-Purpose Interactive World Model

summary.en: DreamX-World 1.0 is a general-purpose interactive video world model spanning photorealistic, game-style, and stylized scenes. Its progressive training pipeline combines camera-accurate Unreal Engine trajectories, action-rich gameplay, and pose-recovered real videos. E-PRoPE injects camera trajectories efficiently, while geometry-based retrieval supplies non-local visual evidence when previously visited content leaves the context window. Residual recycling supports memory use, structured event instructions control multiple entities, and autoregressive distillation enables streaming generation. Evaluation covers short-clip visual quality and camera following, approximately 30-second rollouts, revisit-based scene-memory consistency, and human preference. The released system connects explicit camera and event controls with persistent visual-state generation across diverse domains.
summary.zh: DreamX-World 1.0 是覆盖写实、游戏和风格化场景的通用交互式视频世界模型。其渐进训练流程结合带精确相机几何的虚幻引擎轨迹、动作丰富的游戏记录和恢复相机位姿的真实视频。E-PRoPE 高效注入相机轨迹；当曾访问内容离开局部上下文后，基于几何的检索重新提供非局部视觉证据，残差回收用于稳健利用记忆。结构化事件指令控制多个实体，自回归蒸馏支持流式生成。评估覆盖短视频视觉质量与相机跟随、约三十秒长程展开、基于重访的场景记忆一致性和人工偏好，从而检验相机及事件控制与持续视觉状态生成。

applications: Interactive visual simulation; controllable long-horizon world generation

name: WorldVLN
title: WorldVLN: Autoregressive World Action Model for Aerial Vision-Language Navigation

summary.en: WorldVLN formulates aerial vision-language navigation as autoregressive world-action prediction. From a language instruction and egocentric observation history, a video-latent backbone predicts short-horizon world transitions and an action decoder converts the predicted representation into flight waypoints. After each waypoint is executed, the newly observed state is inserted into the autoregressive context, creating a closed observe–predict–act–update loop. Training first grounds the model with supervised navigation trajectories and then applies Action-aware GRPO to align imagined transitions with useful actions. Experiments use UAV-Flow and IndoorUAV across fixed and open instructions, compare VLA and navigation baselines, analyze the training components, and deploy the model on indoor and outdoor quadrotor platforms.
summary.zh: WorldVLN 将空中视觉语言导航表述为自回归世界—动作预测。模型根据语言指令和第一视角观察历史，用视频潜在骨干预测短程世界转移，再由动作解码器把预测表示转换为飞行航点。每个航点执行后，新观察会写回自回归上下文，形成观察、预测、行动和更新的闭环。训练首先利用监督导航轨迹完成状态与动作接地，随后通过 Action-aware GRPO 使想象的转移更适合动作选择。实验在 UAV-Flow 和 IndoorUAV 的固定及开放指令设置中比较 VLA 与导航基线，分析训练组件，并把模型部署到室内和室外四旋翼平台，检验长程状态更新与真实飞行执行。

applications: Aerial vision-language navigation; closed-loop UAV control

name: WebWorld
title: WebWorld: A Large-Scale World Model for Web Agent Training

summary.en: WebWorld is a language-based browser world model trained to predict web-environment transitions after agent actions. Its data pipeline assembles more than one million real-world interaction trajectories and normalizes accessibility trees, HTML, Markdown, and Playwright-style states into compatible representations. The model reasons about an action before generating the next page state and supports histories of up to thirty interaction turns, multi-tab behavior, and open-web domains. Web2NAL evaluates factual transition correctness, perceptual realism, semantic and fine-grained sensitivity, multi-page behavior, representation formats, and natural-language actions. The 8B, 14B, and 32B variants are also used to generate simulated experience for web-agent training, connecting persistent software-state prediction with downstream policy learning.
summary.zh: WebWorld 是在智能体动作后预测网页环境转移的语言式浏览器世界模型。其数据流程收集并过滤超过一百万条真实网页交互轨迹，把无障碍树、HTML、Markdown 和 Playwright 状态统一为兼容表示。模型先推理动作影响，再生成下一页面状态，支持最长三十轮历史、多标签页行为与开放网页领域。Web2NAL 从事实转移正确性、感知真实性、语义及细粒度敏感性、多页面行为、不同表示格式和自然语言动作等方面评估模型。8B、14B 与 32B 版本还用于为网页智能体训练生成模拟经验，从而把持续的软件状态预测连接到下游策略学习。

applications: Web-agent simulation; offline agent training; browser state prediction

name: ViMo
title: ViMo: A Generative Visual GUI World Model for App Agents

summary.en: ViMo is a generative visual world model for mobile-app interfaces. It represents each text region with a styled rectangular symbol, forming a Symbolic Text Representation that separates layout and graphics from textual content. Given the current interface and a user action, a diffusion-based STR predictor generates the next symbolic GUI; an LLM-based text predictor then fills the generated regions with corresponding interface text. This two-stage state transition preserves pixel-level layout while making text generation explicit. The model is evaluated on next-interface generation, visual and functional measures, and ablations of the representation and predictors. Generated future GUIs are additionally supplied to app agents for step-wise action prediction and tested in online navigation across previously unseen applications.
summary.zh: ViMo 是面向移动应用界面的生成式视觉世界模型。它把每个文本区域替换为具有边框和填充样式的矩形符号，形成符号文本表示，将界面布局与图形同具体文字内容分离。给定当前界面和用户动作，基于扩散的 STR 预测器生成下一符号界面，再由基于 LLM 的文本预测器为相应区域填入界面文字，因而以两阶段方式实现动作条件状态转移。论文评估下一界面生成的视觉及功能指标，并消融表示与预测组件；生成的未来 GUI 还会提供给应用智能体辅助逐步动作预测，并在未见应用的在线导航中检验实际交互用途。

applications: Mobile app agents; visual GUI transition prediction

name: Computer-Using World Model
title: Computer-Using World Model

summary.en: The Computer-Using World Model simulates desktop productivity software for test-time agent planning. Given a current screenshot and candidate UI action, its first stage predicts a structured natural-language description of the localized, decision-relevant change. A second visual-realization stage conditions on that transition and the current screen to synthesize the next screenshot while retaining unchanged regions. The model is trained from annotated offline interface transitions and refined to make textual changes concise and useful for decisions. At inference time, a computer-use agent rolls out alternative actions through the model and searches the imagined outcomes before acting in the real application. Experiments across Microsoft Office tasks evaluate transition modeling and the effect of world-model-guided search on agent decisions and execution.
summary.zh: Computer-Using World Model 为桌面生产力软件提供测试时智能体模拟。给定当前截图和候选界面动作，第一阶段预测结构化自然语言变化，描述局部且与决策相关的状态转移；第二个视觉实现阶段以该转移和当前屏幕为条件，合成下一截图并保留未变化区域。模型主要从带标注的离线界面转移中训练，再通过强化学习使文字变化更精炼并服务决策。推理时，计算机使用智能体先在模型中展开多个候选动作并搜索想象结果，再在真实应用中执行。Microsoft Office 任务实验同时评估状态转移建模，以及世界模型引导搜索对动作决策和执行的作用。

applications: Desktop-agent planning; Microsoft Office interaction; action search

name: RoboWorld
title: RoboWorld: Fast and Reliable Neural Simulators for Generalist Robot Policy Evaluation

summary.en: RoboWorld provides an automated neural simulator for evaluating generalist robot policies. Its causal video world model uses StepForcing, which reconstructs clean frames from one-step self-forwarded priors while interleaving data-derived anchor contexts under the same few-step schedule used at inference. A policy receives generated multi-view observations, emits an action, and the model predicts the next observation, forming a closed-loop rollout. Robot joint commands are converted into kinematically consistent end-effector conditioning, and a task-progress-aware VLM judge scores the resulting trajectory. Training uses DROID and evaluation uses three-view, 300-frame RoboArena episodes. Experiments compare generation quality and throughput and measure how simulated success rates rank nine generalist policy variants relative to real-world evaluation.
summary.zh: RoboWorld 为通用机器人策略提供自动化神经模拟器。其因果视频世界模型采用 StepForcing：在与推理相同的少步去噪日程下，从单步自前馈先验重建清晰帧，并穿插来自真实数据的锚点上下文。策略接收生成的多视角观察、输出动作，模型再预测下一观察，从而形成闭环展开。系统把机器人关节指令转换为运动学一致的末端执行器条件，并由任务进度感知的 VLM 评判器为整段轨迹打分。模型使用 DROID 训练，在三视角、三百帧的 RoboArena 片段上评估；实验比较生成质量与吞吐率，并检验模拟成功率对九种通用策略的排序是否与真实机器人评估一致。

applications: Generalist robot-policy evaluation; closed-loop neural simulation

name: SPIRAL
title: SPIRAL: A Closed-Loop Framework for Self-Improving Action World Models via Reflective Planning Agents

summary.en: SPIRAL turns long-horizon action-conditioned video generation into a closed planning and reflection loop. A PlanAgent decomposes a high-level goal into ordered sub-actions. For each step, a VideoGenerator produces the next segment from the current sub-action and accumulated history; a CriticAgent evaluates the intermediate result and supplies corrective feedback, while ContextMemory retains visual and semantic state across segments. The same interaction traces support post-training: curriculum-generated plans and critic rewards drive GRPO updates of the video generator. The work also contributes ActVideoGen-Dataset and ActVideoGen-Bench. Experiments separately assess planning, critic alignment, visual fidelity, temporal coherence, and action accuracy, then apply the framework across several text-to-video and image-to-video backbones.
summary.zh: SPIRAL 把长程动作条件视频生成改写为闭环规划与反思过程。PlanAgent 将高层目标分解为有序子动作；每一步中，VideoGenerator 根据当前子动作和累积历史生成下一视频片段，CriticAgent 检查中间结果并给出修正反馈，ContextMemory 则在片段之间保留视觉与语义状态。相同交互轨迹还能用于后训练：课程式生成的计划和评判器奖励共同驱动视频生成器的 GRPO 更新。该工作同时提供 ActVideoGen-Dataset 与 ActVideoGen-Bench。实验分别检验规划、评判对齐、视觉质量、时间一致性和动作准确性，并把闭环框架应用到多种文生视频及图生视频骨干上。

applications: Long-horizon action-conditioned video generation; reflective model post-training

name: WoVR
title: WoVR: World Models as Reliable Simulators for Post-Training VLA Policies with RL

summary.en: WoVR uses an action-controllable video world model as a simulator for reinforcement-learning post-training of vision-language-action policies. The model generates closed-loop visual rollouts from robot actions in chunks. Keyframe Intervention Rollout periodically inserts grounded observations to shorten effective prediction depth, while the policy objective accounts for confidence in imagined outcomes. Policy-Aligned Co-Evolution collects a limited set of real trajectories from the updated policy and uses them for low-frequency world-model refinement, keeping the simulator aligned with the policy distribution without continuous physical interaction. Experiments evaluate long-horizon video quality, control, and throughput, then train policies in imagination on LIBERO and transfer them to real manipulation tasks, reporting world-model metrics and downstream task success.
summary.zh: WoVR 把动作可控视频世界模型用作视觉—语言—动作策略强化学习后训练的模拟器。模型根据机器人动作按片段生成闭环视觉展开；关键帧干预展开会周期性插入有依据的观察，以缩短有效预测深度，策略目标同时考虑想象结果的可信度。策略对齐协同演化从更新后的策略收集少量真实轨迹，以低频方式细化世界模型，使模拟器随策略分布变化而重新对齐，无需持续进行物理交互。实验先评估长程视频质量、动作控制和推理吞吐率，再在 LIBERO 中利用想象轨迹训练策略并迁移到真实操作任务，同时报告世界模型指标和下游任务成功率。

applications: VLA reinforcement learning; imagined robot-policy optimization

name: World-VLA-Loop
title: World-VLA-Loop: Closed-Loop Learning of Video World Model and VLA Policy

summary.en: World-VLA-Loop co-trains an action-conditioned video world model and a vision-language-action policy through repeated simulation and real interaction. Its Successful-And-Near-Success dataset pairs completed trajectories with closely related failure outcomes, providing supervision for fine-grained action consequences. The world model jointly predicts future frames and a binary task-success signal, so imagined rollouts supply both observations and rewards for VLA reinforcement learning. A small number of demonstrations adapts the simulator to a new setting. After policy optimization, selected real-world rollouts augment the world-model data and begin another refinement cycle. Experiments measure video and reward alignment, reinforcement-learning gains on LIBERO, transfer to physical manipulation tasks, and the effect of iterative world-model and policy updates.
summary.zh: World-VLA-Loop 通过反复的模拟与真实交互，协同训练动作条件视频世界模型和视觉—语言—动作策略。其“成功与近成功”数据集把完成轨迹和结果相近但未完成的轨迹配对，为细粒度动作后果提供监督。世界模型联合预测未来视频帧和二值任务成功信号，因此想象展开能同时向 VLA 强化学习提供观察与奖励；少量演示用于把模拟器适配到新场景。策略优化后，选取的真实机器人轨迹会补充世界模型训练数据，并启动下一轮细化。实验评估视频与奖励对齐、LIBERO 上的强化学习提升、向真实操作任务的迁移，以及多轮世界模型和策略更新的作用。

applications: Robot-policy reinforcement learning; world-model and policy co-evolution

name: MotuBrain
title: MotuBrain: An Advanced World Action Model for Robot Control

summary.en: MotuBrain is a unified world-action model that predicts visual dynamics and robot control within one architecture. A three-stream Mixture-of-Transformers processes language instructions, multi-view video tokens, and action tokens, while H-bridge attention regulates information exchange among the streams. View-dependent 3D rotary offsets align multiple camera inputs. The system is initialized from a pretrained video foundation model, adapted with robot trajectories, and accelerated through sparse updates, step distillation, and inference optimizations. Joint video and action modeling lets future visual states inform action generation without a separate inverse-dynamics stage. Evaluation covers simulation and physical robots, including fifty clean and randomized manipulation tasks, multi-stage and contact-rich interactions, task-scaling and data-scaling studies, generalization tests, and component ablations.
summary.zh: MotuBrain 在统一架构中同时预测视觉动力学与机器人控制。三流 Mixture-of-Transformers 分别处理语言指令、多视角视频令牌和动作令牌，H-bridge 注意力调节三条信息流之间的交互，依赖视角的三维旋转位置偏移用于对齐多个相机输入。系统从预训练视频基础模型初始化，再用机器人轨迹适配，并通过稀疏更新、步数蒸馏和推理优化加速。联合视频—动作建模使预测的未来视觉状态直接参与动作生成，无需独立逆动力学阶段。评估覆盖仿真与真实机器人，包括五十项干净及随机化操作任务、多阶段和接触密集交互、任务与数据规模分析、泛化测试和组件消融。

applications: Generalist robot control; multi-view manipulation

name: RynnWorld-4D
title: RynnWorld-4D: 4D Embodied World Models for Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: RynnWorld-4D predicts embodied scene evolution with synchronized RGB, depth, and optical-flow videos. Depth lifts image pixels into 3D, while depth and flow together recover per-point 3D scene motion, giving the model an explicit projective representation of 4D state. A tri-branch diffusion architecture exchanges features among appearance, geometry, and motion streams and uses frame-wise 3D rotary positions to keep them aligned. Training draws on Rynn4DDataset 1.0, containing more than 254.4 million pseudo-labeled frames from human and robot manipulation. RynnWorld-4D-Policy attaches an inverse-dynamics head to the learned 4D representation and emits robot actions in one forward pass. Experiments evaluate future generation and closed-loop dexterous bimanual manipulation.
summary.zh: RynnWorld-4D 通过同步生成 RGB、深度和光流视频来预测具身场景演化。深度把图像像素提升到三维空间，深度与光流又可共同恢复逐点三维场景运动，从而形成显式的投影式四维状态表示。三分支扩散架构在外观、几何和运动信息流之间交换特征，并用逐帧三维旋转位置编码保持跨模态对齐。训练采用 Rynn4DDataset 1.0，其中包含超过 2.544 亿帧来自人类及机器人操作视频的伪标注数据。RynnWorld-4D-Policy 在内部四维表示上连接逆动力学头，以单次前向传播输出机器人动作；实验同时评估未来生成和闭环灵巧双臂操作。

applications: 4D robot-world prediction; dexterous bimanual manipulation

name: Delta-JEPA
title: Delta-JEPA: Learning Action-Sensitive World Models via Latent Difference Decoding

summary.en: Delta-JEPA learns a compact, reconstruction-free world model whose latent transitions remain sensitive to actions. A visual encoder maps consecutive observations into states, and a forward predictor estimates the next latent state from the current state and continuous action. Its Latent Difference Action Decoder reconstructs the executed action from the displacement between adjacent latent states rather than from the two endpoints concatenated together. The resulting joint objective trains action-distinguishable dynamics for imagined planning without pixel reconstruction or task rewards. Evaluation uses model-predictive rollouts in Two-Room navigation, Reacher, Push-T, and OGB-Cube manipulation. Experiments report planning success against JEPA-based and representation-learning baselines and analyze latent structure, action recovery, collapse behavior, regularization, and alternative inverse-decoder designs.
summary.zh: Delta-JEPA 学习无需像素重建且对动作敏感的紧凑潜在世界模型。视觉编码器把连续观察映射为状态，前向预测器根据当前潜在状态和连续动作估计下一状态。潜在差分动作解码器不拼接两个端点，而是从相邻状态的位移中重建实际动作，使不同动作在潜在转移中保持可区分。联合目标因此能在没有任务奖励和像素重建的条件下训练可用于想象规划的动力学。评估在 Two-Room 导航、Reacher、Push-T 和 OGB-Cube 操作中执行模型预测展开；实验报告相对 JEPA 与表示学习基线的规划成功率，并分析潜在结构、动作恢复、表示稳定性、正则化和不同逆解码设计。

applications: Latent model-predictive planning; continuous robot control

name: UniDrive-WM
title: UniDrive-WM: Unified Understanding, Planning and Generation World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: UniDrive-WM unifies driving-scene understanding, trajectory planning, and future image generation in one vision-language world model. A QT-Former encodes multi-view cameras, temporal history, perception queries, and scene cues into the language-model reasoning space. The planner predicts a differentiable distribution over future waypoints, connecting multimodal reasoning to numeric vehicle motion. Those waypoints then condition future front-view generation through either discrete autoregressive visual tokens or a continuous diffusion pathway. Generated futures provide additional supervision for understanding and plan refinement, allowing information to circulate among state estimation, action, and prediction. Bench2Drive experiments evaluate scene reasoning, trajectory error, collision rate, image quality, and planning performance, and compare the two visual output representations through controlled architectural and training ablations.
summary.zh: UniDrive-WM 在一个视觉语言世界模型中统一驾驶场景理解、轨迹规划和未来图像生成。QT-Former 把多视角相机、时间历史、感知查询和场景线索编码到语言模型推理空间；规划器预测未来航点的可微分分布，将多模态推理连接到数值车辆运动。预测航点随后通过离散自回归视觉令牌或连续扩散路径条件化未来前视图生成。生成的未来又为场景理解和规划细化提供附加监督，使状态估计、动作与预测之间可以双向传递信息。Bench2Drive 实验评估场景推理、轨迹误差、碰撞率、图像质量和规划表现，并通过受控架构及训练消融比较两种视觉输出表示。

applications: End-to-end autonomous driving; trajectory-conditioned future generation

name: RaWMPC
title: Risk-Aware World Model Predictive Control for Generalizable End-to-End Autonomous Driving

summary.en: RaWMPC is a risk-aware world-model predictive controller for end-to-end autonomous driving. From multi-view observations and ego state, an action-conditioned model rolls out several candidate behaviors and predicts their future semantic scene states together with safety-critical events such as vehicle, pedestrian, and static-object collisions. The controller evaluates an explicit risk cost and executes a low-risk candidate. A risk-aware interaction strategy deliberately gathers both ordinary and hazardous simulator trajectories so these outcomes enter the learned transition model. Self-evaluation distillation then transfers the controller’s action ranking into an efficient generative proposal policy. Experiments on Bench2Drive and NAVSIM evaluate closed-loop driving, safety, robustness under domain shift, variants with and without offline warm-up, and the contributions of interaction and distillation.
summary.zh: RaWMPC 是面向端到端自动驾驶的风险感知世界模型预测控制器。系统从多视角观察和自车状态出发，让动作条件模型展开多个候选行为，并预测相应的未来语义场景状态及车辆、行人和静态物体碰撞等安全事件；控制器依据显式风险代价选择低风险动作。风险感知交互策略在模拟器中主动收集常规与危险轨迹，使关键后果进入所学习的状态转移。随后，自评估蒸馏把控制器的候选排序能力迁移到高效生成式动作提议策略。Bench2Drive 与 NAVSIM 实验评估闭环驾驶、安全性、分布变化下的稳健性、有无离线预热的设置，以及交互和蒸馏组件的作用。

applications: Risk-aware autonomous driving; world-model predictive control

name: RAVEN
title: RAVEN: Long-Horizon Reasoning and Navigation with a Visuo-Spatio-Temporal Memory

summary.en: RAVEN is a visuo-spatio-temporal memory for long-horizon robot reasoning and navigation. During exploration, it stores multimodal visual embeddings together with camera pose and timestamp in a vector database and grounds observations in a spatial map. An agentic retrieval loop decomposes natural-language queries, searches the visual memory, and reasons over semantic, spatial, and temporal evidence without first converting every frame into a caption. Retrieved locations can become navigation goals. Evaluation uses RAVEN-QA, NaVQA, FindingDory, simulated and real trajectories, scaling histories to thousands of frames and measuring retrieval accuracy, information retention, compression, and cost. A Unitree Go1 deployment combines the memory with RGB-D mapping, frontier exploration, A* planning, and natural-language goal reaching in large indoor environments.
summary.zh: RAVEN 是用于长程机器人推理与导航的视觉—空间—时间记忆。探索过程中，系统把多模态视觉嵌入与相机位姿、时间戳共同存入向量数据库，并在空间地图中定位观察。智能体式检索循环分解自然语言查询，搜索视觉记忆并结合语义、空间和时间证据推理，无需先把每一帧转换为文字描述；检索位置还可直接成为导航目标。评估使用 RAVEN-QA、NaVQA、FindingDory 以及仿真和真实轨迹，将记忆历史扩展到数千帧，并测量检索准确率、信息保留、压缩和开销。Unitree Go1 部署进一步结合 RGB-D 建图、前沿探索、A* 规划和自然语言目标到达。

applications: Long-horizon robot memory; open-vocabulary navigation; embodied question answering

name: S2-VLA
title: S2-VLA: State-Space Guided Vision-Language-Action Models for Long-Horizon Manipulation

summary.en: S²-VLA introduces a compact task belief state for long-horizon vision-language-action control. Its State-Space Guided Adaptive Attention recurrently updates the belief from visual observations, language instructions, and prior actions. The state then controls gates over three information streams: local spatial features needed for manipulation, semantic goal information, and temporal action history. This lets the same 2B-parameter policy change its multimodal emphasis as a task moves from interpretation and approach to contact and completion. The model directly emits executable robot actions through a belief-state-space interface. Experiments on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, and ALOHA compare larger VLA baselines, examine multi-step task success, and analyze belief updates, adaptive gates, error propagation, model scale, and individual architectural components.
summary.zh: S²-VLA 为长程视觉—语言—动作控制引入紧凑任务信念状态。状态空间引导自适应注意力根据视觉观察、语言指令和先前动作递归更新该状态，再由它控制三条信息流的门控权重：操作所需的局部空间特征、语义目标信息和时间动作历史。因此，同一个 20 亿参数策略能随任务从理解、接近、接触到完成的阶段变化而调整多模态侧重，并通过信念状态空间接口直接输出可执行机器人动作。论文在 LIBERO、SimplerEnv 和 ALOHA 上比较更大规模 VLA 基线，评估多步骤任务成功，并分析信念更新、自适应门控、误差传播、模型规模和各架构组件。

applications: Long-horizon robot manipulation; phase-adaptive VLA control

name: CascadeOcc
title: CascadeOcc: Rethinking 3D Occupancy World Models with Cascaded VQ Representations

summary.en: CascadeOcc is an autoregressive occupancy world model for driving-scene forecasting and motion planning. A cascaded vector-quantized tokenizer represents each semantic 3D occupancy grid at coarse and fine scales, retaining global layout and local object detail. The forecasting transformer predicts future occupancy tokens and ego pose. Its TimeMixer extends the hierarchy through time: a coarse pathway captures longer-range context, a fine pathway preserves short-range motion, and gated cross-scale residual attention combines both for each prediction step. Training separates occupancy reconstruction from future forecasting. Evaluation on Occ3D-nuScenes measures 3D reconstruction and 4D occupancy evolution with IoU and class mIoU, while nuScenes planning reports trajectory L2 error and collision rate, together with scale, tokenizer, and temporal-mixing ablations.
summary.zh: CascadeOcc 是用于驾驶场景预测与运动规划的自回归占用世界模型。级联向量量化分词器以粗细两个尺度表示语义三维占用网格，同时保留全局布局和局部物体细节；预测变换器联合生成未来占用令牌和自车位姿。TimeMixer 进一步把层级结构扩展到时间轴：粗路径捕获较长范围上下文，细路径保存短程运动，门控跨尺度残差注意力在每个预测步骤融合两者。训练分为占用重建和未来预测两个阶段。Occ3D-nuScenes 实验用 IoU 与类别 mIoU 评估三维重建和四维占用演化，nuScenes 规划则报告轨迹 L2 误差与碰撞率，并分析分词尺度和时间混合组件。

applications: 4D occupancy forecasting; autonomous-driving motion planning

name: World Model Agentic Training
title: Internalizing the Future: A Unified Agentic Training Paradigm for World Model Planning

summary.en: World Model Agentic Training internalizes future simulation inside one autoregressive language agent. During mid-training, trajectories are augmented at randomly selected decision points with a plan-conditioned account of likely future milestones and an estimated probability of success. Foresight Elicitation supervised fine-tuning teaches the model to produce this structured simulation before acting. Foresight-Calibrated reinforcement learning then compares predicted confidence with actual execution outcomes and optimizes both the forecast and the subsequent policy action. The resulting model does not call a separate simulator or value head. Experiments cover seven search-augmented question-answering datasets and AIME 2024–2026 mathematical reasoning, measuring task performance, forecast calibration, stage dependencies, simulation grounding, and the contribution of future-state versus confidence supervision.
summary.zh: World Model Agentic Training 把未来模拟内化到单个自回归语言智能体中。中期训练会在轨迹中随机选择决策点，插入针对当前计划的未来里程碑描述和成功概率估计；“前瞻引出”监督微调教模型在行动前生成这种结构化模拟，“前瞻校准”强化学习再把预测置信度与真实执行结果对应，同时优化预测和后续策略动作。整个过程不调用独立模拟器或价值头。实验覆盖七个带搜索的单跳及多跳问答数据集和 AIME 2024–2026 数学推理，评估任务表现、预测校准、训练阶段依赖、模拟接地，以及未来状态与成功置信监督各自的作用。

applications: Search agents; mathematical reasoning; future-aware policy training

name: PhysReflect-VLA
title: PhysReflect-VLA: Physical Feasibility and Self-Reflective Regulation for Reliable Vision-Language-Action Policies

summary.en: PhysReflect-VLA adds physical feasibility checking and online reflection to a pretrained vision-language-action policy. For each observation and instruction, the policy samples several action segments. A forward model rolls each candidate through abstract future states, while an inverse model reconstructs the action that could explain every predicted transition. Forward–inverse consistency produces an energy used to rank physical admissibility before execution. After the selected segment runs, the observed state is compared with its prediction. Persistent discrepancies trigger a reflection model that generates corrective guidance and conditions subsequent action sampling. Training progresses through transition-model pretraining, evaluator refinement, policy alignment, and teacher-annotated correction data. Five real-robot, multi-stage contact-rich tasks evaluate action selection, recovery, stage stability, and overall success with OpenVLA-based policies.
summary.zh: PhysReflect-VLA 为预训练视觉—语言—动作策略加入物理可行性检查和在线反思。每次观察和指令到来后，策略采样多个动作片段；前向模型把每个候选递归展开为抽象未来状态，逆模型再重建能够解释每次预测转移的动作，二者一致性能量用于在执行前排序物理可行性。选定片段执行后，系统比较真实状态与预测状态；持续偏差会触发反思模型生成修正指引，并条件化后续动作采样。训练依次进行转移模型预训练、评估器细化、策略对齐和教师标注纠错学习。五项真实机器人多阶段接触任务评估候选选择、失败恢复、阶段稳定性和整体成功率。

applications: Reliable robot manipulation; feasibility-aware VLA control

name: IOI
title: IOI: Decoupling Kinematics and Physics for Interactive World Models

summary.en: IOI is a hybrid interactive world model that separates deterministic robot motion from learned scene dynamics. Given a joint or end-effector action sequence and the robot URDF, analytic forward kinematics computes the articulated 3D trajectory. The trajectory is projected into synchronized front, side, and top orthographic views, producing camera-calibration-free geometric controls. A Multi-view Kinematic Aggregation and Injection module encodes and fuses these controls into a diffusion video backbone, which generates object, contact, and environmental responses around the precisely specified robot motion. Experiments use three RoboTwin simulation settings and two real-world platforms, measuring temporal coherence, structural preservation, perceptual quality, action following, out-of-distribution task transfer, and agreement between policy evaluation in generated rollouts and ground-truth environments.
summary.zh: IOI 是把确定性机器人运动与学习式场景动力学分离的混合交互世界模型。给定关节或末端动作序列和机器人 URDF，解析前向运动学先计算三维关节轨迹，再把它投影为同步的正面、侧面和顶部正交视图，形成无需相机外参的几何控制。多视角运动学聚合与注入模块编码并融合这些条件，将其送入扩散视频骨干，由神经生成器补全围绕精确机器人运动的物体、接触与环境响应。实验覆盖三个 RoboTwin 仿真设置和两个真实平台，评估时间一致性、结构保持、感知质量、动作跟随、分布外任务迁移，以及生成展开中的策略评估与真实环境结果的一致性。

applications: Interactive robot simulation; world-model policy evaluation

name: NavWM
title: NavWM: A Unified Navigation World Model for Foresight-Driven Planning

summary.en: NavWM unifies scene representation, future generation, and action planning for visual navigation. Latent World Tokens distill geometric and semantic priors from the current observation and history into a structured internal state. From this state, the model predicts several feasible future trajectories rather than one deterministic path and generates corresponding visual futures. A planner compares these imagined outcomes, selects an action sequence, executes it, and updates the model with the next observation, forming a closed foresight loop. Joint training aligns latent scene reasoning, multimodal action prediction, and video generation. Experiments evaluate future-simulation fidelity and zero-shot navigation across diverse environments, compare reactive and world-model baselines, and analyze trajectory diversity, world-token structure, visual foresight, closed-loop selection, and individual objectives.
summary.zh: NavWM 统一视觉导航中的场景表示、未来生成与动作规划。潜在世界令牌把当前观察和历史中的几何、语义先验蒸馏为结构化内部状态；模型由此预测多个可行未来轨迹，而非单一确定路径，并为每条轨迹生成相应视觉未来。规划器比较这些想象结果，选择动作序列并执行，再用下一观察更新模型，形成闭环前瞻。联合训练对齐潜在场景推理、多模态动作预测和视频生成。实验在多类环境中评估未来模拟质量与零样本导航，比较反应式和世界模型基线，并分析轨迹多样性、世界令牌结构、视觉前瞻、闭环选择和各训练目标。

applications: Foresight-driven visual navigation; zero-shot closed-loop planning

name: EV-WM
title: EV-WM: Event-Verified World Models for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: EV-WM augments a visual-feature world model with task-grounded event prediction for robot planning. A frozen encoder and action-conditioned latent dynamics model roll out each candidate action window. A predicate decoder then reads task events from the imagined future—such as whether an object moved, a drawer opened, a support relation holds, or a precondition was satisfied. The event verifier assembles these predictions into a score card, and a conservative gate combines expected progress with uncertainty before Cross-Entropy Method search selects an executable action. The visual model need not reconstruct pixels or expose symbolic state directly. Experiments span PointMaze and manipulation settings, compare matched feature-distance planners, and evaluate planning success, event prediction, verifier ranking, calibration, gate behavior, and component ablations.
summary.zh: EV-WM 为视觉特征世界模型加入任务接地的事件预测，用于机器人规划。冻结视觉编码器和动作条件潜在动力学模型先展开每个候选动作窗口；谓词解码器再从想象未来中读取任务事件，例如物体是否移动、抽屉是否打开、支撑关系是否成立或前置条件是否满足。事件验证器把结果组织为评分卡，保守门控结合任务进展与不确定性，再由交叉熵方法搜索选择可执行动作。视觉模型无需重建像素，也不必直接暴露符号状态。实验覆盖 PointMaze 和操作任务，比较匹配的特征距离规划器，并评估规划成功、事件预测、验证排序、校准、门控行为和组件消融。

applications: Event-verified robot planning; long-horizon manipulation

name: Dream-Tac
title: Dream-Tac: A Unified Tactile World Action Model for Contact-Rich Robot Manipulation

summary.en: Dream-Tac is a unified tactile world-action model for contact-rich robot manipulation. It extends a pretrained video generator with tactile observation and action streams and jointly predicts future visual frames, future tactile signals, and robot actions. Contact-gated visuo-tactile fusion activates local touch information when interaction begins, while a contact-aware attention bias emphasizes brief events such as contact onset, slip, and release instead of treating all tactile tokens equally. A dual-level acceleration design reduces both generative sampling and control latency. Experiments on six real-world manipulation tasks evaluate contact-sensitive execution, future prediction, training and inference efficiency, and generalization under changed objects and environments. Controlled ablations isolate tactile fusion, event weighting, joint prediction, and acceleration components.
summary.zh: Dream-Tac 是用于接触密集机器人操作的统一触觉世界—动作模型。它在预训练视频生成器上增加触觉观察与动作信息流，联合预测未来视觉帧、未来触觉信号和机器人动作。接触门控视觉—触觉融合在交互开始时启用局部触觉信息，接触感知注意力偏置则突出接触发生、滑移和释放等短暂事件，而不把所有触觉令牌同等处理。双层加速设计同时降低生成采样和控制延迟。六项真实机器人操作实验评估接触敏感执行、未来预测、训练与推理效率，以及物体和环境变化下的泛化；受控消融分别分析触觉融合、事件加权、联合预测和加速组件。

applications: Contact-rich robot manipulation; visuo-tactile control

name: EventVLA
title: EventVLA: Event-Driven Visual Evidence Memory for Long-Horizon Vision-Language-Action Policies

summary.en: EventVLA equips a vision-language-action policy with sparse visual evidence memory for non-Markovian manipulation. Rule-based anchors identify predictable task boundaries, while Keyframe Evidence Memory anticipates which transient observations may be needed later and stores only those frames. During action generation, the policy retrieves relevant evidence—such as an object's earlier position or whether an intermediate event already occurred—without replaying a dense visual history. The work also introduces RoboTwin-MeM, where tasks explicitly require one to five unpredictable intermediate keyframes over hundreds of control steps. Evaluation covers seventeen simulation and four real-world tasks, comparing recurrent and buffer-based memory policies and measuring long-horizon success, evidence selection, retrieval, memory size, latency, and the contribution of anchors and foresight.
summary.zh: EventVLA 为视觉—语言—动作策略加入稀疏视觉证据记忆，以处理非马尔可夫操作。规则式锚点识别可预期的任务边界，关键帧证据记忆则预判哪些短暂观察可能在后续有用，只保存这些帧。生成动作时，策略检索相关证据，例如物体先前位置或某个中间事件是否已经发生，而无需重放稠密视觉历史。工作还提出 RoboTwin-MeM，任务在数百个控制步骤中明确要求记住一到五个不可预知的中间关键帧。评估覆盖十七项仿真和四项真实任务，比较递归及缓冲区记忆策略，并测量长程成功、证据选择、检索、记忆规模、延迟及锚点与前瞻模块的作用。

applications: Non-Markovian robot manipulation; memory-aware VLA control

name: CaR
title: Compression and Retrieval: Implicit Memory Retrieval for Video World Models

summary.en: CaR adds implicit long-term retrieval to camera-controllable video world models. Rather than selecting a few historical frames with a fixed heuristic, it compresses the full context into tokens and lets the generator attend to whichever evidence supports the target view. Camera projection matrices encode relative viewpoint geometry. A zero-initialized Retrieval Attention branch operates beside the pretrained self-attention path, and a dual-branch context encoder preserves low-resolution scene structure plus selected high-resolution detail while reducing context tokens by about 97 percent. Training combines SceneFly, an Unreal Engine dataset with revisit trajectories and exact poses, with real SpatialVid video. Experiments evaluate video extension, scene revisiting, discontinuous hard cuts, generation quality, memory consistency, retrieval behavior, and compute cost.
summary.zh: CaR 为相机可控视频世界模型加入隐式长程检索。它不使用固定启发式挑选少量历史帧，而是把完整上下文压缩为令牌，让生成器自行注意与目标视角相关的证据；相机投影矩阵用于编码相对视点几何。零初始化的检索注意力分支与预训练自注意力并行，双分支上下文编码器同时保留低分辨率场景结构和高分辨率细节，并把上下文令牌减少约百分之九十七。训练结合带精确位姿和重访轨迹的虚幻引擎 SceneFly 数据与真实 SpatialVid 视频。实验评估视频延展、场景重访、不连续硬切、生成质量、记忆一致性、检索行为和计算开销。

applications: Camera-controllable world generation; long-term scene revisiting

name: HarmoWAM
title: HarmoWAM: Harmonizing Generalizable and Precise Manipulation via Adaptive World Action Models

summary.en: HarmoWAM is a closed-loop world-action model for manipulation tasks that combine broad motion with precise physical interaction. A shared predictive representation learns spatiotemporal scene dynamics from future visual supervision. Two action experts then use that representation in complementary ways: one converts predicted transitions into actions through inverse dynamics, while the other produces reactive actions for fine local control. A lightweight process-adaptive gate examines the current observation and selects or combines the experts as task execution moves between transit and interaction stages. The complete policy is trained end to end. Real-robot experiments cover in-domain tasks, unseen objects and environments, and component ablations, measuring task success, stage-dependent behavior, expert coordination, and generalization.
summary.zh: HarmoWAM 面向同时包含大范围移动与精细物理交互的机器人操作。共享预测表示通过未来视觉监督学习场景的时空动力学；两个动作专家以互补方式使用该表示：一个借助逆动力学把预测转移转成动作，另一个为局部精细控制生成反应式动作。轻量的过程自适应门控读取当前观察，并随任务从移动阶段进入交互阶段而选择或融合专家。系统端到端训练并闭环执行。真实机器人实验覆盖域内任务、未见物体与环境，并通过成功率、阶段行为、专家协同和组件消融验证该机制。

applications: Adaptive predictive and reactive robot manipulation

name: MaskWAM
title: MaskWAM: Unifying Mask Prompting and Prediction for World-Action Models

summary.en: MaskWAM extends world-action modeling with an explicit representation of task-relevant image regions. Given the current RGB observation, proprioceptive state, language instruction, and an optional first-frame target mask, a unified diffusion transformer jointly predicts future RGB frames, future masks, and an action chunk. Mask prediction supplies spatial supervision for objects and regions that matter to the task, while optional mask prompting disambiguates a requested target at inference time. The action branch shares the latent generative state through a mixture-of-transformers design, coupling manipulation decisions to predicted visual and object-region changes. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboTwin 2.0, and real robots evaluate task success, distractor and object generalization, lighting variation, target disambiguation, and the contribution of mask modeling.
summary.zh: MaskWAM 在世界动作模型中加入任务相关区域的显式表示。模型接收当前 RGB 观察、本体状态、语言指令以及可选的首帧目标掩码，由统一扩散 Transformer 联合预测未来 RGB、未来掩码和动作块。掩码预测为任务关键物体与区域提供空间监督，可选掩码提示则在推理时明确目标。动作分支通过混合 Transformer 共享潜在生成状态，使操作决策与预测的视觉变化和物体区域变化相耦合。实验在 LIBERO、RoboTwin 2.0 与真实机器人上评估任务成功、干扰物与物体泛化、光照变化、目标消歧和掩码建模的作用。

applications: Spatially grounded robot manipulation with mask-conditioned target selection
