name: Efficient-WAM
title: Efficient-WAM: A 1B-Parameter World-Action Model with Low-Cost Future Imagination

summary.en: Efficient-WAM is a compact world-action model designed to preserve future-conditioned control while reducing the cost of visual imagination. A one-billion-parameter video expert is transferred from a larger generator and produces sparse, low-resolution future latents that encode control-relevant scene change. The video and action branches are trained together, but asymmetric denoising assigns fewer sampling steps to visual prediction than to action generation. The imagined future therefore serves as a guidance signal rather than a photorealistic output requirement. The resulting action chunks are deployed in a closed robot-control loop. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0 and real manipulation tasks compare policy success and latency with larger WAM and VLA baselines and analyze model transfer, latent resolution, token sparsity, and denoising schedules.
summary.zh: Efficient-WAM 旨在保留未来条件控制能力，同时降低视觉想象成本。十亿参数视频专家由更大生成器迁移而来，产生稀疏、低分辨率的未来潜变量，用于编码与控制相关的场景变化。视频与动作分支联合训练，但非对称去噪为视觉预测分配更少采样步，把想象未来作为动作指导信号，而非必须逼真的输出。生成的动作块在机器人闭环中执行。实验在 RoboTwin 2.0 和真实操作任务上比较策略成功率与延迟，并分析模型迁移、潜变量分辨率、令牌稀疏性和去噪步数配置。

applications: Low-latency future-guided robot control

name: Light-WAM
title: Light-WAM: Efficient World Action Models with State-Fusion Action Decoding

summary.en: Light-WAM couples lightweight future prediction with action generation for efficient robot manipulation. A compact video backbone learns scene evolution through downsampled latent-space supervision instead of requiring full-resolution future rendering. The StateFusionActionExpert combines the current observation, language and proprioceptive context with the predicted future representation, then decodes a continuous action chunk. This design keeps future modeling available to the policy while separating action decoding from the heaviest visual generation operations. The model runs as a closed-loop controller that repeatedly observes, predicts and acts. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboTwin 2.0, and real dual-arm tasks report manipulation success, training and inference efficiency, and comparisons with VLA and WAM baselines, together with ablations on backbone size, latent supervision, and state fusion.
summary.zh: Light-WAM 将轻量未来预测与动作生成结合，用于高效机器人操作。紧凑视频骨干通过下采样潜空间监督学习场景演化，无需生成完整分辨率的未来画面。StateFusionActionExpert 融合当前观察、语言、本体信息和预测未来表示，再解码连续动作块；这样既让策略利用未来信息，也把动作解码与最重的视频生成计算分离。模型以反复观察、预测和执行的方式闭环控制。实验在 LIBERO、RoboTwin 2.0 与真实双臂任务上报告操作成功率和训练、推理效率，并比较 VLA、WAM 基线及骨干规模、潜变量监督和状态融合消融。

applications: Efficient future-conditioned manipulation on single- and dual-arm robots

name: Tactile-WAM
title: Tactile-WAM: Touch-Aware World Action Model with Tactile Asymmetric Attention

summary.en: Tactile-WAM augments a visual world-action model with predicted tactile state for contact-rich manipulation. It receives synchronized RGB observations, proprioception, language, actions, and fingertip tactile streams, then jointly models future visual evidence, touch change, and action chunks. Its Tactile Asymmetric Attention Mechanism routes contact information selectively: a VideoClean mask keeps tactile tokens out of visual-query attention, while a touch-aware bias strengthens their influence on action queries when predicted contact changes matter. This preserves separate visual and tactile roles while coupling both to control. Experiments on the ManiFeel suite evaluate insertion, assembly, search, and reorientation tasks, measuring manipulation success across contact regimes and analyzing tactile prediction, attention routing, touch-change bias, and modality combinations.
summary.zh: Tactile-WAM 为视觉世界动作模型加入预测触觉状态，面向接触丰富的机器人操作。模型接收同步的 RGB、本体信息、语言、动作和指尖触觉流，联合建模未来视觉、触觉变化与动作块。触觉非对称注意机制选择性路由接触信息：VideoClean 掩码阻止视觉查询读取触觉令牌，而触觉感知偏置在预测接触变化重要时增强动作查询对触觉的利用，从而保持视觉与触觉的不同作用并共同支持控制。ManiFeel 实验覆盖插入、装配、搜索和重定向任务，评估不同接触条件下的成功率，并分析触觉预测、注意路由、变化偏置和模态组合。

applications: Touch-aware contact-rich robot manipulation

name: Omega-EVA
title: Omega-EVA: Envision, Verify, and Act with Latent Interactive World Models

summary.en: Omega-EVA places latent world prediction directly inside the robot action-generation loop. It first learns action-conditioned latent dynamics from visual trajectories, producing compact representations of how a scene would evolve under a proposed action chunk. A language-conditioned flow policy generates an initial proposal, and the world model rolls that proposal forward in latent space. A verification stage reads the imagined outcome and feeds proposal-conditioned evidence back to the policy, which refines the action before execution. This envision–verify–act cycle operates without rendering full future videos. Experiments on LIBERO, LIBERO-PLUS, and RoboTwin 2.0 evaluate single-arm and bimanual manipulation, long-horizon execution, perturbation robustness, task success, model scale, and the contributions of latent rollout and feedback refinement.
summary.zh: Omega-EVA 把潜在世界预测直接放入机器人动作生成循环。模型先从视觉轨迹学习动作条件潜在动力学，以紧凑表示推演候选动作块将如何改变场景；语言条件流策略产生初始动作，世界模型在潜空间展开其结果，验证阶段再读取想象结果并把与候选相关的证据反馈给策略，在执行前完成动作修正。整个“预想—验证—行动”过程无需渲染完整未来视频。实验在 LIBERO、LIBERO-PLUS 和 RoboTwin 2.0 上覆盖单臂、双臂、长程任务和扰动条件，并评估成功率、模型规模、潜在展开与反馈修正的作用。

applications: Proposal verification and refinement for closed-loop robot manipulation

name: VLWM
title: Beyond the Next Step: Variable-Length Latent World Models for Long-Horizon Planning

summary.en: Variable-length Latent World Models learn action-conditioned dynamics at multiple temporal scales within one predictive objective. An observation encoder maps images into latent states, while the predictor receives a current state, an action segment, and its temporal offset and estimates the corresponding future latent. Training samples both nearby and distant targets, with a horizon curriculum that gradually introduces longer transitions. At planning time, the model can jump across longer intervals instead of relying only on recursively composed one-step predictions, while retaining short-horizon detail when needed. Experiments use PushT and OGBench-Cube offline trajectories and evaluate goal-reaching over short and long horizons, random initial configurations, rollout accuracy, planning efficiency, and the effects of temporal sampling and curriculum design.
summary.zh: 可变长度潜在世界模型在统一预测目标中学习多个时间尺度的动作条件动力学。观察编码器把图像映射为潜在状态，预测器接收当前状态、动作片段和时间间隔，估计对应的未来潜变量。训练同时采样近距离与远距离目标，并用跨度课程逐步引入更长转移。规划时，模型可以跨越较长区间，而不必只递归组合单步预测；需要时仍可保留短程细节。实验基于 PushT 和 OGBench-Cube 的离线轨迹，评估短程、长程目标到达、随机初始配置、展开精度、规划效率，以及时间采样和课程设计的作用。

applications: Multi-timescale latent planning for visual manipulation

name: FF-JEPA
title: FF-JEPA: Long-Horizon Planning in World Models with Latent Planners

summary.en: FF-JEPA extends a JEPA-style latent world model with a planner that predicts intermediate latent subgoals for visual control. The world encoder is frozen after predictive representation learning, and planner variants are trained entirely in its latent space: one maps task context directly to a latent trajectory, while another models trajectory distributions through latent diffusion. The resulting subgoals divide a long task into shorter segments. For each segment, the world model is used as an inverse-dynamics module to recover actions that connect successive imagined states, avoiding a required goal image at every step. PushT experiments evaluate short- and long-horizon completion, random initialization, planning budgets, latent-subgoal quality, and comparisons with flat cross-entropy-method planning and alternative hierarchical designs.
summary.zh: FF-JEPA 为 JEPA 式潜在世界模型加入预测中间潜在子目标的规划器。世界编码器在预测表示学习后冻结，规划器完全在其潜空间训练：一种直接把任务上下文映射为潜在轨迹，另一种通过潜在扩散建模轨迹分布。生成的子目标把长任务拆成多个短片段；对每个片段，世界模型作为逆动力学模块，恢复连接相邻想象状态的动作，因此不必在每一步提供目标图像。PushT 实验评估短程、长程完成、随机初始化、规划预算、潜在子目标质量，并与平坦的交叉熵规划和其他层次方案比较。

applications: Hierarchical latent-subgoal planning for visual manipulation

name: STRIPS-WM
title: STRIPS-WM: Learning Grounded Propositional STRIPS-style World Models from Images

summary.en: STRIPS-WM learns an interpretable symbolic world model from visual transition data for long-horizon manipulation planning. Images are grounded into propositional states describing task entities and relations. From observed state–action–next-state tuples, the method uses a constraint-program formulation to infer each action's positive and negative preconditions together with add and delete effects. It also incorporates trusted missing or inapplicable transitions so that learned operators distinguish feasible actions from visually plausible but invalid ones. The resulting grounded STRIPS model can be passed to a symbolic planner, which composes actions toward a target arrangement without predicting every pixel. Experiments evaluate predicate grounding, operator recovery, transition prediction, applicability, and plan execution across image-based manipulation domains, with additional constraint and proof analyses.
summary.zh: STRIPS-WM 从视觉转移数据学习可解释的符号世界模型，用于长程操作规划。图像先被接地为描述任务实体与关系的命题状态；随后根据“状态—动作—下一状态”样本，用约束规划推断每个动作的正、负前置条件以及增加、删除效果。模型还利用可信的缺失或不可执行转移，使学习到的算子能够区分可行动作与视觉上合理但实际无效的动作。所得接地 STRIPS 模型可交给传统符号规划器，直接组合通向目标布局的高层动作，无需预测每个未来像素。实验评估谓词接地、算子恢复、转移预测、可执行性和计划执行，并分析约束设计。

applications: Visual-to-symbolic operator learning for long-horizon manipulation

name: WEAVER
title: WEAVER, Better, Faster, Longer: An Effective World Model for Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: WEAVER is an action-conditioned video world model built to support three manipulation workflows with one learned simulator: policy evaluation, policy improvement, and test-time planning. It predicts temporally coherent future observations from the current robot view and proposed actions, using an efficient generation design for repeated rollout. Simulated trajectories can estimate the performance of candidate policies, provide additional interaction data for improving a base policy without new physical trials, and score action candidates during online planning. The system is trained with DROID and task-specific robot data and evaluated on a Franka platform with external and wrist cameras. Experiments measure visual fidelity, temporal consistency, rollout speed, correlation between simulated and real policy success, downstream policy gains, planning success, and component ablations.
summary.zh: WEAVER 是动作条件视频世界模型，用一个学习式模拟器支持机器人策略评估、策略改进和测试时规划。模型根据当前机器人视图与候选动作预测时间连贯的未来观察，并采用适合重复展开的高效生成设计。模拟轨迹既可估计候选策略表现，也可在不增加真实交互的情况下生成改进基础策略的数据，还能在在线规划中为动作候选评分。系统使用 DROID 与任务数据训练，在带外部和腕部相机的 Franka 平台上验证。实验评估视觉质量、时间一致性、展开速度、模拟与真实成功率相关性、策略提升、规划成功和组件消融。

applications: Robot policy evaluation, improvement, and test-time planning

name: IA-JEPA
title: Entity-Centric World Models: Interaction-Aware Masking for Causal Video Prediction

summary.en: Interaction-Aware JEPA learns entity-centered predictive representations for causal video understanding. Instead of masking random spatiotemporal patches during self-supervised pretraining, it identifies regions with motion and interaction evidence and preferentially hides those informative tokens. A context encoder must then predict target-encoder representations for the missing entity events, encouraging the latent state to capture object persistence, kinematics, momentum, and interaction consequences. The learned backbone is frozen for evaluation so downstream probes measure information present in the representation rather than capacity added by task-specific fine-tuning. Experiments test intuitive-physics and causal reasoning tasks, compare interaction-aware and random masking under matched architectures, and analyze motion thresholds, mask composition, entity concentration, representation transfer, and the relation between predictive accuracy and physical reasoning.
summary.zh: Interaction-Aware JEPA 学习以实体为中心的因果视频预测表示。它不在自监督预训练中随机遮挡时空块，而是寻找具有运动和交互证据的区域，优先隐藏这些信息密集的令牌；上下文编码器再预测目标编码器对缺失实体事件的表示，使潜在状态编码物体持续性、运动学、动量与交互后果。评估时冻结骨干，只训练下游探针，从而测量表示本身包含的信息。实验覆盖直觉物理与因果推理任务，在相同架构下比较交互感知和随机遮挡，并分析运动阈值、掩码构成、实体聚焦、表示迁移及预测与物理推理的关系。

applications: Predictive representation learning for physical and causal video reasoning

name: UWM-JEPA
title: UWM-JEPA: Predictive World Models That Imagine in Belief Space

summary.en: UWM-JEPA formulates a predictive world model whose latent state is a density matrix rather than a single feature vector. The representation describes a partially observed system together with an auxiliary environment, and an action-conditioned unitary predictor advances their joint belief state. JEPA training matches the predicted reduced state to an exponential-moving-average target representation of the future. Because joint evolution is unitary, information can move between the system and its correlations without being erased, providing a structured mechanism for persistent uncertainty and memory. Experiments examine blind latent rollout, intermediate-horizon prediction, counterfactual action substitutions and ordering, downstream indicators, reduced-state accessibility, and memory behavior in partially observed settings, alongside theoretical analysis of spectrum, purity, entropy, and non-dissipation.
summary.zh: UWM-JEPA 把预测世界模型的潜在状态表示为密度矩阵，而非单一特征向量。该状态联合描述部分可观察系统与辅助环境，动作条件酉预测器推进它们的整体信念；JEPA 训练让预测的约化状态匹配未来观察的指数移动平均目标表示。由于联合演化保持酉性，信息可在系统与相关性之间转移而不被直接消除，为持续不确定性与记忆提供结构化机制。实验研究盲潜在展开、中程预测、反事实动作替换与顺序、下游指标、约化状态可访问性及部分可观察环境中的记忆，并分析谱、纯度、熵和非耗散性质。

applications: Action-conditioned belief-space rollout under partial observability

name: FlowMo-WM
title: FlowMo-WM: A World Model with Object Momentum and Hidden Ambient Drift

summary.en: FlowMo-WM is a visual world model for planning when future motion depends on momentum and environmental drift that are not observable in a single frame. It encodes rendered observations to infer a latent dynamic state, then rolls future object pose forward under a candidate action sequence. Training uses image trajectories and controls, without privileged current, velocity, flow, or simulator-state supervision. The predictor is embedded in a planner that scores action sequences against a target while retaining motion accumulated before the planning window. Experiments vary boat morphology, flow families, starting conditions, and rollout horizon in a two-dimensional navigation simulator, measuring position and heading prediction, long-horizon planning success, and the effects of visual history, momentum representation, drift modeling, and action conditioning.
summary.zh: FlowMo-WM 面向未来运动取决于隐藏动量和环境漂移、而单帧无法完整观测的视觉规划。模型编码一段渲染观察历史以推断潜在动态状态，再在候选动作序列条件下展开未来物体姿态。训练只使用图像轨迹与控制，不需要流速、速度、洋流或模拟器特权状态标签。预测器被嵌入规划器，对动作序列与目标的匹配程度评分，同时保留规划窗口之前积累的运动。实验在二维导航模拟器中改变船体形态、环境流场、初始条件与展开长度，评估位置、朝向预测和长程规划成功，并分析视觉历史、动量表示、漂移建模与动作条件。

applications: Visual planning with hidden momentum and environmental drift

name: PRISM
title: PRISM: PRior-guided Imagination Sampling in world Models

summary.en: PRISM improves sampling-based planning in a learned visual world model by using a behavior prior to guide candidate actions. A latent dynamics model predicts how the scene will change under each sampled sequence, while a diffusion policy supplies a distribution over actions that are plausible for the task. Product-of-Gaussians fusion combines that prior with the planner's proposal distribution and uses predicted variance to control its influence: concentrated priors focus search, whereas uncertain priors leave room for world-model evaluation. The mechanism is integrated with both MPPI and cross-entropy-method planning and scores imagined states against a goal image. Experiments on PushT, Cube, and preliminary real-robot platforms evaluate success under different sampling budgets, multimodal demonstrations, planner choices, prior variances, and encoder variants.
summary.zh: PRISM 用行为先验引导学习式视觉世界模型中的采样规划。潜在动力学模型预测每个候选动作序列将如何改变场景，扩散策略则给出符合任务数据的动作分布。高斯乘积融合把先验与规划器提议分布结合，并利用先验方差调节影响：先验集中时缩小搜索范围，不确定时则让世界模型评估更多候选。该机制同时接入 MPPI 与交叉熵规划，通过想象状态和目标图像的匹配为动作评分。实验在 PushT、Cube 和初步真实机器人平台上评估不同采样预算、多模态示范、规划器、先验方差与编码器设置下的成功率。

applications: Prior-guided sampling for visual model-predictive control

name: Prisma-World
title: Prisma-World: Camera-Controllable Multi-Agent Video World Model

summary.en: Prisma-World is a camera-controllable video world model that represents several agents as coordinated views of one shared environment. Rather than generating each stream independently, it performs joint denoising across all agent videos. Full cross-view attention, multi-agent rotary position encoding, and relative camera geometry connect overlapping observations, while minimap conditioning supplies global spatial guidance. One trained model supports a variable number of agents and controllable camera trajectories. The accompanying PrismaDataset provides panoramic scenes, flexible view groupings, camera poses, and action annotations for training and evaluation. Experiments compare video quality and cross-view consistency across scene types and agent counts, and ablate joint attention, geometric encoding, camera conditioning, and minimap guidance to measure how each component contributes to coherent multi-agent simulation.
summary.zh: Prisma-World 是相机可控的多智能体视频世界模型，把多个智能体表示为同一共享环境中的协调视图。模型不再独立生成各视频流，而是在所有智能体视频之间联合去噪；全视图注意、多智能体旋转位置编码和相对相机几何连接重叠观察，小地图条件提供全局空间引导。一个模型即可支持可变数量的智能体与可控相机轨迹。配套 PrismaDataset 提供全景场景、灵活视图组合、相机姿态和动作标注。实验比较不同场景和智能体数量下的视频质量、跨视图一致性，并消融联合注意、几何编码、相机条件和小地图引导。

applications: Camera-controlled multi-agent shared-world video simulation

name: TD-MPC2
title: TD-MPC2: Scalable, Robust World Models for Continuous Control

summary.en: TD-MPC2 is a scalable latent world model for continuous control. An encoder maps observations to compact states, and action-conditioned dynamics predict the next latent together with reward and task termination. Distributional value functions estimate longer-term outcomes, while a learned policy supplies both executable actions and a proposal distribution for trajectory optimization. At each environment step, model-predictive control samples and refines action sequences in latent space, executes the first action, and replans from the new observation. A single objective supports online, offline, single-task, and multi-task learning. Experiments span 104 tasks from DeepMind Control, Meta-World, and other continuous-control suites, measuring task return, data efficiency, robustness, model scaling, zero-shot task conditioning, planning horizon, and component ablations.
summary.zh: TD-MPC2 是面向连续控制的可扩展潜在世界模型。编码器把观察映射为紧凑状态，动作条件动力学预测下一潜变量、奖励与终止信号；分布式价值函数估计长期结果，学习策略既产生可执行动作，也为轨迹优化提供候选分布。每个环境步中，模型预测控制在潜空间采样并优化动作序列，只执行首个动作，再根据新观察重新规划。统一目标支持在线、离线、单任务和多任务学习。实验覆盖 DeepMind Control、Meta-World 等 104 个任务，评估回报、数据效率、稳健性、模型扩展、任务条件、规划长度和组件作用。

applications: Scalable latent model-predictive control across continuous-control tasks

name: DINO-Foresight
title: DINO-Foresight: Looking into the Future with DINO

summary.en: DINO-Foresight learns visual dynamics by predicting future features from a frozen DINO image encoder. A spatiotemporal predictor receives recent feature maps and, when available, actions, then rolls forward a sequence of latent visual states. Training in feature space preserves semantic and object information without requiring exact pixel reconstruction; an auxiliary decoder can visualize the implied futures for analysis. The same predictive backbone can operate on passive video or action-conditioned robot data and provides future representations to downstream heads and policies. Experiments evaluate feature-prediction quality, long-rollout behavior, object and scene semantics, video understanding, and robotic manipulation, compare pixel and representation targets, and ablate context length, prediction horizon, action conditioning, encoder choice, and autoregressive training.
summary.zh: DINO-Foresight 通过预测冻结 DINO 图像编码器的未来特征来学习视觉动力学。时空预测器接收近期特征图与可用动作，随后展开一系列潜在视觉状态。特征空间训练保留语义和物体信息，无需精确重建像素；辅助解码器可把潜在未来可视化。该骨干既可处理被动视频，也可处理动作条件机器人数据，并把未来表示提供给下游任务头与策略。实验评估特征预测、长程展开、物体与场景语义、视频理解和机器人操作，比较像素、表示预测，并分析上下文、预测长度、动作条件与编码器。

applications: Reusable future visual representations for video reasoning and robot control

name: ManiGaussian
title: ManiGaussian: Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Multi-task Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: ManiGaussian represents a robot workspace as dynamic three-dimensional Gaussians and predicts how that structured scene changes under actions. Multiview RGB observations are lifted into Gaussian position, appearance, opacity, and semantic features. Language and candidate robot motion condition a dynamics module that deforms the Gaussians toward a future state, which can be rendered from multiple viewpoints. The policy combines observations with this predicted geometric future to generate manipulation actions, coupling scene evolution and control in one model. Experiments cover simulated manipulation tasks and evaluate task success, future-view quality, geometry consistency, and generalization across camera viewpoints and task configurations. Ablations study the Gaussian representation, dynamic deformation, future supervision, semantic features, multiview fusion, and the contribution of imagined 3D state to action prediction.
summary.zh: ManiGaussian 用动态三维高斯表示机器人工作空间，并预测动作将如何改变这一结构化场景。多视角 RGB 观察被提升为高斯的位置、外观、不透明度和语义特征；语言与候选机器人运动共同条件化动力学模块，使高斯变形到未来状态，并可从多个视角渲染。策略融合当前观察和预测几何未来来生成操作动作，从而联合场景演化与控制。实验覆盖多种模拟操作任务，评估任务成功、未来视图质量、几何一致性及跨相机和任务配置泛化，并消融高斯表示、动态变形、未来监督、语义特征、多视角融合和三维想象状态。

applications: Geometry-aware future prediction for multi-task robot manipulation

name: GaussianWorld
title: GaussianWorld: Gaussian World Model for Streaming 3D Occupancy Prediction

summary.en: GaussianWorld models a driving scene as a persistent collection of semantic three-dimensional Gaussians that is updated as new camera frames arrive. Ego-motion first aligns the previous latent scene with the current coordinate frame. Separate update mechanisms then handle static structure and moving entities, incorporating current image evidence while retaining information that remains observable only through memory. The resulting Gaussian state is decoded into present and future semantic occupancy, providing a compact geometry-aware representation for streaming perception and prediction. Experiments on autonomous-driving datasets evaluate occupancy accuracy, temporal forecasting, motion regions, memory behavior, and runtime. Comparisons cover frame-based and recurrent occupancy models, while ablations examine Gaussian attributes, motion compensation, static–dynamic decomposition, update order, temporal context, and state size.
summary.zh: GaussianWorld 把驾驶场景表示为持续存在的语义三维高斯集合，并随新相机帧递归更新。自车运动先把上一潜在场景对齐到当前坐标系；静态结构与运动实体分别更新，吸收当前图像证据，同时保留只能依靠记忆维持的信息。所得高斯状态被解码为当前与未来语义占据，为流式感知和预测提供紧凑、几何感知的世界表示。自动驾驶实验评估占据精度、时间预测、运动区域、记忆行为和运行效率，并与单帧和递归占据方法比较；消融分析高斯属性、运动补偿、动静分解、更新顺序、时间上下文和状态规模。

applications: Streaming 3D semantic occupancy prediction for autonomous driving

name: Matrix-Game
title: Matrix-Game: Interactive World Foundation Model

summary.en: Matrix-Game is an interactive video world model that generates a game-like visual future in response to user controls. It converts keyboard and mouse input into aligned action conditions and combines them with a causal history of compressed video tokens. An autoregressive diffusion model predicts the next visual segment, appends it to the world history, and repeats, allowing the user to steer camera motion and in-world behavior during rollout. Temporal conditioning preserves scene identity and progress beyond a clip. The model is trained on action-annotated gameplay video and supports online interaction. Experiments measure video quality, action following, camera controllability, temporal consistency, rollout length, and inference speed, compare passive and action-conditioned generators, and analyze action encoding, history windows, tokenization, and iterative generation.
summary.zh: Matrix-Game 是响应用户控制生成游戏式视觉未来的交互视频世界模型。系统把键盘与鼠标输入转换为时间对齐的动作条件，并与压缩视频令牌的因果历史结合；自回归扩散模型预测下一段视觉内容，将其追加到世界历史后继续展开，使用户在生成过程中控制相机运动和世界行为。时间条件让场景身份与进度跨越单个片段持续存在。模型使用带动作标注的游戏视频训练并支持在线交互。实验评估视频质量、动作遵循、相机可控性、时间一致性、展开长度和推理速度，并分析动作编码、历史窗口、视频令牌化和迭代生成。

applications: Keyboard- and mouse-controlled interactive video worlds

name: Astra
title: Astra: General Interactive World Model with Autoregressive Denoising

summary.en: Astra turns a pretrained video diffusion model into a general interactive world model. A lightweight adapter injects continuous or discrete user actions into chunkwise video generation, while autoregressive denoising appends each generated segment to the observation history. Noise-augmented memory deliberately perturbs older context so the model preserves scene identity and long-term state without ignoring recent controls. This creates an observation–action loop that can remain responsive over extended rollout rather than generating one fixed clip. Training combines real-world and interactive video with aligned action signals. Experiments evaluate action following, long-horizon consistency, visual quality, responsiveness, and real-time interaction across several environments, compare passive and interactive baselines, and ablate adapter placement, memory noise, history length, chunk size, and denoising schedules.
summary.zh: Astra 把预训练视频扩散模型改造成通用交互世界模型。轻量动作适配器把连续或离散用户控制注入分块视频生成，自回归去噪则将每个新片段追加到观察历史。噪声增强记忆主动扰动较早上下文，使模型既保持场景身份与长期状态，又不会忽略近期控制，从而形成可持续展开的“观察—动作”循环，而非生成一次性固定视频。训练融合真实视频、交互视频及对齐动作信号。实验评估多个环境中的动作遵循、长程一致性、视觉质量、响应性和实时交互，并分析适配器位置、记忆噪声、历史长度、分块和去噪设置。

applications: General action-conditioned interactive video simulation

name: Vid2World
title: Vid2World: Crafting Video Diffusion Models to Interactive World Models

summary.en: Vid2World converts a passive video diffusion generator into an interactive world model through two transfer mechanisms. Video diffusion causalization changes the pretrained denoiser so each segment depends only on past observations, supporting autoregressive rollout. Causal action guidance aligns action embeddings with the future frames they can influence and injects them without discarding the visual prior learned from internet video. Starting from an image and action stream, the model repeatedly generates the next observation segment and carries it into subsequent context. The same recipe is evaluated in real-robot manipulation, three-dimensional game simulation, and open-world navigation. Experiments measure visual fidelity, temporal consistency, action following, task-specific control, and long rollout, and analyze causal masking, action guidance, pretraining transfer, context length, and domain adaptation.
summary.zh: Vid2World 通过两种迁移机制把被动视频扩散生成器转成交互世界模型。视频扩散因果化让每个生成片段只依赖已经观察到的历史，从而支持自回归展开；因果动作引导把动作嵌入与其能够影响的未来帧对齐，并在保留互联网视频先验的情况下进行注入。模型从初始图像和动作流出发，反复生成下一观察片段并写入后续上下文。同一方案在真实机器人操作、三维游戏模拟和开放世界导航中评估。实验测量视觉质量、时间一致性、动作遵循、任务控制和长程展开，并分析因果掩码、动作引导、预训练迁移、上下文和领域适配。

applications: Transfer of video generators to action-conditioned robot, game, and navigation worlds

name: GameFactory
title: GameFactory: Creating New Games with Generative Interactive Videos

summary.en: GameFactory uses a pretrained video generator as the visual foundation for creating playable video worlds beyond one game. Training is divided into stages: open-domain video pretraining supplies scene and appearance knowledge, lightweight adaptation learns game-video structure, and a dedicated control module aligns player actions with future motion while the visual backbone is preserved. During inference, an initial scene and live controls condition successive video segments, producing an interactive rollout with controllable camera and player behavior. This separation lets limited action-annotated game data provide control while retaining open-domain scene diversity. Experiments evaluate visual quality, action following, temporal consistency, scene and style generalization, and interactive latency, compare specialized game generators and video baselines, and ablate training stages, control injection, and data mixtures.
summary.zh: GameFactory 把大型预训练视频生成器作为视觉基础，用于创建不局限于单一游戏的可玩视频世界。训练分为多个阶段：开放域视频预训练提供广泛场景与外观知识，轻量适配学习游戏视频结构，专用控制模块把玩家动作与未来运动对齐，同时尽量保留视觉骨干。推理时，初始场景与实时控制条件化连续视频片段，形成相机和角色行为可控的交互展开。该分工让有限的动作标注游戏数据承担控制学习，同时保留开放场景多样性。实验评估视觉质量、动作遵循、时间一致性、场景和风格泛化、交互延迟，并分析训练阶段、控制注入和数据组合。

applications: Open-domain playable video world generation

name: SANA-WM
title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer

summary.en: SANA-WM is a camera-controlled video world model for minute-long, high-resolution rollout. Given an initial frame, text, and a continuous six-degree-of-freedom camera trajectory, it generates a 720p visual path while retaining scene identity when locations are revisited. A hybrid architecture combines efficient gated delta-network layers with selected softmax-attention layers. Dual camera positional encoding and Plucker-ray features inject metric pose and view geometry at high frequency. A two-stage workflow first searches candidate trajectories with the efficient base model, then applies a long-video refiner to selected rollouts. Experiments evaluate sixty-second paths, camera-following accuracy, revisit consistency, video quality, memory and compute use, single-GPU inference, and the contributions of hybrid attention, pose annotation, geometric conditioning, and refinement.
summary.zh: SANA-WM 是用于分钟级高分辨率展开的相机可控视频世界模型。给定首帧、文本和连续六自由度相机轨迹，模型生成 720p 视觉路径，并在重新访问位置时保持场景身份。混合架构把高效门控增量网络层与部分 softmax 注意层结合；双重相机位置编码和 Plücker 射线特征以高频方式注入度量姿态与视角几何。两阶段流程先用高效基础模型搜索候选轨迹，再对选定展开进行长视频精修。实验评估六十秒路径、相机跟随、重访一致性、视频质量、内存与计算、单 GPU 推理，并分析混合注意、姿态标注、几何条件和精修模块。

applications: Minute-scale 720p camera-controlled world exploration

name: Matrix-Game 3.0
title: Matrix-Game 3.0: Real-Time and Streaming Interactive World Model with Long-Horizon Memory

summary.en: Matrix-Game 3.0 is a streaming interactive world model designed to combine long-horizon memory, high-resolution video, and real-time response. An error-aware base model is trained on iterative rollout states so that action control remains aligned as generated segments accumulate. Camera-aware memory indexes earlier spatial content by viewpoint and retrieves relevant context when the user returns to a location. Multi-segment distillation matches training to autoregressive inference and reduces the number of generation steps, while deployment optimizations support a five-billion-parameter model at 720p. A large action-annotated data engine supplies interactive supervision. Experiments measure video quality, control accuracy, spatial revisit consistency, temporal persistence, streaming speed, and latency, and ablate error-aware training, camera memory, segment alignment, distillation, data scale, and system components.
summary.zh: Matrix-Game 3.0 是同时面向长程记忆、高分辨率与实时响应的流式交互世界模型。误差感知基础模型在迭代展开状态上训练，使生成片段不断累积时仍保持动作控制对齐；相机感知记忆按视角索引早期空间内容，在用户返回某位置时检索相关上下文。多片段蒸馏让训练过程贴近自回归推理，并减少生成步数，系统优化支持五十亿参数模型进行 720p 实时展开。大规模动作标注数据引擎提供交互监督。实验评估视频质量、控制精度、空间重访一致性、时间持续性、流式速度和延迟，并分析误差训练、相机记忆、片段对齐、蒸馏和数据规模。

applications: Real-time streaming interactive video worlds with camera-aware memory

name: RELIC
title: RELIC: Interactive Video World Model with Long-Horizon Memory

summary.en: RELIC is an interactive video world model that uses camera geometry to maintain spatial memory during long rollout. Its training data records continuous six-degree-of-freedom poses, camera actions, and rendered observations, establishing a mapping between control and visual response. During autoregressive generation, the model conditions each segment on recent frames and retrieves older content whose camera pose overlaps the current viewpoint. The retrieved observations act as spatial anchors, allowing places and objects to reappear consistently after the user moves away and returns. Experiments compare interactive video models across camera trajectories and extended sessions, measuring control accuracy, image and video quality, long-horizon consistency, and spatial revisit fidelity. Ablations study pose annotation, retrieval criteria, memory size, overlap thresholds, history length, and action conditioning.
summary.zh: RELIC 利用显式相机几何在长程展开中维持空间记忆。训练数据记录连续六自由度姿态、相机动作与渲染观察，从而建立用户控制和视觉响应的精确对应。自回归生成每个新片段时，模型同时使用近期帧，并检索相机姿态与当前视角重叠的较早内容；这些观察充当空间锚点，使用户离开后再返回时，地点和物体能够一致重现。实验沿不同相机轨迹和长交互过程比较多种视频世界模型，评估控制精度、图像与视频质量、长程一致性和空间重访保真度，并分析姿态标注、检索标准、记忆规模、重叠阈值、历史长度和动作条件。

applications: Long-horizon camera-controlled world exploration with spatial retrieval

name: INSPATIO-WORLD
title: INSPATIO-WORLD: A Real-Time 4D World Simulator via Spatiotemporal Autoregressive Modeling

summary.en: INSPATIO-WORLD is a real-time generative simulator for roaming through a persistent four-dimensional environment. A spatiotemporal autoregressive model produces the next visual segment from recent observations and user camera control. Its implicit ST-Cache retains earlier features as long-term anchors, while explicit spatial constraints align generated content with camera geometry and previously visited locations. Joint distribution matching is used to refine visual quality without removing the causal interaction interface. The system repeatedly updates its cache and world view during online navigation. Experiments evaluate camera controllability, spatial persistence, loop closure and revisit behavior, temporal coherence, visual quality, and real-time generation across indoor and outdoor scenes. Comparisons and ablations isolate the autoregressive design, cache retrieval, geometric constraints, distribution matching, context duration, and deployment optimizations.
summary.zh: INSPATIO-WORLD 是用于实时漫游持续四维环境的生成式模拟器。时空自回归模型根据近期观察与用户相机控制产生下一视觉片段；隐式 ST-Cache 保留早期特征作为长期锚点，显式空间约束则让生成内容与相机几何和已经访问的位置对齐。联合分布匹配提升视觉质量，同时保留因果交互接口。系统在在线导航过程中不断更新缓存与世界视图。实验在室内外场景中评估相机可控性、空间持续性、闭环与重访、时间连贯、视觉质量和实时生成，并通过比较与消融分析自回归设计、缓存检索、几何约束、分布匹配、上下文长度和部署优化。

applications: Real-time interactive roaming in persistent 4D generated worlds

name: minWM
title: minWM: A Full-Stack Open-Source Framework for Real-Time Interactive Video World Models

summary.en: minWM is an open full-stack recipe for converting pretrained bidirectional video diffusion models into real-time interactive world models. The first phase adds camera control to a text-to-video or image-to-video backbone using trajectory-conditioned training. The second phase applies causal autoregressive distillation, including Causal Forcing variants, so the model generates the next segment from past context in few denoising steps. The framework covers data preparation, training, inference, and deployment rather than one fixed backbone, and exposes the resulting model as a continuous camera-controlled simulator. Experiments evaluate visual quality, trajectory following, long autoregressive rollout, error accumulation, frame rate, and computational cost across several base generators. Ablations study control encoding, causal masks, teacher construction, distillation objectives, step count, context length, and system settings.
summary.zh: minWM 是把预训练双向视频扩散模型转成实时交互世界模型的开放全栈方案。第一阶段通过轨迹条件训练，为文本到视频或图像到视频骨干加入相机控制；第二阶段采用因果自回归蒸馏，包括 Causal Forcing 系列方法，使模型只用少量去噪步就能根据过去上下文生成下一片段。框架覆盖数据准备、训练、推理与部署，而不绑定单一骨干，并把结果作为连续相机可控模拟器。实验在多种基础生成器上评估视觉质量、轨迹跟随、长程自回归展开、误差累积、帧率和计算成本，并分析控制编码、因果掩码、教师模型、蒸馏目标、步数和上下文。

applications: Open-source conversion of video generators into real-time interactive worlds

name: Interaction Networks
title: Interaction Networks for Learning about Objects, Relations and Physics

summary.en: Interaction Networks learn physical dynamics by decomposing a system into objects, relations, and external effects. Each object carries state such as position and velocity, while directed edges describe possible interactions. A relational model computes an effect for every edge from sender, receiver, and relation attributes; these effects are aggregated per object and passed to an object model that predicts the next state or outcome. The same modules are shared across entities, allowing the simulator to handle different object counts and configurations. Experiments model gravitational n-body systems, bouncing objects, rigid-body arrangements, and articulated mechanisms, evaluating state prediction, force and energy-related quantities, multi-step rollout, and transfer to unseen layouts. Analyses compare monolithic and relation-aware networks and examine graph structure and recurrent application.
summary.zh: Interaction Networks 通过把系统分解为物体、关系和外部作用来学习物理动力学。每个物体携带位置、速度等状态，有向关系边描述可能的交互；关系模型根据发送者、接收者和边属性计算作用效果，再按物体聚合，并交给物体模型预测下一状态或其他物理量。所有实体共享同一组模块，因此学习式模拟器可处理不同数量和布局的物体。实验覆盖引力多体系统、碰撞物体、刚体组合和关节机构，评估状态、力与能量相关量、多步展开及未见布局迁移，并比较整体网络和关系感知网络，分析图结构与递归应用。

applications: Object- and relation-based learned physical simulation

name: Neural Physics Engine
title: A Compositional Object-Based Approach to Learning Physical Dynamics

summary.en: This work learns a compositional physical world model whose state is organized around objects and their pairwise interactions. Object attributes encode position, motion, appearance, and latent physical properties. A shared interaction function estimates how each neighboring object affects another, and an object dynamics function combines those effects with the current state to predict the next step. Repeated application produces a multi-step simulation, while parameter sharing lets knowledge learned on smaller scenes transfer to systems with new object counts and layouts. Experiments cover collision, spring and multi-body environments and evaluate future trajectories, inferred physical properties, and long rollout. Comparisons test monolithic predictors and alternative factorizations, and ablations examine object decomposition, interaction aggregation, latent property encoding, training horizon, and compositional generalization.
summary.zh: 该工作学习以物体及其两两交互组织状态的组合式物理世界模型。物体属性编码位置、运动、外观与潜在物理性质；共享交互函数估计相邻物体之间的影响，物体动力学函数再把这些作用与当前状态结合，预测下一步。递归应用即可形成多步模拟，参数共享使在较小场景上获得的知识迁移到不同物体数量和布局。实验覆盖碰撞、弹簧和多体环境，评估未来轨迹、物理属性推断与长程展开；比较整体预测器和不同分解方式，并分析物体分解、交互聚合、潜在属性、训练跨度和组合泛化。

applications: Compositional object-based prediction of physical dynamics

name: Neural Relational Inference
title: Neural Relational Inference for Interacting Systems

summary.en: Neural Relational Inference learns the hidden interaction structure of a dynamical system and a simulator that uses it. An encoder reads object trajectories and produces a distribution over discrete relation types for every directed pair. Sampling through a differentiable Gumbel-softmax representation yields a latent graph. A message-passing decoder applies relation-specific dynamics along those edges and predicts future object states recursively. The variational objective trains structure inference and dynamics together without graph labels. Experiments use spring systems, charged particles, and motion-capture sequences, measuring edge recovery, one-step error, multi-step rollout, and transfer across trajectories. Comparisons include fully connected and fixed-graph recurrent models, while ablations study edge categories, posterior uncertainty, teacher forcing, rollout training, and the relation between graph structure and predictive performance.
summary.zh: Neural Relational Inference 同时学习动态系统的隐藏交互结构和使用该结构的模拟器。编码器读取物体轨迹，为每个有向物体对产生离散关系类型分布；通过可微 Gumbel-softmax 采样得到潜在图。消息传递解码器沿边应用关系特定动力学，并递归预测未来物体状态。变分目标在没有图标签的情况下联合训练结构推断与动力学。实验使用弹簧系统、带电粒子和动作捕捉序列，评估边恢复、单步误差、多步展开与跨轨迹迁移；同时比较全连接和固定图循环模型，并分析边类别、后验不确定性、教师强制、展开训练及图结构与预测表现的关系。

applications: Latent interaction-graph discovery and physical rollout

name: Graph Network Simulator
title: Learning to Simulate Complex Physics with Graph Networks

summary.en: Graph Network-based Simulators learn particle-level physical dynamics for materials whose behavior emerges from local interactions. Particles become graph nodes with position, velocity, material and boundary features; edges connect nearby particles. An encoder transforms these inputs, a recurrent message-passing processor propagates interaction effects, and a decoder predicts particle accelerations integrated into the next state. Training adds random-walk noise so recursive rollout remains aligned with states encountered during simulation. Experiments cover water, sand, viscous goop, rigid objects and cloth, with thousands of particles and varying containers or obstacles. Evaluation measures trajectory error, visual behavior, long rollout, and generalization to new scene sizes, shapes and initial conditions, while ablations examine neighborhood radius, message steps, state features and noise.
summary.zh: Graph Network-based Simulators 学习粒子级物理动力学，用局部交互模拟流体、颗粒、刚体与可变形材料。粒子作为图节点，携带位置、速度、材料和边界特征，邻近粒子之间建立边；编码器处理输入，循环消息传递模块传播交互作用，解码器预测粒子加速度并积分到下一状态。训练对输入加入随机游走噪声，使递归展开适应模拟过程中遇到的状态。实验覆盖水、沙、黏性材料、刚体与布料，包含大量粒子和不同容器、障碍；评估轨迹误差、视觉行为、长程展开及对新尺寸、形状和初始条件的泛化，并分析邻域、消息步数、状态特征和噪声。

applications: Learned particle simulation for fluids, solids, and deformable materials

name: MeshGraphNets
title: Learning Mesh-Based Simulation with Graph Networks

summary.en: MeshGraphNets learn dynamics directly on the irregular meshes used by physical simulators. Mesh vertices become graph nodes carrying position, velocity and material or boundary features, while mesh connectivity and optional world-space proximity define edges. An encoder–processor–decoder graph network propagates local effects and predicts the next physical state. For deforming systems, an auxiliary sizing field supports adaptive remeshing so resolution follows evolving geometry during rollout. The same architecture is applied to cloth, aerodynamic flow around obstacles, and structural mechanics. Experiments compare prediction accuracy and computation with numerical solvers and learned baselines, measure long-horizon stability and conservation-related behavior, and test generalization to new geometries, meshes and conditions. Ablations examine message-passing depth, connectivity, noise, state variables, remeshing supervision and resolution.
summary.zh: MeshGraphNets 直接在物理模拟器使用的不规则网格上学习动力学。网格顶点成为图节点，携带位置、速度、材料和边界特征；网格连接与可选的世界空间邻近关系定义边。编码器—处理器—解码器图网络传播局部作用并预测下一物理状态。对形变系统，辅助尺寸场支持自适应重网格，使分辨率随展开中的几何变化调整。同一架构用于布料、绕障碍气流和结构力学。实验将预测精度和计算量与数值求解器、学习基线比较，评估长程稳定与跨几何、网格和条件泛化，并分析消息深度、连接、噪声、状态变量、重网格监督和分辨率。

applications: Mesh-based learned simulation for fluids and deformable structures

name: CausalDrive
title: CausalDrive: Real-time Causal World Models for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: CausalDrive is a real-time neural driving simulator that predicts how traffic responds to an ego vehicle rather than replaying a predetermined future layout. Starting from an initial observation, a proposed ego trajectory, and semantic prompts, the model autoregressively renders future driving video while generating the reactions of surrounding participants. Its training and rollout design addresses repeated self-conditioning so the simulator can remain interactive over time. SocioDrive-Bench supplies scenarios and measurements for multi-agent driving behavior. Experiments evaluate image and video fidelity, action controllability, generation speed, long rollout, and causal reactivity to ego maneuvers. The model is also used as a closed-loop policy evaluator and as an environment for generative reinforcement-learning post-training, connecting simulated social interaction with downstream driving decisions.
summary.zh: CausalDrive 是实时神经驾驶模拟器，预测交通参与者如何响应自车，而不是重放预先确定的未来布局。模型从初始观察、候选自车轨迹和语义提示出发，自回归渲染未来驾驶视频，并同步生成周围参与者的反应；训练与展开设计处理反复自条件，使模拟长期保持交互。SocioDrive-Bench 提供多智能体驾驶行为的场景和测量。实验评估图像与视频质量、动作可控性、生成速度、长程展开和对自车操作的因果反应。系统还作为闭环策略评估器与生成式强化学习后训练环境，把模拟社会交互连接到驾驶决策。

applications: Reactive multi-agent driving simulation and policy post-training

name: GraphWorld
title: GraphWorld: Long-Horizon Planning with World Models for End-to-End Autonomous Driving

summary.en: GraphWorld is an end-to-end driving framework that uses a structured latent world model for long-horizon planning. Perception features for the ego vehicle and nearby agents are organized into an Ego-Centric Interaction Graph whose edges encode changing pairwise influence. A world-state change predictor advances this graph over time and exposes anticipated interactions to the planning decoder. Two-stage temporal supervision first teaches future state evolution and then aligns those predictions with the ego trajectory, linking representation learning to control. Experiments use open-loop datasets and closed-loop simulation to measure trajectory displacement, collision, route progress, and longer-horizon performance. Comparisons cover end-to-end planners and alternative world-model representations, while ablations examine graph construction, interaction updates, state-change prediction, temporal supervision stages, planning horizon, and safety-oriented objectives.
summary.zh: GraphWorld 使用结构化潜在世界模型进行长程端到端驾驶规划。自车与周围交通体的感知特征被组织为自车中心交互图，图边编码随时间变化的两两影响；世界状态变化预测器推进该图，并把预期交互提供给规划解码器。两阶段时间监督先学习未来状态演化，再把预测与自车轨迹对齐，使表示学习直接连接控制。实验结合开环数据集与闭环模拟，评估轨迹位移、碰撞、路线进度和长时间范围表现；同时比较端到端规划器及不同世界表示，并分析图构建、交互更新、状态变化预测、监督阶段、规划长度与安全目标。

applications: Interaction-aware long-horizon end-to-end driving planning

name: X-World
title: X-World: Controllable Ego-Centric Multi-Camera World Models for Scalable End-to-End Driving

summary.en: X-World is a controllable generative world model for multi-camera autonomous-driving simulation. It receives synchronized surround-view history and a future ego action sequence, then jointly predicts future video for all cameras. Shared generation and geometric conditioning connect overlapping viewpoints so traffic actors and scene structure remain aligned across views and time. Optional controls specify dynamic-agent behavior and scene elements, enabling reproducible or edited rollouts from the same initial situation. The model exposes the ego-action interface needed by a driving policy and controls useful for scenario creation. Experiments evaluate visual fidelity, cross-view geometry, temporal coherence, action following, dynamic-agent control, long rollout, and scalability, and demonstrate policy-oriented simulation. Ablations analyze multi-camera coupling, action encoding, scene controls, history length, and generation architecture.
summary.zh: X-World 是用于多相机自动驾驶模拟的可控生成世界模型。模型接收同步环视历史和未来自车动作序列，联合预测所有相机的未来视频；共享生成与几何条件连接重叠视角，使交通体和场景结构在跨视图、跨时间保持对齐。可选结构化控制还能指定动态交通体行为与场景元素，从同一初始状态生成可复现或经过编辑的展开。因此系统既提供驾驶策略所需的自车动作接口，也支持场景创建。实验评估视觉质量、跨视图几何、时间连贯、动作遵循、动态交通体控制、长程展开与扩展性，并分析多相机耦合、动作编码、场景控制、历史长度和生成架构。

applications: Editable multi-camera driving simulation for scalable policy development

name: Uni-World VLA
title: Uni-World VLA: Interleaved World Modeling and Planning for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Uni-World VLA unifies driving world prediction and trajectory planning in one autoregressive token sequence. Multicamera images are compressed into visual tokens separated into slower static structure and higher-frequency dynamic cues. Ego velocity, acceleration, navigation command, and depth features provide state. The model alternates generation of future visual tokens with ego trajectory tokens, so predicted environment evolution conditions planning and planned motion conditions subsequent world prediction. Depth cross-attention reinforces spatial geometry without a separate perception pipeline. Experiments evaluate future-image quality and trajectory planning on NAVSIM and other driving settings, including open- and closed-loop measures. Comparisons cover VLA planners and standalone driving world models, while ablations study token rates, static–dynamic separation, interleaving order, depth features, world supervision, and planning feedback.
summary.zh: Uni-World VLA 在同一自回归令牌序列中统一驾驶世界预测与轨迹规划。多相机图像被压缩为离散视觉令牌，并分成更新较慢的静态结构和高频动态线索；自车速度、加速度、导航指令及深度特征补充状态。模型交替生成未来视觉令牌和自车轨迹令牌，使预测环境演化条件化规划，而计划运动又条件化后续世界预测。深度交叉注意增强空间几何，无需另建感知管线。实验在 NAVSIM 等设置中评估未来图像与轨迹规划，包括开环和闭环指标；并比较 VLA 规划器、独立驾驶世界模型，分析令牌频率、动静分解、交替顺序、深度、世界监督和规划反馈。

applications: Interleaved video-world prediction and end-to-end driving planning

name: HorizonDrive
title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation

summary.en: HorizonDrive is a self-corrective autoregressive video world model for long driving simulation. It first converts a standard diffusion generator into a rollout-capable teacher through scheduled recovery training. Some conditioning frames are replaced by the teacher's own predictions while supervision remains on the real future, teaching recovery from states encountered during deployment. Local prediction-to-ground-truth transitions and a global boundary schedule gradually expand this training across longer sequences. Teacher-rollout distribution-matching distillation then transfers the learned behavior into a short-chunk student for repeated interactive generation. Experiments evaluate extended driving rollouts through video quality, temporal and geometric consistency, action following, drift, and efficiency. Comparisons and ablations examine recovery schedules, teacher construction, rollout distillation, chunk length, conditioning history, sequence duration, and autoregressive stability.
summary.zh: HorizonDrive 是用于长程驾驶模拟的自修正自回归视频世界模型。系统先通过计划式恢复训练，把标准扩散生成器转成可展开教师：部分条件帧被教师自身预测替换，而监督仍指向真实未来，使模型学习从部署时实际遇到的状态恢复。局部“预测到真值”过渡与全局边界调度逐步把训练扩展到更长序列；随后，教师展开的分布匹配蒸馏把该行为迁移到适合重复交互生成的短片段学生模型。实验通过视频质量、时间与几何一致性、动作遵循、漂移和效率评估长驾驶展开，并分析恢复调度、教师构建、展开蒸馏、片段长度、条件历史与序列长度。

applications: Self-corrective long-horizon autoregressive driving simulation

name: HERMES++
title: HERMES++: Toward a Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation

summary.en: HERMES++ is a unified driving world model for understanding the current scene and generating future geometry. Multicamera images are encoded into a bird's-eye-view representation shared by language, semantic, and generative tasks. World queries connect the BEV state to a language model for scene description and reasoning. A Current-to-Future Link propagates that state under semantic context, and a renderer generates future point clouds. Joint geometric optimization constrains rendered outputs and latent features so the representation supports reconstruction and prediction. Experiments evaluate driving question answering, captioning, three-dimensional scene reconstruction, point-cloud forecasting, and generation on standard datasets. Comparisons cover multimodal driving models and geometry systems, while ablations study BEV sharing, world queries, temporal propagation, language context, renderer design, and geometric objectives.
summary.zh: HERMES++ 统一理解当前驾驶场景与生成未来几何。多相机图像被编码为鸟瞰表示，并由语言、语义和生成任务共享；世界查询把 BEV 状态连接到语言模型，用于场景描述与推理。Current-to-Future Link 在语义上下文中推进状态，共享渲染器生成未来点云。联合几何优化同时约束渲染输出和潜在特征，使表示兼顾重建与预测。实验在标准数据集上评估驾驶问答、描述、三维场景重建、点云预测和生成，并比较多模态驾驶模型与专用几何系统，分析 BEV 共享、世界查询、时间传播、语言上下文、渲染器和几何目标。

applications: Unified driving scene understanding, reconstruction, and future generation

name: Xiaomi Auto World Model
title: Xiaomi Auto World Model: A Joint World Model Integrating Reconstruction and Generation for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Xiaomi Auto World Model combines two capabilities for autonomous driving: reconstructing the three-dimensional world and generating its future. WorldRec uses sparse scene queries to produce a feed-forward representation without per-scene optimization or one primitive per pixel. WorldGen predicts controllable future observations and scene evolution. The Joint World Model connects their representations so reconstructed geometry supplies spatial structure to generation, while generative training enriches the shared state with dynamics. Camera and driving conditions support viewpoint and motion control. Experiments evaluate reconstruction fidelity, geometric efficiency, novel-view rendering, future-video quality, temporal consistency, and control across driving datasets. Comparisons cover optimized and feed-forward reconstruction, video world models, and separate training, while ablations analyze sparse queries, primitive allocation, feature exchange, joint objectives, and control conditioning.
summary.zh: Xiaomi Auto World Model 结合自动驾驶中的两项核心能力：重建当前三维世界与生成其未来。WorldRec 用稀疏场景查询产生前馈几何表示，无需逐场景优化，也不为每个像素分配高斯；WorldGen 预测可控未来观察和场景演化。Joint World Model 连接两者表示，使重建几何为生成提供稳定空间结构，生成训练则为共享状态加入动力学。相机与驾驶条件支持视角、运动控制。实验评估重建质量、几何效率、新视角渲染、未来视频、时间一致性和控制，并比较优化式、前馈重建及视频世界模型，分析稀疏查询、基元分配、特征交换、联合目标和控制条件。

applications: Joint 3D reconstruction and controllable future generation for driving

name: Driver-WM
title: Driver-WM: A Driver-Centric Traffic-Conditioned Latent World Model for In-Cabin Dynamics Rollout

summary.en: Driver-WM models the driver as part of the evolving world in mixed-autonomy vehicles. One stream encodes in-cabin observations into skeleton state and semantic factors such as attention or activity. A second stream represents external traffic context. Time-causal gated cross-attention injects road events into the internal state, and an autoregressive latent model predicts future driver motion and semantics. The output supports anticipating how a supervising driver may respond as control responsibility changes between person and vehicle. Experiments evaluate skeleton-trajectory forecasting, semantic-factor prediction, temporal rollout, and sensitivity to traffic events on synchronized in-cabin and out-cabin data. Comparisons include single-stream and noncausal models, while ablations examine traffic features, gated fusion, geometric and semantic heads, history length, rollout horizon, and cross-modal alignment.
summary.zh: Driver-WM 在混合自动驾驶中把驾驶员作为演化世界的一部分。一个流把舱内观察编码为骨架几何状态与注意、活动等语义因素，另一流表示车外交通上下文；时间因果门控交叉注意把相关道路事件注入内部状态，自回归潜在模型再多步预测驾驶员运动与语义。该输出可用于预判人与车辆之间控制责任变化时，监督驾驶员会如何响应。实验在同步舱内外数据上评估骨架轨迹、语义因素、时间展开及对交通事件的敏感性，并比较单流和非因果模型，分析交通特征、门控融合、几何与语义预测头、历史长度、展开范围和跨模态对齐。

applications: Traffic-conditioned in-cabin driver-state forecasting

name: Drive-OccWorld
title: Driving in the Occupancy World: Vision-Centric 4D Occupancy Forecasting and Planning via World Models for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Drive-OccWorld represents driving dynamics as action-conditioned four-dimensional semantic occupancy. Multicamera images are encoded into a three-dimensional occupancy state containing free space, geometry, and traffic entities. A temporal world model advances this state under a candidate ego trajectory, producing future occupancy rather than one path. Flexible action conditioning allows multiple ego motions to be simulated from the same observation. An integrated planner reads predicted occupancy and selects trajectories that account for structure and safety. The model is trained jointly for forecasting and planning. Experiments evaluate semantic occupancy, future-state accuracy, trajectory displacement, collision, and driving performance on public datasets. Comparisons cover occupancy predictors and end-to-end planners, while ablations study action conditions, temporal memory, occupancy supervision, planner coupling, safety cost, and rollout length.
summary.zh: Drive-OccWorld 用动作条件四维语义占据表示自动驾驶动力学。多相机图像被编码为包含自由空间、几何和交通体的三维占据状态；时间世界模型在候选自车轨迹条件下推进该状态，生成未来占据，而非只给出单条计划路径。灵活动作条件允许从同一观察模拟多种自车运动。集成规划器读取预测占据，选择同时考虑三维结构与安全的轨迹，模型联合训练预测和规划。实验在公开数据集上评估语义占据、未来状态、轨迹位移、碰撞与驾驶表现，并比较占据预测器、端到端规划器，分析动作条件、时间记忆、占据监督、规划耦合、安全代价和展开长度。

applications: Action-conditioned occupancy forecasting and safe driving planning

name: LiSTAR
title: LiSTAR: Ray-Centric World Models for 4D LiDAR Sequences in Autonomous Driving

summary.en: LiSTAR is a generative world model for controllable four-dimensional LiDAR sequences. A hierarchical coordinate system organizes points along sensor rays and across frames. The 4D VQ-VAE uses ray-centric spatial and temporal attention to compress sparse point clouds into discrete tokens while preserving geometry and motion. MaskSTART predicts masked token sequences conditioned on scene layout, enabling reconstruction, forecasting, and generation within one representation. Layout controls specify road and actor structure, and decoded tokens yield high-resolution future LiDAR. Experiments evaluate point-cloud reconstruction, temporal forecasting, unconditional and controlled generation on driving datasets using geometric, distributional, and temporal metrics. Comparisons cover voxel, range-image and point-based models, while ablations analyze coordinate hierarchy, ray attention, temporal modules, codebook, masking schedule, and layout conditioning.
summary.zh: LiSTAR 是用于可控四维 LiDAR 序列的生成世界模型。分层坐标系统沿传感器射线和时间帧组织点；4D VQ-VAE 结合射线中心空间注意与时间注意，把稀疏点云压缩为离散令牌，同时保留几何和运动。MaskSTART 在场景布局条件下预测被遮挡令牌，使同一表示支持重建、预测和生成；布局控制指定道路与交通体结构，解码后得到高分辨率未来 LiDAR。实验在自动驾驶数据集上用几何、分布和时间指标评估点云重建、未来预测、无条件与可控生成，并比较体素、距离图和点方法，分析坐标层次、射线注意、时间模块、码本、掩码策略和布局条件。

applications: Controllable reconstruction, forecasting, and generation of 4D LiDAR

name: UniAD
title: Planning-Oriented Autonomous Driving

summary.en: UniAD is a planning-oriented autonomous-driving system that organizes perception and prediction around a shared structured scene state. Multicamera images form bird's-eye-view features. Query-based modules track agents, construct online maps, predict interacting agent trajectories, and forecast occupancy. Rather than running these tasks independently, queries pass entity and geometry information forward so each prediction remains connected to the planner. A collision-aware planning head produces the ego trajectory from this joint state, and staged end-to-end training aligns all modules with driving. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate detection, tracking, mapping, motion prediction, occupancy, trajectory displacement, and collision, including joint and module-level comparisons. Ablations study task connections, query propagation, interaction modeling, occupancy, planning losses, training order, and robustness when earlier module predictions are imperfect.
summary.zh: UniAD 以共享结构化场景状态组织自动驾驶感知、预测和规划。多相机图像形成鸟瞰特征；基于查询的模块跟踪交通体、构建在线地图、预测交互轨迹并估计占据。各任务并非独立运行，查询会向后传递实体与几何信息，使每项预测都连接到规划器。碰撞感知规划头根据联合状态生成自车轨迹，分阶段端到端训练把所有模块与驾驶目标对齐。nuScenes 实验评估检测、跟踪、地图、运动预测、占据、轨迹位移和碰撞，并进行联合、模块比较；消融分析任务连接、查询传播、交互、占据、规划损失、训练顺序及前序预测不完美时的稳健性。

applications: Planning-oriented joint perception, prediction, and control

name: GameFormer
title: GameFormer: Game-Theoretic Modeling and Learning of Transformer-Based Interactive Prediction and Planning for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: GameFormer jointly models interactive traffic prediction and ego planning through a game-theoretic Transformer. Encoded map elements and agent histories form a structured multi-agent scene. A hierarchy of level-k decoders alternates predictions: lower levels propose trajectories, while later levels revise each participant after observing others' anticipated behavior. Gaussian-mixture outputs preserve multiple futures, and imitation objectives regularize traffic rules and driving style. The ego planner is trained within the same hierarchy, so its trajectory accounts for agents that may respond. Experiments on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and closed-loop driving evaluate prediction accuracy, multimodality, collision, route progress, and planning performance. Comparisons and ablations examine decoder levels, interaction iterations, shared features, mixture components, learning objectives, and joint versus separate prediction and planning.
summary.zh: GameFormer 用博弈论 Transformer 联合建模交互交通预测与自车规划。编码后的地图元素和交通体历史构成结构化多智能体场景；层次化 level-k 解码器交替预测：较低层提出初始轨迹，后续层观察其他参与者的预期行为后修正每个交通体。高斯混合输出保留多种未来，模仿目标约束交通规则与驾驶风格。自车规划器在同一交互层次中训练，因此轨迹会考虑周围交通体的响应。实验在 Waymo Open Motion 与闭环驾驶中评估运动预测、多模态、碰撞、路线和规划表现，并分析解码层数、交互迭代、共享特征、混合分量、学习目标以及联合、分离训练。

applications: Game-theoretic interactive prediction and autonomous-driving planning

name: LAW
title: Enhancing End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Latent World Model

summary.en: LAW enhances end-to-end driving with a self-supervised latent world model. A visual encoder produces the scene representation used by the planner. During training, an auxiliary decoder predicts next-frame latent features conditioned on the planned trajectory, requiring the current state to capture environment evolution under ego motion. This temporal objective can supplement perception tasks or replace them in a perception-free configuration. The planner generates the ego trajectory from the dynamics-aware representation without visual prediction during deployment. Experiments on nuScenes, NAVSIM, and CARLA evaluate trajectory displacement, collision, planning score, and closed-loop driving. Comparisons cover end-to-end planners with perception supervision, and ablations study future targets, prediction horizon, trajectory conditioning, latent loss, annotation use, feature sharing, and auxiliary-decoder placement.
summary.zh: LAW 用自监督潜在世界模型增强端到端自动驾驶。视觉编码器产生规划器使用的场景表示；训练时，辅助解码器在计划轨迹条件下预测下一相机帧的潜在特征，要求当前状态编码自车运动下的环境演化。该时间目标既可补充基于标注的感知任务，也可在无感知标注配置中单独使用。部署时规划器直接从动力学感知表示生成自车轨迹，无需运行视觉预测。实验在 nuScenes、NAVSIM 和 CARLA 上评估轨迹位移、碰撞、规划分数和闭环驾驶，并比较带感知监督的端到端规划器，分析未来目标、预测长度、轨迹条件、潜在损失、标注使用、特征共享和辅助解码器位置。

applications: Self-supervised dynamics-aware representation learning for end-to-end driving

name: World4Drive
title: World4Drive: End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Intention-Aware Physical Latent World Model

summary.en: World4Drive is an intention-aware latent world model for end-to-end driving. Multicamera observations are encoded into a physical scene state combining spatial geometry, semantics, and dynamic traffic. Driving intention conditions the generation of several plausible ego trajectories. The world model rolls each candidate forward in latent space, estimates scene evolution and safety, and a learned evaluator selects the trajectory to execute. This generate–evaluate–select loop preserves multimodal decisions while grounding them in predicted physical consequences. Experiments on public benchmarks measure trajectory displacement, collision, planning score, route behavior, and closed-loop success. Comparisons cover deterministic and multimodal planners, while ablations study world-state encoding, geometric and semantic features, intention inputs, candidate diversity, latent rollout, evaluation criteria, and joint training.
summary.zh: World4Drive 是用于端到端自动驾驶的意图感知潜在世界模型。多相机观察被编码为结合空间几何、语义上下文和动态交通信息的物理场景状态；驾驶意图表示条件化多个可行自车轨迹的生成。世界模型在潜空间推进每个候选，估计相应场景演化和安全性，学习式评估器再选择执行轨迹。“生成—评估—选择”循环在保留多模态决策的同时，用预测物理后果进行接地。实验在公开驾驶基准上评估轨迹位移、碰撞、规划分数、路线行为和闭环成功，并比较确定性、多模态规划器，分析世界状态、几何语义特征、意图、候选多样性、潜在展开、评估标准和联合训练。

applications: Intention-aware multimodal trajectory generation and evaluation

name: MUVO
title: MUVO: A Multimodal Generative World Model for Autonomous Driving with Geometric Representations

summary.en: MUVO is a multimodal generative world model that predicts driving futures in appearance and geometry. Camera images and LiDAR are encoded separately and fused into a spatial latent scene state. A temporal Transformer advances that state under ego actions, and modality-specific decoders generate future RGB, depth, and three-dimensional occupancy. Joint prediction ties visual texture to metric geometry and supports closed-loop control rather than only video forecasting. The model is trained on CARLA sequences and rolled forward for multiple steps. Experiments evaluate image quality, depth and occupancy accuracy, temporal prediction, action conditioning, and driving success. Comparisons cover single-modality and multimodal predictors, while ablations examine fusion location, geometric lifting, temporal architecture, action input, prediction targets, latent size, rollout horizon, and joint losses.
summary.zh: MUVO 是同时预测驾驶外观与几何未来的多模态生成世界模型。相机图像和 LiDAR 分别编码，并融合为具有空间结构的潜在场景状态；时间 Transformer 在自车动作条件下推进状态，模态专用解码器生成未来 RGB、深度和三维占据。联合预测把视觉纹理与度量几何绑定，使表示不仅用于视频预测，也能支持闭环控制。模型在 CARLA 驾驶序列上训练并进行多步展开。实验评估图像质量、深度与占据精度、时间预测、动作条件和闭环驾驶成功，并比较单模态、多模态预测器，分析融合位置、几何提升、时间架构、动作输入、预测目标、潜变量规模、展开长度和联合损失。

applications: Multimodal geometric world prediction for closed-loop driving

name: DreamVLA
title: DreamVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model Dreamed with Comprehensive World Knowledge

summary.en: DreamVLA is a vision-language-action model trained through prediction of task-relevant world knowledge. From images and an instruction, it identifies dynamic regions and forecasts spatial and semantic representations of how those regions will change. The predicted world representation is fused with the present observation and passed to an inverse-dynamics action decoder, creating a perception–prediction–action loop without full future-video rendering. Spatial targets describe geometry and motion, while semantic targets preserve object and task meaning. Experiments cover simulated and real manipulation, measuring task success, multi-task transfer, object and scene generalization, and data efficiency. Comparisons include direct VLA policies and video-prediction variants, while ablations examine dynamic-region guidance, target types, prediction horizon, knowledge fusion, inverse dynamics, and pretraining.
summary.zh: DreamVLA 通过显式预测任务相关世界知识来训练视觉语言动作策略。模型根据当前图像与指令识别动态区域，预测这些区域将如何变化的紧凑空间、语义表示；预测世界表示与当前观察融合后交给逆动力学动作解码器，形成“感知—预测—行动”循环，无需渲染完整未来视频。空间目标描述几何与运动，语义目标保留物体和任务含义。实验覆盖模拟与真实操作，评估任务成功、多任务迁移、物体和场景泛化及数据效率，并比较直接 VLA、视频预测变体，分析动态区域引导、目标类型、预测长度、知识融合、逆动力学和预训练。

applications: World-knowledge prediction for generalist robot manipulation

name: CoWVLA
title: Chain of World: World Model Thinking in Latent Motion

summary.en: CoWVLA introduces Chain-of-World reasoning for robot manipulation in a latent space that separates scene structure from motion. The observation supplies appearance and geometry features, while a motion representation captures task-relevant change. Conditioned on language, the model predicts a chain of latent motion states and a terminal keyframe. An action decoder reads this progression to produce the robot trajectory, coupling temporal world modeling to control without synthesizing every RGB frame. The separated representation preserves object identity while focusing prediction on movement. Experiments evaluate simulated and real manipulation through task success, long-horizon execution, future representation quality, and generalization to objects and scenes. Comparisons cover VLA and world-action baselines, while ablations study structure-motion separation, chain length, terminal prediction, temporal objectives, and action fusion.
summary.zh: CoWVLA 在结构与运动分离的潜空间中引入 Chain-of-World 机器人操作推理。当前观察提供相对稳定的外观、几何特征，运动表示捕捉任务相关变化；在语言条件下，模型预测连续潜在运动链和终点关键帧表示。动作解码器读取这一想象进程生成机器人轨迹，把时间世界建模连接到控制，而无需合成每个 RGB 帧。分离表示还能在集中预测运动时保持物体身份。实验在模拟和真实操作中评估任务成功、长程执行、未来表示质量及物体、场景泛化，并比较 VLA、世界动作基线，分析结构运动分离、链长度、终点预测、时间目标和动作融合。

applications: Latent motion-chain reasoning for robot manipulation

name: Video Prediction Policy
title: Video Prediction Policy: A Generalist Robot Policy with Predictive Visual Representations

summary.en: Video Prediction Policy uses predictive representations of a video diffusion model as the state for robot control. First, a video foundation model is adapted into a text-guided manipulation predictor using robot trajectories and internet video. A VideoFormer then aggregates features produced during future prediction, and a diffusion policy head decodes robot action chunks. The model learns an implicit inverse-dynamics mapping from anticipated visual change to control while retaining visual knowledge from pretraining. Experiments span simulated and real robots, evaluating multi-task manipulation, unseen objects and environments, and task success. Comparisons cover generalist VLA and predictive policies, while ablations study video adaptation, internet data, feature layer and timestep, VideoFormer aggregation, prediction supervision, and diffusion action decoding.
summary.zh: Video Prediction Policy 把视频扩散模型的内部预测表示作为机器人控制状态。第一阶段用机器人轨迹和互联网操作视频，把视频基础模型适配为文本引导的操作预测器；第二阶段由 VideoFormer 聚合未来预测过程中的特征，扩散策略头再从中解码机器人动作块。因此模型从预期视觉变化到控制学习隐式逆动力学，同时保留视频预训练的广泛视觉知识。实验覆盖模拟与真实机器人，评估多任务操作、未见物体和环境及任务成功，并比较通用 VLA、预测式策略，分析视频适配、互联网数据、特征层和时间步、VideoFormer、预测监督及扩散动作解码。

applications: Predictive video representations for generalist robot control

name: DREMA
title: Dream to Manipulate: Compositional World Models Empowering Robot Imitation Learning with Imagination

summary.en: DREMA connects photorealistic three-dimensional reconstruction to a physics simulator to build a compositional robot world model. Multiview observations create a Gaussian-splatting scene whose objects are segmented and transferred into an executable simulator with corresponding geometry and pose. Robot actions and task phases are rolled forward under physical dynamics, and resulting states are rendered back into realistic observations. These imagined trajectories become demonstrations for an imitation policy, expanding limited real data without executing every variation on hardware. Experiments use simulated and real manipulation and train PerAct on original plus generated demonstrations, measuring task success, data efficiency, and transfer across object arrangements. Comparisons and ablations study reconstruction, object composition, simulator alignment, rendering, action perturbation, imagination volume, and policy training mixtures.
summary.zh: DREMA 把照片级三维重建与物理模拟器连接，构建组合式机器人世界模型。多视角观察生成高斯泼溅场景，物体被分割后以相应几何与姿态转入可执行模拟器；候选机器人动作和任务阶段在物理动力学下展开，结果状态再渲染回真实感观察。这些想象轨迹作为额外示范训练模仿策略，在无需硬件执行每种变化的情况下扩充有限真实数据。实验在模拟与真实操作任务中，用原始和生成示范训练 PerAct，评估任务成功、数据效率和跨物体布局迁移，并分析重建、物体组合、模拟对齐、渲染、动作扰动、想象数量和训练数据配比。

applications: Physics-grounded imagined demonstrations for robot imitation learning

name: Fast-WAM
title: Fast-WAM: Do World Action Models Need Test-Time Future Imagination?

summary.en: Fast-WAM uses future imagination during learning but not during robot deployment. A shared visual-language representation feeds a video branch trained to predict future observations and an action branch trained to generate control chunks. Future-video supervision teaches scene dynamics and task progress, while inference runs only the action pathway, avoiding iterative generation before each movement. The policy retains a world-model-shaped representation with direct control latency. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboTwin, and real manipulation compare success and speed with VLA policies and WAMs that render futures at test time. Ablations examine video co-training, shared layers, prediction targets, loss balance, action decoder, data scale, and variants that enable or remove future generation during inference.
summary.zh: Fast-WAM 在训练中使用未来想象，但机器人部署时无需运行视觉生成。共享视觉语言表示同时连接视频分支和动作分支：视频分支预测未来观察，动作分支生成控制块。未来视频监督让表示学习场景动力学与任务进度，推理时只执行动作路径，避免每次移动前迭代生成视频，从而保留受世界模型塑造的表示并实现直接控制延迟。实验在 LIBERO、RoboTwin 和真实操作中比较任务成功与速度，包括 VLA 策略和测试时显式渲染未来的 WAM；消融分析视频联合训练、共享层、预测目标、损失权重、动作解码器、数据规模及推理时启用、移除生成的变体。

applications: Low-latency robot control with training-time future prediction

name: NavMorph
title: NavMorph: A Self-Evolving World Model for Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments

summary.en: NavMorph is a self-evolving world model for vision-and-language navigation with continuous control. A World-aware Navigator combines instruction, visual history, agent pose, and a structured latent map. The Foresight Action Planner predicts how candidate movements change this state and scores their future route alignment. During online use, feedback from completed transitions updates the world model across episodes, adapting its dynamics to new environments without task labels. The agent repeatedly observes, imagines, acts, and incorporates the transition. Experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE evaluate navigation error, success, SPL, path fidelity, and cross-environment adaptation. Comparisons cover reactive and map-based VLN agents, while ablations study latent structure, foresight horizon, action parameterization, update rules, cross-episode memory, and intrinsic objectives.
summary.zh: NavMorph 是面向连续低层控制的自演化视觉语言导航世界模型。World-aware Navigator 融合指令、视觉历史、智能体姿态和结构化潜在地图；Foresight Action Planner 预测候选参数化移动将如何改变该状态，并按未来路线一致性评分。在线使用时，已执行转移产生的内在反馈跨回合更新世界模型，使动力学无需任务标签即可适应新环境。智能体持续进行观察、想象、行动并吸收结果转移。R2R-CE 与 RxR-CE 实验评估导航误差、成功率、SPL、路径保真和跨环境适应，并比较反应式、地图式 VLN，分析潜在结构、前瞻长度、动作参数、更新规则、跨回合记忆和内在目标。

applications: Self-evolving foresight for continuous vision-and-language navigation

name: UNeMo
title: UNeMo: Collaborative Visual-Language Reasoning and Navigation via a Multimodal World Model

summary.en: UNeMo couples visual future reasoning and navigation decisions within one vision-and-language agent. Instruction and panoramic observation are encoded into multimodal features. For each candidate movement, a Multimodal World Model predicts the next visual-state representation. The navigation policy compares anticipated states with instruction and route history before selecting an action. World prediction and policy learning are optimized collaboratively, so foresight features are shaped by navigation while action selection receives supervision about environmental change. Room-to-Room experiments evaluate navigation error, success, SPL, path fidelity, future-state prediction, and qualitative reasoning. Comparisons include LLM-based, graph-based, and predictive agents, while ablations study world-model inputs, candidate conditioning, prediction targets, joint optimization, loss weighting, visual history, and predicted versus observed future features.
summary.zh: UNeMo 在同一视觉语言智能体中联合未来视觉推理与导航决策。指令和当前全景观察被编码为多模态特征；对每个候选移动，多模态世界模型预测下一视觉状态表示，导航策略再把这些预期状态与指令、路线历史比较后选择动作。世界预测与策略协同优化，使前瞻特征受导航目标塑造，动作选择也直接获得环境变化监督。Room-to-Room 实验评估导航误差、成功率、SPL、路径保真以及未来状态预测与定性推理，并比较 LLM、图方法和预测式智能体，分析世界模型输入、候选条件、预测目标、联合优化、损失权重、视觉历史和预测、真实未来特征。

applications: Collaborative visual-state prediction and language-guided navigation

name: NavQ
title: NavQ: Learning a Q-Model for Foresighted Vision-and-Language Navigation

summary.en: NavQ learns a compact action-value representation of visual futures for goal-oriented vision-and-language navigation. In instruction-free scenes, random trajectories provide observations, candidate actions, and later views. A self-supervised Q-model aggregates future-relevant information following each action into a cumulative feature rather than synthesizing a full video. At navigation time, the policy queries these features for all candidates and combines them with language, current vision, and route history, allowing action selection to reflect later outcomes. Experiments on REVERIE and related benchmarks evaluate success, SPL, oracle success, goal grounding, and trajectory quality. Comparisons include reactive, map-based, and explicit image-generation methods, while ablations study future horizon, cumulative aggregation, random data, feature target, Q-model architecture, policy integration, and inference cost.
summary.zh: NavQ 为目标导向视觉语言导航学习紧凑的动作未来价值表示。在没有指令标注的场景中，随机轨迹提供当前观察、候选动作与后续视图；自监督 Q 模型把每个动作之后与未来相关的信息聚合为累计特征，而不是合成完整视频。导航时，基础策略查询所有候选的 Q 特征，并与语言、当前视觉和路线历史融合，使动作选择考虑超过下一步的结果。实验在 REVERIE 等基准上评估成功率、SPL、预言成功、目标接地和轨迹质量，并比较反应式、地图式和显式图像生成方法，分析未来长度、累计聚合、随机数据、特征目标、Q 架构、策略集成和推理成本。

applications: Future-aggregated action evaluation for language-guided navigation

name: WorldMem
title: WorldMem: Long-Term Consistent World Simulation with Memory

summary.en: WorldMem augments an interactive video diffusion model with a bank of generated content and associated state. As the agent moves, selected frames, camera information, and temporal metadata are stored as memory units. During later generation, spatiotemporal retrieval finds units relevant to the current viewpoint and action, and cross-attention injects their content into the diffusion Transformer. The model can reconstruct places after large camera rotations or long gaps while updating dynamic changes. Training uses Minecraft trajectories and camera-annotated real-estate video. Experiments evaluate long-horizon visual quality, action control, 360-degree rotation, scene revisit consistency, and dynamic-state preservation. Comparisons and ablations study memory-bank size, storage frequency, retrieval signals, attention placement, pose information, temporal distance, action space, and context length.
summary.zh: WorldMem 为交互视频扩散模型加入显式记忆库，存储先前生成内容及其状态。智能体移动时，选定帧、相机信息和时间元数据被写成记忆单元；后续生成中，时空检索找到与当前视角、动作相关的单元，记忆交叉注意把内容注入扩散 Transformer。因此模型可在大幅相机旋转或长时间间隔后重建地点，同时更新动态变化。训练使用 Minecraft 轨迹和带相机标注的房地产视频。实验评估长程视觉质量、动作控制、360 度旋转、场景重访一致性和动态状态保持，并分析记忆规模、存储频率、检索信号、注意位置、姿态、时间距离、动作空间和上下文。

applications: Long-term consistent interactive world simulation with explicit memory

name: Meta-Memory
title: Meta-Memory: Retrieving and Integrating Semantic-Spatial Memories for Robot Spatial Reasoning

summary.en: Meta-Memory constructs a searchable semantic-spatial world state from a robot's observation history. Video is divided into episodes and captioned; each memory stores text features with pose and location metadata. An LLM receives two retrieval tools: semantic similarity finds observations related to a concept, while spatial-range search gathers memories near a location or recalled entity. The model combines these tools to answer spatial questions and identify navigation destinations, rather than fitting full history into one context. Experiments use robot trajectories and queries about objects, places, and relations, evaluating retrieval quality, answer accuracy, localization, and navigation utility. Comparisons and ablations study caption representations, spatial metadata, retrieval radius, semantic versus geographic search, iterative reasoning, memory density, and history duration.
summary.zh: Meta-Memory 从机器人的长观察历史构建可搜索的语义空间世界状态。视频被分成事件并生成描述，每条记忆同时保存文本特征、姿态和位置元数据。LLM 获得两种检索工具：语义相似检索寻找与概念相关的观察，空间范围检索收集某位置或已回忆实体附近的记忆。模型迭代组合工具来回答空间问题、确定导航目标，而非把全部历史塞入单一上下文。实验使用真实机器人轨迹以及关于物体、地点、关系的查询，评估检索质量、回答、定位和导航效用，并分析描述表示、空间元数据、检索半径、语义与地理搜索、迭代推理、记忆密度和历史长度。

applications: Semantic-spatial episodic retrieval for robot reasoning and navigation

name: OccSora
title: OccSora: 4D Occupancy Generation Models as World Simulators for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: OccSora models autonomous-driving futures as trajectory-conditioned sequences of semantic 3D occupancy. A 4D scene tokenizer compresses voxel grids across space and time into compact tokens while retaining category and geometric information. A diffusion Transformer then generates an entire occupancy sequence from noise under an ego-trajectory prompt, allowing the same scene context to be developed along different vehicle motions without autoregressive frame production. Decoding restores the generated tokens to temporally ordered occupancy maps. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate tokenizer reconstruction, long-sequence generation, semantic occupancy quality, temporal evolution, and response to straight, turning, stationary, and accelerating trajectories. The resulting interface connects a planned ego path with an explicit geometric-semantic forecast of the surrounding driving world.
summary.zh: OccSora 将自动驾驶未来表示为由车辆轨迹控制的语义三维占用序列。四维场景分词器在时空维度压缩体素网格，同时保留类别与几何信息；扩散 Transformer 再从噪声一次生成完整占用序列，并以自车轨迹提示控制场景如何随运动展开，避免逐帧自回归。解码器把生成标记还原为按时间排列的占用地图。nuScenes 实验考察分词器重建、长序列生成、语义占用质量、时间演化，以及直行、转向、静止和加速轨迹下的可控性，从而把规划路径与显式几何语义世界预测连接起来。

applications: Trajectory-conditioned 4D occupancy simulation for autonomous driving

name: DOME
title: DOME: Taming Diffusion Model into High-Fidelity Controllable Occupancy World Model

summary.en: DOME is a diffusion occupancy world model that predicts long 3D driving-scene sequences from historical semantic occupancy. Occ-VAE maps dense voxel grids to a continuous latent representation designed to preserve spatial detail. A spatial-temporal diffusion Transformer denoises future latent frames while repeatedly retaining the observed context. Ego trajectories are encoded as control signals, and a trajectory-resampling procedure creates additional valid motion-conditioned training pairs from occupancy and pose data. The model supports forecasting from several context frames, rollout generation, and alternative futures under different paths. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate occupancy reconstruction, future IoU and mIoU over multiple horizons, long-duration generation, trajectory alignment, and controllability, with studies of the tokenizer, diffusion architecture, context length, trajectory encoding, and resampling strategy.
summary.zh: DOME 是从历史语义占用预测长时三维驾驶场景序列的扩散世界模型。Occ-VAE 将稠密体素网格压缩到连续潜在空间，以保存细致的空间结构；时空扩散 Transformer 在去噪未来潜在帧时反复固定已观测上下文。自车轨迹被编码为控制信号，轨迹重采样还可根据占用与位姿生成额外的有效运动条件训练样本。模型支持多帧条件预测、连续展开，以及同一上下文在不同路径下的多种未来。nuScenes 实验评估占用重建、多个时间跨度的 IoU 与 mIoU、长时生成、轨迹对齐和可控性，并分析分词器、扩散架构、上下文长度、轨迹编码与重采样。

applications: Controllable long-duration occupancy forecasting for autonomous driving

name: DFIT-OccWorld
