title: An Efficient Occupancy World Model via Decoupled Dynamic Flow and Image-Assisted Training

summary.en: DFIT-OccWorld is a single-stage occupancy world model for efficient prediction of future driving scenes. It separates persistent scene content from moving components and estimates a decoupled dynamic flow that transports current occupancy features into future time steps. A non-autoregressive decoder produces the requested future sequence in parallel. During training, synchronized future images supply cross-modal supervision to enrich the occupancy representation, while inference uses occupancy inputs alone. The forecast is shared with motion-planning and point-cloud prediction tasks, connecting scene evolution to downstream driving decisions. Experiments on nuScenes and OpenScene evaluate semantic occupancy forecasting across horizons, planning displacement and collision measures, point-cloud forecasting, computation, and memory. Ablations examine flow decomposition, single-stage training, parallel prediction, image assistance, feature warping, and task-specific heads.
summary.zh: DFIT-OccWorld 是用于高效预测未来驾驶场景的单阶段占用世界模型。它把持续场景内容与运动成分分开，估计解耦动态流，将当前占用特征传送到未来各时刻；非自回归解码器并行输出所需序列。训练时，同步未来图像提供跨模态监督以丰富占用表示，推理时只需占用输入。预测结果同时服务于运动规划和点云预测，使场景演化直接连接下游驾驶决策。nuScenes 与 OpenScene 实验评估多时间跨度的语义占用预测、规划位移与碰撞指标、点云预测、计算量和内存，并分析流分解、单阶段训练、并行预测、图像辅助、特征变换与任务头。

applications: Efficient occupancy forecasting, motion planning, and point-cloud prediction

name: COME
title: COME: Adding Scene-Centric Forecasting Control to Occupancy World Model

summary.en: COME introduces scene-centric control for generative occupancy world models. It separates apparent changes caused by ego motion from changes produced by other scene participants. Historical observations are transformed into an ego-invariant frame, where a forecasting module predicts spatially aligned scene-evolution features. These controls are fused with encoded trajectories and BEV layouts inside an occupancy diffusion model, enabling future semantic voxel sequences from camera or occupancy context. The design can use planned or ground-truth ego paths while preserving a distinct signal for environmental development. Experiments on Occ3D-nuScenes evaluate 4D occupancy IoU and mIoU over one- to three-second horizons for several input and trajectory settings. Comparisons and ablations study scene-centric controls, motion compensation, conditioning sources, control integration, forecasting objectives, and generation backbones.
summary.zh: COME 为生成式占用世界模型加入以场景为中心的控制。它区分由自车运动造成的表观变化与其他参与者引起的场景演化：历史观测先被转换到自车不变坐标系，预测模块再生成空间对齐的场景演化特征。这些控制与编码轨迹及可选 BEV 布局共同注入占用扩散模型，可从相机或占用上下文生成未来语义体素序列。模型既可使用规划轨迹，也可使用真实轨迹，同时保留独立的环境发展信号。Occ3D-nuScenes 实验在多种输入和轨迹设置下评估一至三秒的四维占用 IoU 与 mIoU，并分析场景控制、运动补偿、条件来源、融合方式、预测目标和生成骨干。

applications: Scene-centric controllable 4D occupancy generation for driving

name: SparseWorld
title: SparseWorld: A Flexible, Adaptive, and Efficient 4D Occupancy World Model Powered by Sparse and Dynamic Queries

summary.en: SparseWorld represents a driving scene with a compact set of spatially positioned dynamic queries rather than a dense feature grid. Historical trajectories scale the query range, and the queries collect multi-frame, multi-view image evidence through temporal-spatial attention. A state-conditioned forecasting module then refines query positions over future steps while exchanging information with the evolving ego-motion state. Parallel decoders convert each future query set into semantic occupancy and planned waypoints, giving one model a shared scene-and-action interface. Temporal-aware self-scheduling provides mixed training contexts for rollout. Experiments on Occ3D-nuScenes evaluate current and future occupancy with IoU and mIoU, and trajectory planning with displacement and collision measures. Studies examine query count, adaptive range, state interaction, temporal attention, scheduling, supervision, and runtime.
summary.zh: SparseWorld 用少量带空间位置的动态查询表示驾驶场景，而不是使用稠密网格特征。历史轨迹调节查询覆盖范围，查询通过时空注意力汇集多帧多视角图像信息；状态条件预测模块随后在未来步骤中更新查询位置，并与持续演化的自车运动状态双向交换信息。并行解码器把各时刻查询转为语义占用与规划路点，形成共享的场景和动作接口；时间感知自调度提供混合展开上下文。Occ3D-nuScenes 实验以 IoU 和 mIoU 评估当前及未来占用，以位移和碰撞指标评估轨迹规划，并分析查询数量、自适应范围、状态交互、时空注意力、调度、监督方式和运行效率。

applications: Joint sparse occupancy forecasting and ego-trajectory planning

name: PLDM
title: Learning from Reward-Free Offline Data: A Case for Planning with Latent Dynamics Models

summary.en: PLDM studies how reward-free offline trajectories can support new navigation tasks through a learned latent dynamics model. An encoder maps observations to a compact state, and a transition model predicts the next latent state from the current state and action. At deployment, planning searches action sequences whose imagined latent rollouts approach a goal representation, without learning a separate reward-conditioned policy for every task. The paper evaluates this design alongside offline reinforcement-learning and goal-conditioned alternatives on 23 datasets spanning navigation layouts, dataset sizes, trajectory quality, coverage, and horizon. Experiments measure goal-reaching, transfer to new obstacle arrangements, trajectory stitching, robustness to low-quality data, and state-avoidance behavior, while analyses examine representation diversity, dynamics accuracy, planning horizon, and available data.
summary.zh: PLDM 研究如何利用无奖励离线轨迹，通过学习潜在动力学完成新的导航任务。编码器把观测映射为紧凑状态，转移模型根据当前状态与动作预测下一潜在状态；部署时，规划器搜索动作序列，使想象展开的潜在轨迹接近目标表示，无须为每项任务另学奖励条件策略。论文在覆盖不同导航布局、数据规模、轨迹质量、覆盖率与长度的二十三组数据上，与离线强化学习和目标条件方法比较，评估到达目标、迁移到新障碍布局、轨迹拼接、低质量数据适应和状态规避，并分析表示多样性、动力学预测、规划跨度与数据条件。

applications: Reward-free latent-dynamics planning for navigation

name: Causal World Model Induction
title: Inducing Causal World Models in LLMs for Zero-Shot Physical Reasoning

summary.en: Causal World Model Induction equips a language model with an explicit module for reasoning about physical state changes. Multimodal video-text examples are encoded into structured initial-state variables describing objects and properties. A causal physics module predicts final states, while paired interventions alter factors such as mass, friction, or velocity. The causal intervention loss supervises differences between counterfactual outcomes, encouraging the module to represent how changes propagate through a scene. At inference, the predicted physical state is translated back into an answer for unseen questions. Experiments use the simulator-generated and manually validated PhysiCa-Bench, including direct and counterfactual questions, plus zero-shot PIQA. Evaluation covers outcome accuracy, intervention consistency, cross-configuration transfer, module variants, training objectives, and the contribution of structured causal states.
summary.zh: Causal World Model Induction 为语言模型加入显式物理状态变化模块。多模态视频文本样本被编码为描述物体及属性的结构化初始状态；因果物理模块预测最终状态，配对干预则改变质量、摩擦或速度等变量。因果干预损失监督原始结果与反事实结果之间的差值，使模型学习某项变化如何在场景中传播。推理时，预测的物理状态再被转换为未见问题的答案。实验使用由模拟器生成并人工核验的 PhysiCa-Bench，其中包含直接与反事实问题，并进行零样本 PIQA 测试；评估结果预测、干预一致性、跨配置迁移、模块变体、训练目标和结构化因果状态的作用。

applications: Intervention-aware physical reasoning with language models

name: BridgeV2W
title: BridgeV2W: Bridging Video Generation Models to Embodied World Models via Embodiment Masks

summary.en: BridgeV2W adapts a pretrained video generator into an embodied world model by expressing robot actions in image coordinates. Given joint or end-effector commands, the system renders a time-aligned sequence of embodiment masks from the robot URDF and camera parameters. A ControlNet-style pathway injects these masks into an image-to-video diffusion Transformer, while latent temporal-difference and optical-flow objectives emphasize action-related motion. The same interface supports single-arm and dual-arm embodiments and changes in camera viewpoint. Experiments on DROID, AgiBot-G1, and real robots evaluate generated-video quality, action alignment, unseen scenes, unseen viewpoints, and cross-embodiment use. The generated futures are also used to rank manipulation policies, plan toward goal images, and augment closed-loop control, with ablations of masks, motion losses, conditioning, and pretraining.
summary.zh: BridgeV2W 通过把机器人动作表达在图像坐标中，将预训练视频生成器改造成具身世界模型。系统依据机器人 URDF 与相机参数，把关节或末端执行器指令渲染成时间对齐的本体掩码序列，并通过类似 ControlNet 的通路注入图像到视频扩散 Transformer；潜在时间差与光流目标进一步强调动作相关运动。同一接口适用于单臂、双臂和不同相机视角。DROID、AgiBot-G1 与真实机器人实验评估视频质量、动作对齐、未见场景、未见视角和跨本体使用；生成未来还用于排列操作策略、面向目标图像规划并增强闭环控制，同时分析掩码、运动损失、条件方式和预训练。

applications: Action-conditioned video futures for robot policy evaluation and planning

name: ViDAR
title: Visual Point Cloud Forecasting Enables Scalable Autonomous Driving

summary.en: ViDAR defines visual point-cloud forecasting as a self-supervised pretraining task for camera-based autonomous driving. Historical multi-view images are encoded into BEV features, and a future decoder advances these features through time. A latent-rendering operator samples features along LiDAR rays and predicts where each ray terminates, enabling supervision from synchronized point clouds without semantic labels. Repeated decoding yields future geometric observations and trains the visual representation to capture scene dynamics. The pretrained encoder is transferred to 3D detection, map segmentation, motion forecasting, and end-to-end planning. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate point-cloud forecasting, geometric accuracy over time, downstream task metrics, collision and trajectory measures, and label efficiency. Comparisons and ablations study rendering, future decoding, temporal context, forecasting horizon, pretraining scale, and transfer components.
summary.zh: ViDAR 将视觉点云预测定义为相机自动驾驶的自监督预训练任务。历史多视角图像被编码为 BEV 特征，未来解码器让这些特征随时间推进；潜在渲染算子沿激光雷达射线采样特征并预测终止位置，从而利用同步点云监督而无需语义标签。重复解码产生未来几何观测，使视觉表示学习场景动力学。预训练编码器随后迁移到三维检测、地图分割、运动预测和端到端规划。nuScenes 实验评估点云预测、多时间跨度几何精度、下游任务、碰撞与轨迹指标和标签效率，并分析渲染、未来解码、时间上下文、预测跨度、预训练规模与迁移组件。

applications: Scalable geometric pretraining for driving perception and planning

name: NeMo
title: Neural Volumetric World Models for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: NeMo learns dynamic volumetric state for driving planning from camera sequences. A 3D feature volume is trained through neural rendering to reconstruct observed images and through occupancy prediction to encode scene geometry. A motion-flow module transports volumetric content across time, providing supervision about how objects and layout evolve. During planning fine-tuning, future volumes are combined by temporal attention before the trajectory head outputs ego motion. This connects a persistent geometric state and its forecast to visuomotor decisions. Experiments use nuScenes for open-loop planning and CARLA Town05 for closed-loop driving, reporting displacement, collisions, Driving Score, and Route Completion alongside representation tasks. Comparisons and ablations examine volumetric pretraining, rendering, occupancy, motion flow, future features, temporal fusion, data scale, and supervision choices.
summary.zh: NeMo 从相机序列学习用于自动驾驶规划的动态体积表示。三维特征体通过神经渲染重建观测图像，并通过占用预测编码场景几何；运动流模块在时间上搬运体积内容，监督物体与布局如何演化。规划微调时，模型预测未来体积特征，以时间注意力融合后由轨迹头输出自车运动，从而把持续几何状态及其预测直接连接到视觉运动决策。实验在 nuScenes 上进行开环规划，在 CARLA Town05 中进行闭环驾驶，报告位移、碰撞、驾驶得分与路线完成率，并评估表示任务；分析覆盖体积预训练、渲染、占用、运动流、未来特征、时间融合、数据规模和监督组合。

applications: Dynamic volumetric pretraining and planning for autonomous driving

name: Occupancy Flow Fields
title: Occupancy Flow Fields for Motion Forecasting in Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Occupancy Flow Fields represent multi-agent driving futures with a temporal BEV grid. Each cell contains an occupancy probability and a two-dimensional motion vector, preserving both where agents may appear and how occupied regions move. Histories of agents, road structure, and traffic-light state are rasterized for a neural predictor. A flow-trace operation recursively warps current occupancy through predicted vectors, and its consistency loss links occupancy and motion estimates. The same traces recover agent identities and express speculative agents that are occluded or outside view. Experiments on the Waymo-derived Crowds dataset and Interaction evaluate future occupancy, flow estimation, and identity recovery over six seconds. Comparisons and ablations study input features, flow losses, trace construction, model variants, crowded scenes, and speculative occupancy.
summary.zh: Occupancy Flow Fields 用带时间索引的 BEV 网格表示多智能体驾驶未来。每个单元同时保存占用概率与二维运动向量，因此既描述参与者可能出现的位置，也描述已占区域如何移动。模型把智能体历史、道路结构和交通灯状态栅格化后进行预测；流轨迹操作依据预测向量递归变换当前占用，一致性损失把占用与运动估计联系起来。同一轨迹还能恢复智能体身份，并表示当前被遮挡或尚未进入视野的推测参与者。实验在源自 Waymo 的 Crowds 数据与 Interaction 上评估六秒范围的未来占用、流估计和身份恢复，并分析输入特征、流损失、轨迹构造、模型变体、拥挤场景与推测占用。

applications: Structured multi-agent motion forecasting for autonomous driving

name: ManipDreamer
title: ManipDreamer: Boosting Robotic Manipulation World Model with Action Tree and Visual Guidance

summary.en: ManipDreamer is a robotic manipulation world model that generates task-conditioned future video. It parses an instruction into verb and preposition primitives organized by an action tree, then embeds the traversed structure as a control signal for dynamics generation. A multimodal guidance adapter fuses RGB, depth, semantic segmentation, and dynamic-region masks so the rollout preserves scene layout while emphasizing manipulated objects and motion. The resulting video depicts how the robot and workspace evolve under the requested operation. Experiments on RLBench evaluate visual fidelity, temporal consistency, instruction following, physical coherence, and whether generated sequences complete manipulation tasks. Comparisons and ablations examine action-tree structure, instruction encodings, each visual modality, dynamic masks, adapter placement, guidance strength, and transfer across task categories.
summary.zh: ManipDreamer 是生成任务条件机器人操作未来视频的世界模型。它把指令解析为动词和介词原语，并以动作树组织其关系，将树上的遍历编码成动力学生成的控制信号。多模态引导适配器融合 RGB、深度、语义分割与动态区域掩码，使展开既保持场景布局，又突出被操作物体及其运动。生成视频由此呈现机器人和工作空间如何随指定操作演化。RLBench 实验评估视觉质量、时间一致性、指令遵循、物理连贯性和操作任务完成情况，并分析动作树结构、指令编码、各视觉模态、动态掩码、适配器位置、引导强度和跨任务迁移。

applications: Instruction-conditioned visual simulation of robot manipulation

name: NewtonGen
title: NewtonGen: Physics-Consistent and Controllable Text-to-Video Generation via Neural Newtonian Dynamics

summary.en: NewtonGen separates physical-state evolution from visual rendering in controllable text-to-video generation. A Neural Newtonian Dynamics module is trained on physics-clean data to infer motion laws and parameters. At inference, a prompt specifies the scene, initial conditions, and variables such as gravity, velocity, or force. The dynamics module rolls these states forward, and its predicted trajectories condition a video generator. This interface makes the rendered future respond to continuous parameter changes while retaining an explicit intermediate physical process. Experiments cover more than twelve motion tasks and evaluate physical consistency, parameter controllability, trajectory agreement, visual quality, and prompt alignment. Ablations study dynamics pretraining, state parameterization, data amount, motion conditioning, control ranges, and rendering components.
summary.zh: NewtonGen 在可控文本到视频生成中，将物理状态演化与视觉渲染分开。神经牛顿动力学模块在少量物理洁净数据上学习运动规律与物理参数；推理时，提示给出场景、初始条件以及重力、速度或作用力等变量，动力学模块先展开未来状态，再用预测轨迹控制视频生成器补充外观与场景细节。该接口使渲染未来能连续响应参数变化，同时保留显式的中间物理过程。实验覆盖十二种以上运动任务，评估物理一致性、参数可控性、轨迹吻合、视觉质量与提示对齐，并分析动力学预训练、状态参数化、数据量、运动条件、控制范围和渲染组件。

applications: Physics-parameter-controlled dynamic video simulation

name: DreamToNav
title: DreamToNav: Generalizable Navigation for Robots via Generative Video Planning

summary.en: DreamToNav plans robot navigation by turning an intended behavior into a generated future video. A vision-language model refines an image and natural-language command into a spatially explicit prompt. A video world model then depicts the robot completing the instruction. The system detects the robot across generated frames, estimates camera motion with visual odometry, recovers robot pose through PnP, and smooths the metric path with an Extended Kalman Filter before execution. This converts visual imagination into a trajectory usable by different platforms. Indoor experiments use wheeled and quadruped robots on target-reaching and socially phrased commands, measuring trial success, final goal error, path length, and trajectory tracking error. Analyses cover prompt refinement, pose extraction, filtering, and transfer.
summary.zh: DreamToNav 通过把预期行为转成生成的未来视频来规划机器人导航。视觉语言模型将当前图像与自然语言命令细化为空间明确的提示，视频世界模型随后描绘机器人完成指令的过程。系统在生成帧中检测机器人，以视觉里程计估计相机运动，通过 PnP 恢复机器人位姿，并用扩展卡尔曼滤波平滑度量路径后执行，从而把视觉想象转换成不同平台可用的轨迹。室内实验使用轮式与四足机器人完成目标到达和带社会语义的命令，评估试验成功率、终点误差、路径长度和轨迹跟踪误差，并分析提示细化、生成变化、位姿提取、滤波和跨平台迁移。

applications: Generative-video planning for wheeled and legged robot navigation

name: WorldMAP
title: WorldMAP: Bootstrapping Vision-Language Navigation Trajectory Prediction with Generative World Models

summary.en: WorldMAP uses a generative world model as a teacher for vision-language navigation trajectory prediction. Multiple imagined future videos are reconstructed into a persistent 3D memory. Retrieved views are filtered and grounded for target and obstacle regions, backprojected with depth and camera pose, and fused into a shared BEV map. A cost-map planner produces a safe path whose projected trajectory supervises a smaller vision-language student. At deployment, the student predicts a trajectory directly from the current egocentric image and instruction, so generation is used only for bootstrapping. Experiments on Target-Bench measure average and final displacement error and normalized dynamic time warping against robot trajectories. Ablations examine retrieval, grounding, BEV fusion, planning, pseudo-label quality, and student training.
summary.zh: WorldMAP 把生成世界模型作为视觉语言导航轨迹预测的教师。多条想象未来视频先被重建为持续三维记忆；检索视图经过筛选，并定位目标与障碍区域，再结合深度和相机位姿反投影、融合成共享 BEV 地图。代价地图规划器产生安全路径，其投影轨迹用于监督较小的视觉语言学生。部署时，学生直接根据当前第一视角图像和指令预测轨迹，昂贵的生成管线只承担引导训练。Target-Bench 实验以平均位移误差、终点位移误差和归一化动态时间规整比较机器人轨迹，并分析未来流、检索、定位、筛选、BEV 融合、规划、伪标签质量与学生训练。

applications: World-model-supervised trajectory prediction for language navigation

name: VLM-DEWM
title: VLM-DEWM: Dynamic External World Model for Verifiable and Resilient Vision-Language Planning in Manufacturing

summary.en: VLM-DEWM separates semantic planning from persistent world-state maintenance in dynamic manufacturing. Its external world model stores a spatial network, semantic graph, shape priors, task progress, and interaction constraints across stations and occlusions. A vision-language model produces an Externalizable Reasoning Trace containing proposed state updates and actions. A verification engine treats this trace as a transaction, checks it against geometric and physical constraints, and commits validated changes before robot execution. Execution results update the database and provide structured causes for recovery. Simulation and physical-platform experiments cover multi-station assembly, large-area spatial queries, and induced failures. Evaluation measures state tracking, task success, recovery, diagnosis, and inference overhead; ablations isolate geometric, semantic, memory, trace, and verification components.
summary.zh: VLM-DEWM 在动态制造中把语义规划与持续世界状态维护分离。外部世界模型跨工位和遮挡保存空间网络、语义图、形状先验、任务进度与交互约束。视觉语言模型输出包含状态更新和动作建议的可外化推理轨迹；验证引擎把它视为事务，依据几何与物理约束检查，在机器人执行前提交有效变化。执行结果继续更新数据库，并为恢复提供结构化原因。仿真与真实平台实验覆盖多工位装配、大范围空间查询和人为故障，评估状态跟踪、规划与任务成功、恢复成功、诊断行为和推理开销，并分析几何、语义、记忆、约束、轨迹和验证组件。

applications: Persistent and verifiable vision-language planning for manufacturing robots

name: MemVerse
title: MemVerse: Multimodal Memory for Lifelong Learning Agents

summary.en: MemVerse is a model-agnostic memory layer for agents that accumulate multimodal experience over time. Recent context enters short-term memory, while selected observations become persistent multimodal knowledge graphs of entities and relations. A memory orchestrator decides when to add, update, retrieve, consolidate, or delete records according to the reasoning state. Periodically distilled parametric memory supplies a complementary recall path, and retrieved and parametric evidence are combined for an answer or action. This architecture maintains evolving knowledge without placing the entire history in one context. Experiments span multimodal reasoning, visual scene understanding, and web tasks, measuring accuracy, long-horizon coherence, cross-session stability, retrieval quality, and memory growth. Ablations examine memory levels, graph structure, orchestration, consolidation, distillation, and retrieval.
summary.zh: MemVerse 是让智能体随时间积累多模态经验的模型无关记忆层。近期交互进入短期记忆，选定观测则被转换为包含实体和关系的持续多模态知识图。记忆编排器根据推理状态决定新增、更新、检索、整合或删除记录；周期蒸馏的参数记忆提供互补召回路径，检索证据与参数证据共同支持回答或行动。该架构无需把完整历史放入单一上下文即可维护演化知识。实验覆盖多模态推理、视觉场景理解和网页任务，评估回答准确率、跨会话长程连贯性、稳定性、检索质量和记忆增长，并分析记忆层级、图结构、编排操作、整合、删除、参数蒸馏与检索策略。

applications: Persistent multimodal memory for lifelong agent reasoning

name: LoopWM
title: Looped World Models

summary.en: Looped World Models use repeated computation with shared parameters to predict action-conditioned environment transitions. Observations and actions form a signal injected into a latent state. The same Transformer block refines that state for several loops, while a retention matrix carries information between iterations and time steps. A spectral constraint keeps the update stable as loop count or rollout horizon grows, and an adaptive mechanism allocates more iterations to harder transitions. The final state decodes the environment response after one or several actions. Experiments on ScienceWorld and ALFWorld evaluate exact match, token F1, BLEU, entity tracking, multi-action prediction, parameter efficiency, and computation. Ablations examine loop depth, sharing, retention, stability, temporal carryover, adaptive stopping, and rollout length.
summary.zh: Looped World Models 以共享参数的重复计算预测动作条件环境转移。观测和动作组成输入信号并注入潜在状态，同一 Transformer 模块经过多轮循环逐步细化该状态；学习的保留矩阵在循环与时间步之间传递信息，谱约束则在循环次数或展开长度增加时保持更新稳定，自适应机制可为较难转移分配更多迭代。最终状态解码一步或多步动作后的环境响应。ScienceWorld 与 ALFWorld 实验评估精确匹配、词元 F1、BLEU、实体跟踪、多动作预测、参数效率和计算量，并分析循环深度、参数共享、状态保留、稳定约束、时间传递、自适应停止、模型规模与展开长度。

applications: Parameter-efficient action-conditioned world-state prediction

name: GLAM
title: Imitation from Heterogeneous Demonstrations using Grounded Latent-Action World Models

summary.en: GLAM learns a grounded latent action space that aligns demonstrations from embodiments and action labels. An inverse-dynamics encoder infers a latent action from consecutive visual states, while an action encoder maps robot commands into the same space. A forward world model predicts the next observation from latent action, grounding both encoders in shared dynamics through variational objectives. Auxiliary and target transitions are relabeled with these latents, a policy predicts latent actions from observations, and a target decoder produces executable commands. Experiments combine handheld, simulated Kinova, and real Kinova demonstrations for tabletop manipulation. Evaluation covers cross-source replay, latent alignment, behavior-cloning success, target-data efficiency, and transfer; ablations examine forward dynamics, paired losses, object masks, source mixtures, and decoding.
summary.zh: GLAM 学习由动力学约束的潜在动作空间，对齐不同本体和动作标注的示范。逆动力学编码器根据连续视觉状态推断潜在动作，动作编码器把机器人指令映射到同一空间；前向世界模型依据当前观测与潜在动作预测下一观测，通过成对变分目标让两类编码落在共享动力学上。随后，辅助与目标转移被重新标注为潜在动作，策略从观测预测潜在动作，目标解码器输出可执行指令。实验融合手持设备、仿真 Kinova 与真实 Kinova 的操作示范，评估跨来源重放、潜在对齐、行为克隆成功率、目标数据效率和迁移，并分析前向动力学、成对损失、物体掩码与来源组合。

applications: Heterogeneous demonstration transfer for robot manipulation

name: DisCo
title: DisCo: World Models with Discrete Camera Motion Control

summary.en: DisCo is a video world model controlled by discrete camera motions. Continuous camera trajectories are converted into a compact vocabulary of translation and rotation actions, reducing ambiguity between similar controls and allowing compositional commands. The action tokens condition a pretrained video diffusion model trained on re-posed real clips and simulator sequences. Self-forcing distillation produces a four-step causal generator, while windowed attention, attention sinks, and rolling key-value caches maintain context during long exploration. DisCoBench evaluates short commands, long-horizon paths, and highly dynamic scenes. Experiments measure action following, pose agreement, visual quality, temporal coherence, and long-video consistency. Ablations study discretization thresholds, action balance, distillation, attention design, cache length, command composition, and rollout duration.
summary.zh: DisCo 是由离散相机运动控制的视频世界模型。连续相机轨迹被转换为紧凑的平移与旋转动作词表，减少相似控制之间的歧义，并支持组合命令；动作标记用于调节在重估位姿真实片段和模拟器序列上训练的视频扩散模型。自强制蒸馏得到四步因果生成器，窗口注意力、注意力锚点与滚动键值缓存则在长程探索中保持上下文。DisCoBench 覆盖短命令、长路径和高动态场景，实验评估动作遵循、位姿吻合、视觉质量、时间连贯与长视频一致性，并分析离散阈值、动作平衡、蒸馏、注意力、缓存长度、命令组合和展开时长。

applications: Discrete-action controllable visual world simulation

name: WMSD
title: World Model Self-Distillation: Training World Models to Solve General Tasks

summary.en: World Model Self-Distillation trains a video world model to solve tasks from short instructions rather than detailed execution captions. A vision-language model creates task and step-by-step solution descriptions. A Demonstrator video model uses the detailed description, while an Executor sees only the task; distillation aligns their flow fields so the Executor internalizes the missing execution strategy. On-policy variants learn from the student's own generated states. VLM-scored reinforcement learning then rewards videos that complete the instruction while an anchor preserves pretrained generation. Experiments on WorldTasks-Bench and robotic tasks evaluate task completion, agent behavior, physical consistency, visual quality, and transfer across offline and on-policy settings.
summary.zh: World Model Self-Distillation 让视频世界模型只凭简短任务指令生成解决过程，而不再依赖详细执行描述。视觉语言模型先产生任务与分步方案；示范模型读取完整方案，执行模型只看到任务，蒸馏通过对齐两者的流场，使执行模型内化缺失的策略。在线变体还从学生自身生成状态学习。随后，基于视觉语言评分的强化学习奖励真正完成指令的视频，并以示范锚点保留预训练生成能力。WorldTasks-Bench 与机器人任务实验评估任务完成、智能体行为、物理一致性、视觉质量和迁移，并分析离线与在线数据、奖励、锚定、蒸馏强度、生成任务、推理步数与机器人数据。

applications: Instruction-following visual world models for general and robot tasks

name: Loop-OWM
title: Slots, Transitions, Loops: Learning Composable World Models for ARC

summary.en: Loop-OWM treats ARC puzzles as world-state transition problems. An object-centric interpreter converts each colored grid into slots and spatial features. Demonstration pairs are summarized into task tokens that specify the hidden transformation. A recurrent transition module repeatedly updates the query state, combining dense transport for broad movement with slot-conditioned writing for object-level changes, before a decoder reconstructs the output grid. Offline procedural augmentation teaches reusable visual-symbolic operations, and test-time adaptation specializes them to the few demonstrations of a new puzzle. Experiments on ARC-1 and ARC-2 report task-solving accuracy under the official held-out tasks and analyze object slots, task summaries, transition branches, loop count, recurrent sharing, pretraining, adaptation, and decoding.
summary.zh: Loop-OWM 把 ARC 谜题视为世界状态转移问题。物体中心解释器将彩色网格转换为槽位和空间特征，示范输入输出对被压缩成描述隐藏变换的任务标记。循环转移模块反复更新查询状态，将适合整体移动的稠密传送与适合物体变化的槽位条件写入结合，最后由解码器重建输出网格。离线程序化增强教授可复用的视觉符号操作，测试时适配再根据新谜题的少量示范进行专门化。ARC-1 与 ARC-2 实验按官方留出任务评估求解准确率，并分析物体槽、任务摘要、转移分支、循环次数、参数共享、程序化数据、离线预训练、适配步数与解码监督。

applications: Object-centric visual-symbolic transition reasoning

name: BRICKS-WM
title: BRICKS-WM: Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models

summary.en: BRICKS-WM builds a world model from reusable dynamics modules rather than one entangled latent transition. Observations are separated into an actuated agent state and an external background state. Agent dynamics respond to control actions; a learned interface emits a compact latent signal through which the agent influences background dynamics. Regularization gives this interface stable semantics across tasks. The model supports imagined actor-critic control, and a background module learned in one environment can be frozen and paired with newly trained agent-side components in another. DeepMind Control Suite experiments cover Walker, Cheetah, and Hopper locomotion, measuring episode return, prediction, interface structure, and transfer speed. Ablations examine decomposition, interface direction, regularization, frozen reuse, source-target pairs, and component retraining.
summary.zh: BRICKS-WM 用可复用动力学模块构建世界模型，而不是学习单一纠缠的潜在转移。其初始实现把观测分为受控智能体状态与外部背景状态：智能体动力学直接响应控制动作，学习的接口输出紧凑潜在信号，让智能体影响背景动力学；接口正则化使这一协议在任务之间保持稳定语义。模型支持想象式演员评论家控制，并可冻结某个环境学到的背景模块，与另一任务中新训练的智能体组件组合。DeepMind Control Suite 实验覆盖 Walker、Cheetah 和 Hopper，评估回报、预测、接口结构与迁移速度，并分析分解方式、接口方向、正则化、冻结复用、来源目标组合和组件重训。

applications: Reusable modular world models for locomotion control

name: FlowMPC
title: FlowMPC: Improving Flow Matching policies with World Models

summary.en: FlowMPC combines a multimodal flow-matching manipulation policy with world-model planning. The policy is trained from demonstrations to propose diverse action trajectories. A TD-MPC2-style world model encodes visual observations, predicts latent state transitions and rewards under candidate actions, and supplies terminal value estimates. During inference, Model Predictive Path Integral planning samples sequences around policy proposals, rolls them through learned dynamics, reweights them by predicted return, and executes the first refined action before replanning. ManiSkill experiments use PickCube and PickSingleYCB with fixed-length episodes, reporting whether success occurs at any time and whether it is maintained at the final step. The study compares the policy alone with world-model refinement across proposal sampling, planning horizons, iterations, sparse rewards, and terminal stability.
summary.zh: FlowMPC 将多模态流匹配操作策略与世界模型规划结合。策略从示范学习并提出多样动作轨迹；类似 TD-MPC2 的世界模型编码视觉观测，预测候选动作下的潜在状态转移与奖励，并估计终端价值。推理时，模型预测路径积分规划围绕策略建议采样序列，在学习动力学中展开，根据预测回报重新加权，只执行首个优化动作后再次规划。ManiSkill 实验使用 PickCube 与 PickSingleYCB 固定长度回合，分别报告回合中是否曾成功以及最后一步是否保持成功。研究比较单独策略与世界模型优化，并分析建议采样、规划跨度、MPPI 迭代、稀疏奖励和终端稳定性。

applications: World-model refinement of flow-matching robot policies

name: SD-JEPA
title: Subspace-Decomposed JEPAs: Disentangling Progression and Content in Latent World Models

summary.en: SD-JEPA decomposes a predictive latent state into a low-dimensional progression subspace and a higher-dimensional content subspace. An encoder maps pixel observations to both components, and an action-conditioned Transformer predicts the next embedding. A cosine-margin objective organizes progression coordinates across task phases, while distributional regularization preserves diverse content. Cross-Entropy Method planning rolls candidate actions through the predictor and selects sequences approaching a goal embedding. Experiments cover Two-Room navigation, Reacher, Push-T, and OGBench-Cube manipulation. Evaluation reports planning success and probes an angular progression coordinate for task progress, backtracking, perturbation response, and semantic-event localization. Ablations test the subspace split, progression dimension, auxiliary losses, planning costs, prediction horizons, and training seeds.
summary.zh: SD-JEPA 将预测潜在状态分为低维任务进程子空间和高维场景内容子空间。编码器把像素观测映射到两部分，动作条件 Transformer 预测下一嵌入；余弦间隔目标按任务阶段组织进程坐标，分布正则化保持内容多样性。交叉熵规划器在预测器中展开候选动作，选择接近目标嵌入的序列。实验覆盖 Two-Room 导航、Reacher、Push-T 与 OGBench-Cube 操作，既评估规划成功率，也用角度进程坐标分析任务推进、回退、扰动响应和语义事件定位；消融检验子空间分离、进程维度、辅助损失、规划代价、预测跨度与随机种子。

applications: Disentangled latent world models for navigation and manipulation planning

name: EPM-JEPA
title: EPM-JEPA: Operator-Side Experience Modulation in JEPA-Family World Models

summary.en: EPM-JEPA studies test-time adaptation of latent world dynamics through operator-side experience modulation. A convolutional encoder maps video frames to latent state, and a JEPA predictor forecasts several future horizons. Recent prediction experience is summarized into a control vector that generates low-rank changes to predictor weights, changing the transition operator rather than only adding memory to its input. A three-track experiment compares no memory, input-side experience, and weight-level modulation after an unseen gravity change in Moving MNIST. Evaluation measures normalized multi-step prediction error across the shift, seeds, and checkpoints. Mechanism analyses separate buffer cycling, target-encoder drift, and modulation settling; ablations vary experience dimension, memory length, regularization, predictor capacity, update rate, and strength.
summary.zh: EPM-JEPA 研究通过算子侧经验调制，在测试时适应潜在世界动力学。卷积编码器把视频帧映射为潜在状态，JEPA 预测器输出多个未来跨度；近期预测经验被汇总成控制向量，产生对预测器权重的低秩调整，因此改变的是转移算子本身，而不仅是在输入端附加记忆。三轨实验在 Moving MNIST 遭遇未见重力变化后，比较无记忆、输入侧经验和权重级调制。评估统计跨动力学变化、随机种子与训练检查点的归一化多步预测误差；机制分析区分缓冲区循环、目标编码器漂移与调制稳定过程，消融覆盖经验维度、记忆长度、正则化、预测器容量、更新率与调制强度。

applications: Experience-conditioned adaptation of latent physical dynamics

name: Driver-State World Modeling
title: Risk-Aware Selective Multimodal Driver Monitoring with Driver-State World Modeling

summary.en: This framework models driver state to support risk-aware selective monitoring. A compact student continuously fuses in-cabin RGB with windowed heart-rate and electrodermal signals. A driver-state world model predicts future student errors and counterfactual system outcomes for accepting a decision, abstaining for intervention, or invoking a slower branch. A cost-aware gate selects among these actions using calibrated risk while preserving low latency. Experiments on manD classify low versus high driver demand and report Macro-F1, balanced accuracy, coverage, unsafe accepted false negatives, positive abstention, slow-call rate, and effective latency. Matched-coverage baselines and interventions analyze physiological synchronization, scenario priors, calibration shifts, gate thresholds, future-risk evidence, slow-model escalation, and multimodal contributions.
summary.zh: 该框架通过建模驾驶员状态支持风险感知选择式监测。轻量学生持续融合舱内 RGB、窗口心率与皮电信号；驾驶员状态世界模型预测未来学生错误，并估计接受当前判断、拒绝并触发干预或调用慢速分支的反事实系统结果。代价感知门控依据校准风险选择动作，同时保持低延迟。manD 实验区分低与高驾驶需求，报告宏 F1、平衡准确率、覆盖率、不安全已接受假阴性、正例拒绝、慢速调用率和有效延迟。等覆盖基线与干预实验进一步分析生理同步、场景先验、校准变化、门限、未来风险证据、慢模型升级与各模态贡献。

applications: Selective and predictive driver-state monitoring

name: Kairos
title: Kairos: A Regret-Aware Native World-Action Model Stack for Physical AI

summary.en: Kairos is a native world-action model stack organized around a control-sufficient latent state. Multimodal observations and actions are compressed into spatial, semantic, contact, task-progress, risk, and uncertainty variables maintained across multiple timescales. Shared representations support future-state prediction, video generation, and robot-action decoding. Training progresses from open-world video through human-centered behavior to robot interaction, increasing intervention strength while aligning physical priors with executable controls. Distillation reduces generation steps for deployment. Evaluation spans embodied world-model suites, RoboTwin 2.0 and LIBERO-Plus manipulation, physical-video benchmarks, long-horizon generation, and efficiency, measuring instruction grounding, physical plausibility, task success, robustness, temporal consistency, and runtime. Ablations examine pretraining, joint generation and prediction, memory, action grounding, model size, and distillation.
summary.zh: Kairos 是围绕控制充分潜在状态构建的世界动作模型栈。多模态观测与动作被压缩为空间、语义、接触、任务进度、风险和不确定性变量，并在多种时间尺度上维护；共享表示同时支持未来状态预测、视频生成和机器人动作解码。训练按干预强度从开放世界视频推进到人类行为，再到机器人交互，使物理先验与可执行控制对齐；蒸馏减少部署时生成步数。评测覆盖具身世界模型套件、RoboTwin 2.0、LIBERO-Plus、物理视频、长程生成与效率，考察指令定位、物理合理性、任务成功、鲁棒性、时间一致性和运行速度，并分析预训练、联合生成预测、记忆尺度、动作定位、模型规模与蒸馏。

applications: Unified predictive and generative modeling for robot control

name: TacForeSight
title: TacForeSight: Force-Guided Tactile World Model for Contact-Rich Manipulation

summary.en: TacForeSight gives a manipulation policy predictive contact information. Dual-finger tactile displacement fields are tokenized into latent state, while wrist force and torque histories encode the global interaction. A force-conditioned world model forecasts tactile latents several steps ahead, capturing how local contact will evolve under the measured wrench. A gated policy combines predicted contact, tactile state, vision, proprioception, and force to generate a flow-based action chunk. Real-robot experiments use an xArm7 on wiping, card swiping, tube adjustment, bulb locking, and wire insertion, plus height, angle, and pose perturbations. Evaluation reports task success and recovery while latent analyses visualize contact primitives. Ablations examine force conditioning, tactile prediction, horizon, gating, modality combinations, action chunks, model size, and perturbation training.
summary.zh: TacForeSight 为机器人操作策略提供预测式接触信息。双指触觉位移场被分词为潜在状态，腕部力与力矩历史编码整体交互；力条件世界模型预测数步后的触觉潜在量，描述局部接触将如何随测得载荷演化。门控策略再把预测接触、当前触觉、视觉、本体感知和力信号结合，生成基于流的动作块。真实 xArm7 实验覆盖擦拭、刷卡、管件调整、灯泡锁定和导线插入，并加入高度、角度和位姿扰动；评估任务成功与恢复，潜在分析展示接触原语。消融考察力条件、触觉预测、跨度、门控、模态组合、动作块、模型规模与扰动训练。

applications: Predictive tactile control for contact-rich robot manipulation

name: Next Forcing
title: Next Forcing: Causal World Modeling with Multi-Chunk Prediction

summary.en: Next Forcing extends autoregressive world-action modeling with multi-chunk prediction. A flow-matching video stream predicts the current latent chunk, while three lightweight causal modules use multiscale backbone features to forecast progressively farther chunks. Horizon-specific noise schedules strengthen future-dynamics supervision, and the predicted visual state conditions an inverse-dynamics action stream in a shared transformer. The auxiliary modules can remain active at inference to generate two chunks in parallel. Experiments cover 50 RoboTwin bimanual tasks under fixed and randomized scenes, PhyWorld physical-law sequences, and general video pretraining. Evaluation reports task success, convergence, generation speed, physical adherence, FVD, and ablations of prediction depth, fusion, initialization, loss weights, and noise schedules.
summary.zh: Next Forcing 以多块预测扩展自回归世界动作建模。流匹配视频流负责生成当前潜在视频块，三个轻量级因果模块汇聚骨干网络的多尺度特征，依次预测更远的未来块；不同时间跨度采用专门的噪声日程，以加强对未来动力学的监督。预测视觉状态在共享变换器中进一步条件化逆动力学动作流，辅助模块也可在推理时保留，使两个视频块并行生成。实验覆盖 RoboTwin 的五十项双臂任务及固定、随机场景，PhyWorld 物理规律序列和通用视频预训练，并报告任务成功率、收敛速度、生成效率、物理遵循度与 FVD。消融分析预测深度、特征融合、初始化、损失权重和噪声日程。

applications: Causal video prediction and bimanual robot action decoding

name: SLS2
title: Pixels to Proofs: Probabilistically-Safe Latent World Model Control via Parallel Conformal Robust MPC

summary.en: SLS² connects pixel-based latent world modeling with probabilistically safe feedback control. An action-conditioned joint-embedding architecture learns compact Markov states and multistep latent dynamics designed for gradient trajectory optimization. Conformal prediction calibrates model-error sets and a learned latent constraint checker, while GPU-parallel system-level synthesis propagates reachable tubes around candidate plans. Robust model predictive control then chooses feedback actions that pursue visual goals while satisfying calibrated latent constraints. Experiments span simulated Cube and Reacher systems and hardware navigation, pick-and-place, and deformable-object manipulation. Evaluation measures goal reaching, constraint violations, empirical coverage, planning runtime, and robustness across disturbances, with comparisons to nominal world-model planners and safety baselines plus component and calibration ablations.
summary.zh: SLS² 将像素级潜在世界建模与概率安全反馈控制连接起来。动作条件联合嵌入架构学习紧凑状态和多步动力学，使潜在轨迹适合梯度优化。共形预测校准模型误差与潜在约束检查器，GPU 并行系统级综合围绕候选计划传播可达管。鲁棒模型预测控制据此选择反馈动作，在接近视觉目标的同时满足校准后的安全约束。实验包括仿真的方块与机械臂系统，以及硬件导航、抓取放置和可变形物体操作；评估统计目标到达、约束违反、经验覆盖率、规划耗时和扰动表现，并比较名义世界模型规划器与安全规划基线，分析训练、校准、约束和可达性组件。

applications: Probabilistically safe visuomotor planning through latent world dynamics

name: Holo-World
title: Holo-World: Unified Camera, Object and Weather Control for Video World Model

summary.en: Holo-World generates a controlled future world from one observed frame. HoloStateData aligns real, simulated, and weather-transferred clips with camera poses, rendered backgrounds, depth and normal buffers, object controls, scene descriptions, and target weather. A Unified Scene Adapter attaches separate World and State parameter branches to a frozen video backbone, preserving source geometry and object motion while rendering environmental state changes. Scene-Weather Decomposed guidance independently scales scene and weather residuals during sampling. Experiments use separate world-preservation and weather-transfer tracks, including camera trajectories, object manipulation, and rain, snow, fog, and cloud conditions. Evaluation measures camera and object control, structural and temporal consistency, weather alignment, video quality, and branch, control, data-source, and guidance ablations.
summary.zh: Holo-World 从一帧观测生成受控的未来世界。HoloStateData 将真实、模拟和天气迁移视频，与相机位姿、渲染背景、深度及法线、物体控制、场景描述和目标天气对齐。统一场景适配器在冻结的视频骨干上设置分离的世界分支与状态分支，使模型在保持源场景几何和物体运动的同时渲染环境状态变化；场景—天气分解引导在采样时分别调节两类残差。实验设置世界保持和天气迁移两条轨道，覆盖相机轨迹、物体操控以及雨、雪、雾和多云状态。评估考察相机与物体控制、结构和时间一致性、天气匹配及视频质量，并分析分支设计、控制信号、数据来源和引导系数。

applications: Controllable video-world generation with explicit environmental state

name: SafeDojo
title: SafeDojo: Safe Reinforcement Learning for VLA via Interactive World Model

summary.en: SafeDojo performs safety-constrained VLA policy improvement inside an interactive video world model. Starting from an image and instruction, the policy proposes action chunks and an action-conditioned predictor recursively generates future frames and latent states. A visual success classifier estimates per-step task progress, while a lightweight head combines predicted latent context with each action chunk to estimate safety cost. Trajectory rewards and costs drive a Lagrangian constrained GRPO update with an explicit safety budget. Experiments evaluate obstacle-rich manipulation on two SafeLIBERO levels and five real Franka tasks. Reported measures include task success, collision-free safe success, safety cost, and execution steps, with inference-time, model-free, and model-based baselines and ablations of rollout, evaluator, and optimization components.
summary.zh: SafeDojo 在交互式视频世界模型中优化带安全约束的视觉语言动作策略。给定图像与指令，策略提出动作块，动作条件预测器递归生成未来画面和潜在状态；视觉分类器估计逐步任务进展，轻量安全头结合潜在上下文与动作块，输出安全成本。轨迹奖励和成本用于带明确预算的拉格朗日约束 GRPO 更新。实验在两个难度层级的 SafeLIBERO 障碍物环境和五项真实 Franka 任务上进行，报告任务成功率、无碰撞安全成功率、安全成本与执行步数，并比较推理时安全方法、无模型强化学习和基于模型的基线。消融分析想象展开、双分支评估器、约束目标和训练配置。

applications: World-model-based safe post-training for robot manipulation policies

name: InstaDrive
title: InstaDrive: Instance-Aware Driving World Models for Realistic and Consistent Video Generation

summary.en: InstaDrive is an instance-aware driving world model for controlled multi-view video generation. An Instance Flow Guider projects object motion into image space and propagates per-instance features through time, while a 3D Perspective Guider converts world-space boxes into camera-view controls and encodes their depth order. Road maps, BEV keyframes, text, camera geometry, and instance signals condition a latent video diffusion backbone. Experiments on nuScenes measure visual quality, temporal identity, localization, and multiview geometry, then use generated sequences for detection, tracking, and planning. A CARLA pipeline additionally constructs stochastic rare driving scenarios across maps and regions for safety-oriented evaluation. Ablations test flow propagation, perspective projection, depth ordering, foreground supervision, and conditioning sources.
summary.zh: InstaDrive 是面向受控多视角视频生成的实例感知驾驶世界模型。实例流引导器把物体运动投影到图像空间，并沿时间传播各实例特征；三维透视引导器把世界坐标包围盒转换为相机视角控制，同时编码前后深度次序。道路地图、鸟瞰关键帧、文本、相机几何和实例信号共同条件化潜在视频扩散骨干。nuScenes 实验考察视觉质量、身份持续性、实例定位和多视角几何，并把生成序列用于检测、跟踪与规划。CARLA 流程还在不同地图和区域中随机构造少见驾驶情景，用于面向安全的评估。消融分析实例流、透视投影、深度排序、前景监督和条件来源。

applications: Instance-consistent driving-world generation and rare-scenario simulation

name: ConsisDrive
title: ConsisDrive: Identity-Preserving Driving World Models for Video Generation by Instance Mask

summary.en: ConsisDrive generates driving videos while preserving the identity of each foreground object. It builds identity and trajectory masks from 3D boxes, then uses Instance-Masked Attention to connect tokens belonging to the same object across views and frames while separating different instances. An Instance-Focused Loss assigns additional supervision to foreground regions so small vehicles and pedestrians remain represented during diffusion training. Road layout, camera geometry, text, and box controls condition a 3D latent video backbone. Experiments on nuScenes report FID, FVD, instance and temporal consistency, spatial alignment, and multiview quality. Generated data are also tested in perception, tracking, and planning pipelines, and ablations isolate mask construction, trajectory attention, foreground weighting, and control signals.
summary.zh: ConsisDrive 在生成驾驶视频时保持每个前景物体的身份。模型由三维包围盒构建身份掩码和轨迹掩码，实例掩码注意力在视角与帧之间连接属于同一物体的标记，并分隔不同实例；实例聚焦损失加强前景区域监督，使小型车辆和行人在扩散训练中持续呈现。道路布局、相机几何、文本和包围盒共同条件化三维潜在视频骨干。nuScenes 实验报告 FID、FVD、实例与时间一致性、空间对齐和多视角质量，生成数据还用于感知、跟踪和规划流程。消融分别检验掩码构造、轨迹注意力、前景权重和控制信号。

applications: Identity-consistent multiview driving-video generation

name: ShareVerse
title: ShareVerse: Multi-Agent Consistent Video Generation for Shared World Modeling

summary.en: ShareVerse turns several local video generators into a shared generative world. During simultaneous exploration, cross-agent collaborative attention routes dynamic features between agents using relative pose and overlapping fields of view, allowing their independently rendered observations to agree. For asynchronous visits, a global spatiotemporal memory cache stores neural scene tokens with spatial metadata; later agents retrieve nearby history and update the cache as they move. Training data are rendered in CARLA with multiple vehicles, four cameras per agent, and six interaction trajectory patterns. Experiments evaluate concurrent encounters, viewpoint overlap, long trajectories, and revisitation. Metrics cover video quality, cross-view geometry, temporal stability, object identity, and memory persistence, while ablations examine communication, pose encoding, cache retrieval, update strategy, and memory range.
summary.zh: ShareVerse 把多个局部视频生成器组织成一个共享生成世界。在同步探索时，跨智能体协作注意力依据相对位姿和视野重叠交换动态特征，使各自生成的观测保持一致；在异步访问时，全局时空记忆缓存带空间元数据保存神经场景标记，后来的智能体检索附近历史并在移动中更新缓存。训练数据由 CARLA 渲染，包含多辆车辆、每个智能体四个相机和六类交互轨迹组合。实验覆盖并发相遇、视角重叠、长路径和重访，指标考察视频质量、跨视角几何、时间稳定性、物体身份与记忆持续性。消融分析通信、位姿编码、缓存检索、更新方式和记忆范围。

applications: Collaborative world generation for multi-agent driving and simulation

name: PlayWorld
title: PlayWorld: Learning Robot World Models from Autonomous Play

summary.en: PlayWorld trains robot video world models from autonomous play rather than only successful demonstrations. A hardware collection system executes directed exploratory actions, covers diverse object states, contacts, and failure transitions, and can operate for extended unattended sessions with periodic resets. The resulting interaction data condition a video predictor on observations and robot actions. Experiments compare matched quantities and scaling curves from play, human demonstrations, and policy rollouts across contact-rich manipulation. Predicted videos are evaluated for perceptual fidelity, object dynamics, contact events, and failure recognition. The model also scores candidate policies and supplies imagined trajectories for reinforcement learning. Real-robot tests measure policy ranking agreement and task success after world-model training, with analyses of data diversity, scale, exploration strategy, and rollout horizon.
summary.zh: PlayWorld 使用自主玩耍数据训练机器人视频世界模型，而不只依赖成功示范。硬件系统执行定向探索，覆盖多样的物体状态、接触和失败转移，并可通过周期性重置长时间无人运行。所得交互数据用于训练由观测与动作条件化的视频预测器。实验在接触丰富的任务上比较自主玩耍、人类示范和策略展开的等量数据及规模曲线，评估视频质量、物体动力学、接触事件和失败识别。模型还对候选策略评分，并为强化学习提供想象轨迹。真实机器人测试统计策略排序一致性和训练后的任务成功率，同时分析数据多样性、规模、探索方式和展开长度。

applications: Robot-world simulation, policy evaluation, and imagined reinforcement learning

name: C3
title: World Models That Know When They Don't Know - Controllable Video Generation with Calibrated Uncertainty

summary.en: C³ equips an action-conditioned video world model with dense, calibrated uncertainty. The generator predicts future latent video while an uncertainty branch estimates a distribution at subpatch and channel resolution. Strictly proper scoring rules jointly train prediction correctness and confidence calibration, and a decoder maps latent uncertainty into pixel-aligned temporal heatmaps at selectable spatial scales. Experiments use Bridge and DROID robot interactions and real WidowX rollouts. Evaluation measures calibration error, negative log likelihood, confidence-error correlation, spatial localization of generated discrepancies, and detection of unseen environments and actions. Analyses compare latent and pixel uncertainty, patch resolutions, scoring objectives, data shifts, and model variants, showing how confidence can accompany controllable physical rollouts for downstream monitoring and decision support.
summary.zh: C³ 为动作条件视频世界模型加入稠密且经过校准的不确定性。生成器预测未来潜在视频，不确定性分支在子块与通道尺度估计分布；严格适当评分规则联合训练预测正确性和置信度，解码器把潜在不确定性转换为可选尺度、与像素对齐的时间热图。实验使用 Bridge、DROID 机器人数据和真实 WidowX 展开。评估统计校准误差、负对数似然、置信度与预测误差相关性、生成差异的空间定位，以及对未见环境和动作的检测。分析比较潜在与像素不确定性、子块分辨率、评分目标、分布变化和模型配置，使置信信息能够随物理展开提供给监测和决策模块。

applications: Confidence-aware action-conditioned video simulation for robotics

name: WMReward
title: Inference-time Physics Alignment of Video Generative Models with Latent World Models

summary.en: WMReward uses a pretrained latent world model to steer video generation toward predicted physical dynamics at inference time. A sliding window separates generated context and future frames. VJEPA-2 predicts a latent future from the context, encodes the generated continuation, and converts their cosine agreement into a physics reward. The reward ranks Best-of-N samples, guides denoising gradients, or combines both mechanisms without retraining the video generator. Experiments apply the method to text-, image-, and multiframe-conditioned models. Evaluation uses the PhysicsIQ physical-law suite, human preferences, reward correlations, and test-time scaling curves. Comparisons include vision-language and vision-encoder rewards, while ablations vary context length, prediction horizon, masking, guidance strength, candidate count, and search strategy.
summary.zh: WMReward 在推理时用预训练潜在世界模型引导视频生成，使生成轨迹接近预测的物理动力学。滑动窗口把已生成内容分成上下文与未来帧，VJEPA-2 根据上下文预测未来潜在表示，再编码实际生成的延续，并以二者余弦一致性形成物理奖励。该奖励可用于最佳候选选择、去噪梯度引导或两者结合，无需重新训练视频生成器。实验覆盖文本、图像和多帧条件模型，使用 PhysicsIQ 物理规律套件、人类偏好、奖励相关性与测试时扩展曲线评估。比较包括视觉语言模型和视觉编码器奖励，消融考察上下文长度、预测跨度、掩码、引导强度、候选数量和搜索策略。

applications: Inference-time physical alignment of generated video worlds

name: FOUNDER
title: FOUNDER: Grounding Foundation Models in World Models for Open-Ended Embodied Decision Making

summary.en: FOUNDER grounds open-ended task descriptions in a learned world model for embodied control. A foundation encoder converts text or demonstration video into semantic task features. An autoencoder-style mapper aligns those features with actionable latent states from an offline world model using reconstruction and distribution constraints. A temporal-distance network estimates how many imagined transitions separate a state from the mapped goal, providing the reward for goal-conditioned policy learning in imagination. Experiments use reward-free visual trajectories from DeepMind Control Suite, Franka Kitchen, and Minecraft, with tasks specified by language or video and with cross-domain appearance gaps. Evaluation reports task return, success, semantic transfer, and agreement between learned and environment rewards. Ablations test representation mapping, alignment, temporal distance, foundation encoders, and world-model components.
summary.zh: FOUNDER 把开放式任务描述定位到世界模型中用于具身控制。基础编码器将文本或示范视频转换为语义任务特征，自编码映射器通过重建与分布约束，使其和离线世界模型的可行动潜在状态对齐。时间距离网络估计当前状态与映射目标之间的想象转移步数，并把该距离作为目标条件策略在想象中学习的奖励。实验使用 DeepMind Control Suite、Franka Kitchen 和 Minecraft 的无奖励视觉轨迹，任务由语言或视频指定，并设置跨域外观差异。评估报告任务回报、成功率、语义迁移和学习奖励与环境奖励的一致性；消融考察表征映射、对齐、时间距离、基础编码器和世界模型组件。

applications: Language- and video-specified embodied decision making

name: Interactive World Simulator
title: Interactive World Simulator for Robot Policy Training and Evaluation

summary.en: Interactive World Simulator builds a real-data robot simulator from action-conditioned video prediction. A convolutional encoder compresses observations into two-dimensional latents, a consistency decoder reconstructs images in few steps, and a second consistency model predicts the next latent from recent states and robot actions. A shifted context window supports autoregressive rollout for more than ten minutes at 15 frames per second on one GPU. Users collect demonstrations inside the simulator to train imitation policies, or run policy checkpoints under reproducible initial conditions. Experiments cover mug grasping, rope collection, cloth manipulation, sweeping object piles, and related rigid and deformable interactions. Evaluation compares visual dynamics, rollout stability, throughput, policy transfer, simulated task scores, real-world success, and their correlation, with architecture and horizon ablations.
summary.zh: Interactive World Simulator 从动作条件视频预测构建真实数据驱动的机器人模拟器。卷积编码器把观测压缩为二维潜在表示，一致性解码器重建图像，另一个一致性模型根据近期状态和动作预测下一潜在状态。滑动窗口支持单张显卡上每秒十五帧、超过十分钟的交互式展开。用户可在模拟器中采集示范训练模仿策略，也可在可复现条件下运行策略检查点。实验覆盖杯子抓取、绳索收集、布料操作、物体堆清扫等刚体与可变形交互，评估视觉动力学、展开稳定性、吞吐率、策略训练迁移、模拟任务分数、真实成功率及其相关性，并分析架构与时间跨度。

applications: Long-horizon robot simulation, synthetic demonstrations, and policy evaluation

name: PhyWorld
title: PhyWorld: Physics-Faithful World Model for Video Generation

summary.en: PhyWorld post-trains a large video generator as a physics-oriented world simulator. The first stage learns video-to-video continuation so generated frames preserve the physical state established by an input sequence across an extended horizon. The second stage constructs preference pairs from a physical-law taxonomy and applies direct preference optimization to favor continuations judged more physically consistent. Training and evaluation support text, image, and video conditioning. A dedicated 250-prompt suite scores law-specific behavior with an open-weight video-language judge, alongside standard VBench quality measures. Experiments report temporal consistency, visual quality, average physical-faithfulness scores, and per-law results across competing generators. Ablations examine continuation training, context length, preference data, judge configuration, optimization strength, conditioning modality, and the contribution of each post-training stage.
summary.zh: PhyWorld 把大型视频生成器后训练为物理世界模拟器。第一阶段学习视频延续，使生成帧在较长时间中保持输入序列确定的物理状态；第二阶段依据物理规律构造偏好对，通过直接偏好优化选择更符合物理的延续。训练与评估支持文本、图像和视频条件。二百五十条提示套件使用开放权重视频语言裁判对各类物理规律评分，同时采用 VBench 衡量视频质量。实验报告时间一致性、视觉质量、平均物理遵循分数和逐规律结果，并与多种生成器比较；消融考察延续训练、上下文长度、偏好数据、裁判配置、优化强度、条件模态和两个后训练阶段。

applications: Physics-faithful video simulation for Physical AI

name: Causal Forcing++
title: Causal Forcing++: Scalable Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation for Real-Time Interactive Video Generation

summary.en: Causal Forcing++ distills bidirectional video diffusion into low-latency causal generation. Its initialization stage uses causal consistency distillation to learn the autoregressive teacher’s conditional flow map from local noisy-clean pairs, followed by asymmetric distribution matching with student self-rollouts. The resulting model supports frame-wise one- or two-step generation and temporal key-value caching. For an interactive world-model variant, camera poses are injected as actions into a bidirectional Wan backbone trained on pose-annotated WorldPlay data, then distilled into a causal chunk-wise simulator. Experiments evaluate VBench, VisionReward, dynamic degree, first-frame latency, throughput, and training cost. Comparisons span autoregressive diffusion distillation methods, while ablations examine initialization, step count, consistency pairing, trajectory storage, noise schedule, cache use, and world-control conditioning.
summary.zh: Causal Forcing++ 把双向视频扩散蒸馏为低延迟因果生成模型。初始化阶段通过因果一致性蒸馏，从局部噪声—干净样本对学习自回归教师的条件流映射，随后使用学生自身展开进行非对称分布匹配。所得模型支持逐帧一步或两步生成和时间键值缓存。交互式世界模型版本把相机位姿作为动作注入在 WorldPlay 位姿数据上训练的双向 Wan 骨干，再蒸馏为因果分块模拟器。实验评估 VBench、VisionReward、动态程度、首帧延迟、吞吐率和训练成本，并与多种自回归扩散蒸馏方法比较。消融考察初始化方式、步数、一致性配对、轨迹存储、噪声日程、缓存和世界控制条件。

applications: Low-latency interactive video-world rollout

name: Phantom
title: Phantom: Physics-Infused Video Generation via Joint Modeling of Visual and Latent Physical Dynamics

summary.en: Phantom generates video and latent physical dynamics in one coupled model. An initial frame and text prompt condition a frozen visual flow-matching backbone, while a lightweight physics branch evolves V-JEPA-2 embeddings that represent interaction and motion state. Bidirectional cross-attention lets predicted physics guide visual denoising and lets visual features update the physical trajectory. Joint training supervises both future video latents and future physics-aware representations without requiring an external simulator at inference. Experiments use general video data and physics-oriented suites including VideoPhy, PhyGenBench, and PhysicsIQ. Evaluation reports physical-consistency, prompt alignment, temporal and perceptual quality, plus qualitative state evolution. Comparisons span large video generators and physics-guided methods; ablations test the physics encoder, branch capacity, cross-attention direction, joint losses, and conditioning signals.
summary.zh: Phantom 在同一耦合模型中生成视频和潜在物理动力学。初始帧与文本条件化冻结的视觉流匹配骨干，轻量物理分支则演化表示交互和运动状态的 V-JEPA-2 嵌入。双向交叉注意力让预测物理状态引导视觉去噪，也让视觉特征更新物理轨迹。联合训练同时监督未来视频潜在量和物理感知表示，推理时无需外部模拟器。实验使用通用视频数据以及 VideoPhy、PhyGenBench 和 PhysicsIQ 等物理套件，评估物理一致性、提示对齐、时间与感知质量和状态演化，并与大型视频生成器及物理引导方法比较。消融考察物理编码器、分支容量、交叉注意方向、联合损失和条件信号。

applications: Physics-infused predictive video generation

name: LingBot-World-Infinity
title: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions

summary.en: LingBot-World-Infinity is a causal interactive world generator designed for unbounded rollout. A mixed data engine combines egocentric, synthetic, game, and web video with temporally localized camera, action, operation, and event annotations. Causal pretraining stabilizes long histories, and a distilled variant streams 720p frames at 60 frames per second. The control space includes navigation, combat, archery, shooting, object interaction, and text-triggered weather or scene events. A pilot agent selects character behavior from the visible state, while a director agent introduces environmental content; a shared interface supports several participants. Experiments include an uninterrupted hour-long session and benchmark comparisons for visual quality, dynamic degree, prompt and action adherence, response latency, and long-horizon consistency, with data, memory, distillation, and control ablations.
summary.zh: LingBot-World-Infinity 是为无限时长展开设计的因果交互世界生成器。混合数据引擎整合第一视角、模拟、游戏和网络视频，并提供局部化的相机、动作、操作与事件标注。因果预训练稳定长历史，蒸馏版本以每秒六十帧输出七百二十行视频。控制空间包括导航、战斗、射箭、射击、物体交互和文本触发的天气或场景事件。领航智能体根据可见状态选择角色行为，导演智能体持续加入环境内容，共享界面还支持多位参与者。实验包含连续一小时会话，并从视觉质量、动态程度、提示与动作遵循、响应延迟和长程一致性比较多个系统；消融分析数据、记忆、蒸馏和控制设计。

applications: Open-ended interactive worlds for games and embodied simulation

name: LingBot-Video-A2V
title: Scaling Mixture-of-Experts Video Pretraining for Embodied Intelligence

summary.en: LingBot-Video is a mixture-of-experts video foundation model specialized for embodied dynamics, with an action-conditioned world-model adaptation. Sparse expert routing increases capacity while controlling active computation. Its data engine enriches internet video with manipulation, navigation, robotics, and egocentric footage, and reward post-training scores physical rationality and task completion alongside visual criteria. For LingBot-Video-A2V, GR-1 robot trajectories are recaptioned and filtered, action parameters are embedded into transformer blocks, and the model generates future visual states from an initial image, state description, and planned actions. Evaluation covers internal embodied categories, RBench, PhysicsIQ Verified, action following, video quality, physical behavior, efficiency, and scaling. Ablations examine expert count, routing, data mixtures, rewards, action conditioning, trajectory filtering, and distillation.
summary.zh: LingBot-Video 是面向具身动力学的混合专家视频基础模型，并提供动作条件世界模型版本。稀疏专家路由在控制实际计算量的同时扩大模型容量；数据引擎用操作、导航、机器人和第一视角视频补充网络数据，奖励后训练除视觉标准外还评价物理合理性与任务完成。构建 LingBot-Video-A2V 时，系统重写并过滤 GR-1 机器人轨迹，把动作参数嵌入变换器模块，根据初始图像、状态描述和计划动作生成未来视觉状态。评估覆盖内部具身类别、RBench、PhysicsIQ Verified、动作遵循、视频质量、物理行为、效率与规模扩展。消融考察专家数量、路由、数据组合、奖励、动作条件、轨迹过滤和蒸馏。

applications: Action-conditioned visual simulation for embodied intelligence

name: AlayaWorld
title: AlayaWorld: Long-Horizon and Playable Video World Generation

summary.en: AlayaWorld is a full-stack autoregressive system for playable long-horizon video worlds. Prompt switching localizes text-driven actions and scene changes in time, while Camera-AdaLN injects continuous or keyboard-style navigation into the diffusion transformer. A 3D cache stores spatially anchored observations for later views, a history compressor summarizes the recent trajectory, and an error bank supplies retrieved corrections when generated content begins to drift. Few-step distillation reduces response latency for interaction. Experiments demonstrate free navigation, prompt-driven events, revisitation, and extended streaming across varied scenes. Evaluation considers video quality, camera and instruction adherence, geometric and temporal consistency, memory persistence, generation duration, and runtime. Comparisons cover interactive world generators, and ablations isolate prompt scheduling, camera modulation, cache, compression, correction, and distillation.
summary.zh: AlayaWorld 是面向可游玩长程视频世界的自回归系统。提示切换把文本动作与场景变化定位到具体时间，相机自适应归一化把连续轨迹或键盘导航注入扩散变换器。三维缓存保存带空间锚点的观测供后续视角检索，历史压缩器概括近期轨迹，错误库在内容漂移时提供修正；少步蒸馏降低响应延迟。实验展示多类场景中的自由导航、提示事件、重访和长时间流式生成。评估考察视频质量、相机与指令遵循、几何和时间一致性、记忆持续性、生成时长与速度，并和交互世界生成器比较。消融分析提示调度、相机调制、缓存、压缩、纠错和蒸馏。

applications: Long-horizon navigable and prompt-driven world generation

name: DriveCtrl
title: DriveCtrl: Conditioned Sim-to-Real Driving Video Generation

summary.en: DriveCtrl converts labelled simulator video into realistic driving footage while preserving its scene trajectory. A structure-aware adapter conditions a pretrained video foundation model on per-frame depth, maintaining road layout, object motion, and temporal geometry. A reference image specifies the target real-dataset style and a text prompt supplies semantic context, so the output can reuse the simulator’s frame-level annotations. The generation pipeline scales across simulator scenes, weather, traffic, and target datasets. Experiments compare video translation and controllable generation baselines using FID, FVD, structural alignment, temporal measures, and downstream perception performance. The proposed Driving Video Realism Score combines driving plausibility, temporal coherence, structural consistency, and perceptual quality. Ablations test depth, style, text, adapter placement, conditioning strength, data volume, and annotation preservation.
summary.zh: DriveCtrl 把带标签的模拟器视频转换为真实感驾驶画面，同时保持场景轨迹。结构感知适配器用逐帧深度条件化视频基础模型，维持道路布局、物体运动和时间几何；参考图像指定目标数据集风格，文本提供语义上下文，因此输出可继续使用帧级标注。生成流程可扩展到不同模拟场景、天气、交通和目标数据集。实验以 FID、FVD、结构对齐、时间指标和下游感知表现比较视频翻译及可控生成基线。驾驶视频真实感分数综合驾驶合理性、时间连贯性、结构一致性和感知质量，消融考察深度、风格、文本、适配器位置、条件强度、数据量和标注保持。

applications: Annotation-preserving synthetic driving-video generation

name: DriveWAM
title: DriveWAM: Video Generative Priors Enable Scalable World-Action Modeling for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: DriveWAM adapts a pretrained video diffusion transformer into an autoregressive driving world-action policy. Video and continuous ego-action tokens share one temporal sequence and a joint flow-matching objective. For each chunk, the model first predicts future visual latents and then decodes the action from that imagined state. A frozen vision-language model produces scene-evolving intent from observation history, ego motion, and route commands, injected through localized cross-attention. Separate bounded key-value pools retain relevant, nonredundant video and action history during long rollout. Experiments on NAVSIM and PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles report planning, collision, trajectory, and generation measures, with training sets from four thousand to one hundred thousand clips. Ablations examine pretraining, visual rollout, semantic guidance, memory selection, cache size, and joint objectives.
summary.zh: DriveWAM 把预训练视频扩散变换器改造为自回归驾驶世界动作策略。视频与连续自车动作标记共享时间序列和联合流匹配目标；每个分块先预测未来视觉潜在量，再从想象状态解码动作。冻结的视觉语言模型依据观测历史、自车运动和路线命令产生随场景演化的意图，并通过局部交叉注意力注入。推理时，分离且有界的键值池保留相关而不冗余的视频与动作历史。NAVSIM 和 PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles 实验报告规划、碰撞、轨迹与生成指标，并将训练数据从四千扩展到十万段。消融考察预训练、视觉展开、语义引导、记忆选择、缓存容量和联合目标。

applications: Autoregressive video-action planning for autonomous driving

name: Robust Dreamer
title: Robust Dreamer: Deviation-Aware Latent Gaussian Memory for Action-Controlled AR Video Generation

summary.en: Robust Dreamer generates an interactive scene one action-controlled frame at a time. Latent Gaussian Memory attaches diffusion latents directly to reconstructed Gaussian primitives, then splats a viewpoint-aligned latent for the next prediction without repeatedly decoding and re-encoding RGB. Each generated latent is inherited by the spatial memory, supporting large camera changes and revisits. Deviation Learning records errors from model rollouts and injects matched corrupted histories during training so the generator learns to operate on its own evolving memory. Experiments on ScanNet, DL3DV, and OmniWorldGame measure long-horizon visual quality, geometric consistency, revisit agreement, drift, and action response. Comparisons cover 2D-history and 3D-memory generators; ablations examine latent versus RGB storage, splatting, deviation type, corruption timestep, history length, and memory updates.
summary.zh: Robust Dreamer 逐帧生成由动作控制的交互场景。潜在高斯记忆把扩散潜在量直接附着到重建的高斯基元上，再为下一次预测溅射与视角对齐的潜在条件，避免反复在潜在表示与 RGB 之间转换。每个新生成潜在量都会写回空间记忆，支持大幅相机移动和重访。偏差学习记录模型展开中的误差，并在训练时注入相匹配的受扰历史，使生成器适应自身不断演化的记忆。ScanNet、DL3DV 和 OmniWorldGame 实验考察长程视觉质量、几何一致性、重访一致、漂移和动作响应，并比较二维历史及三维记忆方法。消融分析潜在或 RGB 存储、溅射、偏差类型、扰动时间步、历史长度和记忆更新。

applications: Long-horizon action-controlled 3D-aware world generation

name: Policy World Model
title: From Forecasting to Planning: Policy World Model for Collaborative State-Action Prediction

summary.en: Policy World Model unifies video forecasting and trajectory planning in one autoregressive driving model. It first learns world dynamics from unlabeled driving sequences, using a context-guided tokenizer to emphasize changing regions. At decision time, the model describes the current scene, predicts plausible future frames without conditioning on a candidate action, and treats both language and generated video as multimodal rationales for the ego trajectory. Parallel token generation reduces forecasting overhead. Experiments on nuScenes and NAVSIM evaluate camera-only planning with trajectory displacement, collision, driving score, PDMS, and visual prediction measures. Comparisons include end-to-end policies, world-model planners, and multimodal driving systems. Ablations test world pretraining, descriptions, forecast frames, tokenizer design, parallel decoding, prediction horizon, and how generated futures enter the action head.
summary.zh: Policy World Model 在同一自回归驾驶模型中统一视频预测与轨迹规划。模型先从无标签驾驶序列学习世界动力学，并用上下文引导的分词器强调随时间变化的区域。决策时，它先描述当前场景，再在不依赖候选动作的情况下预测可能的未来帧，并把语言与生成视频共同作为自车轨迹的多模态依据；并行标记生成降低预测开销。nuScenes 和 NAVSIM 实验以轨迹位移、碰撞、驾驶分数、PDMS 与视觉预测指标评估纯相机规划，并比较端到端策略、世界模型规划器和多模态驾驶系统。消融考察世界预训练、场景描述、未来帧、分词器、并行解码、预测跨度和未来状态进入动作头的方式。

applications: Future-conditioned end-to-end autonomous driving

name: Pixel-to-4D
title: Pixel-to-4D: Camera-Controlled Image-to-Video Generation with Dynamic 3D Gaussians

summary.en: Pixel-to-4D predicts an explicit dynamic world representation from one image. A feed-forward network outputs layered pixel-aligned 3D Gaussians for static background and moving objects, including appearance, geometry, velocity, acceleration, angular motion, and latent variables for uncertain futures. DINOv2 features enrich the image representation. At inference, the predicted 4D Gaussian scene is advanced through time and rendered from any requested camera trajectory, producing video and depth without iterative diffusion. Experiments cover KITTI, Waymo, RealEstate10K, and DL3DV-10K. Evaluation reports PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, FVD, camera adherence, depth accuracy, temporal consistency, and inference time against camera-controlled video and 3D-aware baselines. Ablations examine Gaussian layers, motion parameterization, uncertainty sampling, feature fusion, object decomposition, and camera paths.
summary.zh: Pixel-to-4D 从一幅图像预测显式动态世界表示。前馈网络为静态背景和运动物体输出分层、像素对齐的三维高斯，其中包含外观、几何、速度、加速度、角运动以及表示未来不确定性的潜在变量，并融合 DINOv2 特征。推理时，系统让预测的四维高斯场景随时间演化，并从任意指定相机轨迹渲染视频与深度，无需迭代扩散。实验覆盖 KITTI、Waymo、RealEstate10K 和 DL3DV-10K，以 PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS、FVD、相机遵循、深度精度、时间一致性和推理耗时比较相机控制视频及三维感知基线。消融考察高斯层、运动参数化、不确定性采样、特征融合、物体分解和相机路径。

applications: Fast camera-controlled future rendering from a single image

name: Aero-World
title: Aero-World: Action-Conditioned Aerial Video Generation from Inertial Controls

summary.en: Aero-World converts an image-to-video diffusion model into an action-conditioned aerial simulator. Sequences of translational acceleration and angular velocity are embedded as action tokens and injected into the latent diffusion transformer during lightweight adaptation. A separately trained frozen Physics Probe maps latent video to inferred inertial motion, providing differentiable agreement with commanded six-degree-of-freedom controls without decoding every training sample. Training uses synchronized drone video and IMU sequences. AeroBench evaluates generated flights with Action Alignment Score, Physical Consistency Rate, optical-flow–IMU correlation, FVD, SSIM, and temporal stability, including aggressive and out-of-distribution motion. Comparisons cover action-only fine-tuning and aerial generation systems; ablations examine probe supervision, action encoding, loss weight, LoRA placement, inertial channels, sequence length, and control magnitude.
summary.zh: Aero-World 把图像到视频扩散模型改造为动作条件航空模拟器。平移加速度与角速度序列被编码为动作标记，在适配中注入潜在扩散变换器。单独训练并冻结的物理探针从潜在视频推断惯性运动，使生成动力学与六自由度命令进行可微一致性监督，而无需解码每个样本。训练使用同步无人机视频与惯性测量序列。AeroBench 以动作对齐分数、物理一致率、光流与惯性相关性、FVD、SSIM 和时间稳定性评估生成飞行，覆盖激烈及分布外运动。比较包括仅动作微调和航空生成系统，消融考察探针监督、动作编码、损失权重、低秩适配位置、惯性通道、序列长度和控制幅度。

applications: Six-degree-of-freedom controllable aerial video simulation

name: Endless World
title: Endless World: Real-Time 3D-Aware Long Video Generation

summary.en: Endless World is a streaming autoregressive video model that carries explicit geometric evidence through long generation. Each new segment is conditioned on prior generated content with gradients detached to limit feedback during training. A 3D feature extractor recovers scene structure and correspondences from the history, and a fusion mechanism injects those features into global attention for the next prediction. Attention sinks stabilize long context, while an optional 3D similarity loss reinforces structural agreement. Experiments on public long-video evaluations report VBench quality and semantic scores, object consistency, temporal stability, duration, and generation speed. Comparisons include autoregressive and long-video baselines; ablations examine attention sinks, conditional generation, 3D fusion, consistency loss, stream length, feature placement, and history size.
summary.zh: Endless World 是在长时间生成中持续携带几何证据的流式自回归视频模型。每个新片段由此前生成内容条件化，训练时停止历史梯度以限制反馈。三维特征提取器从历史恢复场景结构与对应关系，融合模块再把这些特征注入下一次预测的全局注意力；注意力汇聚标记稳定长上下文，可选三维相似损失加强结构一致。公共长视频评估报告 VBench 质量与语义分数、物体一致性、时间稳定性、生成时长和速度，并与自回归及长视频基线比较。消融考察注意力汇聚、条件生成、三维融合、一致性损失、流长度、特征位置和历史容量。

applications: Real-time geometry-aware long video-world generation

name: DriveLaW
title: DriveLaW: Unifying Planning and Video Generation in a Latent Driving World

summary.en: DriveLaW unifies driving-video generation and trajectory planning through a shared latent world. DriveLaW-Video encodes multiview observations and ego state, predicts future scene latents, and decodes spatiotemporal video. DriveLaW-Act is a diffusion planner that conditions candidate ego trajectories on the same learned representation, allowing planning to use dynamics acquired by video prediction. Training proceeds from video-world pretraining to planner adaptation and joint refinement. Experiments on nuScenes and NAVSIM include standard and rare scenarios and report video quality, temporal and multiview consistency, trajectory displacement, collision, comfort, and PDMS. Comparisons cover standalone world models and end-to-end planners; ablations test shared versus separate features, video pretraining, latent alignment, joint losses, forecasting horizon, camera inputs, and each training stage.
summary.zh: DriveLaW 通过共享潜在世界统一驾驶视频生成和轨迹规划。DriveLaW-Video 编码多视角观测与自车状态，预测未来场景潜在量并解码时空视频；DriveLaW-Act 是在同一表示上条件化候选自车轨迹的扩散规划器，使规划直接利用视频预测获得的动力学。训练从视频世界预训练推进到规划器适配和联合细化。nuScenes 与 NAVSIM 实验覆盖常规及少见场景，报告视频质量、时间和多视角一致性、轨迹位移、碰撞、舒适性与 PDMS，并比较独立世界模型和端到端规划器。消融考察共享或分离特征、视频预训练、潜在对齐、联合损失、预测跨度、相机输入和各训练阶段。

applications: Unified driving-world generation and ego-trajectory planning

name: World-R1
title: World-R1: Reinforcing 3D Constraints for Text-to-Video Generation

summary.en: World-R1 uses reinforcement learning to teach a text-to-video model 3D scene consistency. A text prompt is paired with a synthesized camera trajectory, which is embedded through wrapped latent noise. Candidate videos are reconstructed as 3D Gaussians by a frozen foundation model. Their rewards combine novel meta-view consistency, rendering fidelity, camera-trajectory alignment, and general generation quality, and Flow-GRPO-Fast updates the video policy from these scores. This moves geometric supervision into training rather than requiring reconstruction during deployment. Experiments measure multiview and reconstruction-independent consistency, camera control, VBench quality, long-video stability, scene-complexity behavior, and data scaling. Comparisons include standard and 3D-aware generators; ablations separate each reward, camera conditioning, Gaussian lifting, policy optimization, prompt data, rollout count, and reward weighting.
summary.zh: World-R1 通过强化学习让文本到视频模型内化三维场景一致性。文本提示配合合成相机轨迹，轨迹通过包裹潜在噪声注入；候选视频由冻结的三维基础模型重建为高斯场景。奖励结合新视角一致性、渲染保真、相机轨迹对齐和通用生成质量，Flow-GRPO-Fast 再依据这些分数更新视频策略，使几何监督进入训练而非部署时重建。实验评估多视角及独立于重建的一致性、相机控制、VBench 质量、长视频稳定性、场景复杂度和数据扩展，并比较常规及三维感知生成器。消融分别分析各奖励、相机条件、高斯提升、策略优化、提示数据、候选数量和奖励权重。

applications: Geometry-aligned text-to-video world generation

name: ReSim
title: ReSim: Reliable World Simulation for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: ReSim is a controllable driving world model trained on both real expert logs and simulated expert and hazardous behavior. A diffusion transformer receives visual history, command, and optional future ego waypoints. Progressive training combines OpenDV, NAVSIM, and CARLA, while a dynamics-consistency loss and nonuniform noise schedule emphasize motion under unusual actions. A Video2Reward module uses frozen DINOv2 features and CARLA infraction supervision to score predicted futures. ReSim can generate an action-free visual plan for inverse-dynamics trajectory decoding, rank proposals from several policies, or run policies in a closed visual loop. Experiments report video realism, waypoint following, zero-shot Waymo prediction, NAVSIM planning and PDMS, reward accuracy, policy selection, and simulation-real correlation, with data, loss, noise, reward, and conditioning ablations.
summary.zh: ReSim 是同时使用真实专家日志以及模拟专家和危险行为训练的可控驾驶世界模型。扩散变换器接收视觉历史、命令和可选未来自车路径点；渐进训练结合 OpenDV、NAVSIM 与 CARLA，动力学一致损失和非均匀噪声日程强化少见动作下的运动建模。Video2Reward 以冻结的 DINOv2 特征和 CARLA 违规分数监督，为预测未来评分。ReSim 可生成无动作视觉计划供逆动力学解码轨迹，也可排序多个策略建议或在视觉闭环中运行策略。实验报告视频真实感、路径点遵循、Waymo 零样本预测、NAVSIM 规划与 PDMS、奖励精度、策略选择及模拟—真实相关性；消融考察数据、损失、噪声、奖励和条件方式。

applications: Driving policy planning, selection, and closed-loop evaluation

name: AnchorWeave
title: AnchorWeave: World-Consistent Video Generation with Retrieved Local Spatial Memories

summary.en: AnchorWeave conditions video-world generation on retrieved spatial memories. As a camera explores, observations are converted into local point clouds and stored with pose metadata. For each target chunk, the system retrieves memories, renders anchor videos from the requested camera path, and computes relative anchor-to-target poses. A shared attention block encodes several anchors; pose-guided importance weights weave them into one control signal for the diffusion backbone. Experiments use a 500-video partial-revisit split from RealEstate10K and DL3DV, plus long keyboard-controlled trajectories from open-domain images. Evaluation measures image and video quality, camera adherence, geometric consistency, overlap agreement, loop closure, and long-horizon persistence. Comparisons cover history, point-cloud, and memory-conditioned generators; ablations test retrieval radius, anchor count, fusion, pose encoding, weighting, rendering, and memory density.
summary.zh: AnchorWeave 用检索到的局部空间记忆条件化视频世界生成。相机探索时，观测被转换为局部点云并连同位姿元数据保存；生成每个目标片段前，系统检索附近记忆，沿目标相机路径渲染短锚点视频，并计算锚点到目标的相对位姿。共享注意力模块编码多个锚点，位姿引导的重要性权重把它们编织为扩散骨干的统一控制信号。实验使用 RealEstate10K 与 DL3DV 的五百段局部重访视频，并从开放域图像生成键盘控制长轨迹。评估考察图像及视频质量、相机遵循、几何一致、重叠区域、闭环和长程持续性。消融分析检索半径、锚点数量、融合、位姿编码、权重、渲染和记忆密度。

applications: World-consistent long-horizon video exploration

name: Dynamic World Simulation
title: Pre-Trained Video Generative Models as World Simulators

summary.en: Dynamic World Simulation adapts a pretrained video generator into an action-conditioned control environment. Action modules inject discrete controls into the video backbone, while a motion-reinforced objective weights changing regions so predicted transitions reflect agent input. The simulator rolls forward from image observations. For model-based reinforcement learning, prioritized imagination selects states and trajectories using policy value and model signals, then updates a PPO agent from generated experience. Experiments cover Procgen games, Breakout, and Battle Zone with RGB observations and discrete actions. Evaluation reports video prediction, action response, sample efficiency, episode return, and transfer across levels. Comparisons include model-free PPO and PPG and DreamerV3; ablations examine video pretraining, action injection, motion loss, imagined-data ratio, prioritization criteria, rollout length, and update schedule.
summary.zh: Dynamic World Simulation 把预训练视频生成器适配为动作条件控制环境。轻量动作模块将离散控制注入视频骨干，运动强化目标提高变化区域的权重，使预测转移反映智能体输入。所得模拟器从图像观测持续展开。进行基于模型的强化学习时，优先想象机制依据策略价值和模型信号选择合成状态与轨迹，再用生成经验更新 PPO 智能体。实验覆盖 Procgen 游戏、Breakout 和 Battle Zone，输入为 RGB 图像并采用离散动作。评估报告视频预测、动作响应、样本效率、回合回报和跨关卡迁移，并比较无模型 PPO、PPG 与 DreamerV3。消融考察视频预训练、动作注入、运动损失、想象数据比例、优先标准、展开长度和更新日程。

applications: Video-world simulation for model-based reinforcement learning

name: OmniRoam
title: OmniRoam: World Wandering via Long-Horizon Panoramic Video Generation

summary.en: OmniRoam generates navigable worlds in a panoramic video representation. It adapts a pretrained video model to visual context and motion, decomposing camera control into normalized flow direction and global step scale. A global preview sketches the wandering trajectory and scene evolution at lower detail; local refinement synthesizes high-resolution segments from panoramic context. This maintains information outside the current perspective and supports loop closure after large turns. Experiments compare 81-frame previews and 641-frame sequences using panoramic and perspective training variants. Evaluation reports visual quality, trajectory adherence, temporal consistency, panoramic seams, and loop agreement. Comparisons include direct autoregression and camera-controlled generation; ablations examine panorama use, preview-refinement, flow-scale decomposition, conditioning layout, refinement windows, and trajectory length.
