summary.zh: OmniRoam 以全景视频生成长程可导航世界。模型在预训练视频骨干上加入视觉与运动条件，把相机控制分解为移动方向与全局步幅。全局预览先规划漫游轨迹和场景演化，局部细化再参考全景上下文生成高分辨率片段；这种表示保留当前透视之外的信息，并支持大幅转向后的闭环。实验比较八十一帧预览与六百四十一帧长序列，以及全景和透视训练版本。评估报告视觉质量、轨迹遵循、时间一致性、全景接缝与闭环一致，并比较直接自回归和相机控制生成方法。消融考察全景表示、预览—细化、方向—步幅分解、条件布局、细化窗口和轨迹长度。

applications: Long-horizon panoramic world wandering

name: E3C
title: E3C: Video Generation with 3D Environmental Memory and Ego-Exo Human Pose Control

summary.en: E³C generates egocentric video with persistent environment and human-motion control. Project Aria trajectories and point clouds form a 3D memory. For each target frame, this memory is rendered into the camera view and encoded as geometric conditioning for a diffusion transformer. The participant’s 3D body and wrist motion supplies ego pose, while bystander skeletons provide exocentric controls, allowing camera, wearer, and other people to evolve together. Training and evaluation use 1,100-plus Nymeria recordings with disjoint environments and synchronized motion capture. Metrics cover video quality, temporal and geometric consistency, environmental alignment, ego-pose adherence, exo-human pose, and identity. Comparisons include egocentric and pose-controlled generators; ablations test 3D memory, rendering channels, camera pose, ego joints, exo controls, fusion, and memory density.
summary.zh: E³C 生成保持环境与人体运动控制的第一视角视频。Project Aria 相机轨迹和点云组成三维记忆，每个目标帧都把记忆渲染到当前视角，作为潜在扩散变换器的几何条件。参与者的三维身体和腕部运动提供自我姿态，旁观者骨架提供外部人体控制，使相机、佩戴者和其他人共同演化。训练与评估使用 Nymeria 超过一千一百段环境互斥且带同步动作捕捉的记录。指标考察视频质量、时间与几何一致性、环境对齐、自我姿态遵循、外部人体姿态和身份，并与第一视角及姿态控制生成器比较。消融分析三维记忆、渲染通道、相机位姿、自我关节、外部控制、融合和记忆密度。

applications: 3D-memory-aware egocentric human-world generation

name: Directing the World
title: Directing the World: Fast Autoregressive Video Generation with Compositional Human-Camera Control

summary.en: Directing the World adds compositional human and camera control to autoregressive video worlds. An MMPL backbone preserves segment history and macro plans. The first training stage learns SMPL-conditioned single- and multi-person motion through timestep-guided projection and Motion-CFG; the second adds camera trajectories rendered as point-cloud video through a separate branch. Fast-Slow Memory updates controllers rapidly while changing pretrained generation and memory more gradually. A curated dataset separates motion-centric and camera-centric samples before joint use. Experiments evaluate long world exploration, target-person control, simultaneous people, and large camera moves. Metrics cover visual quality, pose accuracy, identity, motion smoothness, camera adherence, and temporal consistency. Ablations examine stage order, update rates, projection timing, guidance, control branches, data filters, and memory length.
summary.zh: Directing the World 为自回归视频世界加入人体与相机控制。MMPL 骨干保存片段历史和宏观计划。第一阶段通过随时间变化的投影与 Motion-CFG 学习 SMPL 条件的单人及多人动作，第二阶段用独立分支加入渲染成点云视频的相机轨迹。快慢记忆训练让新控制器快速更新，同时缓慢调整预训练生成和记忆模块。数据先区分运动中心与相机中心样本再联合使用。实验评估长程世界探索、指定人物控制、多人同步和大幅相机运动，指标涵盖视觉质量、姿态精度、身份、动作平滑、相机遵循和时间一致性。消融考察阶段顺序、更新速率、投影时机、引导、控制分支、数据过滤与记忆长度。

applications: Human-directed long-horizon world exploration

name: BIFE
title: BIFE: Better Interaction, Fewer Errors for Minute-Long Video Generation

summary.en: BIFE targets minute-long interactive generation with changing prompts. Each block uses a local key-value cache plus a global sparse bank. Prompt embeddings retrieve earlier blocks with related content, and only salient tokens from new blocks are stored, preserving distant identities and events within bounded memory. Block Forcing exposes the model to its generated histories during training so later segments learn to continue imperfect contexts. InterVBench contains one thousand minute-long videos with block-level interactive prompts. Experiments measure visual and temporal quality, prompt following after switches, identity and object persistence, motion, long-range retrieval, and error accumulation. Comparisons include sliding-window and long-video generators; ablations test sparse-token ratio, retrieval count, similarity function, local window, bank update, Block Forcing schedule, and sequence length.
summary.zh: BIFE 面向提示不断变化的分钟级交互生成。每个视频块同时使用局部键值缓存与全局稀疏库；提示嵌入检索内容相关的早期片段，新生成块只把显著键值标记写入记忆，从而在有界容量中保留远距离身份和事件。Block Forcing 在训练时让模型接触自身生成的历史，使后续片段学会延续不完美上下文。配套 InterVBench 包含一千段带分块交互提示的分钟级视频。实验考察视觉与时间质量、提示切换后的遵循、身份和物体持续性、运动、远程检索与误差累积，并比较滑动窗口和长视频生成器。消融分析稀疏比例、检索数量、相似函数、局部窗口、记忆更新、Block Forcing 日程和序列长度。

applications: Long-range interactive video-world generation

name: Foresight
title: Foresight: Failure Detection for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation with Action-Conditioned World Model Latents

summary.en: Foresight monitors long-horizon robot execution with action-conditioned world-model latents. A frozen V-JEPA 2 encoder represents visual context, and a predictor trained on robot trajectories forecasts latent future state from the policy’s action chunk. A causal transformer aggregates predictive tokens over time and outputs a failure score using only final rollout success or failure labels. Functional conformal prediction calibrates a time-varying alarm threshold on successful trajectories. Experiments cover LIBERO-Long, four compositional ManiSkill-Long tasks, BEHAVIOR-1K, and real ReactorX and Franka manipulation with several VLA and visuomotor policies. Evaluation reports detection delay, true- and false-alarm rates, AUROC, calibration, and cross-policy transfer. Comparisons include visual, policy-uncertainty, embedding, and world-model detectors; ablations examine actions, predictor training, latent layers, temporal context, thresholds, and task supervision.
summary.zh: Foresight 用动作条件世界模型潜在表示监控长程机器人执行。冻结的 V-JEPA 2 编码器表示视觉上下文，基于机器人轨迹训练的预测器依据策略下一动作块预测未来潜在状态；因果变换器沿时间汇聚这些预测标记，仅用整段展开的成功或失败标签输出失败分数。函数共形预测在成功轨迹上校准随时间变化的报警阈值。实验覆盖 LIBERO-Long、四项组合 ManiSkill-Long 任务、BEHAVIOR-1K，以及 ReactorX 和 Franka 上的多种 VLA 与视觉运动策略。评估报告检测延迟、真警与误警率、AUROC、校准和跨策略迁移，并比较视觉、策略不确定性、嵌入及世界模型检测器。消融考察动作、预测器训练、潜在层、时间上下文、阈值和任务监督。

applications: Long-horizon manipulation failure monitoring

name: World-Value-Action
title: World-Value-Action Model: Implicit Planning for Vision-Language-Action Systems

summary.en: World–Value–Action learns implicit planning inside a VLA system. Observations and instructions condition a latent distribution over future trajectories. A world module predicts latent state evolution, a value module estimates long-horizon utility, and iterative inference shifts probability toward dynamically feasible, high-value trajectories. An action decoder turns the refined latent into executable robot chunks without explicit search over the full action space. The paper analyzes how feasible action probability shrinks with horizon and how latent inference reshapes it. Experiments span LIBERO task families, compositional simulation, generalization settings, and real robot manipulation. Evaluation reports success, horizon sensitivity, robustness, and inference iterations against VLA and diffusion-policy baselines. Ablations separate dynamics, value, refinement, latent dimension, iteration count, planning horizon, language, and world-model pretraining.
summary.zh: World–Value–Action 在 VLA 系统内部学习隐式规划。观测与指令条件化未来轨迹的潜在分布，世界模块预测状态演化，价值模块估计长程效用，迭代推理再把概率集中到动力学可行且高价值的轨迹。动作解码器把细化潜在量转换为可执行动作块，避免在完整动作空间搜索。论文还分析可行轨迹概率随跨度收缩以及潜在推理如何重塑分布。实验覆盖 LIBERO 任务族、组合长程模拟、泛化设置和真实机器人操作，以成功率、跨度敏感性、鲁棒性和推理轮数比较 VLA 与扩散策略基线。消融考察动力学、价值、细化、潜在维度、迭代次数、规划跨度、语言和世界模型预训练。

applications: Value-guided long-horizon robot manipulation

name: NavForesee
title: NavForesee: A Unified Vision-Language World Model for Hierarchical Planning and Dual-Horizon Navigation Prediction

summary.en: NavForesee unifies hierarchical language planning and latent world prediction for continuous navigation. From instruction and observation history, one VLM tracks completed sub-instructions, identifies a milestone, and proposes the next semantic action trunk. It also predicts DINO and SAM environment features at two horizons: immediate local state for obstacle-aware execution and the visual state expected when the subgoal is completed. An MLP converts the plan and imagined features into waypoints and an arrival flag. Training uses R2R-CE and RxR-CE trajectories with VLM-derived milestone annotations. Evaluation reports success rate, oracle success, SPL, path and navigation errors, and progress on unseen environments. Comparisons span VLM navigation and predictive world-model agents; ablations test hierarchical plans, each horizon, feature targets, history, milestones, and action decoding.
summary.zh: NavForesee 为连续导航统一分层语言规划和潜在世界预测。根据完整指令与观测历史，同一个 VLM 跟踪已完成子指令、识别当前里程碑并提出下一语义动作段；同时在两个跨度预测紧凑的 DINO 与 SAM 环境特征：短期特征支持局部避障执行，长期特征表示完成当前子目标时预期看到的状态。MLP 把计划和想象特征转换为连续路径点与到达标志。训练使用公共 R2R-CE、RxR-CE 轨迹及 VLM 生成的里程碑标注。评估报告成功率、预言成功率、SPL、路径与导航误差以及未见环境进展，并比较 VLM 导航和预测世界模型智能体。消融考察分层计划、两个预测跨度、特征目标、历史、里程碑和动作解码。

applications: Language-guided continuous navigation with predictive foresight

name: VLA-World
title: Learning Vision-Language-Action World Models for Autonomous Driving

zh: 视觉语言动作世界模型

summary.en: VLA-World couples predictive imagination with reflective driving reasoning. The model first describes relevant traffic participants and road boundaries, predicts a feasible short-term ego trajectory, and uses it to condition generation of the next driving frame. A vision-language reasoning stage inspects the imagined scene for emerging agents and risks before producing the final long-horizon trajectory. Training proceeds through a visual-generation cold start, joint perception–generation–planning instruction tuning, and reinforcement learning that scores decisions through generated futures. Experiments use autonomous-driving planning and future-generation benchmarks, reporting trajectory L2, collision, FID, visual quality, and reasoning measures. Comparisons include VLA policies and driving world models; ablations test each training stage, generation, reflection, trajectory conditioning, multi-view input, future length, and reinforcement rewards.
summary.zh: VLA-World 把预测想象与反思式驾驶推理结合起来。模型先描述相关交通参与者和道路边界，预测可行的短期自车轨迹，并以此条件化下一驾驶帧生成；视觉语言推理阶段再检查想象场景中的新出现智能体与风险，输出最终长程轨迹。训练依次进行视觉生成冷启动、感知—生成—规划联合指令微调，以及通过生成未来评价决策的强化学习。实验使用自动驾驶规划与未来生成基准，报告轨迹 L2、碰撞、FID、视觉质量和推理指标，并比较 VLA 策略与驾驶世界模型。消融考察各训练阶段、未来生成、反思、轨迹条件、多视角输入、未来长度和强化奖励。

applications: Generation-informed end-to-end autonomous driving

name: Reason-Imagine-Act
title: Reason-Imagine-Act: Closed-Loop LLM Decision Making with World Models for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Reason–Imagine–Act closes the loop between language reasoning and driving dynamics. At each CARLA step, an LLM selects a high-level intent and proposes several parameterized sub-actions. An action-conditioned world model rolls each candidate forward over a short horizon, and a scorer measures collision, lane, and kinematic safety. The best executable candidate is applied, while the rollout feedback becomes context for the next LLM decision. The framework requires no policy fine-tuning. Experiments use a unified point-goal protocol with one thousand episodes and traffic, plus a held-out world-prediction test. Evaluation reports route completion, arrival, collision, infractions, and rollout error against training-free LLM and world-model variants. Ablations remove imagination, feedback, candidate diversity, and safety terms or vary rollout horizon and action granularity.
summary.zh: Reason–Imagine–Act 在语言推理与驾驶动力学之间形成闭环。CARLA 的每个决策步中，LLM 选择高层意图并提出若干参数化子动作，动作条件世界模型对每个候选进行短程展开，数值评分器再计算碰撞、车道与运动学安全。系统执行最安全的可行动作，并把展开反馈加入下一次 LLM 决策上下文，整个流程无需策略微调。实验采用统一点目标协议，包含一千个城市回合和受控背景交通，并设置独立世界预测测试。评估报告路线完成、到达、碰撞、违规和展开误差，比较训练自由的 LLM 与世界模型变体。消融移除想象、反馈、候选多样性或安全项，并改变展开跨度与动作粒度。

applications: World-model-verified autonomous-driving decisions

name: DLWM
title: DLWM: Dual Latent World Models enable Holistic Gaussian-centric Pre-training in Autonomous Driving

summary.en: DLWM pretrains autonomous-driving perception and planning around semantic 3D Gaussians. In the first stage, multiview features are converted into Gaussian scene elements and trained by rendering semantic and depth images, producing geometrically detailed context. The second stage contains two latent world models: one predicts temporal Gaussian features under estimated Gaussian flow for occupancy perception and forecasting, while the other predicts representations conditioned on an ego trajectory for motion planning. Experiments on SurroundOcc and nuScenes report 3D occupancy IoU and mIoU, future occupancy forecasting, trajectory L2, collision, and transfer across task heads. Comparisons include voxel, BEV, Gaussian, and latent-world pretraining. Ablations examine reconstruction signals, flow guidance, ego planning, model separation, pretraining stages, temporal horizon, rendering, and Gaussian representation.
summary.zh: DLWM 围绕语义三维高斯为自动驾驶感知与规划进行预训练。第一阶段把多视角特征转换为高斯场景元素，并通过渲染语义图和深度图学习几何细节。第二阶段包含两个潜在世界模型：一个在高斯流引导下预测时间高斯特征，用于占用感知与预测；另一个根据自车轨迹预测表示，用于运动规划。下游任务头复用这些预训练状态。SurroundOcc 与 nuScenes 实验报告三维占用 IoU、mIoU、未来占用预测、轨迹 L2、碰撞和跨任务头迁移，并比较体素、鸟瞰、高斯及潜在世界预训练方法。消融考察重建信号、流引导、自车规划、模型分离、预训练阶段、时间跨度、渲染和高斯表示。

applications: Unified occupancy perception, forecasting, and driving planning

name: SparseWorld
title: SparseWorld: Enhancing End-to-End Autonomous Driving via World Models with Sparse Scene Representation

summary.en: SparseWorld uses an instance-level future instead of a dense image or BEV world. A driving backbone extracts traffic participants, map elements, action conditions, and an ego proposal. Sparse Dreamer applies temporal and spatial attention to an instance memory and autoregressively forecasts future agents and layout features. Motion queries interact with those predicted sparse states to refine surrounding-agent motion and the ego trajectory. The module can attach to instance-aware end-to-end driving systems. Experiments evaluate nuScenes open-loop planning and Bench2Drive closed-loop driving, reporting trajectory displacement, collision, route and driving scores, forecasting accuracy, computation, and memory. Comparisons include dense occupancy, BEV latent, and instance-based baselines; ablations test each attention path, action conditioning, instance memory, forecast steps, planner interaction, sparse content, and backbone integration.
summary.zh: SparseWorld 使用实例级未来，而非稠密图像或鸟瞰世界。驾驶骨干提取当前交通参与者、地图元素、动作条件和自车初始计划；Sparse Dreamer 对实例记忆施加时间与空间注意力，自回归预测未来智能体及布局特征。运动查询随后与这些稀疏预测状态交互，细化周围智能体运动和自车轨迹。该模块可接入实例感知端到端驾驶系统。实验评估 nuScenes 开环规划和 Bench2Drive 闭环驾驶，报告轨迹位移、碰撞、路线与驾驶分数、预测精度、计算和内存，并比较稠密占用、鸟瞰潜在及实例基线。消融考察两类注意力、动作条件、实例记忆、预测步数、规划交互、稀疏内容和骨干集成。

applications: Efficient future-aware end-to-end driving

name: OccSim
title: OccSim: Multi-kilometer Simulation with Long-horizon Occupancy World Models

summary.en: OccSim builds an occupancy-based driving simulator from one initial frame and future ego actions. W-DiT generates static semantic occupancy autoregressively while applying rigid coordinate transformations, mask-injected conditioning, and an SNR-weighted loss. Rollout beyond three thousand frames is fused into a map exceeding four kilometers, and graph search extracts lane topology. A Layout Generator places dynamic agents on the synthesized road network, while an IDM-style controller provides reactive traffic. Experiments measure occupancy quality, diversity, rollout stability, map length, topology, traffic layout, and downstream transfer. Data generated by OccSim pretrains 4D occupancy forecasting and is evaluated zero-shot under dataset scaling. Comparisons include occupancy world models and asset simulators; ablations test geometry injection, masks, loss weighting, fusion, topology, layout, and action conditioning.
summary.zh: OccSim 从单个初始占用帧和未来自车动作构建驾驶模拟器。W-DiT 在自回归生成静态语义占用时应用刚体坐标变换、掩码注入条件和按信噪比加权的损失。超过三千帧的展开被融合为长度超过四公里的地图，图搜索从中提取车道拓扑。布局生成器在合成道路网中放置动态智能体，类 IDM 控制器提供反应式交通。实验考察占用质量、多样性、展开稳定性、地图长度、拓扑、交通布局和下游迁移；生成数据还用于预训练四维占用预测并进行零样本评估。比较包括占用世界模型和资产模拟器，消融分析几何注入、掩码、损失权重、融合、拓扑、布局和动作条件。

applications: Large-scale occupancy-world driving simulation

name: ExploreVLA
title: ExploreVLA: Dense World Modeling and Exploration for End-to-End Autonomous Driving

summary.en: ExploreVLA uses dense world prediction to train an end-to-end driving policy beyond trajectory imitation. A shared vision-language backbone predicts the ego trajectory together with future RGB images and depth maps, so its internal state captures appearance and metric geometry. During GRPO post-training, uncertainty in the generated future acts as a novelty signal, while a safety gate constrains the exploration reward. The model therefore connects imagined scene evolution with action learning without requiring an online simulator. Experiments on NAVSIM and nuScenes report planning quality, predictive driving scores, depth and image generation, and exploration measures. Ablations isolate dense generation, uncertainty, safety gating, reward terms, and the joint training design.
summary.zh: ExploreVLA 用稠密世界预测训练端到端驾驶策略，而不只模仿轨迹。共享视觉语言骨干同时预测自车轨迹、未来 RGB 图像和深度图，使内部状态包含外观与度量几何。GRPO 后训练阶段把未来图像生成的不确定性作为新颖性信号，并用安全门约束探索奖励，从而在无需在线模拟器的情况下把想象的场景演化与动作学习连接起来。实验在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 上报告规划质量、预测驾驶分数、深度与图像生成及探索指标；消融分别检验稠密生成、不确定性、安全门、奖励项和联合训练。

applications: World-model-guided exploratory training for autonomous driving

name: LMGenDrive
title: LMGenDrive: Bridging Multimodal Understanding and Generative World Modeling for End-to-End Driving

summary.en: LMGenDrive combines multimodal instruction understanding and generative world modeling in one end-to-end driving network. Three synchronized camera streams and a natural-language command enter a shared model with dedicated action and world queries. The action branch predicts future waypoints, while the generative branch produces multi-view future video frames, allowing spatial-temporal understanding and scene evolution to be learned jointly. Training proceeds through visual pretraining, task-specific query learning, and longer-horizon generation. Closed-loop experiments on CARLA LangAuto, LangAuto-Short, and LangAuto-Tiny report driving score, route completion, and infraction score. Ablations study visual initialization, action/world queries, temporal horizon, multi-view generation, and the contribution of each training stage.
summary.zh: LMGenDrive 在一个端到端驾驶网络中结合多模态指令理解与生成式世界建模。三路同步相机和自然语言指令输入共享模型，并由动作查询和世界查询分别处理。动作分支预测未来路点，生成分支产生多视角未来视频，使时空理解和场景演化能够联合学习。训练依次采用视觉预训练、任务查询学习和长时域生成。CARLA LangAuto、LangAuto-Short 与 LangAuto-Tiny 的闭环实验报告驾驶分数、路线完成率和违规分数；消融分析视觉初始化、两类查询、时间跨度、多视角生成以及各训练阶段的作用。

applications: Language-conditioned closed-loop autonomous driving

name: DeepSight
title: DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving

summary.en: DeepSight equips a vision-language driving model with an explicit long-horizon latent future. Camera observations are encoded into bird’s-eye-view semantic features and reconstructed through a learned codebook. Instead of emitting one future image token sequence, the model predicts multiple consecutive latent BEV states in parallel, and the planning head uses this forecast to produce a trajectory. An adaptive chain-of-thought mechanism invokes additional textual reasoning for scenarios identified as demanding social knowledge. Closed-loop experiments on Bench2Drive evaluate driving score, success rate, route completion, safety, and scenario-level abilities under the standard expert-data protocol. Ablations vary latent prediction, forecast length, reconstruction, textual reasoning, and their placement in the unified model.
summary.zh: DeepSight 为视觉语言驾驶模型加入显式长时域潜在未来。相机观测先编码为鸟瞰语义特征，并通过学习到的码本重建；模型不再只输出单个未来图像序列，而是并行预测多个连续的潜在鸟瞰状态，规划头利用这些预测生成轨迹。自适应思维链机制会在需要社会知识的场景中调用额外文本推理。Bench2Drive 闭环实验在标准专家数据协议下评估驾驶分数、成功率、路线完成、安全和场景能力；消融改变潜在预测、预测跨度、重建、文本推理及其在统一模型中的位置。

applications: Long-horizon closed-loop autonomous-driving planning

name: WMGen-v1
title: One Image is All You Need: Agentic One-Shot Image Generation via Text-Based World Models for Long-Tail Spatial Perception

summary.en: WMGen-v1 is an agentic text-based world model for producing long-tail spatial training data from one reference image. A large vision-language model first converts the image into a structured description of objects, layout, scale, and relations. A language model then expands that state under guidance rules encoding physical plausibility and commonsense constraints, and an image generator renders the resulting scene specification. The pipeline targets rare road-work and maritime cases while retaining spatial grounding. Experiments on industrial data, ROADWork, and LaRS train YOLO and Faster R-CNN detectors with synthetic, real, and mixed samples. Evaluation reports aggregate and per-class detection measures and compares alternative generation pipelines, prompting schemes, constraints, and data mixtures.
summary.zh: WMGen-v1 是从单张参考图像生成长尾空间训练数据的智能体式文本世界模型。大型视觉语言模型先把图像转成包含物体、布局、尺度和关系的结构化描述，语言模型再依据物理合理性与常识约束扩展该状态，最后由图像生成器渲染场景规范。流程面向道路施工和海事等稀有情形，同时保持空间落地。工业数据、ROADWork 和 LaRS 实验分别用合成、真实及混合样本训练 YOLO 与 Faster R-CNN，报告总体和分类检测指标，并比较不同生成流程、提示策略、约束及数据组合。

applications: Physically grounded synthetic data for spatial perception

name: DynFlowDrive
title: DynFlowDrive: Flow-Based Dynamic World Modeling for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: DynFlowDrive models how a latent driving scene changes under alternative ego trajectories. A rectified-flow objective learns a velocity field over latent states, enabling progressive future prediction conditioned on each proposed action sequence. The planner generates multiple trajectory candidates and evaluates the stability of the scene transition induced by each one, then selects a mode using this world-model signal. The module is attached to several end-to-end driving frameworks without adding a separate rollout stage at deployment. Experiments on nuScenes and NAVSIM report trajectory error, collision, predictive driving score, and safety-related planning measures. Comparisons cover deterministic, appearance-generative, and latent-dynamics baselines; ablations examine flow formulation, conditioning, stability scoring, candidate count, and integration choices.
summary.zh: DynFlowDrive 建模不同自车轨迹条件下潜在驾驶场景如何变化。整流流目标在潜在状态上学习速度场，从而针对每个候选动作序列逐步预测未来。规划器产生多条轨迹，并根据各轨迹诱导的场景转移稳定性进行评估，再利用这一世界模型信号选择模式。该模块可接入多种端到端驾驶骨干，部署时不增加独立展开阶段。nuScenes 与 NAVSIM 实验报告轨迹误差、碰撞、预测驾驶分数和安全相关规划指标；比较涵盖确定性、外观生成及潜在动力学基线，消融分析流形式、条件、稳定性评分、候选数量和集成方式。

applications: Trajectory-conditioned autonomous-driving planning

name: DREAM-Chunk
title: DREAM-Chunk: Reactive Action Chunking with Latent World Model

summary.en: DREAM-Chunk adds test-time latent imagination to an action-chunking robot policy. At each decision point, the policy samples several candidate chunks and a lightweight world model predicts their latent state sequences. During execution, the current observation is encoded and matched against the dreamed sequences; the controller selects actions from the chunk whose predicted state best agrees with the observed rollout, allowing online switching without policy fine-tuning. Kinetix experiments vary action noise, stochasticity, candidate count, and the presence of corrective demonstrations. Real-hardware tests cover four manipulation tasks with execution error, partial observability, and external perturbations. Evaluation reports success and robustness, with ablations on dynamics quality, matching, replanning, sampling, and corrective data.
summary.zh: DREAM-Chunk 为动作分块机器人策略加入测试时潜在想象。每个决策点由策略采样多个候选动作块，轻量世界模型预测相应的潜在状态序列；执行过程中把当前观测编码后与这些想象序列匹配，并从预测状态最符合实际展开的动作块中选择动作，因此无需微调策略即可在线切换。Kinetix 实验改变动作噪声、随机性、候选数量和纠正示范，真实硬件测试覆盖四个含执行误差、部分可观测和外部扰动的操作任务。评估报告成功率与稳健性，并消融动力学质量、匹配、重规划、采样和纠正数据。

applications: World-model-based reactive robot action chunking

name: GEM-4D
title: GEM-4D: Geometry-Enhanced Video World Models for Robot Manipulation

summary.en: GEM-4D trains a video world model to preserve geometry while imagining robot manipulation. Dense four-dimensional correspondences are distilled from a pretrained geometry foundation model into the generative backbone, jointly supervising appearance, depth, and physical point identity without adding an inference branch. Given an observation and instruction, the model produces a correspondence-consistent future video. An adaptive inverse-dynamics module then converts that rollout into executable robot trajectories. Experiments on Droid and RLBench measure video quality, depth, point tracking, geometric consistency, and simulated or real manipulation success. Comparisons include video and 4D world models, while ablations vary correspondence supervision, geometry sources, inverse dynamics, rollout length, action extraction, and training objectives.
summary.zh: GEM-4D 让视频世界模型在想象机器人操作时保持几何一致。方法把预训练几何基础模型产生的稠密四维对应关系蒸馏进生成骨干，同时监督外观、深度和物理点身份，推理时无需增加额外分支。给定观测与指令，模型生成对应关系一致的未来视频，自适应逆动力学模块再把展开转换为可执行机器人轨迹。Droid 与 RLBench 实验评估视频质量、深度、点跟踪、几何一致性以及仿真或真实操作成功率；比较覆盖视频和四维世界模型，消融对应监督、几何来源、逆动力学、展开长度、动作提取和训练目标。

applications: Geometry-consistent video planning for robot manipulation

name: Compositional Planning with Jumpy World Models
title: Compositional Planning with Jumpy World Models

summary.en: Compositional Planning with Jumpy World Models treats pretrained policies as temporally extended actions. For each parameterized policy, a generative model predicts the distribution of states visited after several possible jump lengths. A consistency objective aligns occupancy predictions across timescales, and the planner combines these forecasts to estimate the value of arbitrary policy sequences before execution. Receding-horizon replanning lets an agent solve tasks that require composing behaviors not demonstrated as one sequence. Experiments use offline OGBench locomotion and manipulation domains, comparing constituent policies, hierarchical methods, and other test-time planners. Evaluation reports goal-reaching and planning efficiency; analyses vary prediction horizon, consistency loss, proposal distribution, replanning frequency, policy library, and planning objective.
summary.zh: Compositional Planning with Jumpy World Models 把预训练策略视为时间延展动作。针对每个参数化策略，生成模型预测多个跳跃长度后可能访问的状态分布，跨时间尺度一致性目标使不同跨度的占用预测相互对齐。规划器组合这些预测，在执行前估计任意策略序列的价值，并通过滚动重规划完成未以完整序列示范过的组合任务。实验采用离线 OGBench 的移动与操作环境，比较单个策略、层级方法和其他测试时规划器，报告目标到达和规划效率；分析改变预测跨度、一致性损失、提议分布、重规划频率、策略库及规划目标。

applications: Long-horizon composition of pretrained robot policies

name: GenieDrive
title: GenieDrive: Towards Physics-Aware Driving World Model with 4D Occupancy Guided Video Generation

summary.en: GenieDrive generates driving futures through an explicit four-dimensional occupancy state. A variational autoencoder compresses high-resolution semantic occupancy into latent triplanes. Mutual Control Attention injects ego controls into the occupancy dynamics model, which forecasts geometry and moving objects before a second stage renders synchronized camera views. This separates physical scene evolution from appearance while preserving a shared action condition. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate 4D occupancy forecasting, video fidelity, temporal and multi-view consistency, control following, and physical plausibility. Comparisons include occupancy predictors and driving video generators. Ablations examine triplane compression, joint VAE training, control attention, occupancy guidance, temporal modeling, view conditioning, and the contribution of the intermediate state to generated video.
summary.zh: GenieDrive 通过显式四维占用状态生成驾驶未来。变分自编码器把高分辨率语义占用压缩为潜在三平面，Mutual Control Attention 将自车控制注入占用动力学模型，先预测几何和运动物体，再由第二阶段渲染同步相机视图。这样把物理场景演化与外观生成分开，同时保留统一动作条件。nuScenes 实验评估四维占用预测、视频保真度、时间与多视角一致性、控制跟随和物理合理性，并比较占用预测器及驾驶视频生成器；消融三平面压缩、联合 VAE 训练、控制注意力、占用引导、时间建模、视角条件和中间状态。

applications: Action-conditioned occupancy and video simulation for driving

name: UniWorld
title: UniWorld: Autonomous Driving Pre-training via World Models

summary.en: UniWorld pretrains autonomous-driving representations through a spatial-temporal occupancy world model. Synchronized multi-camera images are encoded into a three-dimensional scene state, while LiDAR-derived occupancy supplies label-free reconstruction targets. The model estimates missing current geometry and forecasts future occupancy, so the pretrained features contain both spatial structure and participant motion. Separate downstream heads then fine-tune this shared state for motion prediction, multi-camera 3D detection, and semantic scene completion. Experiments on nuScenes report occupancy IoU and video panoptic quality, detection measures, semantic completion, and performance under reduced 3D annotation. Comparisons cover monocular and multi-camera pretraining, with analyses of temporal prediction, occupancy targets, data scale, and transfer design.
summary.zh: UniWorld 通过时空占用世界模型预训练自动驾驶表征。同步多相机图像被编码为三维场景状态，来自激光雷达的占用提供无需人工标签的重建目标；模型既估计当前缺失几何，也预测未来占用，使预训练特征同时包含空间结构与交通参与者运动。随后为运动预测、多相机三维检测和语义场景补全分别微调下游任务头。nuScenes 实验报告占用 IoU、视频全景质量、检测和语义补全指标，并考察减少三维标注时的表现；比较覆盖单目及多相机预训练，分析时间预测、占用目标、数据规模和迁移设计。

applications: Label-efficient pretraining for autonomous-driving perception and forecasting

name: TesserAct
title: TesserAct: Learning 4D Embodied World Models

summary.en: TesserAct learns an embodied four-dimensional world model from manipulation videos augmented with depth and surface normals. A video generator predicts RGB, depth, and normal sequences conditioned on observations, language, and robot behavior. Geometry-aware spatial and temporal consistency losses align the modalities across viewpoints and time. The generated future is also used to train an inverse-dynamics model that maps predicted scene evolution back to robot actions. Experiments span synthetic and real manipulation datasets, evaluating visual generation, depth and normal accuracy, temporal consistency, action prediction, and task execution. Comparisons include two-dimensional video world models and geometry-aware alternatives; ablations vary the added modalities, consistency objectives, data construction, conditioning, and inverse-dynamics interface.
summary.zh: TesserAct 从补充了深度和表面法线的操作视频中学习具身四维世界模型。视频生成器依据观测、语言和机器人行为预测 RGB、深度与法线序列，几何感知的空间和时间一致性损失使多种模态在视角与时间上对齐。生成的未来还用于训练逆动力学模型，把预测的场景演化转换回机器人动作。实验覆盖合成与真实操作数据，评估视觉生成、深度和法线精度、时间一致性、动作预测及任务执行；比较二维视频世界模型和几何方法，消融新增模态、一致性目标、数据构造、条件及逆动力学接口。

applications: Geometry-aware prediction and control for robot manipulation

name: IR-WM
title: Vision-Centric 4D Occupancy Forecasting and Planning via Implicit Residual World Models

summary.en: IR-WM represents a driving scene in bird’s-eye-view and forecasts only what changes. Camera features form the current BEV state, while the previous state supplies a temporal prior. An implicit residual module predicts action-conditioned feature differences rather than reconstructing the entire future, and an occupancy head decodes the resulting four-dimensional scene. The forecast can supervise trajectory learning or filter candidate plans. Experiments evaluate vision-centric occupancy forecasting and motion planning with occupancy IoU, trajectory displacement, collision, and latency measures. Comparisons cover full-state, voxel, and BEV world models. Ablations examine residual prediction, temporal priors, ego actions, occupancy supervision, candidate filtering, decoupled planning, forecast horizons, and alternative uses of the predicted state.
summary.zh: IR-WM 在鸟瞰空间表示驾驶场景，并只预测发生变化的部分。相机特征形成当前鸟瞰状态，上一时刻状态提供时间先验；隐式残差模块预测动作条件下的特征差，而非重建完整未来，占用头再解码四维场景。预测结果既可监督轨迹学习，也可用于筛选候选规划。实验评估视觉中心占用预测和运动规划，报告占用 IoU、轨迹位移、碰撞与延迟，并比较完整状态、体素和鸟瞰世界模型；消融残差预测、时间先验、自车动作、占用监督、候选筛选、解耦规划、预测跨度及预测状态的不同用法。

applications: Efficient occupancy forecasting and autonomous-driving planning

name: GIM-World
title: Geometry-Aware Implicit Memory for Video World Models

summary.en: GIM-World gives a controllable video world model a compact geometry-aware memory. A transformer compresses a variable-length observation history into a fixed set of tokens. During training, a camera-queryable geometry head distills three-dimensional structure into those tokens, and a pruning rule removes redundant history while bounding memory cost. The geometry teacher is absent at inference; the retained state conditions future video generation during long paths and revisits. Experiments on MIND measure geometric consistency, appearance preservation, pose adherence, and generation quality across increasing horizons. Comparisons include frame retrieval, online reconstruction, and other implicit memories. Ablations vary geometry supervision, query cameras, token count, pruning, history length, and the interface between memory and video generator.
summary.zh: GIM-World 为可控视频世界模型提供紧凑的几何感知记忆。Transformer 把可变长度观测历史压缩为固定数量的记忆标记；训练时由可查询相机的几何头把三维结构蒸馏进这些标记，并通过剪枝规则删除冗余历史、限制记忆开销。推理时不再使用几何教师，保留的状态用于条件化长路径和重访中的未来视频生成。MIND 实验随时间跨度增加评估几何一致性、外观保持、位姿遵循和生成质量，并比较帧检索、在线重建及其他隐式记忆；消融几何监督、查询相机、标记数量、剪枝、历史长度和记忆接口。

applications: Long-horizon camera-controlled video world simulation

name: MosaicMem
title: MosaicMem: Hybrid Spatial Memory for Controllable Video World Models

summary.en: MosaicMem combines explicit localization and implicit generation for spatially persistent video worlds. Selected image patches are lifted into three dimensions, indexed by camera geometry, and retrieved for a queried view. A patch-and-compose interface injects the aligned evidence through the video model’s native attention, preserving prompt-driven motion and object changes. PRoPE supplies finer camera-pose control. The same memory supports revisits, minute-scale navigation, direct scene editing, and autoregressive rollout. Experiments evaluate pose adherence, visual consistency, dynamic evolution, and generation quality against explicit reconstruction and implicit-memory baselines, including a revisit benchmark with scene changes. Ablations vary patch selection, lifting, retrieval, composition, pose encoding, memory size, and dynamic conditioning.
summary.zh: MosaicMem 在具有空间持续性的视频世界中结合显式定位与隐式生成。选定图像块被提升到三维空间并按相机几何建立索引，查询新视角时检索相应内容；patch-and-compose 接口通过视频模型原生注意力注入对齐证据，同时保留提示驱动的运动和物体变化，PRoPE 提供更精细的相机位姿控制。同一记忆支持重访、分钟级导航、直接场景编辑和自回归展开。实验在含动态变化的重访基准上比较显式重建与隐式记忆，评估位姿遵循、视觉一致性、动态演化和生成质量；消融图块选择、提升、检索、组合、位姿编码和记忆规模。

applications: Persistent controllable video generation and scene editing

name: DriveDreamer4D
title: DriveDreamer4D: World Models Are Effective Data Machines for 4D Driving Scene Representation

summary.en: DriveDreamer4D turns a driving world model into training data for a dynamic four-dimensional scene representation. Structured conditions describing road layout, objects, and ego maneuvers guide the generation of videos along trajectories not present in the captured sequence. These synthesized observations complement real sensor frames when optimizing static and dynamic Gaussian components, allowing the reconstructed scene to render lane changes, acceleration, deceleration, and other viewpoints. Experiments on driving sequences evaluate novel-trajectory image quality, spatial-temporal agent consistency, and perceptual preference using FID, NTA-IoU, and user studies. Comparisons include Gaussian and neural sensor simulators; ablations analyze world-model data, structured controls, dynamic decomposition, trajectory diversity, and reconstruction stages.
summary.zh: DriveDreamer4D 把驾驶世界模型生成的内容用于训练动态四维场景表示。道路布局、交通物体和自车机动等结构化条件引导模型生成原始采集序列中不存在的轨迹视频；这些合成观测与真实传感器帧共同优化静态及动态高斯组件，使重建场景能够渲染变道、加速、减速和其他视角。驾驶序列实验通过 FID、NTA-IoU 和用户研究评估新轨迹图像质量、交通参与者时空一致性与感知偏好，并比较高斯及神经传感器模拟器；消融世界模型数据、结构化控制、动态分解、轨迹多样性和重建阶段。

applications: Closed-loop novel-trajectory driving sensor simulation

name: PERSIST
title: Beyond Pixel Histories: World Models with Persistent 3D State

summary.en: PERSIST simulates an interactive environment by maintaining a latent three-dimensional state rather than relying only on recent video frames. The model factorizes the world into an environment representation, camera state, and renderer. User actions update the camera and environment, and rendered guidance frames condition the next video generation step. Because the state persists beyond the native context window, changes outside the current view can be retained, revisited, visualized, and edited. Experiments use diverse Luanti voxel worlds and long action trajectories, measuring generation quality, geometry, revisit consistency, temporal stability, and state accuracy. Comparisons use pixel-history and memory baselines; ablations vary 3D guidance, state updates, rendering, context length, supervision, and editable initialization.
summary.zh: PERSIST 通过持续维护潜在三维状态来模拟交互环境，而不只依赖最近的视频帧。模型把世界分解为环境表示、相机状态和渲染器；用户动作更新相机与环境，渲染出的引导帧再条件化下一步视频生成。由于状态可跨越模型原生上下文窗口，当前视野之外的变化能够被保留、重访、可视化和编辑。实验使用多样的 Luanti 体素世界与长动作轨迹，评估生成质量、几何、重访一致性、时间稳定性和状态精度，并比较像素历史与记忆基线；消融三维引导、状态更新、渲染、上下文长度、监督及可编辑初始化。

applications: Persistent interactive voxel-world video simulation

name: LiveWorld
title: LiveWorld: Simulating Out-of-Sight Dynamics in Generative Video World Models

summary.en: LiveWorld models events that continue while the camera looks elsewhere. It factorizes a scene into a static three-dimensional background and active entities maintained by a monitor-centric state. Camera controls determine the rendered view, while the entity model advances unobserved actors and events independently of visibility. When a region is revisited, the video generator conditions on their updated state rather than their last observed appearance. The accompanying LiveBench protocol tests controlled departures, elapsed time, returns, and persistent event outcomes. Experiments report event accuracy, revisit consistency, geometry, video quality, and long-horizon behavior against observation-memory and video-world-model baselines. Ablations examine factorization, monitoring, fast-forward schedules, background state, entity updates, and rendering conditions.
summary.zh: LiveWorld 建模相机移开后仍会继续发生的事件。方法把场景分为静态三维背景和由监控中心状态维护的活动实体；相机控制决定渲染视角，而实体模型独立于可见性推进未观察的参与者与事件。相机重访某一区域时，视频生成器依据更新后的状态，而不是最后一次看到的外观。配套 LiveBench 通过受控离开、时间流逝、返回和持续事件结果进行测试。实验比较观测记忆及视频世界模型，报告事件准确率、重访一致性、几何、视频质量和长时行为；消融场景分解、监控、快进计划、背景状态、实体更新及渲染条件。

applications: Persistent dynamic video-world simulation across revisits

name: 3D-Belief
title: 3D-Belief: Embodied Belief Inference via Generative 3D World Modeling

summary.en: 3D-Belief frames world modeling as belief inference under partial observability. Incoming views are fused into an explicit three-dimensional scene state, while a generative completion model predicts plausible content for unseen regions and updates those hypotheses as new evidence arrives. The representation can be rendered from unobserved viewpoints and queried for objects, relations, and navigable goals. It therefore connects persistent spatial memory with contextual reasoning and embodied navigation. Experiments evaluate two-dimensional image imagination, three-dimensional reconstruction and completion, spatial question answering, and object navigation across simulated indoor environments. Comparisons include generative view models and mapping systems; ablations examine belief updates, explicit geometry, completion, uncertainty, observation count, camera selection, and the interface to the navigation policy.
summary.zh: 3D-Belief 把世界建模表述为部分可观测条件下的信念推断。输入视角被融合为显式三维场景状态，生成式补全模型为未观察区域预测可能内容，并在获得新证据时更新这些假设。该表示可从未见视角渲染，也能查询物体、关系和可导航目标，从而连接持续空间记忆、语境推理与具身导航。实验在室内仿真环境中评估二维图像想象、三维重建与补全、空间问答和目标导航，并比较生成视图模型及建图系统；消融信念更新、显式几何、补全、不确定性、观测数量、相机选择和导航策略接口。

applications: Generative spatial belief for embodied reasoning and navigation

name: PreWorld
title: Semi-Supervised Vision-Centric 3D Occupancy World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: PreWorld learns a vision-centric occupancy world model with a two-stage supervision scheme. During pretraining, camera features form three-dimensional attribute fields whose rendered depth, semantics, and color are matched to two-dimensional or sensor-derived targets. Supervised fine-tuning then produces semantic occupancy and forecasts its future evolution, with the resulting state supporting a motion-planning head. This design uses large image-LiDAR collections before requiring dense occupancy labels. Experiments on Occ3D-nuScenes report 3D occupancy mIoU and RayIoU, four-dimensional forecasting, trajectory error, collision, and performance across reduced-label settings. Comparisons cover fully supervised and pretraining methods; ablations study each rendered attribute, pretraining data, fine-tuning scale, temporal module, occupancy supervision, and planning connection.
summary.zh: PreWorld 以两阶段监督学习视觉中心占用世界模型。预训练时，相机特征形成三维属性场，并把渲染出的深度、语义和颜色与二维或传感器目标对齐；监督微调随后产生语义占用并预测其未来演化，所得状态连接运动规划头。这样可以先利用大规模图像—激光雷达集合，再使用稠密占用标签。Occ3D-nuScenes 实验报告三维占用 mIoU 与 RayIoU、四维预测、轨迹误差、碰撞及不同标注比例下的结果，并比较全监督与预训练方法；消融各渲染属性、预训练数据、微调规模、时间模块、占用监督和规划连接。

applications: Label-efficient occupancy forecasting and driving planning

name: GeoWorld-VLM
title: GeoWorld-VLM: Geometry from World Models for Vision-Language Models

summary.en: GeoWorld-VLM transfers geometric structure learned by a video world model into a vision-language model. A frozen camera-conditioned world model supplies intermediate visual features for the same image and prompt. Training aligns the VLM image encoder and multimodal projector to those features while an anchor preserves its original representation; the language model remains frozen, and the teacher is unnecessary at inference. The resulting visual tokens are used to answer spatial-relation questions involving depth, direction, proximity, and containment. Experiments cover multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks with Gemma and InternVL backbones, reporting overall and relation-specific accuracy. Comparisons use task-only tuning and static DINO features; ablations vary teacher layer, camera/prompt conditioning, alignment position, anchor strength, and trainable modules.
summary.zh: GeoWorld-VLM 把视频世界模型学到的几何结构迁移到视觉语言模型。冻结的相机条件世界模型针对同一图像与提示产生中间视觉特征，训练时只让 VLM 图像编码器和多模态投影器对齐这些特征，并用锚定项保留原表示；语言模型保持冻结，推理时也不需要教师。所得视觉标记用于回答深度、方向、邻近和包含等空间关系问题。实验在多个空间推理基准上使用 Gemma 与 InternVL 骨干，报告总体及关系级准确率，并比较仅任务微调和静态 DINO 特征；消融教师层、相机与提示条件、对齐位置、锚定强度和可训练模块。

applications: World-model-informed spatial reasoning in vision-language models

name: OccLLaMA
title: OccLLaMA: An Occupancy-Language-Action Generative World Model for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: OccLLaMA represents driving perception, language, and action in one autoregressive world model. A vector-quantized tokenizer compresses three-dimensional semantic occupancy into discrete tokens. These tokens are interleaved with text and trajectory representations, allowing the transformer to predict future occupancy, answer questions about the scene, and generate driving actions from a shared context. The sequence interface also exposes how candidate actions relate to subsequent world states. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate four-dimensional occupancy forecasting, motion planning, and visual question answering, reporting occupancy IoU, trajectory displacement, collision, and answer accuracy. Comparisons include occupancy predictors, planning models, and multimodal language systems; ablations vary tokenization, modality order, forecasting targets, language supervision, action tokens, and joint-task training.
summary.zh: OccLLaMA 在一个自回归世界模型中统一驾驶感知、语言与动作。向量量化分词器把三维语义占用压缩为离散标记，再与文本及轨迹表示交错输入 Transformer，使模型能够从共享上下文预测未来占用、回答场景问题并生成驾驶动作。序列接口也显式连接候选动作与后续世界状态。nuScenes 实验评估四维占用预测、运动规划和视觉问答，报告占用 IoU、轨迹位移、碰撞和回答准确率，并比较占用预测器、规划模型及多模态语言系统；消融分词、模态顺序、预测目标、语言监督、动作标记和多任务联合训练。

applications: Unified driving forecasting, reasoning, and planning

name: 3D4D
title: 3D4D: An Interactive, Editable, 4D World Model via 3D Video Generation

summary.en: 3D4D is an interactive visualization system that converts image or text input into an editable four-dimensional scene. Its pipeline combines generative content creation with a Gaussian scene representation rendered through WebGL and Supersplat. Temporal elements and camera movement form a navigable 4D experience, while multimodal user controls modify the view and generated content. A foveated strategy concentrates rendering work near the user’s focus to support real-time interaction. The paper presents the four system modules, their data flow, browser integration, and demonstrations of scene creation, exploration, and editing from static prompts. The official NOVA page provides the interactive examples and implementation entry for reproducing the presented workflow.
summary.zh: 3D4D 是把图像或文本输入转换为可编辑四维场景的交互可视化系统。流程结合生成式内容创建与高斯场景表示，并通过 WebGL 和 Supersplat 渲染；时间元素和相机运动形成可导航的四维体验，多模态用户控制可修改视角及生成内容。注视点渲染策略把计算集中在用户关注区域，以支持实时交互。论文说明四个系统模块、数据流与浏览器集成，并展示从静态提示创建、探索和编辑场景的流程；官方 NOVA 页面提供交互示例及实现入口。

applications: Browser-based interactive generation and editing of 4D scenes

name: Delta-Triplane Transformers
title: Delta-Triplane Transformers as Occupancy World Models

summary.en: Delta-Triplane Transformers model driving futures as changes in a compact occupancy representation. A pretrained encoder maps three-dimensional semantic occupancy onto three orthogonal latent planes. Temporal triplanes provide the recent state, and multi-scale transformers predict plane-wise residuals for future steps. A decoder reconstructs four-dimensional occupancy, while sparse queries drawn from that forecast condition the motion planner. Experiments evaluate occupancy forecasting, trajectory planning, and runtime, reporting mIoU, displacement, collision, and frames per second. Comparisons cover voxel, variational-latent, and occupancy world models. Ablations study triplane resolution, delta versus full-state prediction, temporal context, transformer scales, decoder training, forecast horizons, planning queries, and the balance between forecasting accuracy and computation.
summary.zh: Delta-Triplane Transformers 把驾驶未来建模为紧凑占用表示中的变化。预训练编码器将三维语义占用映射到三个正交潜在平面，时间三平面提供近期状态，多尺度 Transformer 预测未来各步的平面残差。解码器重建四维占用，并从预测结果提取稀疏查询来条件化运动规划器。实验评估占用预测、轨迹规划和运行速度，报告 mIoU、位移、碰撞与每秒帧数，并比较体素、变分潜在及占用世界模型；消融三平面分辨率、残差与完整状态预测、时间上下文、Transformer 尺度、解码器训练、预测跨度和规划查询。

applications: Real-time occupancy forecasting and autonomous-driving planning

name: LiDARCrafter
title: LiDARCrafter: Dynamic 4D World Modeling from LiDAR Sequences

summary.en: LiDARCrafter is a controllable world model for dynamic four-dimensional LiDAR scenes. A structured scene graph specifies road layout, object classes, boxes, trajectories, and requested edits. A multi-branch diffusion model separates scene context, dynamic actors, and controls, then autoregressively generates temporally coherent point-cloud sequences. Users can synthesize layouts or insert, delete, and move agents to construct driving situations, including safety-critical cases. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate several levels of fidelity, controllability, and temporal consistency, together with scene-editing accuracy and downstream data use. Comparisons include LiDAR generation and simulation systems; ablations vary graph conditions, diffusion branches, autoregressive context, editing controls, temporal modeling, and data scale.
summary.zh: LiDARCrafter 是生成动态四维激光雷达场景的可控世界模型。结构化场景图描述道路布局、物体类别、边界框、轨迹和编辑要求，多分支扩散模型分别处理场景上下文、动态参与者与控制，再自回归生成时间一致的点云序列。用户能够合成布局，或插入、删除、移动交通参与者，从而构造包括安全关键情形在内的驾驶场景。nuScenes 实验按多个层级评估保真度、可控性和时间一致性，并测试场景编辑精度与下游数据用途；比较激光雷达生成及模拟系统，消融图条件、扩散分支、上下文、编辑控制、时间建模和数据规模。

applications: Controllable LiDAR simulation and editing for autonomous driving

name: Foundational LiDAR World Models
title: Towards foundational LiDAR world models with efficient latent flow matching

summary.en: This work develops a transferable LiDAR world model around efficient latent flow matching. A high-compression variational autoencoder maps point-cloud occupancy into a compact latent state, and a conditional flow-matching model predicts its temporal evolution. The pretrained dynamics are fine-tuned across outdoor and indoor scenes, sparse- and dense-beam sensors, and nonsemantic or semantic occupancy targets. Experiments form a systematic transfer matrix over three domain shifts and multiple data budgets, reporting reconstruction, forecasting accuracy, semantic occupancy, training cost, and inference efficiency. Comparisons include training from scratch and generative LiDAR predictors. Ablations examine compression ratio, VAE adaptation, flow objectives, conditioning, pretraining scale, fine-tuning data, sensor beams, and semantic transfer.
summary.zh: 该工作围绕高效潜在流匹配构建可迁移激光雷达世界模型。高压缩率变分自编码器把点云占用映射为紧凑潜在状态，条件流匹配模型预测其时间演化；预训练动力学随后在室外与室内、稀疏与稠密波束传感器以及无语义和语义占用目标之间微调。实验针对三类领域变化和多种数据预算建立系统迁移矩阵，报告重建、预测、语义占用、训练成本与推理效率，并比较从头训练及生成式激光雷达预测器；消融压缩率、VAE 适配、流目标、条件、预训练规模、微调数据、波束和语义迁移。

applications: Transferable LiDAR forecasting across sensors and domains

name: RoboFlow4D
title: RoboFlow4D: A Lightweight Flow World Model Toward Real-Time Flow-Guided Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: RoboFlow4D unifies three-dimensional motion prediction and robot manipulation planning in a lightweight model. From visual observations and a language instruction, it directly predicts several future 3D scene-flow fields describing how task-relevant points should move. A compact action policy conditions on this flow plan and current observation, forming an observation–planning–execution loop that updates as the scene changes. The interface avoids reconstructing separate object, depth, and tracking modules at deployment. Experiments cover simulated and real manipulation tasks, reporting task success, inference speed, model size, and flow accuracy. Comparisons include modular flow planners and vision-language-action policies; ablations vary temporal horizon, 3D supervision, language conditioning, flow representation, policy coupling, and feedback frequency.
summary.zh: RoboFlow4D 用轻量模型统一三维运动预测与机器人操作规划。给定视觉观测和语言指令，模型直接预测多个未来三维场景流，描述任务相关点应如何运动；紧凑动作策略依据流计划与当前观测执行，形成随场景变化持续更新的观测—规划—执行闭环，部署时无需分别运行物体、深度和跟踪模块。实验覆盖仿真与真实操作任务，报告任务成功率、推理速度、模型规模和流精度，并比较模块化流规划器及视觉语言动作策略；消融时间跨度、三维监督、语言条件、流表示、策略耦合和反馈频率。

applications: Real-time flow-guided robotic manipulation

name: Mirage
title: Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models

summary.en: Mirage equips a video world model with a persistent spatial cache in diffusion-latent space. Instead of storing RGB colors and repeatedly rendering, encoding, and decoding them, it associates the model’s own latent features with three-dimensional world points. For each camera query, one latent-resolution projection retrieves aligned memory and conditions the next generated chunk; newly observed features then extend the cache. The same state supports controlled camera motion and revisits over long rollouts. Experiments on RealEstate10K and WorldScore measure reconstruction, spatial consistency, video quality, generation speed, and memory use. Comparisons include RGB point-cloud caches and implicit memories; ablations vary latent layer, projection, cache growth, chunk length, camera path, and feature aggregation.
summary.zh: Mirage 为视频世界模型建立位于扩散潜在空间的持续三维缓存。方法不存储 RGB 颜色并反复渲染、编码和解码，而是把模型自身的潜在特征关联到三维世界点。每次查询相机视角时，只需一次潜在分辨率投影即可取回对齐记忆并条件化下一段生成，新观测特征随后扩展缓存；同一状态支持长时间相机控制和重访。RealEstate10K 与 WorldScore 实验评估重建、空间一致性、视频质量、生成速度和内存，并比较 RGB 点云缓存与隐式记忆；消融潜在层、投影、缓存增长、片段长度、相机路径和特征聚合。

applications: Efficient spatially persistent video-world generation

name: GaussianDream
title: GaussianDream: A Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian World Model for Robotic Manipulation

summary.en: GaussianDream adds a feed-forward three-dimensional Gaussian world state to language-conditioned manipulation. Training reconstructs the observed scene as Gaussian primitives using RGB, depth, and scene-flow targets, then predicts how that state changes at several future horizons along robot trajectories. The resulting compact representation is inserted as a prefix for vision-language-action decoding. Auxiliary reconstruction and future-prediction heads provide dense supervision during training and are removed for action inference. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboCasa Human-50, and real robots report manipulation success and computational efficiency across diverse tasks. Comparisons cover two-dimensional VLAs, 3D-enhanced policies, and video world models; ablations examine Gaussian targets, depth, flow, horizons, prefix design, auxiliary heads, and data scale.
summary.zh: GaussianDream 为语言条件操作加入前馈三维高斯世界状态。训练时利用 RGB、深度和场景流目标把观测重建为高斯基元，并预测该状态沿机器人轨迹在多个未来时间点的变化；所得紧凑表示作为前缀输入视觉语言动作解码器。辅助重建和未来预测头在训练中提供稠密监督，动作推理时被移除。LIBERO、RoboCasa Human-50 与真实机器人实验报告多类任务的操作成功率和计算效率，并比较二维 VLA、三维增强策略及视频世界模型；消融高斯目标、深度、流、预测跨度、前缀设计、辅助头和数据规模。

applications: Efficient 3D world modeling for robot manipulation

name: P3Sim
title: Perceptual 3D Simulation With Physical World Modeling

summary.en: P3Sim predicts a visual scene after a requested but incomplete three-dimensional transformation. A learned physical world model autoregressively generates future frames, while a geometric conditioning module converts partial camera or object motion signals into depth- and flow-related guidance. A persistent memory carries scene content across the rollout, enabling the model to combine one initial image with local transformations and interaction cues. Demonstrations cover camera motion, rigid object movement, contact, and multi-step scene dynamics. Experiments evaluate visual fidelity, transformation adherence, geometry, physical event consistency, and long-horizon preservation against image-to-video and geometry-conditioned baselines. Ablations separate the physical model, depth and optical flow, transformation encoding, persistent memory, autoregressive context, and different levels of 3D input completeness.
summary.zh: P3Sim 预测场景在给定但不完整的三维变换后会如何呈现。学习到的物理世界模型自回归生成未来帧，几何条件模块把局部相机或物体运动信号转换为深度与光流相关引导，持续记忆在展开过程中保存场景内容，使模型能从单张初始图像结合局部变换和交互线索。演示覆盖相机运动、刚体移动、接触及多步场景动力学。实验比较图生视频和几何条件基线，评估视觉保真、变换遵循、几何、物理事件一致性和长时保持；消融物理模型、深度与光流、变换编码、持续记忆、上下文和三维输入完整度。

applications: Image-based simulation of camera and object transformations

name: NeoVerse
title: NeoVerse: Enhancing 4D World Model with in-the-wild Monocular Videos

summary.en: NeoVerse builds a four-dimensional world model from diverse monocular videos without requiring camera poses during input. A feed-forward reconstruction network estimates dynamic Gaussian geometry, and an online degradation strategy creates training pairs from ordinary videos. The reconstructed state conditions a video generator that follows novel camera trajectories while preserving dynamic scene content. The same model supports reconstruction, trajectory-controlled generation, editing, and additional visual applications. Training combines eighteen public datasets spanning indoor, outdoor, object, and dynamic scenes. Experiments report novel-view reconstruction, video quality, geometric and temporal consistency, camera control, and transfer to downstream tasks. Comparisons include 4D reconstruction and video-world models; ablations examine data mixture, pose handling, degradation, Gaussian state, generation stages, and trajectory conditions.
summary.zh: NeoVerse 从多样单目视频构建四维世界模型，输入时不要求相机位姿。前馈重建网络估计动态高斯几何，在线退化策略从普通视频构造训练对；重建状态条件化视频生成器，使其沿新相机轨迹运动时保持动态场景内容。同一模型支持重建、轨迹控制生成、编辑和其他视觉应用。训练混合十八个室内、室外、物体与动态场景数据集。实验评估新视角重建、视频质量、几何与时间一致性、相机控制及下游迁移，并比较四维重建和视频世界模型；消融数据组合、位姿处理、退化、高斯状态、生成阶段和轨迹条件。

applications: Scalable 4D reconstruction and camera-controlled generation

name: 3WM
title: Unified 3D Scene Understanding Through Physical World Modeling

summary.en: 3WM unifies several three-dimensional understanding tasks as prompt-selected inference paths through one physical world model. A shared visual representation and generative backbone accept an image plus task and geometric conditions, then produce depth, a novel camera view, or a scene in which a specified object has been manipulated. Joint training lets reconstruction, geometry, and editing supervision share the same state rather than using separate task models. Experiments cover depth-estimation and novel-view datasets together with a new real-image object-editing benchmark. Evaluation reports depth accuracy, PSNR, LPIPS, perceptual quality, and Edit Adherence to object boundaries and transformations. Comparisons use specialist models; ablations vary joint data, prompts, geometric signals, inference pathways, and task transfer.
summary.zh: 3WM 把多种三维理解任务统一为同一物理世界模型中的提示选择推理路径。共享视觉表示和生成骨干接收图像、任务及几何条件，随后输出深度、新相机视角，或对指定物体完成操作后的场景。联合训练使重建、几何和编辑监督共享同一状态，而不必使用独立任务模型。实验覆盖深度估计、新视角数据集以及新的真实图像物体编辑基准，报告深度精度、PSNR、LPIPS、感知质量和衡量边界及变换遵循的 Edit Adherence，并比较专用模型；消融联合数据、提示、几何信号、推理路径和任务迁移。

applications: Prompt-driven depth, view synthesis, and 3D scene editing

name: AHEAD
title: Intercepting the Future: Latent-Space Predictive World Model for Dynamic VLA Manipulation

summary.en: AHEAD augments a frozen vision-language-action model with a small predictive wrapper for moving-object manipulation. It estimates patch-level motion from recent observations, selects an interception horizon from the measured dynamics, and uses conditional flow matching to forecast VLA feature tokens at that future time. The unchanged action decoder then plans from the predicted state rather than the latest camera frame. Parallel samples keep prediction within the control latency budget. Experiments include simulation and five physical xArm tasks involving moving containers, objects, paddles, balls, and projectiles across several speeds. Evaluation reports success, speed sensitivity, forecasting error, and runtime. Ablations examine motion masks, horizon adaptation, kinematic conditioning, sample count, flow steps, and latent versus pixel prediction.
summary.zh: AHEAD 为冻结的视觉语言动作模型增加小型预测封装，以处理运动物体操作。它从近期观测估计图块级运动，根据动力学选择拦截时间，并用条件流匹配预测该未来时刻的 VLA 特征标记；原有动作解码器随后依据预测状态而非最新相机帧进行规划，并行采样使预测保持在控制延迟预算内。实验包含仿真及五类 xArm 动态任务，涉及移动容器、物体、球拍、球和抛射物，并改变运动速度。评估报告成功率、速度敏感性、预测误差与运行时间；消融运动掩码、时间自适应、运动学条件、样本数、流步数及潜在与像素预测。

applications: Predictive interception for dynamic VLA manipulation

name: VideoREPA
title: VideoREPA: Learning Physics for Video Generation through Relational Alignment with Foundation Models

summary.en: VideoREPA teaches a text-to-video diffusion model physical relations by distilling a video foundation model. Rather than aligning individual features, its Token Relation Distillation loss matches relations among tokens within each frame and across time, transferring spatial structure and dynamics while preserving the generator’s native representation. The method fine-tunes CogVideoX on open-domain video without requiring explicit physical annotations. Experiments probe physics understanding on Physion and generated-video behavior on VideoPhy and VideoPhy2, reporting semantic adherence, physical commonsense, and standard quality measures. Comparisons include the original generator, feature-level REPA, and physics-oriented tuning. Ablations vary teacher models, spatial versus temporal relations, alignment strength, layers, data, and loss combinations.
summary.zh: VideoREPA 通过视频基础模型蒸馏，让文本生成视频扩散模型学习物理关系。Token Relation Distillation 不直接对齐单个特征，而是匹配帧内标记关系和跨时间关系，在保留生成器原有表示的同时迁移空间结构与动力学。方法在开放领域视频上微调 CogVideoX，无需显式物理标注。实验在 Physion 上探测物理理解，并在 VideoPhy 与 VideoPhy2 上评估生成视频，报告语义遵循、物理常识及常规质量指标；比较原始生成器、特征级 REPA 和物理定向微调，消融教师模型、空间与时间关系、对齐强度、层、数据和损失组合。

applications: Physics-aware text-to-video world generation

name: LingBot-VA
title: Causal World Modeling for Robot Control

summary.en: LingBot-VA unifies visual dynamics and robot actions as one autoregressive diffusion sequence. A Mixture-of-Transformers processes interleaved continuous video and action tokens, and flow matching generates the next chunk conditioned on all preceding observations and controls. The same model can imagine future video from actions, infer actions between visual states, or repeatedly integrate camera feedback for closed-loop manipulation. Pretraining mixes internet video with robot trajectories before task adaptation. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0, LIBERO, and physical robots evaluate success, long-horizon memory, deformable and precision tasks, novel configurations, and few-shot data efficiency. Comparisons include VLA policies and world-action models; ablations vary modality order, pretraining sources, temporal context, diffusion, and feedback.
summary.zh: LingBot-VA 把视觉动力学和机器人动作统一为一个自回归扩散序列。Mixture-of-Transformers 处理交错的连续视频与动作标记，流匹配依据此前观测和控制生成下一片段。同一模型可由动作想象未来视频、根据视觉状态反推动作，也可持续接收相机反馈完成闭环操作。预训练混合互联网视频与机器人轨迹，再进行任务适配。RoboTwin 2.0、LIBERO 和真实机器人实验评估成功率、长时记忆、柔性与精密任务、新配置泛化和少样本效率，并比较 VLA 策略及世界动作模型；消融模态顺序、预训练来源、时间上下文、扩散和反馈。

applications: Unified world prediction and closed-loop robot manipulation

name: STICA
title: Object-Centric World Models for Causality-Aware Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: STICA learns reinforcement-learning dynamics as interacting object slots. A slot autoencoder separates entities from static background, and a transformer predicts each object’s next latent state from the current slots, action, and reward context. The policy and value networks use causal attention over these tokens, focusing their decisions on task-relevant objects while imagined rollouts provide model-based training data. Experiments evaluate Point and Car tasks in Safety Gym and two- and three-dimensional Object-Centric Visual RL environments, reporting normalized return, final performance, and sample efficiency. Comparisons include DreamerV3, TD-MPC2, and transformer world models. Ablations examine slot decomposition, background removal, object dynamics, causal attention, imagination, token interactions, and actor/critic sharing.
summary.zh: STICA 把强化学习动力学表示为相互作用的物体槽。槽自编码器把实体与静态背景分离，Transformer 根据当前物体槽、动作和奖励上下文预测各物体的下一潜在状态；策略与价值网络对这些标记施加因果注意力，使决策聚焦任务相关物体，并利用想象展开提供基于模型的训练数据。实验评估 Safety Gym 的 Point、Car 任务以及二维和三维物体中心视觉强化学习环境，报告归一化回报、最终表现与样本效率，并比较 DreamerV3、TD-MPC2 和 Transformer 世界模型；消融槽分解、背景移除、物体动力学、因果注意力、想象、标记交互和网络共享。

applications: Causality-aware control in object-rich environments

name: COMET
title: Better Decisions through the Right Causal World Model

summary.en: COMET extracts an interpretable causal world model from visual reinforcement-learning trajectories. It detects objects and their properties in rendered frames, uses symbolic regression to map those properties to relevant internal environment variables, then fits equations describing how each variable changes with other states and agent actions. Semantic inference labels the resulting object-centric transition graph, which can be inspected, edited, and executed as a simulator. Experiments in JAX Atari Pong and Freeway compare extracted equations with known RAM dynamics and test interventions on relevant variables, state updates, and simulated trajectories. Analyses cover mapping precision, symbolic complexity, execution speed, and discovered shortcuts. Component studies examine object discovery, regression search, state selection, action terms, and semantic filtering.
summary.zh: COMET 从视觉强化学习轨迹中提取可解释因果世界模型。它在渲染帧中检测物体及属性，使用符号回归把这些属性映射到相关环境内部变量，再拟合各变量如何随其他状态和智能体动作变化的方程；语义推断为所得物体中心转移图加上含义，使其能够检查、编辑并作为模拟器执行。JAX Atari 的 Pong 与 Freeway 实验把提取方程同已知 RAM 动力学比较，并对相关变量、状态更新和模拟轨迹进行干预测试；分析映射精度、符号复杂度、执行速度和发现的决策捷径，并考察物体发现、回归搜索、状态选择、动作项和语义筛选。

applications: Interpretable causal transition extraction for visual RL

name: WM3C
title: Modeling Unseen Environments with Language-guided Composable Causal Components in Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: WM3C learns a world model from causal components named by language and recombines them for new tasks. Text descriptions identify factors such as a manipulation verb and object, while a latent dynamics model separates their transition mechanisms under actions. At test time, known components can be composed into an unseen environment and rolled out in imagination, providing states for reinforcement-learning policy adaptation even before observations from that combination are available. Experiments use controlled numerical systems and Meta-World robot manipulation with eighteen training tasks and nine novel combinations or mixtures. Evaluation reports latent-component identification, transition prediction, imagined-policy return, and task success. Comparisons include causal representation methods, DreamerV3, and TD-MPC2; ablations vary language, factorization, composition, unknown components, and data.
summary.zh: WM3C 从语言命名的因果组件学习世界模型，并为新任务重新组合这些组件。文本描述标识操作动词、物体等因素，潜在动力学模型在动作条件下分离各因素的转移机制；测试时可把已知组件组合成未见环境并进行想象展开，在尚无该组合观测前就为强化学习策略适配提供状态。实验采用受控数值系统和 Meta-World 机器人操作，包含十八个训练任务及九个新组合或混合任务。评估报告潜在组件识别、转移预测、想象策略回报和任务成功率，并比较因果表征方法、DreamerV3 与 TD-MPC2；消融语言、因果分解、组合、未知组件和数据量。

applications: Language-guided transfer to unseen robot-control environments

name: Meta-Causal World Model
title: Curious Causality-Seeking Agents Learn Meta Causal World

summary.en: This work represents an open-ended environment with a Meta-Causal Graph. Each latent meta state activates a causal subgraph describing which variables and actions determine the next state, while transitions between meta states capture changes in the governing mechanism. A Curious Causality-Seeking Agent selects interventions using an information-oriented reward and verifies the resulting effects, jointly learning the subgraphs and their activation conditions. Experiments use synthetic systems with shifting causal rules and a robot-arm manipulation task containing unseen contexts. Evaluation reports graph recovery, transition prediction, subgraph identification, task return, and generalization. Comparisons include dense, modular, graph, and static-causal dynamics models; ablations test curiosity, intervention verification, graph capacity, meta-state count, exploration budget, and context shifts.
summary.zh: 该工作用元因果图表示开放环境。每个潜在元状态激活一个因果子图，描述哪些变量和动作决定下一状态；元状态之间的转移则刻画支配机制如何变化。Curious Causality-Seeking Agent 依据面向信息的奖励选择干预并验证结果，从而联合学习各子图及其激活条件。实验采用因果规则会变化的合成系统和包含未见情境的机器人手臂操作任务，评估图恢复、转移预测、子图识别、任务回报与泛化，并比较稠密、模块化、图模型和静态因果动力学；消融好奇心奖励、干预验证、图容量、元状态数量、探索预算和情境变化。

applications: Causal exploration and adaptation in changing environments

name: DreamerPro
title: DreamerPro: Reconstruction-Free Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with Prototypical Representations

summary.en: DreamerPro learns an action-conditioned latent world model without reconstructing pixels. An online encoder maps observations to features and assigns them to learned prototypes, while a slowly updated target encoder supplies temporally consistent assignments for nearby frames. These prototype objectives train the recurrent state-space dynamics to preserve task-relevant structure. The agent then rolls the model forward under candidate actions and trains its actor and critic entirely from imagined trajectories, following the Dreamer control interface. Experiments on DeepMind Control Suite tasks evaluate return with clean observations and natural-video backgrounds, including changing and unseen distractions. Comparisons cover reconstruction-based Dreamer and contrastive models; ablations vary prototypes, target updates, temporal pairing, augmentations, reconstruction, and dynamics losses.
summary.zh: DreamerPro 学习无需像素重建的动作条件潜在世界模型。在线编码器把观测映射为特征并分配到学习到的原型，缓慢更新的目标编码器为相邻帧提供时间一致的原型分配，这些目标训练循环状态空间动力学保留任务相关结构。智能体随后在候选动作下展开模型，并完全利用想象轨迹训练 actor 与 critic，沿用 Dreamer 的控制接口。DeepMind Control Suite 实验评估干净观测、自然视频背景以及变化和未见干扰下的回报，并比较重建式 Dreamer 与对比模型；消融原型、目标更新、时间配对、增强、重建和动力学损失。

applications: Visual model-based control under changing backgrounds

name: DINO-world
title: Back to the Features: DINO as a Foundation for Video World Models

summary.en: DINO-world predicts future visual features rather than pixels. A frozen DINOv2 encoder supplies semantically structured frame tokens, and a scalable transformer learns their temporal evolution from more than sixty million uncurated videos with varying resolution, frame rate, and context length. Task heads decode the predicted features for segmentation and depth forecasting, while probes assess intuitive physical events. The predictor can also be fine-tuned on observation-action trajectories and used to simulate candidate controls in latent space for planning. Experiments span driving, indoor, simulated, and physical-interaction datasets, reporting feature prediction and downstream task measures. Comparisons and ablations examine model/data scale, encoder features, horizons, context, sampling rate, action conditioning, and planning objectives.
summary.zh: DINO-world 预测未来视觉特征而不是像素。冻结的 DINOv2 编码器提供具有语义结构的帧标记，可扩展 Transformer 从超过六千万条不同分辨率、帧率与上下文长度的无筛选视频中学习其时间演化。任务头把预测特征解码为分割和深度，探针评估直觉物理事件；预测器还可在观测—动作轨迹上微调，并在潜在空间模拟候选控制用于规划。实验覆盖驾驶、室内、仿真与物理交互数据，报告特征预测和下游任务指标；比较与消融模型及数据规模、编码特征、跨度、上下文、采样率、动作条件和规划目标。

applications: General video forecasting and action-conditioned latent planning

name: InfiniCube
title: InfiniCube: Unbounded and Controllable Dynamic 3D Driving Scene Generation with World-Guided Video Models

summary.en: InfiniCube creates large dynamic driving environments through a sequence of explicit world representations. A map-conditioned generator autoregressively extends semantic voxel geometry beyond a fixed scene boundary. HD maps, vehicle boxes, trajectories, and text control the layout. A world-guided video model adds appearance while respecting the voxel state, and a dynamic 3D Gaussian stage converts the generated observations into a renderable scene with moving agents. Experiments use Waymo Open Dataset geometry and images, evaluating voxel quality, scene extent, video fidelity, camera-path adherence, vehicle control, temporal consistency, and novel-view rendering. Comparisons cover 3D scene generators and driving video models; ablations isolate each representation, guidance source, dynamic component, and extension strategy.
summary.zh: InfiniCube 通过一系列显式世界表示创建大规模动态驾驶环境。地图条件生成器自回归扩展语义体素几何，使场景不受固定边界限制；高精地图、车辆框、轨迹和文本共同控制布局。世界引导视频模型在遵循体素状态的同时补充外观，动态三维高斯阶段再把生成观测转换为含运动参与者的可渲染场景。实验使用 Waymo Open Dataset 的几何与图像，评估体素质量、场景范围、视频保真、相机路径遵循、车辆控制、时间一致性和新视角渲染，并比较三维场景生成器及驾驶视频模型；消融各表示、引导来源、动态组件和扩展策略。

applications: Controllable large-scale dynamic driving-scene generation

name: Geometry Forcing
title: Geometry Forcing: Marrying Video Diffusion and 3D Representation for Consistent World Modeling

summary.en: Geometry Forcing trains a video diffusion world model to internalize three-dimensional structure. A frozen geometry foundation model processes the training frames, and two auxiliary objectives align selected diffusion features with its representation: angular alignment preserves relational direction, while scale alignment transfers geometric magnitude. The losses accompany the ordinary video objective and add no teacher at inference. The resulting model supports autoregressive generation conditioned on camera motion or environment actions. Experiments evaluate visual fidelity, long-rollout stability, camera control, action response, depth, correspondence, and three-dimensional consistency on video-world datasets. Comparisons include pixel-only diffusion and representation-alignment baselines; ablations vary teacher layers, student blocks, alignment terms, weights, conditioning type, horizon, and training scale.
summary.zh: Geometry Forcing 训练视频扩散世界模型内化三维结构。冻结的几何基础模型处理训练帧，两项辅助目标把选定扩散特征与其表示对齐：角度对齐保留关系方向，尺度对齐迁移几何幅度；这些损失与常规视频目标共同训练，推理时无需教师。所得模型支持相机运动或环境动作条件下的自回归生成。实验在视频世界数据上评估视觉保真、长展开稳定性、相机控制、动作响应、深度、对应关系和三维一致性，并比较仅像素扩散与表征对齐基线；消融教师层、学生模块、对齐项、权重、条件类型、跨度和训练规模。

applications: Geometry-consistent interactive video world modeling

name: Cosmos-Predict2.5 & Transfer2.5
title: World Simulation with Video Foundation Models for Physical AI

summary.en: The Cosmos 2.5 report presents video foundation models for physical-world simulation. Cosmos-Predict2.5 uses one flow-based architecture for text-, image-, and video-conditioned future generation, with Cosmos-Reason1 supplying detailed physical and linguistic grounding. Post-training adds instruction alignment, long video, multiview camera output, and robot action conditioning. Cosmos-Transfer2.5 injects structural controls such as segmentation, depth, edges, maps, and driving layouts while preserving appearance. Training uses two hundred million curated video clips and task-specific data. Evaluations cover general video quality, instruction following, physical behavior, robotics, autonomous-driving simulation, multiview consistency, and control. The report also details data curation, model scaling, reinforcement-learning refinement, inference, safety filters, and ablations.
summary.zh: Cosmos 2.5 技术报告介绍面向物理世界模拟的视频基础模型。Cosmos-Predict2.5 用统一流架构完成文本、图像和视频条件的未来生成，并由 Cosmos-Reason1 提供细粒度物理与语言落地；后训练加入指令对齐、长视频、多视角相机输出和机器人动作条件。Cosmos-Transfer2.5 注入分割、深度、边缘、地图和驾驶布局等结构控制，同时保持外观。训练使用两亿条筛选视频及任务数据。评估覆盖通用视频质量、指令遵循、物理行为、机器人、自动驾驶模拟、多视角一致性和控制，并详细报告数据整理、模型扩展、强化学习优化、推理、安全过滤与消融。

applications: General physical-AI, robotics, and driving world simulation

name: MotionStream
title: MotionStream: Real-Time Video Generation with Interactive Motion Controls

summary.en: MotionStream turns motion-conditioned video generation into a causal interactive stream. A bidirectional teacher learns joint text and local track guidance, including camera and object motion. Self Forcing distills it into a student trained on its own rolling outputs. An attention sink and rolling key-value cache preserve context while bounding computation, allowing indefinite generation with sub-second response and up to twenty-nine frames per second on one GPU. Experiments cover camera paths, dragged points, object motion, and mixed controls, reporting video quality, trajectory adherence, temporal consistency, latency, throughput, and long-run stability. Comparisons include offline and streaming generators; ablations examine teacher guidance, distillation, cache length, attention sink, rollout training, controls, and chunk size.
summary.zh: MotionStream 把运动条件视频生成变为因果交互流。双向教师联合学习文本与局部轨迹引导，包括相机和物体运动；Self Forcing 再让学生在自身滚动输出上训练。注意力汇聚标记和滚动键值缓存既保留上下文又限制计算，使单张 GPU 上可持续生成，并达到亚秒响应和最高每秒二十九帧。实验覆盖相机路径、拖拽点、物体运动和混合控制，报告视频质量、轨迹遵循、时间一致性、延迟、吞吐及长时稳定性，并比较离线与流式生成器；消融教师引导、蒸馏、缓存长度、注意力汇聚、展开训练、控制和片段大小。

applications: Real-time interactive camera and object motion generation

name: Scalable Policy Evaluation with Video World Models
title: Scalable Policy Evaluation with Video World Models

summary.en: Scalable Policy Evaluation with Video World Models estimates robot-policy quality through generated action-conditioned rollouts. Pretrained video predictors are adapted to receive robot observations and action sequences, then simulate the visual outcome of executing a candidate policy. Task-success judges and value estimators score those futures, allowing policies to be ranked without resetting and running every trial on physical hardware. Experiments include synthetic environments and real manipulation datasets with multiple policies and tasks. Evaluation measures ranking agreement, correlation between predicted and real policy values, success prediction, rollout quality, and calibration. Studies vary pretraining, dataset diversity, action conditioning, horizon, judge design, and model scale, and analyze categories of prediction behavior that affect evaluation reliability.
summary.zh: Scalable Policy Evaluation with Video World Models 通过生成动作条件展开来估计机器人策略质量。预训练视频预测器经适配后接收机器人观测与动作序列，模拟候选策略执行后的视觉结果；任务成功判断器和价值估计器为这些未来评分，从而无需在真实硬件上反复重置并运行每个试验即可排序策略。实验包含仿真环境和真实操作数据集中的多种策略与任务，评估排序一致性、预测与真实策略价值相关性、成功预测、展开质量和校准；研究预训练、数据多样性、动作条件、跨度、判断器设计与模型规模，并分析会影响评测可靠性的预测行为类别。

applications: World-model-based evaluation of robot manipulation policies

name: RealWonder
title: RealWonder: Real-Time Physical Action-Conditioned Video Generation

summary.en: RealWonder generates video responses to continuous physical actions in real time. It reconstructs approximate scene geometry and material properties from one image, executes forces, torques, gripper commands, or camera motion in a physics simulator, and converts the simulated result into RGB and optical-flow guidance. A streaming video model then renders the visual consequence while the user continues interacting. Demonstrations span rigid objects, deformable bodies, fluids, granular materials, robotic manipulation, and viewpoint changes. Experiments evaluate action adherence, motion and physical consistency, visual quality, latency, and frame rate against action-conditioned and geometry-guided video systems. Ablations vary reconstruction, simulator signals, flow/RGB guidance, streaming design, material estimates, and action types.
summary.zh: RealWonder 实时生成连续物理动作对应的视频反馈。它从单张图像估计场景几何与材料属性，在物理模拟器中执行力、力矩、夹爪命令或相机运动，再把模拟结果转换为 RGB 与光流引导；流式视频模型随后渲染视觉后果，同时允许用户继续交互。演示覆盖刚体、柔性体、流体、颗粒材料、机器人操作和视角变化。实验比较动作条件及几何引导视频系统，评估动作遵循、运动与物理一致性、视觉质量、延迟和帧率；消融重建、模拟器信号、光流与 RGB 引导、流式设计、材料估计和动作类型。

applications: Interactive physical video simulation for robotics and AR/VR

name: PhysGen
title: PhysGen: Rigid-Body Physics-Grounded Image-to-Video Generation

summary.en: PhysGen turns a static image and a specified physical intervention into a temporally coherent video. An image-understanding stage estimates object masks, depth, geometry, material, mass, friction, and support. A rigid-body simulator applies the requested force or torque and produces image-space trajectories, contacts, visibility, and motion cues. These signals condition a video diffusion model that renders appearance throughout the simulated event. Experiments cover falling, collision, rolling, sliding, and compound object interactions from varied images. Evaluation measures physical plausibility, trajectory and condition adherence, temporal consistency, perceptual video quality, and human preference against image-to-video and motion-guided baselines. Ablations examine scene parsing, physical parameters, simulator output, occlusion, diffusion conditioning, and sampling.
summary.zh: PhysGen 把静态图像和指定物理干预转换为时间连贯视频。图像理解阶段估计物体掩码、深度、几何、材料、质量、摩擦与支撑关系；刚体模拟器施加所给的力或力矩，产生图像空间轨迹、接触、可见性和运动线索，再由视频扩散模型依据这些信号渲染整个事件的外观。实验覆盖不同图像中的下落、碰撞、滚动、滑动和复合物体交互，比较图生视频与运动引导基线，评估物理合理性、轨迹及条件遵循、时间一致性、感知视频质量和人工偏好；消融场景解析、物理参数、模拟输出、遮挡、扩散条件和采样。

applications: Controllable rigid-body image-to-video generation

name: FIERY
title: FIERY: Future Instance Prediction in Bird's-Eye View from Surround Monocular Cameras

summary.en: FIERY predicts probabilistic futures of traffic participants directly from surround monocular video. Camera features are lifted into three dimensions, pooled into a bird’s-eye-view grid, and aligned through known ego motion over time. A temporal model forms the current scene state, while a variational latent samples possible futures. Decoders produce future instance segmentation, centers, offsets, and motion, from which non-parametric trajectories can be recovered. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate semantic IoU, video panoptic quality, instance recognition, motion accuracy, and the diversity and calibration of multiple futures over several horizons. Comparisons include image-view, BEV, deterministic, and stochastic prediction systems; ablations vary cameras, temporal context, ego-motion alignment, latent sampling, losses, and output heads.
summary.zh: FIERY 直接从环视单目视频预测交通参与者的概率未来。相机特征被提升到三维空间、汇聚成鸟瞰网格，并利用已知自车运动跨时间对齐；时间模型形成当前场景状态，变分潜变量采样多种可能未来。解码器输出未来实例分割、中心、偏移和运动，可由此恢复非参数轨迹。nuScenes 实验在多个时间跨度上评估语义 IoU、视频全景质量、实例识别、运动精度以及多未来的多样性与校准，并比较图像视角、鸟瞰、确定性和随机预测系统；消融相机数量、时间上下文、自车对齐、潜变量采样、损失和输出头。

applications: Multimodal traffic-agent forecasting for autonomous driving

name: C-SWM
title: Contrastive Learning of Structured World Models

summary.en: Contrastively-trained Structured World Models learn object dynamics from raw images without reconstructing pixels. A convolutional extractor produces object masks and slot embeddings, and a graph neural network models pairwise relations among those slots. Given an action, the transition model predicts each object’s next latent state. A contrastive objective brings predicted and observed states together while separating unrelated states, encouraging a compact compositional representation. Experiments use grid-world and physics-based pushing environments with varying objects, relations, and action effects. Evaluation reports one- and multi-step prediction, state retrieval, object correspondence, transfer to new object counts, and planning behavior. Comparisons and ablations examine reconstruction, graph interactions, slots, negative sampling, action encoding, rollout length, and compositional generalization.
summary.zh: Contrastively-trained Structured World Models 从原始图像学习物体动力学而不重建像素。卷积提取器产生物体掩码和槽嵌入，图神经网络建模槽之间的成对关系；给定动作后，转移模型预测每个物体的下一潜在状态。对比目标使预测状态接近真实观测并远离无关状态，从而形成紧凑可组合表示。实验使用物体数量、关系和动作效果不同的网格世界及物理推动环境，评估单步与多步预测、状态检索、物体对应、新物体数量迁移和规划行为，并比较重建式方法；消融图交互、槽、负采样、动作编码、展开长度和组合泛化。
