applications: Object-centric visual prediction and compositional planning

name: GenAD
title: GenAD: Generative End-to-End Autonomous Driving

summary.en: GenAD formulates autonomous driving as joint generation of the future traffic scene and ego plan. Camera features produce agent and map representations, and a generative trajectory model learns a structural latent prior over plausible motions. It samples multimodal futures for surrounding participants together with the ego vehicle, so high-order interactions enter planning directly rather than through a fixed serial perception–prediction pipeline. A planning head selects the final ego trajectory from the shared future representation. Experiments on nuScenes report planning displacement, collision, prediction quality, and inference efficiency. Comparisons include modular and end-to-end driving systems; ablations examine the generative prior, multimodal sampling, ego-agent coupling, map context, latent dimension, interaction layers, and joint training.
summary.zh: GenAD 把自动驾驶表述为联合生成未来交通场景与自车规划。相机特征产生交通参与者和地图表示，生成式轨迹模型学习合理运动的结构潜在先验，并同时采样周围参与者与自车的多模态未来，使高阶交互直接进入规划，而不是经过固定的感知—预测串行流程。规划头从共享未来表示中选择最终自车轨迹。nuScenes 实验报告规划位移、碰撞、预测质量和推理效率，并比较模块化及端到端驾驶系统；消融生成先验、多模态采样、自车—参与者耦合、地图上下文、潜在维度、交互层和联合训练。

applications: Interaction-aware generative end-to-end autonomous driving

name: AdaptiveDriver
title: Planning with Adaptive World Models for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: AdaptiveDriver plans with a world model that adapts other agents’ behavior to the observed driving context. BehaviorNet uses a graph convolutional network over recent agent histories to predict Intelligent Driver Model control parameters. Those parameters define an ensemble of reactive traffic models rather than fixed future trajectories. A model-predictive controller rolls each ego proposal through the resulting interaction dynamics and scores its safety and progress before execution. Experiments on nuPlan closed-loop Test-14 and Hard scenarios report reactive and nonreactive planning scores, infractions, and city-level generalization, including held-out locations. Comparisons include rule-based, learned, and language-model planners; analyses use city/log oracles and ablate graph features, parameter adaptation, reactivity, history, and MPC costs.
summary.zh: AdaptiveDriver 使用会随当前驾驶情境调整其他参与者行为的世界模型进行规划。BehaviorNet 在近期参与者历史图上运行图卷积网络，预测智能驾驶员模型的控制参数；这些参数构成一组反应式交通模型，而不是固定未来轨迹。模型预测控制器把每个自车候选方案放入交互动力学中展开，在执行前评估安全与进度。nuPlan 闭环 Test-14 和 Hard 场景实验报告反应式与非反应式规划分数、违规及城市级泛化，并包含未见地点；比较规则、学习式和语言模型规划器，通过城市或日志 oracle 分析并消融图特征、参数适配、反应性、历史和 MPC 代价。

applications: Context-adaptive closed-loop motion planning on real driving logs

name: WoTE
title: End-to-End Driving with Online Trajectory Evaluation via BEV World Model

summary.en: WoTE evaluates candidate driving trajectories by imagining their future bird’s-eye-view states. An end-to-end backbone proposes multiple ego trajectories. A trajectory-conditioned BEV world model forecasts how road agents and scene occupancy evolve under each candidate, using supervision available from BEV traffic simulation. A reward model combines imitation agreement with rules and safety signals computed from those predicted futures, then selects the trajectory online. Experiments on NAVSIM and CARLA-based Bench2Drive report predictive driving score, trajectory quality, collisions, route completion, and closed-loop driving score. Comparisons include planning-only and rule-based ranking methods; ablations remove future prediction, trajectory evaluation, individual rewards, multimodal proposals, world-model conditions, and forecast horizons.
summary.zh: WoTE 通过想象候选驾驶轨迹对应的未来鸟瞰状态来进行在线评估。端到端骨干先提出多条自车轨迹，轨迹条件鸟瞰世界模型利用交通模拟可提供的监督，预测每个候选下道路参与者和场景占用如何演化。奖励模型把模仿一致性与从预测未来计算的规则及安全信号结合，再选择执行轨迹。NAVSIM 和基于 CARLA 的 Bench2Drive 实验报告预测驾驶分数、轨迹质量、碰撞、路线完成与闭环驾驶分数，并比较仅规划和规则排序方法；消融未来预测、轨迹评估、各奖励、多模态候选、世界模型条件和预测跨度。

applications: Future-aware online trajectory selection for autonomous driving

name: LatentDriver
title: Learning Multiple Probabilistic Decisions from Latent World Model in Autonomous Driving

summary.en: LatentDriver jointly represents uncertain traffic evolution and uncertain ego decisions. A latent autoregressive world model predicts the next vectorized scene as a mixture distribution. A multilayer Multiple Probabilistic Planner maintains a Gaussian mixture over possible ego actions and progressively refines it using the predicted world state. Samples from intermediate planner layers are returned to the dynamics model, so future prediction is conditioned on plausible current actions before the final deterministic control is chosen. Experiments on Waymax use reactive and nonreactive agents and report closed-loop driving, collision, progress, and expert-comparison measures. Comparisons include imitation and reinforcement-learning planners; ablations vary mixture components, sampling, intermediate feedback, autoregression, uncertainty, planner layers, and world-model coupling.
summary.zh: LatentDriver 联合表示不确定的交通演化与自车决策。潜在自回归世界模型把下一向量化场景预测为混合分布，多层 Multiple Probabilistic Planner 维护可能自车动作的高斯混合，并依据预测世界状态逐层细化；中间层采样动作会反馈给动力学模型，使最终确定性控制选定前的未来预测以合理当前动作作为条件。Waymax 实验同时使用反应式和非反应式参与者，报告闭环驾驶、碰撞、进度及与专家比较指标，并比较模仿与强化学习规划器；消融混合分量、采样、中间反馈、自回归、不确定性、规划层和世界模型耦合。

applications: Uncertainty-aware closed-loop autonomous-driving planning

name: DriveDreamer-2
title: DriveDreamer-2: LLM-Enhanced World Models for Diverse Driving Video Generation

summary.en: DriveDreamer-2 generates customized driving videos from natural-language requests. A large language model converts the request into foreground-agent trajectories. An HD-map generator creates compatible road and background traffic conditions, and the two structured sources jointly control a Unified Multi-View Video Model. Shared temporal and cross-view mechanisms keep synchronized cameras and traffic motion coherent while producing the requested scene. Experiments on driving datasets evaluate image and video fidelity, temporal consistency, view consistency, trajectory and map adherence, scenario diversity, and downstream 3D detection and tracking after synthetic-data training. Comparisons include controllable driving generators; ablations study the LLM interface, trajectory generation, map module, structured controls, multiview sharing, temporal attention, and data augmentation.
summary.zh: DriveDreamer-2 从自然语言请求生成定制驾驶视频。大型语言模型先把请求转换为前景交通参与者轨迹，HD-map 生成器创建兼容的道路与背景交通条件，两类结构化来源共同控制统一多视角视频模型；共享的时间和跨视角机制使同步相机及交通运动保持一致，同时呈现所要求的场景。驾驶数据实验评估图像与视频保真、时间及视角一致性、轨迹和地图遵循、场景多样性，以及使用合成数据训练后的三维检测与跟踪，并比较可控驾驶生成器；消融语言接口、轨迹生成、地图模块、结构条件、多视角共享、时间注意力和数据增强。

applications: User-defined multiview driving video generation

name: Panacea
title: Panacea: Panoramic and Controllable Video Generation for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Panacea generates controllable panoramic video for autonomous-driving data synthesis. Bird’s-eye-view sequences, road maps, three-dimensional boxes, camera parameters, and text conditions specify the intended traffic scene. A decomposed four-dimensional attention design shares information across time and camera views, while a two-stage procedure first learns high-quality multiview images and then temporal evolution. The output includes aligned annotations for perception training. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate image and video fidelity, temporal continuity, cross-view consistency, layout and object control, diversity, and downstream 3D perception using synthetic data. Comparisons cover street-view and multiview generators; ablations vary BEV injection, ControlNet, text, camera embeddings, attention decomposition, training stages, and sampling.
summary.zh: Panacea 为自动驾驶数据合成生成可控全景视频。鸟瞰序列、道路地图、三维边界框、相机参数和文本共同规定目标交通场景；分解的四维注意力在时间与相机视角之间共享信息，两阶段流程先学习高质量多视角图像，再学习时间演化，输出还包含用于感知训练的对齐标注。nuScenes 实验评估图像与视频保真、时间连续性、跨视角一致性、布局和物体控制、多样性及合成数据对下游三维感知的作用，并比较街景及多视角生成器；消融鸟瞰注入、ControlNet、文本、相机嵌入、注意力分解、训练阶段和采样。

applications: Controllable annotated multiview driving-data generation

name: MagicDrive
title: MagicDrive: Street View Generation with Diverse 3D Geometry Control

summary.en: MagicDrive synthesizes street-view images under explicit three-dimensional driving geometry. The diffusion model receives camera intrinsics and extrinsics, a bird’s-eye-view road map, object classes and 3D bounding boxes, and a text description. Specialized encoders project each condition into the image generator, while cross-view attention shares scene information among synchronized cameras. Users can alter viewpoint, road layout, object position, scale, class, weather, and appearance through the corresponding controls. Experiments on nuScenes evaluate image quality, geometric and layout adherence, multiview consistency, controllability, and the effect of synthetic images on 3D detection. Comparisons include BEV- and text-conditioned generators; ablations vary each control, box encoding, camera embedding, cross-view attention, guidance, and data scale.
summary.zh: MagicDrive 在显式三维驾驶几何条件下合成街景图像。扩散模型接收相机内外参、鸟瞰道路地图、物体类别与三维边界框以及文本描述；专用编码器把各条件投影到图像生成器，跨视角注意力在同步相机间共享场景信息。用户可通过相应控制改变视点、道路布局、物体位置、尺度、类别、天气和外观。nuScenes 实验评估图像质量、几何与布局遵循、多视角一致性、可控性以及合成图像对三维检测的作用，并比较鸟瞰与文本条件生成器；消融各控制、边界框编码、相机嵌入、跨视角注意力、引导和数据规模。

applications: Geometry-controlled multiview street-scene synthesis

name: LidarDM
title: LidarDM: Generative LiDAR Simulation in a Generated World

summary.en: LidarDM generates temporally coherent LiDAR sequences by separating world creation from sensor observation. A layout-conditioned latent diffusion model builds the three-dimensional scene, including road structure and dynamic actors. Their trajectories evolve through time, and a LiDAR observation model casts sensor measurements into the generated world to produce a four-dimensional point-cloud video. Scenario conditions permit controlled driving layouts and agent motion. Experiments on autonomous-driving datasets evaluate point-cloud realism, temporal coherence, layout consistency, diversity, and agreement with sensor statistics. Generated sequences are also used to train and test perception models. Comparisons include LiDAR generators and simulation systems; ablations study layout conditioning, world representation, dynamic agents, temporal generation, ray simulation, and data scale.
summary.zh: LidarDM 通过分离世界创建与传感器观测来生成时间连贯的激光雷达序列。布局条件潜在扩散模型构建包含道路结构和动态参与者的三维场景，参与者轨迹随时间演化，激光雷达观测模型再向生成世界投射传感器测量，产生四维点云视频；场景条件可控制驾驶布局和参与者运动。自动驾驶数据实验评估点云真实度、时间连贯性、布局一致性、多样性及传感器统计，并把生成序列用于训练和测试感知模型。比较涵盖激光雷达生成器与模拟系统，消融布局条件、世界表示、动态参与者、时间生成、射线模拟和数据规模。

applications: Generative LiDAR simulation for driving perception

name: UniPi
title: Learning Universal Policies via Text-Guided Video Generation

summary.en: UniPi represents a policy as a text-conditioned video generator. Given the current observation and a language task, a diffusion model imagines a sequence of frames that reaches the goal. An inverse-dynamics model converts consecutive predicted frames into actions, and the system can replan from new observations during execution. Because visual plans share a generative representation, tasks, subgoals, embodiments, and internet videos can be combined without requiring one monolithic action label space. Experiments evaluate compositional subgoal generalization, multi-task control, data scaling, web-video transfer, and physical robot manipulation. Comparisons include imitation and goal-conditioned policies; ablations vary text, video pretraining, plan horizon, inverse dynamics, replanning, task mixture, and generated-plan sampling.
summary.zh: UniPi 把策略表示为文本条件视频生成器。给定当前观测和语言任务，扩散模型想象一段到达目标的帧序列，逆动力学模型把相邻预测帧转换为动作，执行过程中还可依据新观测重新规划。由于视觉计划共享生成表示，任务、子目标、不同机器人形态和互联网视频能够组合，而无需统一成一个庞大的动作标签空间。实验评估组合子目标泛化、多任务控制、数据扩展、网络视频迁移和真实机器人操作，并比较模仿与目标条件策略；消融文本、视频预训练、规划跨度、逆动力学、重规划、任务组合和生成计划采样。

applications: Universal language-conditioned visual planning and control

name: Cosmos Policy
title: Cosmos Policy: Fine-Tuning Video Models for Visuomotor Control and Planning

summary.en: Cosmos Policy adapts a pretrained video world model into a robot policy in one post-training stage. Robot actions, proprioceptive state, expected return, and future images are encoded as latent frames and generated inside Cosmos-Predict2’s existing diffusion process, without adding a separate action architecture. The model can execute its action output directly or sample several action–future–value bundles and select the highest-valued plan. Past policy rollouts can further refine its dynamics and value estimates. Experiments on LIBERO, RoboCasa, and real bimanual manipulation report success across tasks, objects, and layouts. Comparisons include diffusion policies, video-based policies, and VLAs; ablations examine pretrained initialization, output modalities, value prediction, future frames, rollout data, sample count, and model-based selection.
summary.zh: Cosmos Policy 通过一次后训练把预训练视频世界模型适配为机器人策略。机器人动作、本体状态、预期回报和未来图像都编码为潜在帧，并在 Cosmos-Predict2 原有扩散过程中共同生成，无需增加独立动作架构。模型既可直接执行动作输出，也可采样多组动作—未来—价值并选择最高价值计划；过去的策略展开还能继续改进动力学和价值估计。LIBERO、RoboCasa 与真实双臂操作实验报告不同任务、物体和布局下的成功率，并比较扩散策略、视频策略与 VLA；消融预训练初始化、输出模态、价值预测、未来帧、展开数据、样本数和基于模型的选择。

applications: Video-model-based visuomotor control and planning

name: RynnVLA-002
title: RynnVLA-002: A Unified Vision-Language-Action and World Model

zh: 统一视觉语言动作世界

summary.en: RynnVLA-002 integrates a vision-language-action policy and video world model in one multimodal architecture. Text, observations, future video, and robot actions enter a shared transformer, with generative heads trained to predict both control and visual consequences. World prediction supplies temporal and physical structure to action learning, while robot trajectories ground the video model in executable interactions. The model can therefore act, imagine, and use their joint representation during closed-loop execution. Experiments evaluate LIBERO simulation and physical LeRobot tasks, reporting manipulation success, world-generation quality, transfer, and the change from adding each objective. Comparisons include stand-alone VLA and world models; ablations vary shared layers, training order, data mixtures, future horizon, action loss, and generation supervision.
summary.zh: RynnVLA-002 在一个多模态架构中整合视觉语言动作策略与视频世界模型。文本、观测、未来视频和机器人动作进入共享 Transformer，生成头同时学习控制和视觉后果；世界预测为动作学习提供时间与物理结构，机器人轨迹则让视频模型落地到可执行交互。模型因而能在闭环执行中共同利用行动、想象和共享表示。实验评估 LIBERO 仿真与真实 LeRobot 任务，报告操作成功率、世界生成质量、迁移及加入各目标后的变化，并比较独立 VLA 与世界模型；消融共享层、训练顺序、数据混合、未来跨度、动作损失和生成监督。

applications: Unified robot action and future-video generation

name: VideoVLA
title: VideoVLA: Video Generators Can Be Generalizable Robot Manipulators

summary.en: VideoVLA turns a pretrained video generator into a language-conditioned robot manipulator. From the current observation and instruction, it jointly predicts a visual future depicting the intended task and an action sequence expected to produce that future. The shared video representation supplies motion and physical priors, while action supervision grounds the imagination in robot control. Experiments span simulation and real hardware, including novel tasks, objects, backgrounds, camera settings, and skills transferred from other embodiments. Evaluation reports task success, action accuracy, video quality, and the correlation between imagined outcomes and execution. Comparisons include vision-language-action and video-policy systems; ablations vary video pretraining, joint objectives, future horizon, action head, data scale, and imagination sampling.
summary.zh: VideoVLA 把预训练视频生成器转换为语言条件机器人操作器。根据当前观测和指令，模型联合预测表现目标任务的视觉未来，以及预计能实现该未来的动作序列；共享视频表示提供运动与物理先验，动作监督则使想象落地到机器人控制。实验覆盖仿真与真实硬件，包括新任务、物体、背景、相机设置以及从其他机器人形态迁移的技能。评估报告任务成功率、动作精度、视频质量和想象结果与实际执行的相关性，并比较视觉语言动作与视频策略系统；消融视频预训练、联合目标、未来跨度、动作头、数据规模和想象采样。

applications: Generalizable visual-imagination-based robot manipulation

name: mimic-video
title: mimic-video: Video-Action Models for Generalizable Robot Control Beyond VLAs

summary.en: mimic-video grounds robot control in the latent plans of a pretrained video diffusion model. Given an observation and instruction, the frozen backbone samples a future visual trajectory in its compact representation. Intermediate features from that trajectory condition an inverse-dynamics decoder that produces low-level actions, so multimodal long-horizon planning remains in the video model while action decoding focuses on realizing one selected future. The design avoids generating full videos during policy inference. Experiments span single-arm, bimanual, and dexterous manipulation in simulation and physical environments, reporting success, sample efficiency, convergence, and generalization. Comparisons include VLA and video-action policies; ablations examine frozen versus tuned backbones, latent layers, visual-plan noise, horizon, decoder capacity, demonstrations, and sampling.
summary.zh: mimic-video 把机器人控制建立在预训练视频扩散模型的潜在计划上。给定观测与指令，冻结骨干在紧凑表示中采样未来视觉轨迹，轨迹的中间特征条件化逆动力学解码器以产生低层动作；多模态长时规划由视频模型承担，动作解码只需实现选定未来，策略推理时无需完整渲染视频。实验覆盖仿真和真实环境中的单臂、双臂与灵巧操作，报告成功率、样本效率、收敛和泛化，并比较 VLA 及视频动作策略；消融冻结与微调骨干、潜在层、视觉计划噪声、跨度、解码容量、示范数量和采样。

applications: Sample-efficient video-action robot control

name: World-Env
title: World-Env: Leveraging World Model as a Virtual Environment for VLA Post-Training

zh: 视觉语言动作虚拟环境

summary.en: World-Env replaces physical trial-and-error during VLA post-training with a learned virtual environment. Its action-conditioned video simulator predicts future observations from the robot’s proposed controls, with geometry features from VGGT injected to preserve scene structure. A vision-language reflector compares generated states with the instruction, supplies continuous task reward, and terminates a rollout as soon as the goal is recognized. The policy is then optimized through reinforcement learning on these resettable synthetic interactions. Experiments use LIBERO suites and four physical manipulation tasks with as few as five or ten demonstrations, reporting success, data efficiency, and transfer. Comparisons and ablations examine geometry injection, simulator tuning, reflector reward, termination, rollout length, demonstration count, and post-training steps.
summary.zh: World-Env 用学习到的虚拟环境替代 VLA 后训练中的真实试错。动作条件视频模拟器根据机器人候选控制预测未来观测，并注入 VGGT 几何特征以保持场景结构；视觉语言反思器比较生成状态与指令，提供连续任务奖励，并在识别到目标完成时立即终止展开。策略随后在可重置的合成交互中进行强化学习优化。实验使用 LIBERO 套件和四个真实操作任务，每项只需五到十条示范，报告成功率、数据效率与迁移，并比较和消融几何注入、模拟器微调、反思奖励、终止、展开长度、示范数量和后训练步数。

applications: World-model-based reinforcement post-training for robot VLAs

name: VLA-RFT
title: VLA-RFT: Vision-Language-Action Reinforcement Fine-Tuning with Verified Rewards in World Simulators

summary.en: VLA-RFT fine-tunes a vision-language-action policy through trajectories generated by a learned world simulator. The simulator is trained on real robot interactions and predicts future visual observations conditioned on a proposed action sequence. Each synthetic rollout is compared with a goal-achieving reference trajectory to obtain a dense, action-aligned verified reward. GRPO then updates the policy without repeated physical interaction. Experiments evaluate manipulation under standard and perturbed conditions, reporting task success, optimization steps, sample use, recovery, and retry behavior. Comparisons include supervised fine-tuning and simulator-based reinforcement learning. Ablations vary world-model conditioning, reward components, reference frames, rollout horizon, GRPO grouping, perturbations, data scale, and the number of fine-tuning iterations.
summary.zh: VLA-RFT 利用学习到的世界模拟器生成轨迹，对视觉语言动作策略进行强化微调。模拟器由真实机器人交互训练，根据候选动作序列预测未来视觉观测；每条合成展开与成功参考轨迹比较，得到稠密且与动作对齐的验证奖励，GRPO 随后无需反复真实交互即可更新策略。实验在标准与扰动条件下评估操作，报告任务成功率、优化步数、样本使用、恢复和重试行为，并比较监督微调及基于模拟器的强化学习；消融世界模型条件、奖励项、参考帧、展开跨度、GRPO 分组、扰动、数据规模和微调迭代数。

applications: Efficient world-model reinforcement fine-tuning for VLA policies

name: ABot-PhysWorld
title: ABot-PhysWorld: Interactive World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Physics Alignment

summary.en: ABot-PhysWorld is a fourteen-billion-parameter video world model for action-controlled robot manipulation. Its training corpus contains three million curated manipulation clips, balanced across robots, tasks, scenes, and interaction types and annotated with physics-aware captions. A diffusion transformer receives visual context, language, and robot actions. Vision–action alignment training connects controls to motion, and preference optimization reinforces physical event consistency. The model generates trajectory previews for unseen robot–task–scene combinations. Experiments use PBench and the newly introduced EZSbench, which mixes real and synthetic zero-shot cases. Evaluation separates action controllability, physical realism, visual quality, and generalization. Comparisons include large video models; ablations vary curation, captions, action representations, alignment, preference data, scale, and sampling.
summary.zh: ABot-PhysWorld 是面向动作控制机器人操作的 140 亿参数视频世界模型。训练语料包含三百万条经筛选的操作视频，在机器人、任务、场景和交互类型上保持平衡，并带有物理感知描述。扩散 Transformer 接收视觉上下文、语言和机器人动作，视觉—动作对齐训练把控制连接到运动，偏好优化强化物理事件一致性；模型可为未见的机器人—任务—场景组合生成轨迹预览。实验使用 PBench 及新提出、混合真实与合成零样本情形的 EZSbench，分别评估动作可控性、物理真实度、视觉质量和泛化，并比较大型视频模型；消融数据整理、描述、动作表示、对齐、偏好数据、规模和采样。

applications: Physics-aware interactive robot-manipulation simulation

name: VLMaps
title: Visual Language Maps for Robot Navigation

summary.en: VLMaps builds an open-vocabulary spatial memory for language-guided navigation. RGB-D observations are projected into a geometric map, and pretrained visual-language features are fused at the corresponding world locations. At query time, text descriptions retrieve spatial regions without a fixed semantic label set. Language instructions can combine objects, landmarks, spatial relations, and route constraints; the resulting goal and obstacle maps feed a conventional navigation planner. Experiments in simulated indoor environments and on a physical robot evaluate goal localization, instruction completion, navigation success, and path efficiency across seen and novel categories. Comparisons include geometric and closed-set semantic maps; ablations vary feature encoders, fusion, map resolution, language parsing, viewpoint coverage, and goal selection.
summary.zh: VLMaps 为语言引导导航构建开放词汇空间记忆。RGB-D 观测被投影到几何地图，预训练视觉语言特征融合到对应世界位置；查询时，文本描述无需固定语义标签集即可检索空间区域。语言指令可组合物体、地标、空间关系和路线约束，生成的目标图与障碍图再交给常规导航规划器。仿真室内环境和真实机器人实验评估目标定位、指令完成、导航成功率及路径效率，覆盖已见与新类别，并比较几何及封闭类别语义地图；消融特征编码器、融合、地图分辨率、语言解析、视角覆盖和目标选择。

applications: Open-vocabulary language-guided robot navigation

name: CLIP-Fields
title: CLIP-Fields: Weakly Supervised Semantic Fields for Robotic Memory

summary.en: CLIP-Fields represents a robot’s environment as a continuous semantic field. A coordinate network maps each three-dimensional location to embeddings aligned with CLIP, Detic, and Sentence-BERT supervision gathered from posed RGB-D observations. The field stores open-vocabulary semantics, object-instance identity, and scene-specific visual information without manual scene labels. Text, image, or instance queries can then retrieve positions, segment objects, identify repeated instances, and localize a camera view, providing a compact memory for later navigation and interaction. Experiments on indoor scans evaluate semantic segmentation, instance identification, spatial text retrieval, and view localization against feature grids and supervised maps. Ablations vary foundation-model supervision, coordinate encoding, fusion, field capacity, observations, and query combinations.
summary.zh: CLIP-Fields 把机器人环境表示为连续语义场。坐标网络将每个三维位置映射到与 CLIP、Detic 和 Sentence-BERT 监督对齐的嵌入，这些监督来自带位姿的 RGB-D 观测。场在无需人工场景标签的情况下保存开放词汇语义、物体实例身份和场景特有视觉信息。文本、图像或实例查询可检索位置、分割物体、识别重复实例并定位相机视角，为后续导航与交互提供紧凑记忆。室内扫描实验比较特征网格和监督地图，评估语义分割、实例识别、空间文本检索及视角定位；消融基础模型监督、坐标编码、融合、场容量、观测数量和查询组合。

applications: Open-vocabulary spatial memory and localization for robots

name: ConceptGraphs
title: ConceptGraphs: Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Graphs for Perception and Planning

summary.en: ConceptGraphs builds a compact open-vocabulary scene graph while a robot explores. Object masks and visual-language features from RGB-D frames are associated across views and fused into three-dimensional object nodes. Captions describe each node, and geometric tests add spatial relations, producing a graph that can be updated online and queried with free-form language. The representation supports object search, localization, scene understanding, navigation, and task planning without storing dense features at every map point. Experiments on indoor scans and robot deployments evaluate object retrieval, semantic association, graph quality, mapping efficiency, and downstream planning. Comparisons include dense open-vocabulary maps; ablations vary detections, feature fusion, association thresholds, captions, relation construction, and graph updates.
summary.zh: ConceptGraphs 在机器人探索过程中建立紧凑开放词汇场景图。RGB-D 帧中的物体掩码和视觉语言特征跨视角关联并融合为三维物体节点，描述文本说明各节点，几何检测加入空间关系，形成可在线更新并用自由语言查询的图。该表示无需在每个地图点保存稠密特征，即可支持物体搜索、定位、场景理解、导航和任务规划。室内扫描与机器人部署实验评估物体检索、语义关联、图质量、建图效率和下游规划，并比较稠密开放词汇地图；消融检测、特征融合、关联阈值、描述、关系构建和图更新。

applications: Open-vocabulary 3D mapping for robot perception and planning

name: DREAMWALKER
title: DREAMWALKER: Mental Planning for Continuous Vision-Language Navigation

summary.en: DREAMWALKER gives a continuous vision-language navigation agent a discrete model for mental planning. Visual observations and navigable locations are encoded as structured states, with learned transitions describing the consequences of movement actions. Before acting, the agent synthesizes several instruction-conditioned action sequences, rolls them through the model, evaluates their predicted states and goal progress, and executes the selected segment before replanning. The imagined futures also expose the intention behind each decision. Experiments on VLN-CE evaluate success, path length, navigation error, SPL, and interpretation of imagined plans against model-free and planning baselines. Ablations vary state abstraction, transition learning, rollout depth, candidate count, scoring, instruction grounding, and replanning frequency.
summary.zh: DREAMWALKER 为连续视觉语言导航智能体提供用于心理规划的离散模型。视觉观测与可通行位置被编码为结构化状态，学习到的转移描述移动动作的后果。执行前，智能体合成多条指令条件动作序列，在模型中展开并评估预测状态与目标进度，执行选定片段后再规划；想象未来也展示每次决策的意图。VLN-CE 实验比较无模型与规划基线，评估成功率、路径长度、导航误差、SPL 和想象计划的可解释性；消融状态抽象、转移学习、展开深度、候选数量、评分、指令落地和重规划频率。

applications: World-model planning for continuous vision-language navigation

name: SayPlan
title: SayPlan: Grounding Large Language Models Using 3D Scene Graphs for Scalable Robot Task Planning

summary.en: SayPlan grounds language-model task planning in a hierarchical three-dimensional scene graph. Building, floor, room, object, and relation nodes form a compact world state. Given a request, semantic search expands only the relevant graph branches for the LLM, reducing context while preserving spatial and affordance information. A formal verifier checks action preconditions and effects, returns failures to the model, and supports iterative replanning before robot execution. Experiments use large multistory environments and diverse navigation-manipulation instructions, reporting plan correctness, executability, token use, graph reduction, and task completion, including a physical mobile manipulator. Comparisons use flat or text-only scene descriptions; ablations vary hierarchy, semantic search, verification, feedback, graph detail, and replanning.
summary.zh: SayPlan 把语言模型任务规划落地到分层三维场景图。建筑、楼层、房间、物体和关系节点构成紧凑世界状态；收到请求后，语义搜索只展开与任务相关的图分支，既减少上下文又保留空间和可供性信息。形式验证器检查动作前提与效果，把失败反馈给模型，并在机器人执行前支持迭代重规划。实验使用大型多楼层环境和多样导航—操作指令，报告规划正确性、可执行性、标记用量、图压缩和任务完成，并包含真实移动操作机器人；比较平面或纯文本场景描述，消融层级、语义搜索、验证、反馈、图细节和重规划。

applications: Large-scale language task planning for mobile manipulators

name: ReMEmbR
title: ReMEmbR: Building and Reasoning Over Long-Horizon Spatio-Temporal Memory for Robot Navigation

summary.en: ReMEmbR gives a mobile robot a searchable long-horizon spatio-temporal memory. Streaming video is segmented and captioned, and each observation is stored with visual and text embeddings, timestamp, and robot pose. A retrieval layer combines semantic search with structured time and location constraints. The language model reasons over the selected memories to answer where, when, order, and duration questions, or turns a requested remembered event into a navigation goal on the map. Experiments use extended robot deployments and a long-horizon question-answering dataset, reporting answer accuracy, retrieval recall, latency, temporal reasoning, and navigation demonstrations. Comparisons include direct LLM/VLM context; ablations vary captions, embeddings, metadata filters, retrieval size, memory duration, and reasoning prompts.
summary.zh: ReMEmbR 为移动机器人提供可搜索的长时空记忆。流式视频被切分并生成描述，每条观测连同视觉与文本嵌入、时间戳和机器人位姿一起存储；检索层把语义搜索与时间、位置结构约束结合，语言模型依据选出的记忆回答地点、时间、先后和持续时长问题，或把被请求的历史事件转换为地图导航目标。实验使用长时间机器人部署和长时问答数据集，报告回答准确率、检索召回、延迟、时间推理及导航演示，并比较直接 LLM/VLM 上下文；消融描述、嵌入、元数据过滤、检索数量、记忆时长和推理提示。

applications: Long-horizon robot memory, question answering, and navigation

name: BEVBert
title: BEVBert: Multimodal Map Pre-Training for Language-Guided Navigation

summary.en: BEVBert pretrains vision-language navigation on an explicit hybrid map. Local panoramic observations are projected into a metric bird’s-eye-view representation for short-range geometry, while visited locations form a topological graph for long-range history and connectivity. A transformer fuses instruction tokens with both map scales. Masked language, masked map, action prediction, and navigation objectives pretrain the representation before task fine-tuning. Experiments on R2R, R4R, RxR, and REVERIE report navigation error, success, oracle success, SPL, and remote-object grounding across seen and unseen environments. Comparisons include panorama- and graph-based agents; ablations vary local/global maps, BEV construction, pretraining tasks, map history, cross-modal attention, and transfer data.
summary.zh: BEVBert 在显式混合地图上预训练视觉语言导航。局部全景观测被投影为度量鸟瞰表示以保存近距离几何，访问位置则形成拓扑图以记录长程历史与连通性；Transformer 把指令标记与两种地图尺度融合。遮蔽语言、遮蔽地图、动作预测和导航目标先预训练该表示，再针对任务微调。R2R、R4R、RxR 与 REVERIE 实验在已见和未见环境中报告导航误差、成功率、oracle 成功率、SPL 和远程物体落地，并比较全景及图式智能体；消融局部与全局地图、鸟瞰构建、预训练任务、地图历史、跨模态注意力和迁移数据。

applications: Map-based pretraining for vision-language navigation

name: Mobility VLA
title: Mobility VLA: Multimodal Instruction Navigation with Long-Context VLMs and Topological Graphs

summary.en: Mobility VLA studies navigation from multimodal instructions and a previously recorded demonstration tour. The tour is converted into a topological graph whose nodes store views and route context. At deployment, a long-context vision-language model compares live observations with this memory, localizes the robot, interprets text and reference-image instructions, and selects the next graph edge. The persistent graph separates route connectivity from transient camera appearance and supports navigation without a prebuilt metric map. Real-world experiments cover varied indoor routes, instruction types, viewpoints, and environmental changes, reporting task success, goal distance, and path efficiency. Comparisons and ablations test direct VLM actions, shorter context, removal of the graph, tour coverage, localization cues, multimodal prompts, and recovery.
summary.zh: Mobility VLA 研究根据多模态指令和预先录制的示范巡游进行导航。巡游被转换为拓扑图，各节点保存视图和路线上下文；部署时，长上下文视觉语言模型把实时观测与记忆比较，完成定位，理解文本及参考图像指令，并选择下一条图边。持续图把路线连通性与瞬时相机外观分离，无需预建度量地图即可导航。真实世界实验覆盖不同室内路线、指令类型、视点和环境变化，报告任务成功率、目标距离与路径效率；比较和消融 VLM 直接动作、较短上下文、移除图、巡游覆盖、定位线索、多模态提示和恢复。

applications: Real-world navigation from demonstration tours and multimodal goals

name: Spatial Memory for Video World Models
title: Video World Models with Long-Term Spatial Memory

summary.en: Spatial Memory extends a video world model beyond its temporal context with a geometry-grounded record of generated observations. Depth and camera estimates lift frames into a three-dimensional point cloud that is fused as the rollout grows. For each new camera pose, relevant points are rendered back into the queried view and condition the video diffusion model together with current text and motion controls. This allows places to retain appearance after long absences and repeated revisits. Experiments test long navigation paths, loops, and scene returns, reporting generation quality, geometric consistency, identity preservation, pose adherence, and memory efficiency. Comparisons include context-only and memory methods; ablations vary depth, pose, fusion, retrieval, rendered conditioning, memory age, and trajectory length.
summary.zh: Spatial Memory 用几何落地的生成观测记录，把视频世界模型扩展到原生时间上下文之外。深度与相机估计把帧提升为三维点云，并随展开持续融合；每个新相机位姿到来时，相关点被重新渲染到查询视角，与当前文本和运动控制共同条件化视频扩散模型，使地点在长时间离开及多次重访后仍保持外观。实验测试长导航路径、闭环和场景返回，报告生成质量、几何一致性、身份保持、位姿遵循和记忆效率，并比较仅上下文与其他记忆方法；消融深度、位姿、融合、检索、渲染条件、记忆年龄和轨迹长度。

applications: Long-term spatial consistency in controllable video worlds

name: AR Forcing
title: AR Forcing: Towards Long-Horizon Robot Navigation World Model

summary.en: AR Forcing aligns diffusion-world-model training with the way a robot uses the model during navigation. At each training step, the model conditions on its own previously generated frame and trajectory state, then receives the standard diffusion loss for the next prediction. Repeating this within the training loop exposes the network to accumulated rollout contexts without changing its architecture. During planning, it autoregressively predicts observations and paths under navigation controls over long horizons. Experiments on RECON, SCAND, HuRoN, and TartanDrive evaluate image consistency, trajectory accuracy, planning success, known-environment performance, and zero-shot transfer. Comparisons use parallel teacher-forced training; ablations vary rollout depth, self-context schedule, gradients, diffusion steps, data domains, and context mixing.
summary.zh: AR Forcing 让扩散世界模型的训练方式与机器人导航时的使用方式一致。每个训练步中，模型以自己先前生成的帧和轨迹状态为条件，再对下一预测计算标准扩散损失；在训练循环内重复此过程，使网络无需改变架构就接触到会累积误差的展开上下文。规划时，它在导航控制下长程自回归预测观测与路径。RECON、SCAND、HuRoN 和 TartanDrive 实验评估图像一致性、轨迹精度、规划成功率、已知环境表现和零样本迁移，并比较并行教师强制训练；消融展开深度、自上下文计划、梯度、扩散步、数据域和上下文混合。

applications: Long-horizon diffusion world modeling for robot navigation

name: MindJourney
title: MindJourney: Test-Time Scaling with World Models for Spatial Reasoning

summary.en: MindJourney adds test-time visual exploration to a vision-language model. Starting from one image and a spatial question, the VLM proposes camera motions and a controllable world model generates the corresponding unseen views. Spatial Beam Search scores alternative imagined paths, retains promising branches, and stores informative views in an evidence buffer. The VLM answers only after this multi-step exploration, requiring no task training or model parameter update. Experiments on the SAT spatial reasoning benchmark use four VLMs, including closed and open models, and report question accuracy across geometric relations and difficulty levels. Comparisons and ablations vary the world model, search width and depth, action proposals, scoring, evidence selection, compute budget, and direct versus imagined reasoning.
summary.zh: MindJourney 为视觉语言模型加入测试时视觉探索。给定单张图像和空间问题，VLM 提出相机运动，可控世界模型生成相应的未见视角；Spatial Beam Search 为不同想象路径评分、保留有希望的分支，并把信息量高的视图存入证据缓冲，VLM 完成多步探索后才回答，无需任务训练或参数更新。SAT 空间推理基准实验使用四种开放及闭源 VLM，报告不同几何关系和难度的问题准确率，并比较和消融世界模型、搜索宽度与深度、动作提议、评分、证据选择、计算预算以及直接与想象推理。

applications: Test-time 3D imagination for spatial question answering

name: Episodic Spatial World Model
title: Building Spatial World Models from Sparse Transitional Episodic Memories

summary.en: The Episodic Spatial World Model builds a cognitive map from sparse, disconnected transition memories. Each episode records a local state, movement, and resulting observation rather than a full trajectory. A shared model retrieves relevant episodes and composes their spatial transformations across multiple hops, allowing it to infer relative locations and predict transitions not directly experienced. The representation can be updated by adding memories without reconstructing one global map. Experiments use controlled navigation worlds with varying coverage, disjoint trajectories, novel layouts, and query distances. Evaluation reports spatial prediction, map completion, uncertainty, and generalization. Analyses measure how integration path length affects confidence and how inserted shortcut memories change answers; ablations vary memory sparsity, retrieval, transition rules, and composition depth.
summary.zh: Episodic Spatial World Model 从稀疏且不连续的转移记忆构建认知地图。每条情节只记录局部状态、移动及所得观测，而非完整轨迹；共享模型检索相关情节并跨多跳组合空间变换，从而推断相对位置并预测未直接经历的转移。加入新记忆即可更新表示，无需重建单一全局地图。实验使用覆盖程度、离散轨迹、新布局和查询距离不同的受控导航世界，评估空间预测、地图补全、不确定性与泛化；分析整合路径长度如何影响置信度，以及插入捷径记忆如何改变答案，并消融记忆稀疏度、检索、转移规则和组合深度。

applications: Spatial inference and navigation from sparse episodic memory

name: WMA Agents
title: Web Agents with World Models: Learning and Leveraging Environment Dynamics in Web Navigation

summary.en: WMA agents add learned environment dynamics to language-model web navigation. A world model is fine-tuned on browser transitions to predict the next page state and task-relevant consequences of a proposed action. At each step, the policy generates several candidate clicks, form entries, or navigation commands; the model imagines their outcomes and a value function selects the candidate expected to advance the goal while accounting for irreversible effects. This planning layer does not require retraining the base policy. Experiments on WebArena and Mind2Web report task success, policy-selection accuracy, model calls, time, and monetary cost. Comparisons include direct agents and tree search; ablations vary world-model data, outcome format, candidate count, value scoring, horizon, and action risk.
summary.zh: WMA agents 为语言模型网页导航加入学习到的环境动力学。世界模型在浏览器转移数据上微调，预测候选动作后的页面状态与任务相关后果。每一步中，策略产生多个点击、表单输入或导航命令，模型想象其结果，价值函数再选择预计能推进目标且考虑不可逆影响的候选；这一规划层无需重新训练基础策略。WebArena 与 Mind2Web 实验报告任务成功率、策略选择准确率、模型调用、时间和费用，并比较直接智能体与树搜索；消融世界模型数据、结果格式、候选数量、价值评分、规划跨度和动作风险。

applications: World-model planning for long-horizon web navigation

name: WAC
title: World-Model-Augmented Web Agents with Action Correction

summary.en: WAC places a world-model correction loop before each web-agent action. A policy model proposes an operation from the current page and goal, while an environment-aware model supplies an alternative proposal and predicts how the page will change. The system evaluates progress, execution risk, and consistency between the imagined outcome and task requirements, then feeds this assessment back to refine the action before it reaches the browser. The loop supports clicks, typing, navigation, and other interface operations without rolling back a real mistake. Experiments on VisualWebArena and Online-Mind2Web report task success, action accuracy, correction frequency, and risk-related behavior. Ablations vary model collaboration, simulation, feedback, correction rounds, candidate sources, and state representations.
summary.zh: WAC 在每次网页智能体动作前加入世界模型纠正闭环。策略模型根据当前页面与目标提出操作，环境感知模型给出另一候选并预测页面如何变化；系统评估任务进度、执行风险以及想象结果与任务要求的一致性，再把结论反馈给策略，在动作真正送入浏览器前完成修正。闭环支持点击、输入、导航等界面操作，无需通过真实错误再回滚。VisualWebArena 与 Online-Mind2Web 实验报告任务成功率、动作准确率、纠正频率和风险相关行为；消融模型协作、结果模拟、反馈、纠正轮数、候选来源和状态表示。

applications: Pre-execution correction for web automation agents

name: MobileDreamer
title: MobileDreamer: Generative Sketch World Model for GUI Agent

summary.en: MobileDreamer gives a mobile GUI agent a lightweight textual world state for lookahead. A screen is converted into a sketch listing task-relevant interface elements, attributes, and spatial relations. Order-invariant training prevents arbitrary serialization from changing the state meaning. Conditioned on a tap, swipe, typing, or system action, the world model predicts the next sketch. Recursive imagination rolls several actions forward, and the agent scores these trajectories before selecting what to execute. Experiments on AndroidWorld report end-to-end task success, post-action element prediction, spatial accuracy, rollout quality, latency, and token cost. Comparisons include reactive GUI agents and screenshot predictors; ablations vary sketch fields, order invariance, rollout depth, candidate count, feedback, and model size.
summary.zh: MobileDreamer 为移动 GUI 智能体提供轻量文本世界状态用于前瞻。屏幕被转换为列出任务相关界面元素、属性和空间关系的草图，顺序不变训练避免任意序列化改变状态含义。世界模型根据点击、滑动、输入或系统动作预测下一草图，递归想象将多步动作向前展开，智能体比较这些轨迹后再选择执行。AndroidWorld 实验报告端到端任务成功率、动作后元素预测、空间精度、展开质量、延迟和标记成本，并比较反应式 GUI 智能体与截图预测器；消融草图字段、顺序不变性、展开深度、候选数量、反馈和模型规模。

applications: Structured world-model planning for mobile GUI agents

name: Agent World Model
title: Agent World Model: Infinity Synthetic Environments for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Agent World Model is a pipeline for synthesizing executable environments rather than predicting a single benchmark’s next state. It generates software-like worlds with SQL-backed state, tool APIs, observations, tasks, and programmatic verifiers, all exposed through a unified Model Context Protocol interface. Each environment runs in an isolated instance and supports multi-turn actions with persistent consequences. The released corpus contains one thousand environments and ten thousand tasks spanning everyday tool-use scenarios. Agents are trained by reinforcement learning entirely in these synthetic worlds and evaluated on three external benchmarks. The paper reports environment validity, task diversity, training scale, task success, and out-of-distribution transfer, with ablations on generation stages, verification, environment count, task count, and curriculum.
summary.zh: Agent World Model 是生成可执行环境的流程，而不是只预测某个基准的下一状态。它合成具有 SQL 后端状态、工具 API、观测、任务和程序验证器的软件式世界，并通过统一 Model Context Protocol 接口开放；每个环境在隔离实例中运行，支持后果持续存在的多轮动作。发布语料包含一千个环境和一万个日常工具使用任务。智能体完全在这些合成世界中进行强化学习，再在三个外部基准上评估。论文报告环境有效性、任务多样性、训练规模、任务成功率与分布外迁移，并消融生成阶段、验证、环境数量、任务数量和课程。

applications: Scalable executable environments for tool-use agent training

name: 4D Occupancy Forecasting
title: Point Cloud Forecasting as a Proxy for 4D Occupancy Forecasting

summary.en: This work reframes future LiDAR prediction as four-dimensional occupancy forecasting. Instead of generating only the points a moving sensor may observe, the model estimates whether any continuous space-time location is occupied, free, or unobserved. Ray geometry from future LiDAR frames provides self-supervision, while ego motion and occlusion are represented separately from scene dynamics. The resulting field can be queried for static structure and moving objects at arbitrary future times. Experiments on nuScenes, KITTI-Odometry, and Argoverse 2 compare point forecasting and occupancy approaches using conventional point metrics and geometry-aware occupancy measures. Analyses re-evaluate prior rankings and ablate visibility handling, temporal context, coordinate frames, query sampling, horizons, and static/dynamic components.
summary.zh: 该工作把未来激光雷达预测重述为四维占用预测。模型不只生成移动传感器可能看到的点，而是估计任意连续时空位置属于占用、自由或未观测；未来激光雷达帧的射线几何提供自监督，自车运动与遮挡则和场景动力学分开表示。所得场可在任意未来时刻查询静态结构与运动物体。nuScenes、KITTI-Odometry 和 Argoverse 2 实验用传统点指标及几何感知占用指标比较点预测与占用方法，并重新分析既有方法排序；消融可见性处理、时间上下文、坐标系、查询采样、预测跨度和静动态组件。

applications: Self-supervised geometric forecasting for autonomous driving

name: UnO
title: UnO: Unsupervised Occupancy Fields for Perception and Forecasting

summary.en: UnO learns a continuous four-dimensional occupancy world from unlabeled LiDAR sequences. Past point clouds are encoded into a scene representation, and an implicit network answers occupancy queries at arbitrary space-time coordinates. Future sensor rays supervise occupied, free, and unknown regions without object boxes, tracks, maps, or semantic classes. The learned features capture geometry and motion and are transferred to downstream occupancy, semantic, and forecasting heads with limited labels. Experiments across autonomous-driving datasets evaluate continuous occupancy, future geometry, semantic segmentation, object-related perception, and data-efficient transfer. Comparisons include supervised and self-supervised world models; ablations vary ray labels, unknown-space handling, query sampling, temporal history, coordinate encoding, feature transfer, forecast horizon, and labeled-data fraction.
summary.zh: UnO 从无标签激光雷达序列学习连续四维占用世界。过去点云被编码为场景表示，隐式网络可回答任意时空坐标的占用查询；未来传感器射线在无需物体框、轨迹、地图或语义类别的情况下监督占用、自由和未知区域。学习到的特征包含几何与运动，可在少量标签下迁移到占用、语义和预测任务头。多个自动驾驶数据集实验评估连续占用、未来几何、语义分割、物体相关感知和数据高效迁移，并比较监督及自监督世界模型；消融射线标签、未知空间、查询采样、时间历史、坐标编码、特征迁移、预测跨度和标签比例。

applications: Label-free world representation for driving perception and forecasting

name: UniWM
title: Unified World Models: Memory-Augmented Planning and Foresight for Visual Navigation

summary.en: UniWM unifies visual imagination and navigation control in a single autoregressive model. Camera observations, instructions, trajectories, and future visual tokens share one sequence, reducing mismatch between a separately trained world model and planner. A hierarchical memory retains detailed recent observations while summarizing longer route context, and imagined future frames and paths are generated together for action selection. Experiments on Go Stanford, ReCon, SCAND, HuRoN, zero-shot TartanDrive, and the 1X Humanoid Dataset evaluate navigation success, goal distance, trajectory error, long-horizon consistency, and transfer to high-dimensional control. Comparisons include navigation policies and separate world-model planners; ablations vary joint objectives, memory levels, context length, visual prediction, action tokens, and planning horizon.
summary.zh: UniWM 在一个自回归模型中统一视觉想象与导航控制。相机观测、指令、轨迹和未来视觉标记共享同一序列，减少独立训练世界模型与规划器造成的不一致；分层记忆保留细致近期观测并概括长程路线，想象未来帧与路径共同生成用于动作选择。实验覆盖 Go Stanford、ReCon、SCAND、HuRoN、零样本 TartanDrive 及 1X Humanoid Dataset，评估导航成功率、目标距离、轨迹误差、长时一致性和高维控制迁移，并比较导航策略与分离世界模型规划器；消融联合目标、记忆层级、上下文长度、视觉预测、动作标记和规划跨度。

applications: Memory-augmented visual navigation and humanoid control

name: AstraNav-World
title: AstraNav-World: World Model for Foresight Control and Consistency

summary.en: AstraNav-World jointly generates what a navigation agent will see and how it should move. A vision-language planner shares a probabilistic representation with a future-visual branch. Action Forcing conditions imagined frames on planned controls, while foresight features feed back into trajectory generation, keeping visual and action sequences aligned over long horizons. The model can roll forward and revise navigation decisions from incoming observations. Experiments span multiple embodied-navigation datasets and physical zero-shot deployments, reporting trajectory accuracy, success, goal progress, visual prediction, consistency, and unseen-scenario transfer. Comparisons include separate envision-then-plan systems and direct policies; ablations remove either branch, shared training, action conditioning, feedback, long-context VLM features, and rollout objectives.
summary.zh: AstraNav-World 联合生成导航智能体将看到什么以及应如何移动。视觉语言规划器与未来视觉分支共享概率表示，Action Forcing 让想象帧以规划控制为条件，前瞻特征再反馈到轨迹生成，使视觉与动作序列在长时域保持对齐；模型还能根据新观测继续展开并修正导航决策。实验覆盖多种具身导航数据和真实零样本部署，报告轨迹精度、成功率、目标进度、视觉预测、一致性及未见场景迁移，并比较分离的先想象后规划系统与直接策略；消融任一分支、共享训练、动作条件、反馈、长上下文 VLM 特征和展开目标。

applications: Unified future prediction and embodied navigation control

name: R-WoM
title: R-WoM: Retrieval-Augmented World Model for Computer-Use Agents

summary.en: R-WoM grounds an LLM world model for computer-use agents with environment-specific documentation. Tutorials and interface knowledge are indexed for retrieval. During planning, relevant passages condition both action-driven next-state simulation and reward prediction, supplying current details that may be absent from model parameters. The agent rolls candidate operations through this grounded simulator and selects a sequence expected to complete the task. The paper first probes transition and progress modeling, then evaluates the retrieval-augmented system on OSWorld and WebArena subsets. Metrics cover simulated-state accuracy, progress estimation, task success, and performance by planning horizon. Comparisons include ungrounded LLM world models and direct agents; ablations vary retrieval source, query, context, rollout depth, reward model, and documentation coverage.
summary.zh: R-WoM 用环境特定文档为计算机操作智能体的 LLM 世界模型提供落地信息。教程与界面知识被建立检索索引；规划时，相关段落同时条件化动作驱动的下一状态模拟和奖励预测，补充模型参数中可能缺失的当前环境细节。智能体在该落地模拟器中展开候选操作，并选择预计能完成任务的序列。论文先探测转移与进度建模能力，再在 OSWorld 和 WebArena 子集评估检索增强系统，指标包括模拟状态准确率、进度估计、任务成功率和不同规划跨度表现；消融检索来源、查询、上下文、展开深度、奖励模型和文档覆盖。

applications: Grounded world-model planning for computer-use agents

name: AdaWorld
title: AdaWorld: Learning Adaptable World Models with Latent Actions

summary.en: AdaWorld separates transferable visual dynamics from environment-specific action labels. During large-scale pretraining, a latent-action encoder infers compact motion controls between frames and a world model predicts future observations from those controls. For a new environment with a different action space, a small adapter learns to translate real actions into the pretrained latent action space using limited interactions. The adapted model then supports action-conditioned simulation and visual planning. Experiments span multiple environments with heterogeneous controls, reporting video prediction, action reconstruction, planning success, transfer quality, and interaction efficiency. Comparisons include training from scratch and fixed-action world models; ablations vary latent-action vocabulary, pretraining data, adapter size, interaction budget, fine-tuning layers, horizon, and planning method.
summary.zh: AdaWorld 把可迁移视觉动力学与环境特定动作标签分开。大规模预训练中，潜在动作编码器从相邻帧推断紧凑运动控制，世界模型依据这些控制预测未来观测；面对动作空间不同的新环境，小型适配器仅用少量交互把真实动作映射到预训练潜在动作空间，适配后的模型即可进行动作条件模拟和视觉规划。实验覆盖控制形式不同的多个环境，报告视频预测、动作重建、规划成功率、迁移质量和交互效率，并比较从头训练及固定动作世界模型；消融潜在动作词表、预训练数据、适配器规模、交互预算、微调层、跨度和规划方法。

applications: Adaptable action-conditioned simulation across environments

name: Motus
title: Motus: A Unified Latent Action World Model

summary.en: Motus is a unified latent-action model for visual understanding, world prediction, and robot control. A Mixture-of-Transformers connects experts initialized from language-vision understanding, video generation, and action modeling. A UniDiffuser-style schedule trains different combinations of text, images, video, latent actions, and robot controls. Latent actions represent pixel-level motion changes, providing a shared interface across internet video and heterogeneous embodiments. The same model performs instruction understanding, future-video generation, inverse dynamics, world modeling, and joint video-action prediction. Experiments evaluate simulation and real manipulation across tasks and robots, reporting success, transfer, generation, and action accuracy. Comparisons include VLA and world-action models; ablations vary experts, schedules, latent actions, data sources, joint objectives, and modality dropout.
summary.zh: Motus 是统一视觉理解、世界预测与机器人控制的潜在动作模型。Mixture-of-Transformers 连接由语言视觉理解、视频生成和动作建模初始化的专家，UniDiffuser 式调度训练文本、图像、视频、潜在动作和机器人控制的不同组合。潜在动作表示像素级运动变化，为互联网视频和不同机器人形态提供共享接口。同一模型可完成指令理解、未来视频生成、逆动力学、世界建模及视频—动作联合预测。仿真与真实操作实验跨任务和机器人评估成功率、迁移、生成及动作精度，并比较 VLA 与世界动作模型；消融专家、调度、潜在动作、数据来源、联合目标和模态丢弃。

applications: Unified multimodal world modeling and robot manipulation

name: Driving with LLMs
title: Driving with LLMs: Fusing Object-Level Vector Modality for Explainable Autonomous Driving

summary.en: Driving with LLMs connects an object-level numerical scene state to a pretrained language model for interpretable driving decisions. Cars, pedestrians, ego motion, route geometry, and traffic signals are encoded by a vector encoder and cross-attentive Vector Former, then aligned with language embeddings through structured vector captions. After driving-question fine-tuning, the model answers scene questions and emits acceleration, braking, and steering values that can be parsed for control. A simulator pipeline uses a reinforcement-learning expert and generated questions to build training data. Experiments evaluate vector grounding, perception fields, action prediction, and driving question answering against behavioral-cloning and language-model baselines with automated and human grading.
summary.zh: Driving with LLMs 将物体级数值场景状态接入预训练语言模型，用于可解释驾驶决策。车辆、行人、自车运动、路线几何与交通信号先由向量编码器和交叉注意力 Vector Former 表示，再借助结构化向量描述与语言嵌入对齐。经过驾驶问答微调后，模型既能回答场景问题，也能输出可解析为控制量的加速、制动和转向数值。训练数据由仿真器中的强化学习专家轨迹与生成式问题共同构成。实验系统评估向量落地、感知字段、动作预测和驾驶问答，并与行为克隆及语言模型基线比较，结合自动评分和人工评分验证结果。

applications: Object-level vector grounding, driving reasoning, and direct action prediction

name: SimLingo
title: SimLingo: Vision-Only Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving with Language-Action Alignment

summary.en: SimLingo is a camera-only vision-language-action model for closed-loop autonomous driving. An InternVL2-based backbone receives the front camera, speed, navigation command, and task prompt, then produces natural-language responses together with temporal waypoints or a geometric path. Its Action Dreaming procedure augments training with alternative ego trajectories whose collision and route outcomes are checked in simulation, while instruction tuning aligns linguistic explanations with driving actions. The system is evaluated in CARLA and Bench2Drive using closed-loop driving scores, route completion, infractions, and language-action measures. Experiments compare driving policies and vision-language models and analyze action representation, auxiliary tasks, data composition, and simulated trajectory augmentation.
summary.zh: SimLingo 是面向闭环自动驾驶的纯相机视觉语言动作模型。基于 InternVL2 的主干读取前视图像、车速、导航指令和任务提示，同时生成自然语言回答以及时间序列航点或几何路径。Action Dreaming 在仿真中构造替代自车轨迹，并检查其碰撞和路线结果以扩充训练；指令微调进一步对齐语言解释与驾驶动作。系统在 CARLA 和 Bench2Drive 中按闭环驾驶分数、路线完成率、交通违规及语言动作指标评估。实验比较驾驶策略与视觉语言模型，并分析动作表示、辅助任务、数据组成和仿真轨迹增强的作用。

applications: Vision-language-action driving with aligned language and waypoint outputs

name: DriveVLM
title: DriveVLM: The Convergence of Autonomous Driving and Large Vision-Language Models

summary.en: DriveVLM applies a large vision-language model to scene understanding and hierarchical planning for autonomous driving. Its chain-of-thought pipeline first describes the scene, identifies critical objects, and reasons over their attributes, motion states, and potential influence. It then generates a high-level meta-action, a textual decision description, and future trajectory waypoints. DriveVLM-Dual combines this semantic planner with a conventional 3D perception and planning branch so that geometric information and high-frequency control complement language reasoning. Experiments cover visual question answering, open-loop trajectory prediction, planning comparisons, and real-vehicle deployment. Ablations examine the reasoning stages, visual inputs, object information, trajectory refinement, branch fusion, and model scale.
summary.zh: DriveVLM 将大型视觉语言模型用于自动驾驶场景理解与分层规划。其思维链流程先描述场景、识别关键物体，并推理物体属性、运动状态及其潜在影响；随后依次生成高层元动作、文字决策说明和未来轨迹航点。DriveVLM-Dual 进一步把这一语义规划器与传统三维感知和规划分支结合，使几何信息与高频控制补充语言推理。实验覆盖视觉问答、开环轨迹预测、规划方法比较及真实车辆部署；消融分析推理阶段、视觉输入、物体信息、轨迹细化、双分支融合和模型规模，从而验证完整感知—推理—规划接口。

applications: Vision-language scene analysis, hierarchical planning, and vehicle control

name: DriveMLM
title: DriveMLM: Aligning Multi-Modal Large Language Models with Behavioral Planning States for Autonomous Driving

summary.en: DriveMLM aligns a multimodal large language model with executable behavioral planning states for autonomous driving. A multimodal tokenizer converts camera and sensor observations into the language-model interface, while instructions specify the planning task and driving context. The decoder jointly produces a natural-language explanation and structured behavioral decisions compatible with a modular driving stack. A data engine derives supervision from simulation and driving logs, and the resulting planner can be inserted into Apollo for closed-loop execution. Experiments include perception and planning question answering, behavioral-decision prediction, and CARLA Town05 Long closed-loop driving, with comparisons and ablations covering input modalities, instruction formats, model components, data generation, and planning-state alignment.
summary.zh: DriveMLM 将多模态大型语言模型与可执行的自动驾驶行为规划状态对齐。多模态标记器把相机和传感器观测接入语言模型，系统指令与用户指令共同规定规划任务和驾驶语境；解码器同时生成自然语言解释以及可与模块化驾驶栈衔接的结构化行为决策。数据引擎从仿真和驾驶日志中构造监督，训练后的规划器能够作为插件接入 Apollo 进行闭环执行。实验包括感知与规划问答、行为决策预测和 CARLA Town05 Long 闭环驾驶，并通过比较与消融分析输入模态、指令格式、模型组件、数据生成及规划状态对齐。

applications: Multimodal language-model alignment with executable behavioral planning states
